Friend,
A judge ruled that all of my court proceedings in Atlanta will be TELEVISED for the entire country to watch.
The Communist Democrats would love nothing more than for me to be stuck in court in a televised spectacle as a way to keep me off the campaign trail.
_But I refuse to play into the Left 's hands._
That's why I have waived my in-person formal arraignment and simply pleaded **" NOT GUILTY"** to the indictment in the Georgia witch hunt...
| [ ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=e195cc09dc9d497fbde5fb63747a6cd7&_e=8m-6T-2vsjvZiFfAx3-XiqpSAEdslqrq-QqCUL9I8jPX1qAxrJA4GgpnDrbQh1GywCGUTH5Za14lTSHfsKlHPwfH2oIo-dZsVHAR9gZXrpCEfON5DQd4frvs-kY___H5aiYqnxy4mXFD3Ysiy6XiLRIpsmVW9yiljrr9E6glZg3GYvzYfg1cVrCWhSEj4uRNtLUQJkKl9xLN9Cziy8WGcATNrmYJyv4WpmgKwZLzd77XmrNku8aKNOsjaFAWT_fpqk67HD0Ie3yV02avtguf_5hENKLOrwGwqhirzRCp6fO46-Z7N2LWZxy-0gfUFHjR88XcAuFGSyb2cjV5__cVDxu7H8iuUEAWtHHC5vbjxn2KIn49grewliaFbo-qHvttQRz73vH0PaC0hut4OfeORJzzFBgyMZdBcHAO9235qfkWMyfC5D5059X7ccwGFTue)

**_Why would I fly down to Atlanta just to hear over a dozen FALSE CHARGES brought against me on live TV?_**
Our country is hurting right now. Our border is in chaos, our dollar is losing value, our justice system is dead, our rights are being ripped from our hands, and our enemies abroad are plotting ways to exploit our weaknesses.
We have _serious_ matters to deal with - not televised charades orchestrated by Crooked Joe and his corrupt accomplices.
I'm going to focus on the REAL ISSUES that matter to Americans. And that's how we're going to win back the White House in 2024 and MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!

clean_body: | | | | See what Mike is up to! | Now that Labor Day has come and gone, Peter, it's time to update you on the latest happenings with Team Lawler as we transition into the fall season. Please take a moment to see how Congressman Lawler is fighting for YOU. | MIKE IN THE NEWS "Democrats Want to Flip N.Y. House Seats. But There’s a Primary Problem." "AOC makes stunning admission: 'Crisis in our backyard'" "New York seeks federal aid to mitigate surging migrant crisis: 'Absolute mess' | Fox News Video" "GOP anger grows over Biden admin's potential plea deal for suspected 9/11 architects | Fox News" "Lawmakers reflect on two-year anniversary of deadly Afghanistan bombing, pay respects to the 13 fallen heroes | Fox News" "House Republicans’ road to power runs through New York. Stefanik is driving. - POLITICO" | TOP SOCIAL MEDIA POSTS | | | | | | Mike Lawler is a Republican running for reelection in New York’s 17th Congressional District. He is passionate about standing with law enforcement and making our communities more safe, protecting Social Security and Medicare, fixing our crumbling roads and bridges, and restoring the SALT deduction to lower taxes and make New York more affordable. | | USE THE ADDRESS BELOW TO CONTRIBUTE BY CHECK LAWLER FOR CONGRESS PO BOX 87 SOUTH SALEM, NY 10590 GET YOUR MIKE LAWLER, NO CUOMO MERCH No New Yorker wants to call our Tappan Zee Bridge the “Governor Mario M. Cuomo Bridge”. Proudly send the message that you want the bridge restored as the Tappan Zee. | Are you interested in staying up-to-date on Mike Lawler's reelection battle? Don't miss out on the latest news and updates from his campaign! By texting "Lawler" to 85007, you can receive regular updates on Mike's campaign, upcoming events, and important news about the race. Text "Lawler" to 85007 today and join the fight for a brighter future for New York!_ Do you know someone who would be interested in supporting Mike Lawler’s reelection campaign for Congress? Don't keep it to yourself! Spread the word and remind your friends and family to join the fight for America’s future. Simply forward this message to five of your friends or family members who you think would be interested in staying up-to-date with Mike's campaign. FORWARD THIS EMAIL As we get closer to the 2024 election, Mike Lawler is more motivated than ever to continue our journey toward a better future for all New Yorkers. To stay up-to-date with our latest news and events, we encourage you to text "Lawler" to 85007 and follow us on social media, where we share updates, thoughts, and news about our progress. You can also opt others in by providing their email address and we will send them regular updates and important news about the campaign. | go.txting.io/7jAGfc Let's work together to ensure that Mike Lawler has the support he needs to make a real difference for New York! | | | | | = \- =

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Requesting your response, Derek
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| I don’t take corporate PAC money because that’s not who I seek to represent — you are. And you deserve to have your voice heard.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=3738%2E5257348%2EBfHy9K)
Hey Derek —
Every so often, our campaign team sends out surveys to supporters like you to gather your input and set our campaign’s priorities for the weeks and months ahead.
As I travel across the state of California, I’m attempting to meet with as many people as humanly possible. I’d love the chance to sit down and hear from you directly, Derek, but getting your response to my campaign’s Fall Survey is the next best thing.
So what do you say? [**Can I count on your response to our U.S. Senate campaign’s official fall survey?**](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1023?c0=engagement-20230905-fall-issues-survey.krHAcP&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_SUR_AC90_20230905_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=3738%2E5257348%2EBfHy9K)

---
I don’t take corporate PAC money because that’s not who I seek to represent — you are. And you deserve to have your voice heard.
Thanks for adding your input today.
— Adam

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: What Josh Hawley said about Citizens United…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
He’s willing to let massive corporations spend unlimited amounts of money to gut our communities and undermine our democracy. Just read for yourself:
#
Peter,
Since the Supreme Court ruled in favor of Citizens United, massive corporations have spent billions of dollars buying our elections.
**But here’s what Josh Hawley had to say about it:**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36274?refcode=em20230905-3702&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3702%2E614464%2Ee_0Pei)
Josh Hawley knows all about what Citizens United has done to our country — after all, they sent him big campaign checks!
When he celebrated their endorsement, he showed us exactly who he really is — just another corrupt politician willing to let these massive corporations spend unlimited amounts of money to gut our country and undermine our democracy.
**[DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY: CHIP IN NOW →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36274?refcode=em20230905-3702&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3702%2E614464%2Ee_0Pei)**
**I’m running to replace Josh Hawley without a cent from corporate PACs so that when I’m in the U.S. Senate, you’ll always know I’m fighting for real working people like you.** And that’s why I’m reaching out today, Peter.
Every day between now and November 2024 is an opportunity for us to get this message in front of voters and continue exposing Hawley for the fraud he is. But the only way we’ll be able to do that, AND fight back against the desperate attacks that are already coming from the DC insiders propping up his campaign, is with a flood of grassroots support from real people just like you.

clean_body: He’s willing to let massive corporations spend unlimited amounts of money to gut our communities and undermine our democracy. Just read for yourself: Peter, Since the Supreme Court ruled in favor of Citizens United, massive corporations have spent billions of dollars buying our elections. But here’s what Josh Hawley had to say about it: Josh Hawley knows all about what Citizens United has done to our country — after all, they sent him big campaign checks! When he celebrated their endorsement, he showed us exactly who he really is — just another corrupt politician willing to let these massive corporations spend unlimited amounts of money to gut our country and undermine our democracy. I’m running to replace Josh Hawley without a cent from corporate PACs so that when I’m in the U.S. Senate, you’ll always know I’m fighting for real working people like you. And that’s why I’m reaching out today, Peter. Every day between now and November 2024 is an opportunity for us to get this message in front of voters and continue exposing Hawley for the fraud he is. But the only way we’ll be able to do that, AND fight back against the desperate attacks that are already coming from the DC insiders propping up his campaign, is with a flood of grassroots support from real people just like you. subject: BREAKING: Don Jr.'s Upcoming Book Tour Through Illinois
body:
In the Trump world, loyalty means everything, and throwing support behind Ron DeSantis, who trails by over 40 points, is a non-starter.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/2d4daa41b688/breaking-don-jrs-upcoming-book-tour-through-illinois?e=1cb5fdae9e)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=cdc057addf-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_05_11_49&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-cdc057addf-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Illinois Review eBlast Powered By
https://kasparlaw.co/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=cdc057addf-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_05_11_49&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-cdc057addf-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
https://www.bestdental.org/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=cdc057addf-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_05_11_49&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-cdc057addf-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Donald Trump Jr. to Visit Illinois During Letters to Trump Book Tour as DeSantis Campaign Supporter Jeanne Ives Sends Emissaries in Hopes of Securing an Interview, Share Stage with VIP Guest (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/09/donald-trump-jr-to-visit-illinois-during-letters-to-trump-book-tour-as-desantis-campaign-supporter-jeanne-ives-sends-emissaries-in-hopes-of-securing-an-interview-share-stage-with-vip-guest.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=cdc057addf-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_05_11_49&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-cdc057addf-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/09/donald-trump-jr-to-visit-illinois-during-letters-to-trump-book-tour-as-desantis-campaign-supporter-jeanne-ives-sends-emissaries-in-hopes-of-securing-an-interview-share-stage-with-vip-guest.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=cdc057addf-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_05_11_49&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-cdc057addf-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
(Source: Winning Team Publishing website)
Donald Trump Jr., the eldest child of President Donald J. Trump will be making several stops in Illinois (https://www.mcgopac.com/event-details/exclusive-event-with-donald-trump-jr?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=cdc057addf-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_05_11_49&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-cdc057addf-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) next month as part of a national book tour to promote Letters To Trump (https://45books.com/products/letters-to-trump?gclid=CjwKCAjwo9unBhBTEiwAipC117f9zORpnkCNqhVIdbNgPsVWYaYFYCbLTvVCFMIC1DjGhqXUjx8l-RoCi7UQAvD_BwE&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=cdc057addf-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_05_11_49&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-cdc057addf-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) – a 319-page book that captures the private correspondence between President Trump and some of the biggest names in history over the last 40 years.

The book is published by
Winning Team Publishing (https://45books.com/pages/about-us?gclid=CjwKCAjwo9unBhBTEiwAipC11xjpN4Y4BbYB_Y35m9tvCMEcG53nLJoE-mExdRdIXhnVbbJobK1AtRoCNY8QAvD_BwE&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=cdc057addf-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_05_11_49&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-cdc057addf-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , where Donald Trump Jr. is a co-founder. The book, which hit number 1 on Amazon’s bestseller list is a fascinating collection of letters from Oprah Winfrey, Presidents Richard Nixon and Bill Clinton, now-King Charles, John F. Kennedy, Jr., Sen. Ted Kennedy, Princess Diana and North Korean President Kim Jong Un.

The book also includes a letter that Donald Trump sent to former IL Gov. Rod Blagojevich shortly after he was fired on Celebrity Apprentice in 2010.
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/09/donald-trump-jr-to-visit-illinois-during-letters-to-trump-book-tour-as-desantis-campaign-supporter-jeanne-ives-sends-emissaries-in-hopes-of-securing-an-interview-share-stage-with-vip-guest.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=cdc057addf-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_05_11_49&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-cdc057addf-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
President Trump speaks at the book launch party for his latest book, Letters To Trump at his Mar-a-Lago estate on April 24, 2023. (Photo credit: Illinois Review)
But as preparations are underway for the VIP visit, sources can confirm to Illinois Review that local IL GOP leader, radio host and state central committee member Jeanne Ives, who announced in May that she was backing Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis’ campaign (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/06/il-gop-leaders-join-billionaire-ken-griffin-in-supporting-gov-ron-desantis-presidential-campaign-including-jeanne-ives-and-richard-porter.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=cdc057addf-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_05_11_49&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-cdc057addf-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) for president – recently sent emissaries to try and secure special “VIP” treatment during the high profile visit, including a request for an interview with Trump Jr. on her Sunday evening radio show and a request to speak on stage during one of the stops on the book tour – but the requests were all denied.

In the Trump world, loyalty means everything – and throwing one’s support behind DeSantis, who trails President Trump by over
40 points (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/08/breaking-records-over-200-million-people-tuned-into-tuckers-interview-with-trump-as-vivek-dominated-desantis-on-gop-primary-debate-stage-and-trump-makes-ratings-history.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=cdc057addf-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_05_11_49&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-cdc057addf-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , is a non-starter.

https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/09/donald-trump-jr-to-visit-illinois-during-letters-to-trump-book-tour-as-desantis-campaign-supporter-jeanne-ives-sends-emissaries-in-hopes-of-securing-an-interview-share-stage-with-vip-guest.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=cdc057addf-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_05_11_49&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-cdc057addf-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
A giant cake commemorating the launch of Letters To Trump is on display at Mar-a-Lago during the private book launch party hosted by President Trump on April 24, 2023. (Photo credit: Illinois Review)

In April, President Trump hosted a small gathering of about 60 attendees, all handpicked by the former president to attend a private Letters To Trump book launch party (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/04/an-evening-at-mar-a-lago-exclusive-president-trump-private-book-launch-party-for-letters-to-trump.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=cdc057addf-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_05_11_49&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-cdc057addf-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) which was hosted in the White and Gold Ballroom of his Palm Beach estate, Mar-a-Lago.

The mega-exclusive event was held on a day when Mar-a-Lago is closed – but the luxurious estate remained open for the former president and his special guests.

Former Democratic Illinois Gov. Rod Blagojevich, who’s prison sentence was commuted by President Trump on February 18, 2020, made a surprise appearance after the former president extended a special invite to his former Celebrity Apprentice contestant.
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/09/donald-trump-jr-to-visit-illinois-during-letters-to-trump-book-tour-as-desantis-campaign-supporter-jeanne-ives-sends-emissaries-in-hopes-of-securing-an-interview-share-stage-with-vip-guest.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=cdc057addf-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_05_11_49&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-cdc057addf-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Former Illinois Gov. Rod Blagojevich, D, left and IR editor-in-chief Mark Vargas, right, who worked with President Trump’s team on the Blagojevich presidential commutation, pose with President Trump at Mar-a-Lago just prior to the Letters To Trump book launch party on April 24, 2023. (Photo credit: Illinois Review)
Special guests of the former president also included former Arizona governor candidate Kari Lake, US Rep. Ronny Jackson, R-TX, US Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene, R-GA, Ambassador Richard Grenell and former New York City Mayor Rudy Giuliani.

https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/09/donald-trump-jr-to-visit-illinois-during-letters-to-trump-book-tour-as-desantis-campaign-supporter-jeanne-ives-sends-emissaries-in-hopes-of-securing-an-interview-share-stage-with-vip-guest.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=cdc057addf-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_05_11_49&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-cdc057addf-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
IR publisher and Trump family friend Scott Kaspar, center, and Gov. Blagojevich, right, browsing through an advanced copy of Letters To Trump on the evening of the private book launch party at Mar-a-Lago on April 24, 2023. (Photo credit: Illinois Review)
An hour before the event, several of the guests gave media interviews, including Blagojevich, in designated areas in the main residence at Mar-a-Lago, as the former President chatted with several guests, including with Trump family friend and IR publisher Scott Kaspar and IR editor-in-chief Mark Vargas, in the living room of his lavish estate.

A more detailed schedule of the book tour will be posted on Illinois Review when it becomes available.

https://youtu.be/PlQKgUZ_uXU?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=cdc057addf-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_05_11_49&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-cdc057addf-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Friend,

name: Chris to Congress
subject: You’re Invited to My Campaign Kickoff at Balletto Vineyards
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY COMMITTEE TO ELECT CHRIS COLOUMBE TO CONGRESS
body:
I’ll see you at 6:30pm on Thursday, September 14, at Balletto Vineyards. It is a great spot, deeply rooted in the history of the North Coast, and a special place to launch the campaign alongside my closest supporters.

| | |
---
---
Dear Friend, **I would like to invite you to a special evening on Thursday, September 14, at Balletto Vineyards in Santa Rosa.** Then and there, I will officially announce my candidacy for the 2nd Congressional District, representing the North Coast in Washington, D.C. I’ll have more to say at Balletto, but I’ll tell you this now: Last year, in just 90-days and with a small team, **I came within 700 votes of defeating a man who was backed by the party and campaigned for 18 months**. No one except for my supporters thought we stood a chance. **We proved everyone wrong.** This time, we are publicly launching with 5 months until the primary and several months of ground work complete, and we have a thorough plan to qualify for the battle that really matters: the general election versus Jared Huffman, who has overstayed his welcome as our representative in Congress. **I’ll see you at 6:30pm on Thursday, September 14, at Balletto Vineyards**. It is a great spot, deeply rooted in the history of the North Coast, and a special place to launch the campaign alongside my closest supporters. **RSVPs are preferred. To RSVP, simply reply to this email or click the invitation graphic below.** See you soon,

**Chris Coulombe**
Republican Candidate for U.S. Congress**
******
---
* * *
---

body:
And we're giving you a chance to spread that dream

| |

| | | | [](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=0ccbc413e22e405eb239b749658fa5b7&_e=VZLyy3nHD3aZxm5TO2KKkDI_qiD_vSihzXep2_kaEnYXqSqTWmYHRtGwdwLBpQ0y1rHl3M1zAj0iD3FTgRGwz-ixdxMB9Dyx4rr9hHi1KZvCr_ACCZk7BYL9GT0EEKZMUXDFRptLXsHXWToyp1Z0-KwL0POqA5MOwUnLAj0mfUgA1UlaXJPbM9FYf84iveUsBMopFAnJYXjBA8mfFhH6aRM7pvOxr11aWsGv2XfQkERB8QwU4L62yLmJmWwDL7tqZFgQFQEKk5tC1GFGTvaI-7WH-YBR2UjKNyGDggq0kRNfjcoiDL3sJ-jOjNqGIBARGETYPHikpEaV3TxOW17WI64hDbmWYNywHZpWsEWNEflzEkKflLilW6EdlX1zBxFoCgWeYJmtRz-QLUfhGPbyB50Tp2PB8hp_RkWNZOm9kAUTzcd6aF_tfMCbSr3lHcmS)

As the daughter of Indian immigrants, Nikki Haley was taught to love God & country. Her parents sacrificed so much to pursue the American Dream & Nikki's story is an American story.

She wasn't given an easy path when she worked in her mother's dress shop in Bamberg, SC, at age 12. But, she learned the value of hard work & the key to prosperity.

When working as a CPA, she realized those in elected office were too comfortable with the status quo. Nikki ran for the state legislature & unseated a 35-year incumbent. No one thought it was possible.
---
| | | [STAND WITH NIKKI >> STAND FOR AMERICA](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=0ccbc413e22e405eb239b749658fa5b7&_e=VZLyy3nHD3aZxm5TO2KKkDI_qiD_vSihzXep2_kaEnYXqSqTWmYHRtGwdwLBpQ0y1rHl3M1zAj0iD3FTgRGwz-ixdxMB9Dyx4rr9hHi1KZvCr_ACCZk7BYL9GT0EEKZMUXDFRptLXsHXWToyp1Z0-KwL0POqA5MOwUnLAj0mfUgA1UlaXJPbM9FYf84iveUsBMopFAnJYXjBA8mfFhH6aRM7pvOxr11aWsGv2XfQkERB8QwU4L62yLmJmWwDL7tqZFgQFQEKk5tC1GFGTvaI-7WH-YBR2UjKNyGDggq0kRM8hadzxrytO9fGH-gPHT9hKIByTkt4Mt2PqT8GsqJvJEt5jg7pNyhePMOa_4mX4QLdY2saT-9dcZUephhkIiZ5rx2DnXoCWUr20Wq1xw4B7x2wZ428MAJblrvD5kQho3NF957Y9UWZL2vStAJNrjcZ)
---
She became a voice for freedom & government transparency - demanding American values be protected & corrupt ideals (and politicians) rejected.

She launched a race for governor & was polling in single digits. She had little name ID & limited resources. But she won, becoming the first female to lead the state. A two-term champion of economic growth, she earned her state a nickname: Beast of the Southeast.

Trump took notice & named her U.S. Ambassador to the UN, where she fought to restore American strength. She stood toe-to-toe with the world's totalitarian leaders & reversed the script. America would no longer feed the hand that bit her.

American freedom and strength matter and are being destroyed by Biden & the Left.

The American Dream is on the line in 2024 & Nikki is running for president to take back our country. Will YOU unite with thousands of conservatives and join Team Haley, Friend?

**[If you stand for America, stand with Nikki by donating $25, $50, or even $100 to help spread the American Dream.](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=0ccbc413e22e405eb239b749658fa5b7&_e=VZLyy3nHD3aZxm5TO2KKkDI_qiD_vSihzXep2_kaEnYXqSqTWmYHRtGwdwLBpQ0y1rHl3M1zAj0iD3FTgRGwz-ixdxMB9Dyx4rr9hHi1KZvCr_ACCZk7BYL9GT0EEKZMUXDFRptLXsHXWToyp1Z0-KwL0POqA5MOwUnLAj0mfUgA1UlaXJPbM9FYf84iveUsBMopFAnJYXjBA8mfFhH6aRM7pvOxr11aWsGv2XfQkERB8QwU4L62yLmJmWwDL7tqZFgQFQEKk5tC1GFGTvaI-7WH-YBR2UjKNyGDggq0kRO76Gt2higN0Rj1xIS7y1zOxclABqzRv2fWBVH1CVYKSIrZ3lT2p5RmpVq-uXZpdHTP6Yoc-n74VWcaA-jyJRYUFSiUo2oHS4OjLLUMFcWiQasKtkbtKaXiMivNeuTzHJzZ2oCUzdQGnCXjhgpywbUb "If you stand for America, stand with Nikki by donating $25, $50, or even $100 to help spread the American Dream. clean_body: And we're giving you a chance to spread that dream | | | | | | As the daughter of Indian immigrants, Nikki Haley was taught to love God & country. Her parents sacrificed so much to pursue the American Dream & Nikki's story is an American story. She wasn't given an easy path when she worked in her mother's dress shop in Bamberg, SC, at age 12. But, she learned the value of hard work & the key to prosperity. When working as a CPA, she realized those in elected office were too comfortable with the status quo. Nikki ran for the state legislature & unseated a 35-year incumbent. No one thought it was possible. | | | She became a voice for freedom & government transparency - demanding American values be protected & corrupt ideals (and politicians) rejected. She launched a race for governor & was polling in single digits. She had little name ID & limited resources. But she won, becoming the first female to lead the state. A two-term champion of economic growth, she earned her state a nickname: Beast of the Southeast. Trump took notice & named her U.S. Ambassador to the UN, where she fought to restore American strength. She stood toe-to-toe with the world's totalitarian leaders & reversed the script. America would no longer feed the hand that bit her. American freedom and strength matter and are being destroyed by Biden & the Left. The American Dream is on the line in 2024 & Nikki is running for president to take back our country. Will YOU unite with thousands of conservatives and join Team Haley, Friend? "If you stand for America, stand with Nikki by donating $25, $50, or even $100 to help spread the American Dream. " God Bless, Team Haley | | Paid for by SFA Fund, Inc. name: Jacky Rosen via Zak for Congress
subject: I hope this resonates with you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ZAK FOR CONGRESS
body:
#
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/23-rosen-split?amount=10?source=em230905-zm-jr-split-90do&refcode2=414_8507_WZx-Jj&akid=414%2E8507%2EWZx-Jj)

Can I tell you the story of how I first got involved in politics?

While serving as the president of Nevada's largest synagogue, I was recruited to run in a competitive House race to help flip a red seat blue. Looking back, it's incredibly fitting that this was my entry point to public service – **because my Judaism is at the very core of my work in the Senate today.**

**In fact, my decision to say "yes" and run for public office in the first place was guided by the Jewish principle of Tikkun Olam – which means to leave the world a better place than how we found it.**

Now, as the third Jewish woman and only former synagogue president in Senate history, I'm proud to serve Nevada and our country. And as we face everything from growing antisemitism to attacks on reproductive freedom to threats to tear down our very democracy, I'm as committed as ever to keep fighting to better this world and make positive change happen. **But I need your help.**

**Mitch McConnell's handpicked candidate has launched his campaign to defeat me, and recent polling shows me _2 points down_ in the race that experts say will likely decide Senate control. So please, I'm humbly asking:**

[_If the principle of Tikkun Olam resonates with you – if you're with me in the fight to continue making progress for the people and communities that we love – will you chip in $10 or more today - to split between my campaign and Zak Mallamed for Congress - to help me defend my seat in Nevada and our Democratic Senate majority?_](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/23-rosen-split?amount=10?source=em230905-zm-jr-split-90do&refcode2=414_8507_WZx-Jj&akid=414%2E8507%2EWZx-Jj)

If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Split $25 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/23-rosen-split?amount=10?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em20230829-ca-split-el&refcode2=414_8507_WZx-Jj&akid=414%2E8507%2EWZx-Jj) [Split $50 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/23-rosen-split?amount=10?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em20230829-ca-split-el&refcode2=414_8507_WZx-Jj&akid=414%2E8507%2EWZx-Jj) [Split $150 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/23-rosen-split?amount=10?express_lane=true&amount=150&refcode=em20230829-ca-split-el&refcode2=414_8507_WZx-Jj&akid=414%2E8507%2EWZx-Jj) [Other Amount ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/23-rosen-split?amount=10&amount=30&refcode=em20230829-ca-split-el&refcode2=414_8507_WZx-Jj&akid=414%2E8507%2EWZx-Jj)

Jacky

name: Senator Ted Cruz
subject: If this is true, he needs to be impeached
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Hunter Biden has no marketable skills. No one in their right mind would pay him to do anything. | **“If Joe Biden took bribes—he should be impeached, removed, and thrown in jail.”
-Ted Cruz**
Peter,

There are bank records showing that the Biden family and associates took MILLIONS of dollars from corrupt officials in foreign governments (Russia, Ukraine, and Kazakhstan) during Joe Biden’s time as the United States’ vice president.

**_These allegations are serious, and they deserve to be investigated._** However, so long as Joe Biden and his allies run the Justice Department, there aren’t going to be any investigations into the president’s business dealings.

My colleagues in the House, James Comer, and Jim Jordan, have uncovered mounds upon mounds of records, bank statements, and emails that provide more than enough evidence of wrongdoing to open such proceedings.

I want to know where YOU stand, Peter. name: Felix Frisch
subject: Dad
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Adam for Colorado
body:
It’s Felix Frisch – Adam Frisch’s son. When my dad told us that he was going to run against Lauren Boebert in 2022, I did what most 16-year-olds would do: I took a year off from school to be involved in the campaign.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69263307/425596149/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWVlMjczYy00ZTRjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zUFBW4Nq5kXevPmNZ3ZEeSPxZvFxHIEWIpxY3xksDpE=&emci=150a738a-4d4c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=85ee273c-4e4c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=19445147)
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69263308/425596150/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWVlMjczYy00ZTRjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zUFBW4Nq5kXevPmNZ3ZEeSPxZvFxHIEWIpxY3xksDpE=&emci=150a738a-4d4c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=85ee273c-4e4c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=19445147)
Hey there. It’s Felix Frisch – Adam Frisch’s son.
When my dad told us that he was going to run against Lauren Boebert in 2022, I did what most 16-year-olds would do: I took a year off from school to be involved in the campaign.
Technically, I went “online” for school – and yes, I definitely missed all my friends. But I wouldn’t go back and change it for the world.
My dad and I hitched a trailer to our red pickup truck and crisscrossed the entire district, taking turns at the wheel. He shook hands with voters, while I organized 130 interns virtually to make 700,000 phone calls for the campaign.
It felt like a 24,000-mile father-son road trip; just my dad, me... and the thousands of people we met at every stop along the way.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69263309/425596151/1610638071?refcode=em20230905pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=85ee273c-4e4c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWVlMjczYy00ZTRjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zUFBW4Nq5kXevPmNZ3ZEeSPxZvFxHIEWIpxY3xksDpE=)
The campaign was hard. My sister and I knew they’d probably make up and say a lot of false things about our dad. But hearing and seeing the lies all over TV and social media is another thing entirely.
It was all worth it, though. We made hundreds of stops, met so many people, ate so much good food... And Dad came _so close_ to winning and defeating Boebert! It was an experience I’ll never forget.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69263310/425596152/1610638071?refcode=em20230905pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=85ee273c-4e4c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWVlMjczYy00ZTRjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zUFBW4Nq5kXevPmNZ3ZEeSPxZvFxHIEWIpxY3xksDpE=)
Now, Dad’s running again, and I know that, with your help, he _will_ defeat Lauren Boebert this time.
**[It means a lot that people like you have got his back. So if you can, please make a donation now to my dad Adam Frisch’s campaign and help him defeat Lauren Boebert in 2024.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69263311/425596153/1610638071?refcode=em20230905pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=85ee273c-4e4c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWVlMjczYy00ZTRjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zUFBW4Nq5kXevPmNZ3ZEeSPxZvFxHIEWIpxY3xksDpE=)**
Thanks for everything you can afford to do for my dad and his campaign. It means a lot to him – and to our entire family.
Felix

| **[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69263312/425596154/1610638071?refcode=em20230905pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=85ee273c-4e4c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWVlMjczYy00ZTRjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zUFBW4Nq5kXevPmNZ3ZEeSPxZvFxHIEWIpxY3xksDpE=)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Eigel?=
subject: BILL EIGEL LAUNCH EVENT | ONE WEEK - *RSVP and BRING 10 FRIENDS!*
body:
Can you help us invite people to this very exciting event? | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us21.campaign-archive.com/?e=c00a6982d2&u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=e1c5ef9e78)
---
| |
---
| | My fellow patriots -

We are one week away from this special [campaign launch event](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=5712030708&e=c00a6982d2).

Many of you have [RSVP](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=b59bd5d87d&e=c00a6982d2)'d, and _we are looking so forward to seeing you_.**Would you mind passing this email along to ten of your friends? **I don't want anyone to miss out on this incredible event.

If you haven't [RSVP](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=58268ecc84&e=c00a6982d2)'d - please do so today!

**_*RSVP for launch_** [**_here_**](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=ef312c50c6&e=c00a6982d2)** _*_**

Missouri is short on leadership. The Show-Me State has stagnated economically and fallen behind other big red conservative states because of a Swamp in Jefferson City that refuses to accomplish what the People desperately need. Our culture is in the midst of a war of ideas on the role of government—we need a wartime leader with the backbone and willingness to take on the powerful special interests in our state that are profiting at the expense of the People. I will be that leader, and unlike many politicians, I've **always** done what I said I was going to do.

**_*RSVP for launch_** [**_here_**](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=09b067dcd8&e=c00a6982d2)** _*_**

The Eigel for Governor Exploratory campaign started in October 2022 to determine if sufficient support and interest existed to elect a bold, conservative reformer. By every metric we set since October of 2022, we have seen an unbelievable response from the People of Missouri. Our exploratory campaign has garnered [national attention](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=b5f0612af4&e=c00a6982d2) for our small dollar fundraising network. In the second quarter of 2023, Eigel received more than 41,000 donations from over 20,000 donors. At an average donation of under $20, this represents more single donations than ANY other candidate running for the Republican gubernatorial nomination in their state anywhere in the United States for 2024.

**_*RSVP for launch_** [**_here_**](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=030328843e&e=c00a6982d2)** _*_**

**It's time for a reckoning for the Jefferson City Swamp; I will be that reckoning. **

The event on September 8th will be held at Smartt Field at the St. Charles County Regional Airport. Tickets to the event are **FREE** **but[you must RSVP.](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=21a043cd99&e=c00a6982d2)

DOORS OPEN: 4:30pm
Food will be served from 4:30pm to 5:30pm, so get there fast! **

**_*RSVP for launch_** [**_h_**](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=0d9c76f72e&e=c00a6982d2)**[ _ere_](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=807bd8da00&e=c00a6982d2)**** _* or _****send an email to [mofreedom2024@gmail.com](mailto:mofreedom2024@gmail.com)**** stating your: Name, Email, Contact Phone, and Address**

**LET'S GO MISSOURI!**
---
| [Support Bill Eigel](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=05b67d5d04&e=c00a6982d2 "Support Bill Eigel")

Eigel for Missouri398 Patriotic TrailWeldon Spring, MO 63304

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/profile?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=010dc0790a&e=c00a6982d2&c=e1c5ef9e78) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=010dc0790a&e=c00a6982d2&c=e1c5ef9e78).

name: Working Families Party
subject: Join UAW President Shawn Fain for a virtual labor solidarity rally
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St
body:
This Sunday, September 10th at 7PM ET, we’re hosting a virtual rally with the UAW, MoveOn, and allies to show our solidarity with union members gearing up to take on the three biggest U.S. automakers. | | | Peter,
**At 11:59 PM on Thursday, September 14th nearly 150,000 auto workers’ contracts will expire — setting up what could be one of the largest strikes of the year.** Right now, the United Auto Workers (UAW) union is in intense negotiations with General Motors, Ford, and Stellantis, demanding pay increases, improved benefits and pensions, an end to the tiered wage system, and job security for all workers during the transition to electric vehicle production as part of their new contract agreement. But, if the companies refuse to reach a fair deal by the expiration date of the existing contract, UAW members have authorized the union to call a strike against the companies. **This Sunday, September 10th at 7PM ET, join us for a virtual rally with the UAW, MoveOn, and allies as we show our solidarity with union members gearing up to take on the three biggest U.S. automakers.** **[You don’t want to miss this. Click here to RSVP now.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDN_AKdF4M0u5pGQ87M_sP-cGYGWrDFVb05z_d7bYwkuq1Wd5R2yAKqeyBlJLpnIaY4xc-gz5CgkftCuTNeMDUcK74BI4_Z5oFCEu1FJSa0G9LEfFDzJg2u1CCz6JkMYmgcykOOMhwjAwBsyEYmevYz5ApxSuKZJIBjiFuasawo9iJzNBdFWIuXgEdnrXOO6yT_GzxywjmMhlW75Lr5cPycnnDIoaNbFGfGy-rPryyCJSOmIS1xr50RpWvmE1kI5GXaKMEFDGG_VBHuzShg4QXOS0K4BCuJiYB-zzWF49sjonVjPrhX52rFv_Z90sa_Fs9g/3zd/PXv9tzjhTgS4Tmn1rx65Hg/h0/s57LM3d9ageJJL9BQn16wQB6hzsPkfV8QHIV9YkEtbE)** **_[](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDN_AKdF4M0u5pGQ87M_sP-cGYGWrDFVb05z_d7bYwkuq1Wd5R2yAKqeyBlJLpnIaY4xc-gz5CgkftCuTNeMDUcK74BI4_Z5oFCEu1FJSa0G9B402hHMoFUUTSYz5P7vK-3PGo9uab-ry-RslhLhy4OeObXJjD8UcQz9F3AHri98wVJpp2Xxe0S2bIMAiT_KAsMP7gA1vC7zYnc-cXL1C8iEJ6SH1MtiZ6XZuJZNPVazeHw6ayn0a_ua1qTl2vABSsc2QwZTezTEC75vbkTZ1UwzSTIfIpFI5knbhOgL_TJ4FkHjN4_TKKXwTh4k7_sUGng/3zd/PXv9tzjhTgS4Tmn1rx65Hg/h1/6c7BsRtJIfoRHd8ZygEULVI5_be5pqd3VkD5PFWeL10)_****__** **[RSVP now »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDN_AKdF4M0u5pGQ87M_sP-cGYGWrDFVb05z_d7bYwkuq1Wd5R2yAKqeyBlJLpnIaY4xc-gz5CgkftCuTNeMDUcK74BI4_Z5oFCEu1FJSa0G93dXlwBaR6H5We7byPX7zm29H_xAcW2zzKo6fanTgDUE7tHWfyBj4AiHyd8ztg-zWtN2Xwnsb8zgFPDXlFuWiell27FGihjUL5L_WwymXWjn_-u3GRCpuVHDJYsb9klGm5pECVgfFi7f3tPLvLp8vlfG1fYhnbKS_M7QLMcrFi_ZYppMJym_81Qwqq4kV5A4R6F2eEzUUS129fvdBQb6FFA/3zd/PXv9tzjhTgS4Tmn1rx65Hg/h2/h9ZYIkVFaou--tp9_nfcwj6vqWcRsLj1KxDcfvVbB6Q)** We'll hear from UAW President Shawn Fain, who will update us with the latest on what's happening at the bargaining table, and how we can best support workers heading for strike. clean_body: This Sunday, September 10th at 7PM ET, we’re hosting a virtual rally with the UAW, MoveOn, and allies to show our solidarity with union members gearing up to take on the three biggest U.S. automakers. | | | Peter, At 11:59 PM on Thursday, September 14th nearly 150,000 auto workers’ contracts will expire — setting up what could be one of the largest strikes of the year. Right now, the United Auto Workers (UAW) union is in intense negotiations with General Motors, Ford, and Stellantis, demanding pay increases, improved benefits and pensions, an end to the tiered wage system, and job security for all workers during the transition to electric vehicle production as part of their new contract agreement. But, if the companies refuse to reach a fair deal by the expiration date of the existing contract, UAW members have authorized the union to call a strike against the companies. This Sunday, September 10th at 7PM ET, join us for a virtual rally with the UAW, MoveOn, and allies as we show our solidarity with union members gearing up to take on the three biggest U.S. automakers. We'll hear from UAW President Shawn Fain, who will update us with the latest on what's happening at the bargaining table, and how we can best support workers heading for strike. Special guests, including U.S. Representative Rashida Tlaib and WFP National Director Maurice Mitchell, will also join us to share stories of solidarity and why all of us need to join the struggle for a fair contract. Ready to join the fight? In solidarity, Working Families Party Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[Click here](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-e-pkdjjhd-didthutlhu-dr/) [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pkdjjhd-didthutlhu-r/) **September 5, 2023** Friend - It's a busy time for everyone but we hope you had a chance to have one last summer hurrah and enjoyed your Labor Day weekend.Read our latest update below! -Team WisGOP | [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pkdjjhd-didthutlhu-y/) On Thursday, the First Lady, Jill Biden joined Tammy Baldwin to speak with the [National Education Association ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pkdjjhd-didthutlhu-j/)and the [American Federation of Teachers](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pkdjjhd-didthutlhu-t/), reaffirming the Biden Administration's union-first, student-last agenda.Wisconsin students are struggling [academically; ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pkdjjhd-didthutlhu-i/)Wisconsin parents, [financially](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pkdjjhd-didthutlhu-d/). Yet, Baldwin and the Biden administration [believe that appeasing the teacher's unions ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pkdjjhd-didthutlhu-h/)who [slow-walked schools re-opening](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pkdjjhd-didthutlhu-k/) and label concerned parents as ["domestic terrorists"](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pkdjjhd-didthutlhu-u/) was the best way to kick-off the new school year. But who's shocked that Baldwin showed where her loyalty lies -- she has been [bankrolled by the teachers' unions](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pkdjjhd-didthutlhu-o/) for years.WisGOP [held a press call](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pkdjjhd-didthutlhu-b/) featuring Rep. Amanda Nedweski, Rep. Cindi Duchow, and other wonderful moms from across the state to address the performance of concerns and failures of Democrats ahead of the new school year. Moms Maggie, Stephanie, and Ginna discussed everything from absences and achievement gaps as a result of COVID lockdowns to teachers dictating anything but "appropriate" curriculum in the classroom. While many topics were covered, one major theme remained clear: Baldwin and the Biden Administration are out-of-touch with the needs of Wisconsin students and uninterested in the rights of Wisconsin parents. In case you missed it, the Governor's office has no policy for supervisor-subordinate relationships. The [Milwaukee Journal Sentinel uncovered ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pkdjjhd-didthutlhu-a/)the Chief-of-Staff to Tony Evers has given a 80% pay raise in the last 4 years to her significant other. And what is the Governor's response? It's none of Wisconsin taxpayers business.Just yesterday, another reporter questioned Evers again. [Evers doubled down](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pkdjjhd-didthutlhu-f/) on why his office is excluded from having a policy.
---

[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pkdjjhd-didthutlhu-z/) On August 23, the Republican Party hosted the first Primary Presidential Debate in Milwaukee. Under Biden, America has suffered from record high [inflation](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pkdjjhd-didthutlhu-v/), [increased crime](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pkdjjhd-didthutlhu-e/) in major cities, an uncontrolled border [crisis](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pkdjjhd-didthutlhu-s/), and [much more.](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pkdjjhd-didthutlhu-g/) Candidates explained to voters how, as President, they would work to remediate the disasters caused by weak Democrat leadership. While Republicans highlighted many fantastic alternatives to Biden, Wisconsin Democrats tried to rewrite reality, claiming Wisconsinites are satisfied with [the 'Biden boom,'](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pkdjjhd-didthutlhu-w/) but Chairman Schimming was quick to point out that ['the President's numbers are upside down in almost every poll.'](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pkdjjhd-didthutlhu-yd/) Biden's disastrous record is unexplainable, and while the Democrats may try to hide his failures with cheesy-lines, the truth remains that Americans do not [support](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pkdjjhd-didthutlhu-yh/) President Biden. [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pkdjjhd-didthutlhu-yk/) [Over Labor Day weekend](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pkdjjhd-didthutlhu-yu/), the Biden administration took another chance to gaslight voters on what the economy looks like.The reality is that Wisconsin workers are worse off under Bidenomics:
* [Inflation is up nearly 16%](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pkdjjhd-didthutlhu-jl/) since January 2021.
* Food prices are up nearly 20% since January 2021.
* Paychecks are worth less.
* Delinquencies are [rising](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pkdjjhd-didthutlhu-jr/),
* [Real wages](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pkdjjhd-didthutlhu-jy/) are down.
* There's [d](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pkdjjhd-didthutlhu-jj/)[eterioration](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pkdjjhd-didthutlhu-jt/)" in the jobs market.

[SIGN UP TO BE POLL WORKERS!](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pkdjjhd-didthutlhu-ji/)
---

# **In Case You Missed It**
[**WisGOP Statement on FLOTUS visit to Madison, Wisconsin**](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pkdjjhd-didthutlhu-jd/)
"Jill Biden's visit to Madison shows who is top of mind, not only for the Biden administration, but for Tammy Baldwin - who is beholden to the teachers' unions. As Wisconsin students head back to school, Wisconsin parents won't forget that Baldwin spent their time appeasing the teachers' unions and praising the Biden administration who have [vilified parents](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pkdjjhd-didthutlhu-jh/), allowed the [unions](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pkdjjhd-didthutlhu-jk/) to [lock students out of the classroom](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pkdjjhd-didthutlhu-ju/), and [waged war on girls' sports](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pkdjjhd-didthutlhu-tl/).
[**THE REPUBLICAN POINT: TWO YEARS AGO, JOE BIDEN SHOWED THE TYPE OF PRESIDENT HE IS**](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pkdjjhd-didthutlhu-tr/)
Two years ago today, Joe Biden repeatedly looked at his watch during the dignified transfer of the American heroes killed in the attack on the Kabul airport during the Afghanistan withdrawal.
[**THE REPUBLICAN POINT: FACT-CHECKING BIDEN'S "EXPLAINER ON 'BIDENOMICS'**](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pkdjjhd-didthutlhu-ty/)
A few days ago, Joe Biden released an absurd [whiteboard explainer on 'Bidenomics'](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pkdjjhd-didthutlhu-tj/) in which he awkwardly held a marker and lied about his economic agenda.
**[WisGOP Chairman Brian Schimming Tapped for RNC 's State Chairmen's Advisory Committee](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pkdjjhd-didthutlhu-tt/)**
Ahead of the Republican National Committee's (RNC) summer meeting in Milwaukee next week, Republican Party of Wisconsin Chairman Brian Schimming was named Midwestern Regional Co-Chairman for the RNC's State Chairmen's Advisory Committee. This appointment comes from Chairman Ronna McDaniel -- showcasing once again the importance of Wisconsin.
**[Liberal Supreme Court Makes Unprecedented Move Ahead of Protasiewicz Swearing In](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pkdjjhd-didthutlhu-ti/)**
Janet Protasiewicz and the Democratic Party of Wisconsin have begun to leverage their new liberal majority to their advantage. Before Protasiewicz was even sworn into office, the liberal Justice Jill Karofsky informed the director of the state courts system, Randy Koshnick, he would be fired.
**[WisGOP, RNC, Rock and Walworth County GOPs File to Intervene in Election Integrity Lawsuit](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pkdjjhd-didthutlhu-td/)**
Following the Elias Group's recent lawsuit, the Republican Party of Wisconsin (WisGOP), Republican National Committee (RNC), along with Walworth County GOP, Rock County GOP, and RITE PAC [filed to intervene](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pkdjjhd-didthutlhu-th/) in a recent election integrity lawsuit, [Priorities USA v. Wisconsin Election Commission](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pkdjjhd-didthutlhu-tk/).

subject: President Biden is in shambles after being caught in this damaging lie
body:
TheFederalistWire.com

DAILY NEWS | September 06, 2023

President Biden is in
shambles after being caught in this damaging lie
Joe Biden's policies have
been disastrous for the American people. But his inability to get
his facts straight, are making things even worse.

And President Biden is in
shambles after being caught in this damaging lie.
➞ Continue Reading

TRENDING NEWS

Top Republican sends Joe
Biden one warning that's keeping him up at night

The President and his
lackeys are barely treading water. His scandals are massive with
no end in sight.
➞ Continue Reading

Trump smacked Joe Biden
across the face with this big reality check

Former President
Donald Trump is done playing the nice guy. He's on a mission to
clear his name.
➞ Continue Reading

This impeachment trial has
put President Biden on notice

The process of
impeachment should be used sparingly. But always used when a
politician is caught red-handed.
➞ Continue Reading

ABOUT
US
The
Federalist Wire brings you dependable news that highlights the US
political landscape as well as the economy. We're here for
citizens who want to stay in the know. If you're particularly
interested in politics or economics, our regular news updates
will help keep you informed. If you're not especially interested
in the topics but know it's important to keep up, then our
reports will be simple to understand.

You know that the political and
economic worlds often collide, and that's why we provide you with
specific coverage. Our news team strives to pinpoint and report
the stories that interest you most. We keep our eyes on domestic
and international matters, both political and financial, so we
can help you stay on top of the latest happenings.

DISCLAIMER
Your privacy is important to us.
It is The Federalist Wire's policy to respect your privacy and
comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across
our website, and other sites we own and operate.

subject: Most newspapers are not on your side
body:

**FROM THE DESK OF MONICA CROWLEY** Throughout my career, I've been on both sides of the media equation.** ** I've been honored to serve two presidents and to have seen the inside of newsrooms from Fox News to MSNBC.** ** Bad journalism is everywhere. Most newspapers have chosen a side, and it's not yours. Instead of holding the corrupt and powerful accountable, they are protecting them. They are a menace to our republic.** ** But good journalism still exists - and it's thriving at The New York Sun! Founded in 1833, 18 years before the New York Times, the Sun puts that paper to shame.** ** The Sun is committed to "safeguarding liberty" and "speaking out the sentiment" of the American people. Principled and relentless, it's a paper that fights for us. Its editors are some of the smartest and fairest in the business, including famed editor-in-chief Seth Lipsky.** ** The Sun is making waves, but it's up against the biggest and best funded media giants in the industry.** ** The Sun has a secret weapon though: readers like you and me who are committed to joining the effort to build a better press. That's how we do it in America.** ** Membership starts at just 1c a day. You can't beat that! So please join me in this groundbreaking effort.** ** The New York Sun needs us, and America needs The New York Sun.
---

**Sign up today and make a real difference.**** ****See you on the other side!**

**Monica Crowley** Subscriber, The New York Sun

name: Team WisGOP
subject: Be A Poll Worker!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF WISCONSIN NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
Make our elections more secure
No images? [Click here](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-e-pkhkiid-didthutlhu-o/) [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pkhkiid-didthutlhu-r/)
### Friend,
Have you signed up to be a poll worker yet? Poll workers are crucial in the fight for more secure elections! By working the polls, you are the first line of defense in ensuring our elections are secure and free of fraud. As we work to ensure ballot security across Wisconsin, we are calling on supporters like you, friend, to help us by becoming a poll worker today. name: ICYMI News
subject: C.S. Lewis's Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions

| This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z53unoh5htc2gnjp9odlc3v7gr4v0sfkpkgh540o_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjie2ob2cjh2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z34nefr4q2giuqf6tlhqsalp3ui06t24rmb3oj48_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjie2ob2cjh2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zs56ls4f48f8vh4t37eel5kjslqthke9uka58mso_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjie2ob2cjh2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z6akeauq673ktacj2aga774sksgqnqouknk1fr6o_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjie2ob2cjh2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

ICYMI News
---

subject: Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning...

**The Truth About
The Coming Crisis** This might be your only warning... According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite the severity of the situation, the mainstream media has chosen to remain silent. And our own government has ignored the dire warnings of industry experts. Experts like a fourth-generation American farmer who warns of the impending crisis: **"Food shortages are coming."** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Well, no need to worry anymore... When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... name: Pro Life Update
subject: C.S. Lewis's Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions

| This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zjol7t82q2kguh4cg1spm0jj9g87qu527231aorg_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjie1o32chh2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z0mhkm7sj9coa7d8vjtsnb7hagvrto8em25rv52o_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjie1o32chh2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zeonatkb212ahbkndhidecdc00kuc870ibqf7ft8_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjie1o32chh2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zvaq98ul4m5f2727f5ji4ebf2uk67qr2hda84hjg_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjie1o32chh2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Pro Life Update

clean_body: C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions | This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read. His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century. That's why we produced "" which you can now own on DVD. | | | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including: good and evil, conversion and faith, prayer and the Bible, suffering and death, * heaven and hell, and much more. Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis and After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man, and the co-editor of The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns! This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity. That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with . Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College | | Pro Life Update 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Ann Coulter
subject: Hi, it’s Ann.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 1776 Project PAC
body:
This may be the first time you’ve heard from me in a while, but this is important.

| | | Friend, this is Ann Coulter.
---
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c676769%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3Qhn8L4R76QRvKAUYP6lEw&sysid=1)
---
**[I’m reaching out to you today because America is in deep trouble, and I wanted to see if you could help me fight back. ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c676760%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=EboWmV%2f%2b94ZOVvtRkfhiog&sysid=1)** Before you ask, no: I’m not talking about the Presidential election. I’m not talking about threats from China. I’m not even talking about Joe Biden or the madhouse that’s happening in Washington, D.C.. **_I’m talking about the all out assault that the radical left is waging against parents and students across the country._** You’ve seen what’s happening in our schools. Parents are being lied to by teachers, investigated by the FBI for protesting at school board meetings, and shut out of crucial conversations about their kids’ mental health. Explicit pornographic material is being handed to students in school libraries. Critical Race Theory and hardcore marxist ideologies are being taught as the gospel to children K-12. Test scores are plummeting nationwide as school officials claim that MATH and MERIT are “racist systems.” And in some extreme circumstances, minors are being groomed to become transgender and rebel against their Christian upbringing... And all of this is happening in secret, behind the backs of parents. Friend, none of what’s happening in our nation’s schools is an accident. Rather, it’s the consequence of a 30 year long campaign from leftist billionaires like George Soros designed to infiltrate our education system from the ground up. **The good news is that, for the first time EVER, patriots like you and I have a way to fight back.** Allow me to introduce you to the 1776 Project PAC: **This Political Action Committee was founded by my friend Ryan Girdusky to counteract what Soros and Company have been doing for decades by influencing local school board elections.** Take it from me: Ryan’s team at the 1776 Project PAC is the best there is. Since they were founded a little over 2 years ago, they’ve: ✅**Liberated** MILLIONS of students from left wing leadership in their local school boards ✅**FIRED** 132 radical left wing school board members across the country ✅**Endorsed** and developed rock solid plan to support over 100 MORE conservative school boards candidates THIS November, 2023 Point blank: No other organization is doing what Ryan Girdusky and the 1776 Project PAC are doing. **[But they can’t do this without your help. Could you do me a personal favor and send in a donation of $17.76 or more to help the 1776 Project PAC get brave conservative school board candidates elected nationwide?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c676761%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=sxMgh5Pi1%2byJP4JW7%2b74eg&sysid=1)** **Friend****, if p atriots like you and I don’t stand up today, America’s destiny will be determined by a generation who was raised on Critical Race Theory, Radical Gender Ideology, and outright MARXIST ideas.** We cannot let that happen. **[That’s why I’m hoping and praying that you’ll join me in supporting the 1776 Project PAC as they fight to take back our schools with a donation of just $17.76 today.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c676762%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TKyXgjoqbBAu0t%2fGH3WavA&sysid=1)** Thank you for taking the time to review this message. God Bless You, Ann Coulter, On Behalf of the 1776 Project PAC

clean_body: Polls continue to show Donald Trump holding a strong chance of beating Joe Biden and winning a second term. | | | Polls continue to show Donald Trump holding a strong chance of beating Joe Biden and winning a second term. But Democrats have a back-up plan in place. And Donald Trump got some really bad news about getting kicked off the ballot in 2024. name: Gun Rights Survey from the NRA
subject: Joe Biden doesn’t want you to take this Official Survey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Rifle Association of America
body:
They don't want you to take this survey
[Unsubscribe](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oW_1YzUDN0)
We are helping NRA fundraise. Questions? 1(800)672-3888

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62219552:W_1YzUDN0:m:1:2627245898:4B11B6A29A48ECB849BA4859124368F9:r)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62219552:W_1YzUDN0:m:1:2627245898:4B11B6A29A48ECB849BA4859124368F9:r)

Friend,

_Gun rights have always been one of the most sacred freedoms in America._

That's why our Second Amendment was the VERY NEXT IDEA that the Founding Fathers protected in the Bill of Rights after the right to free speech. _They knew how crucial it is for law-abiding Americans to be able to defend themselves without government infringement._

Now, over 200 years later, protecting the Second Amendment has never been more important. Studies and data show that Americans need to be able to defend themselves, and we've found that enthusiasm within our movement has never been stronger. To know for sure, our team just released the **Official Armed Citizens Survey** , and we'd love to see your response.
**[COMPLETE THE SURVEY»](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62219552:W_1YzUDN0:m:1:2627245898:4B11B6A29A48ECB849BA4859124368F9:r)**
The NRA is deeply committed to serving all law-abiding American gun owners by fighting for their CONSTITUTIONALLY GUARANTEED RIGHTS. Your responses to this survey will help our Association best meet YOUR NEEDS.
**[COMPLETE THE SURVEY»](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62219552:W_1YzUDN0:m:1:2627245898:4B11B6A29A48ECB849BA4859124368F9:r)**
This **Official Survey** just went live, and we'll be collecting the first batch of responses at **11:59 tonight.**

_Friend, can you complete the survey now so our team can read your responses as quickly as possible?_

**[Please complete the OFFICIAL ARMED CITIZENS SURVEY before 11:59 tonight to make sure your responses go to the TOP of our list.>>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62219552:W_1YzUDN0:m:1:2627245898:4B11B6A29A48ECB849BA4859124368F9:r)**

**[OFFICIAL ARMED CITIZENS SURVEY](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62219552:W_1YzUDN0:m:1:2627245898:4B11B6A29A48ECB849BA4859124368F9:r)**
**Do you believe that all law-abiding American adults should have the right to bear arms?**

**[YES»](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62219552:W_1YzUDN0:m:1:2627245898:4B11B6A29A48ECB849BA4859124368F9:r)**

**[NO»](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62219552:W_1YzUDN0:m:1:2627245898:4B11B6A29A48ECB849BA4859124368F9:r)**

**[COMPLETE THE SURVEY»](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62219552:W_1YzUDN0:m:1:2627245898:4B11B6A29A48ECB849BA4859124368F9:r)**

Thank you,

NRA HQ

**[COMPLETE THE SURVEY»](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62219552:W_1YzUDN0:m:1:2627245898:4B11B6A29A48ECB849BA4859124368F9:r)**

Paid for by the National Rifle Association of America

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)

name: Viktor Valencia Avalos
subject: Viktor for Congress.
body:
Dear Mr./Mrs. Willis, I wanted to reach out and let you know that after speaking with the Democratic Party in Tarrant County I have decided to run for Tarrant County Sheriff. If you are still interested in participating or receiving information please let me know. I have included the new website and facebook page for the new campaign.

Thank you,

Viktor J. Valencia Avalos
Viktorforsheriff.com
<https://www.facebook.com/viktorforsheriff/>

<https://twitter.com/viktorjva>
