name: Jaiden (Gadsden Flag)
subject: I was kicked out of school. Here’s what’s next…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Libertas Institute
body:
I’m guessing you saw me in the news last week.

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c676771%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fj1u3ESK2vCHDjYkRw4xRA&sysid=1 "Tuttle Twins")

Dear Friend,

I’m guessing you saw me in the news last week. I’m the 12-year-old boy who was kicked out of class in my school in Colorado because I had a “Don’t tread on me” Gadsden flag patch on my backpack.

The vice principal claimed that it was tied to slavery. (Totally false!) And they wouldn’t let me come back to class until I removed the patch.

You might not know why this story got so many views -- over 40 million so far!

After I was kicked out of class, I talked with my mom about what to do. I remembered in one of the Tuttle Twins books how the kids got the media involved to fight against some corruption in the government.

[The Tuttle Twins helped me stand up for what I believe in. I want to help them ship their pro-American history books to schools and families. Can you chip in $25 or more today?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c676772%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=MUdrFTMP4L8PSnp3IyClbw&sysid=1)

[Support Tuttle Twins >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c676773%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Uu7U%2fZtYlc7CQMu3ITgfBg&sysid=1)

I asked my mom if we could drive over to the local TV station. She agreed, so I went up and rang the doorbell of their office. Here I am:

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c676771%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fj1u3ESK2vCHDjYkRw4xRA&sysid=1)

Nobody would speak with me. I felt defeated -- this was a story that needed to be told! My 1st amendment rights were being violated. Why didn’t other people care?

Then, my mom decided to reach out to Connor Boyack that night. He’s the author of the Tuttle Twins books -- and I’m a huge fan. Connor agreed to share the video my mom had recorded of the vice principal, and now it seems like everyone has seen it!

I’m definitely a little more popular at school now, haha. Lots of other kids are now putting Gadsden flag stickers on their lockers.

I was interviewed by a lot of people afterward. When I talked with Ben Shapiro, he asked me why I knew so much about politics and American history. Here’s what I told him:

_“I give it mainly to Connor Boyack with his Tuttle Twins books. I read those growing up, and that really, really helped me. And now I have a good understanding of America and all sorts of key concepts.”_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c676771%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fj1u3ESK2vCHDjYkRw4xRA&sysid=1)

I’m so happy that Connor shared my story. But what’s next?

Well, one day, I want to run for governor of Colorado. I have to be 30 years old, so that will be in the future.

There is something I can do in the meantime. I can use this attention for good. I can pay it forward. I can get other kids to learn the same things I’ve learned so when the time comes up, they can stand up for themselves, too.

Connor, my mom, and I have been talking over the past few days about what we can do to use this moment for good. And this email is one of the ideas -- we can use my story to encourage people like you to help us.

**So here is what we are doing:**

Connor and his team have some new American history books that teach the ideas of freedom and the founding fathers. They’re so much better than the textbooks we have to use in school that don’t really teach history with any kind of depth.

**I want more kids to be able to read these history books. So we are launching a fundraiser to raise $25,000 this week, and we will use the money to ship history books to schools across the country -- with a heavy focus on my state, Colorado.** 😀

[Will you stand up with me and help me? I’m super excited by this. Please donate here -- every $25 donation covers the cost of the book and shipping to a library or classroom.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c676774%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UuornquCh4GAvynXi0DEHQ&sysid=1)

[Donate $25 = 1 Book Distributed >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c676785%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yOBWQ5ysUoL0lyg1kniJdw&sysid=1)

[Donate $50 = 2 Books Distributed >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c676786%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2f%2boHZtmMS%2byObkYre7twAA&sysid=1)

[Donate $100 = 4 Books Distributed >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c676787%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BKqKZ%2buNlDVSvv5hq7zF2Q&sysid=1)

[Donate $200 = 8 Books Distributed >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c676788%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=uQtty7e7axKxB5uphyQJwg&sysid=1)

[Donate $500 = 20 Books Distributed >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c676789%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DSbf0LIOhiDQmUBl%2fK1hIA&sysid=1)

[Donate $1,000 = 40 Books Distributed >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c676780%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=J2nvD%2bEL6mtQnkQotQ%2b1Qg&sysid=1)

**What’s super cool about this is Connor has a big donor who is passionate about this, and they agreed to double everyone’s donations!** So, let’s say you want to sponsor 5 books for students. That means you’ll actually do 10 books when your donation is matched!

I knew how to act when my school tried to shut me down because I’d been learning these ideas for years. Because of the Tuttle Twins, I know what my rights are and how to stand up for them. People like Connor and you have been part of my story, and I’m grateful.

Now, we have to use this moment for good, and I hope you’ll stand with me to make a difference. So many other kids need to learn what I have. It’s education -- real, true, good education -- that will make sure other kids don’t get tread on, too:

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c676771%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fj1u3ESK2vCHDjYkRw4xRA&sysid=1)

Let’s use this momentum to find more Jaidens -- and get them learning today! I’m pumped to work with the author of my favorite books to help even more kids learn what I have.

[So please support our project today! Donate here:](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c676781%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UoF%2fXqfc8hjd7hA32FYnww&sysid=1)

[Donate $25 = 1 Book Distributed >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c676785%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yOBWQ5ysUoL0lyg1kniJdw&sysid=1)

[Donate $50 = 2 Books Distributed >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c676786%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2f%2boHZtmMS%2byObkYre7twAA&sysid=1)

[Donate $100 = 4 Books Distributed >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c676787%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BKqKZ%2buNlDVSvv5hq7zF2Q&sysid=1)

[Donate $200 = 8 Books Distributed >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c676788%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=uQtty7e7axKxB5uphyQJwg&sysid=1)

[Donate $500 = 20 Books Distributed >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c676789%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DSbf0LIOhiDQmUBl%2fK1hIA&sysid=1)

[Donate $1,000 = 40 Books Distributed >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c676780%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=J2nvD%2bEL6mtQnkQotQ%2b1Qg&sysid=1)

I’m just a 12-year-old kid. I have to focus on my school work and my family, but this is a great opportunity for me to make a difference while I get ready for my gubernatorial campaign 18 years from now.

I hope you can support us! In the meantime, stay free and stay strong!

Jaiden (Gadsden Flag)

Paid for by Libertas Institute

American Update
---

name: American Action News
subject: C.S. Lewis's Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions

| This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zf0lmb906t2r2tdkdik1qms1s8klufts746muf48_rp22sh2s8i66p71c1g68or6chh2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zm29k21rm5i2ons6mjnsgo26ds6uh1e60f59sbeo_rp22sh2s8i66p71c1g68or6chh2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdvdsd0sjgmd9gmq37f9d4tjanrdh7d4lv8pk25o_rp22sh2s8i66p71c1g68or6chh2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zk0q6sggov3i9e2i73rl4g3uu3n5tvj085a32ppo_rp22sh2s8i66p71c1g68or6chh2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

American Action News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: The Federalist Wire
subject: This shocking accusation could change everything for Barack Obama
body:
TheFederalistWire.com

DAILY NEWS | September 06, 2023

This shocking
accusation could change everything for Barack Obama
Former President Obama is
one of the most influential voices in the Democrat Party. But now
his influence may have gone too far.

And this shocking accusation
could change everything for Barack Obama.
➞ Continue Reading

TRENDING NEWS

President Biden is in
shambles after being caught in this damaging lie

Joe Biden's policies
have been disastrous for the American people. But his inability
to get his facts straight, are making things even worse.
➞ Continue Reading

Top Republican sends Joe
Biden one warning that's keeping him up at night

The President and his
lackeys are barely treading water. His scandals are massive with
no end in sight.
➞ Continue Reading

Trump smacked Joe Biden
across the face with this big reality check

Former President
Donald Trump is done playing the nice guy. He's on a mission to
clear his name.
➞ Continue Reading

ABOUT
US
The
Federalist Wire brings you dependable news that highlights the US
political landscape as well as the economy. We're here for
citizens who want to stay in the know. If you're particularly
interested in politics or economics, our regular news updates
will help keep you informed. If you're not especially interested
in the topics but know it's important to keep up, then our
reports will be simple to understand.

You know that the political and
economic worlds often collide, and that's why we provide you with
specific coverage. Our news team strives to pinpoint and report
the stories that interest you most. We keep our eyes on domestic
and international matters, both political and financial, so we
can help you stay on top of the latest happenings.

DISCLAIMER
Your privacy is important to us.
It is The Federalist Wire's policy to respect your privacy and
comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across
our website, and other sites we own and operate.

TheFederalistWire.com

525-K East Market Street # 114

City: Leesburg
State: Virginia
Zip Code: 20176
Contact Email:
today@thefederalistwire.com

Dear Friends,

Today, the General Assembly gavels in at 10am. We have a budget to vote on.

I'm all in for tax cuts, but not in for more programs and spending. We need to return any excess funds back to the people.

[Here's the the link to the Senate version of the budget.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zcysIS3sKrG6iBT_0ZqNt-YBTYrNpxl_oEA5d7AuXeTVbb_ixYPv4Az_OeggWoskCpj_VK1m0rjz_KAox-zh6JHQzpyOz0htkw_pUHw2jZ3-t1HYZjBG33WYO-LlWI02y-LWw_LJtA3EI8jH1AztzrqMq3F946BySGW4n12Qk2CEHPiJU3jYMQVw0yOKh0hF0ZBYbtFpDldXAoQYTcoM_XsiWWm-H1LZfmBjPISq5PE8ceWoZxVozKOxJ9_l7Jymr3Fr7540QrYQiF5240zGSQZEjqAAlzpAmRyHBLV1lvObXuowwa2yic6YSjDGbH_8&c=7hSDOfldfj6YUh190KJmH6DNT2HbrckMGrukrUgNTvWOQ9RcPZUtAg==&ch=sh8_8DebaIPV0uouOcRlTolWGacEyEcDWXN5o84r3RHuPTlzpUsvaQ==)

As a founder of the Transparency Caucus, I encourage you to [view today's Special Session, linked here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zcysIS3sKrG6iBT_0ZqNt-YBTYrNpxl_oEA5d7AuXeTVbb_ixYPv4JQzYBEptSuzbD4lN9szoOD0ct7eMwtIK3d3uAKM7G8dNrBijbNwtrHH3T1tfbvjoajSeNd9B2dp9brbPjaJOKIHcCypo12j1GWYWw__2fFaRckRg0_l77n5EhfZsNJ5IxoRCmuNUzrCDpqxjv-ELzE=&c=7hSDOfldfj6YUh190KJmH6DNT2HbrckMGrukrUgNTvWOQ9RcPZUtAg==&ch=sh8_8DebaIPV0uouOcRlTolWGacEyEcDWXN5o84r3RHuPTlzpUsvaQ==).

For God & Country,
Amanda Chase

name: Jon Tester
subject: Peter, did you know?
body:
this is personal...
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1f3cd03e-860b-4055-ae27-4cbee6190822/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, Did you know that not a single state bordering Montana has a Democratic Senator? In fact, I’m the only statewide-elected Democrat in Montana. That’s why I spend every single day fighting so hard, not just for my own constituents, but for everyone who lives in a farm town like me — especially folks without any Democratic senators looking out for them. Because while Washington Republicans might choose wealthy corporations over dirt farmers, side with Big Pharma instead of teachers, or listen to their big donors and ignore the rest of us, I will always work for you. When you make a donation to my campaign, you’re not just supporting me. You’re giving me the resources to fight back against Mitch McConnell’s disastrous policies and work to protect our progress — for all of us. [So, if you can, I’m personally asking you to split a $10 or more donation between Blue Amp Action and my campaign to help us reach our critical fundraising goal. We’re slightly behind right now and anything you can give keeps me fighting for you in the Senate.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tae70b326-fcc8-46c9-9313-ec6deabae83a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Chip in $5 now!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdaf60806-e62f-4987-a351-e15244661089/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **[Chip in $10 now!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T92ae7e63-fdc3-4e43-b70e-63e41d2bb17c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **[Chip in $25 now!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T11d3dfb9-b66c-40be-a127-9978d6679fd0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **[Or, donate another amount](https://default.salsalabs.org/T206c13e0-808f-402c-85a0-cf345cb9f9cd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**
|
---
| | | | |
---
| Politics isn’t a game. Lives and livelihoods are put at stake when Washington Republicans continuously choose shady donors over everyday Americans. That’s why I’m fighting so hard for working families in Montana and across the country. — Jon [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T61cb13b8-e8c8-47e0-897f-91fc38cc56c9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5008a8a8-f191-4de0-8ec7-54e695d5864a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.
---
|
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---

name: Nikki Haley
subject: Can I ask an important question?
body:
I'm headed to New Hampshire on Tuesday for back-to-back events

| |
---
| | |
---
| | | Friend,

I'm headed to New Hampshire on **Tuesday** for back-to-back events, **[and I need you on my side more than ever.>>](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1f5d36567ae84d3d8743395e442d2391&_e=BBnC2Za6tQb_yAJdzHiKDsmQULnu2uOhdp4dwGUjeJbKBSTShiByBq_g0A0AgpxXAcSnqgHFYauEC3kA_K0K2kya6LBhGLWgFm3_tVOsNcywN4VcMR0Nd7o3tdNNZ6mcJUqWynmJIfbKkIa9pZKPAlnSAr3QqEU3u5Og4AzAAsECXvXiZB6oZo1DmxngTbMz6eBEhK7Yfgo8RfmdvSZF7e8UL4rF5nW4jO6sJxa9rPFy8f9RP0eW6LPFBc7yxNyde-0KbEhPcFabe11oU4Cd-nWyvso62Zh27aCNXCqrLsXzBydA_0fco8wvvfCRohu3Qtr0JE9I2R14OvThsUJDvHjxddt-Ss1k_k_yWO4JxugJUXs4qBydfImafeeg-ICkkXzLjkOUx0zxcbUZTJjSdA%3D%3D "and I need you on my side more than ever. >>")**

So, I have an important question to ask you.

**[If you have even $7 or more to spare, can you rush a donation to help fuel my fight?](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1f5d36567ae84d3d8743395e442d2391&_e=BBnC2Za6tQb_yAJdzHiKDsmQULnu2uOhdp4dwGUjeJbKBSTShiByBq_g0A0AgpxXAcSnqgHFYauEC3kA_K0K2kya6LBhGLWgFm3_tVOsNcywN4VcMR0Nd7o3tdNNZ6mcJUqWynmJIfbKkIa9pZKPAlnSAr3QqEU3u5Og4AzAAsECXvXiZB6oZo1DmxngTbMz6eBEhK7Yfgo8RfmdvSZF7e8UL4rF5nW4jO6sJxa9rPFy8f9RP0eW6LPFBc7yxNydL1WsAh85u2yLpOgpdm0qS1rD3lg0tU1xEHAdvOyY_EjVWZ0kVjsCaKpVz73_vksT-xfwUDotXYuXvaFdsXReHCxdVI2C0u1kpAnYafjABnU5GDkYzqtvxXx87PbOoPv1C4lBt2dngMPD1Y1makiXIw%3D%3D "If you have even $7 or more to spare, can you rush a donation to help fuel my fight? ")**

---
| [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1f5d36567ae84d3d8743395e442d2391&_e=BBnC2Za6tQb_yAJdzHiKDsmQULnu2uOhdp4dwGUjeJbKBSTShiByBq_g0A0AgpxXAcSnqgHFYauEC3kA_K0K2kya6LBhGLWgFm3_tVOsNcywN4VcMR0Nd7o3tdNNZ6mcJUqWynmJIfbKkIa9pZKPAlnSAr3QqEU3u5Og4AzAAsECXvXiZB6oZo1DmxngTbMz6eBEhK7Yfgo8RfmdvSZF7e8UL4rF5nW4jO6sJxa9rPFy8f9RP0eW6LPFBc7yxNydQxQezFDJkCLOgyVNCq4Dl_ebYjaSmp8rMopVbmF84EXaAJbj43GSWjDeHuMMKMODnu1ktp6yMwgcZ1QmvUjc90xelrH8iOlP1lbCf30jSYtQ0i7K3LUrMi2NmA-FZ7tCBdlRpMsmkNiXMGhFfCvGlA%3D%3D)
---
| | [RUSH IN A DONATION](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1f5d36567ae84d3d8743395e442d2391&_e=BBnC2Za6tQb_yAJdzHiKDsmQULnu2uOhdp4dwGUjeJbKBSTShiByBq_g0A0AgpxXAcSnqgHFYauEC3kA_K0K2kya6LBhGLWgFm3_tVOsNcywN4VcMR0Nd7o3tdNNZ6mcJUqWynmJIfbKkIa9pZKPAlnSAr3QqEU3u5Og4AzAAsECXvXiZB6oZo1DmxngTbMz6eBEhK7Yfgo8RfmdvSZF7e8UL4rF5nW4jO6sJxa9rPFy8f9RP0eW6LPFBc7yxNydLNpRoj0KdJPynjfk2JHJSpj92GcYWevBqfAwGYwtRjRDwWz6yF7XkaO2qWaYACr84GCCZaeQ_Cix0gssK831DixrF7WHP5xCnlXVZovmK5fXIkvq5KR3tsqs8JndANLCHKk4mlYk7L5zND7F4mnoLw%3D%3D)
---
As you know, we're building a strong grassroots infrastructure in early voting states so we can win and get our country back on track.

Every time I travel to New Hampshire, it's another opportunity to talk with voters, get my message out, and continue to build momentum throughout the state.

**BUT, traveling and putting on events isn 't cheap. **My team and I make sure we spend every dollar wisely. That means taking a lot of Spirit and JetBlue flights, putting on events at local venues, and stopping into mom and pop shops to meet with voters.

**[With such little time before my next New Hampshire event, I could really use your help to cover some of this week's costs. Will you pitch in just $7?](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1f5d36567ae84d3d8743395e442d2391&_e=BBnC2Za6tQb_yAJdzHiKDsmQULnu2uOhdp4dwGUjeJbKBSTShiByBq_g0A0AgpxXAcSnqgHFYauEC3kA_K0K2kya6LBhGLWgFm3_tVOsNcywN4VcMR0Nd7o3tdNNZ6mcJUqWynmJIfbKkIa9pZKPAlnSAr3QqEU3u5Og4AzAAsECXvXiZB6oZo1DmxngTbMz6eBEhK7Yfgo8RfmdvSZF7e8UL4rF5nW4jO6sJxa9rPFy8f9RP0eW6LPFBc7yxNyd2FnhVQW9sumwHJN7srYNctQBPsZAI4n8TlVbf7LEZNNfHLXXSd-n3Z4-Vf7UTRQBwk8yOzgN6GIzDTgrTUwf8sCbltjRwFM9ltIO-lrWPe9azeJCs9TUMKYNHhMCDGXzEfbG7szSCcCqPJ7-TPpbLw%3D%3D "With such little time before my next New Hampshire event, I could really use your help to cover some of this week’s costs. Will you pitch in just $7? ")**

Here are just some of the things your donation will help us do in New Hampshire:
* **Cover transportations costs**
* **Help cover lodging expenses **
* **Rent sound equipment for town halls**
* **Rent chairs for town hall guests**

---
| | [HELP FUEL MY FIGHT](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1f5d36567ae84d3d8743395e442d2391&_e=BBnC2Za6tQb_yAJdzHiKDsmQULnu2uOhdp4dwGUjeJbKBSTShiByBq_g0A0AgpxXAcSnqgHFYauEC3kA_K0K2kya6LBhGLWgFm3_tVOsNcywN4VcMR0Nd7o3tdNNZ6mcJUqWynmJIfbKkIa9pZKPAlnSAr3QqEU3u5Og4AzAAsECXvXiZB6oZo1DmxngTbMz6eBEhK7Yfgo8RfmdvSZF7e8UL4rF5nW4jO6sJxa9rPFy8f9RP0eW6LPFBc7yxNydUO2uOF4jUMUMIHKCzwIAMComAWZhs9d4sGGW0WxrvvLkBCJ2mJVNFE4kbnT67pKHguTwqPTg099JTcAXeBwjA7HQRUwFaoCsj30Jod7xSku7Ln0fOcqK897-wP9iiAgJTqp1Ew3ZLkAqg3L7QdD7iw%3D%3D)
---
It's so important that I continue to travel to battleground states like New Hampshire so we reach every American with our conservative message. _**We 're putting in the hard work and laying the groundwork for victory. **_

**[Will you please step up ASAP to help me fuel my campaign and save the future of America?](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1f5d36567ae84d3d8743395e442d2391&_e=BBnC2Za6tQb_yAJdzHiKDsmQULnu2uOhdp4dwGUjeJbKBSTShiByBq_g0A0AgpxXAcSnqgHFYauEC3kA_K0K2kya6LBhGLWgFm3_tVOsNcywN4VcMR0Nd7o3tdNNZ6mcJUqWynmJIfbKkIa9pZKPAlnSAr3QqEU3u5Og4AzAAsECXvXiZB6oZo1DmxngTbMz6eBEhK7Yfgo8RfmdvSZF7e8UL4rF5nW4jO6sJxa9rPFy8f9RP0eW6LPFBc7yxNydeRvVDbDMCPrmPvnEXOUgMCDswSzFB_yfGis0lTvXVINhXLQrNLglqjknZ__tmbNh0_TItqs-EVhoXxM-FFxXhvCirpgW5tguu4Aow7wUcbtP2ggxstal4CfxvxNfmnzoWyjkS_06dtnP8lMDstcH2w%3D%3D "Will you please step up ASAP to help me fuel my campaign and save the future of America?")**

My very best,

---

clean_body: I'm headed to New Hampshire on Tuesday for back-to-back events | | | | | | | | Friend, I'm headed to New Hampshire on Tuesday for back-to-back events, "and I need you on my side more than ever. >>" So, I have an important question to ask you. "If you have even $7 or more to spare, can you rush a donation to help fuel my fight? " | | | As you know, we're building a strong grassroots infrastructure in early voting states so we can win and get our country back on track. Every time I travel to New Hampshire, it's another opportunity to talk with voters, get my message out, and continue to build momentum throughout the state. BUT, traveling and putting on events isn 't cheap. My team and I make sure we spend every dollar wisely. That means taking a lot of Spirit and JetBlue flights, putting on events at local venues, and stopping into mom and pop shops to meet with voters. "With such little time before my next New Hampshire event, I could really use your help to cover some of this week’s costs. Will you pitch in just $7? " Here are just some of the things your donation will help us do in New Hampshire: Cover transportations costs Help cover lodging expenses Rent sound equipment for town halls Rent chairs for town hall guests | | It's so important that I continue to travel to battleground states like New Hampshire so we reach every American with our conservative message. We 're putting in the hard work and laying the groundwork for victory. "Will you please step up ASAP to help me fuel my campaign and save the future of America?" My very best, | Nikki Haley | Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc. **By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided by from each of Team Stand For America, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, SFA Fund Inc., and Ambassador Nikki Haley (48324) directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. body:

| | | Friend, this is Ann Coulter.

**[I'm reaching out to you today because America is in deep trouble, and I wanted to see if you could help me fight back. ](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a05fdae56d8d45abac1f94334bb8249a&_e=4KCPDuvWRrtlRwA6qcSoV0mybNM2zYNagESwODb43x2RgmgG1BFjgyIKMd4VGA-kIOzmZ-7A7Znf-KSrPv3Jzu9pZyMvbI-RCP7m4cUvX-BSfqqvTAcwQE66yquRWzcjYauk-5-8OZrxx_1iU1XPHXrEaVmircVONOkjOQJuET0dlM6GlMK3lMj2sAmPoIu2sEHey1qnHCA_nWlEkMf6D1EmGjG-Mot9ByqjPHHCRDZHY95k9nvBMFJWZre_estS_Gw9U5uGHV7CBshvor80rwWXWpwWgy7eSOGmxJOK3ireWFWJ8XcVDzEbizRyD2WAa4HQmjoQiJDuFrDaGLDp3YUUDDX1-Yc4DDWggvCUXoijdWFiEXIO2x92VryxRQltJW_a6by0rRkHI3Gb30omlicIiL50yCke5q6s--iThU5T9bFTcBn5Z5RjvlhFcnPa)** Before you ask, no: I'm not talking about the Presidential election. I'm not talking about threats from China. I'm not even talking about Joe Biden or the madhouse that's happening in Washington, D.C.. **_I 'm talking about the all out assault that the radical left is waging against parents and students across the country._** You've seen what's happening in our schools. Parents are being lied to by teachers, investigated by the FBI for protesting at school board meetings, and shut out of crucial conversations about their kids' mental health. Explicit pornographic material is being handed to students in school libraries. Critical Race Theory and hardcore marxist ideologies are being taught as the gospel to children K-12. Test scores are plummeting nationwide as school officials claim that MATH and MERIT are "racist systems." And in some extreme circumstances, minors are being groomed to become transgender and rebel against their Christian upbringing... And all of this is happening in secret, behind the backs of parents. Friend, none of what's happening in our nation's schools is an accident. Rather, it's the consequence of a 30 year long campaign from leftist billionaires like George Soros designed to infiltrate our education system from the ground up. **The good news is that, for the first time EVER, patriots like you and I have a way to fight back.** Allow me to introduce you to the 1776 Project PAC: **This Political Action Committee was founded by my friend Ryan Girdusky to counteract what Soros and Company have been doing for decades by influencing local school board elections.** Take it from me: Ryan's team at the 1776 Project PAC is the best there is. Since they were founded a little over 2 years ago, they've: ✅**Liberated** MILLIONS of students from left wing leadership in their local school boards ✅**FIRED** 132 radical left wing school board members across the country ✅**Endorsed** and developed rock solid plan to support over 100 MORE conservative school boards candidates THIS November, 2023 Point blank: No other organization is doing what Ryan Girdusky and the 1776 Project PAC are doing. **[But they can't do this without your help. Could you do me a personal favor and send in a donation of $17.76 or more to help the 1776 Project PAC get brave conservative school board candidates elected nationwide?](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a05fdae56d8d45abac1f94334bb8249a&_e=4KCPDuvWRrtlRwA6qcSoV0mybNM2zYNagESwODb43x2RgmgG1BFjgyIKMd4VGA-kIOzmZ-7A7Znf-KSrPv3Jzu9pZyMvbI-RCP7m4cUvX-BSfqqvTAcwQE66yquRWzcjYauk-5-8OZrxx_1iU1XPHXrEaVmircVONOkjOQJuET0dlM6GlMK3lMj2sAmPoIu2sEHey1qnHCA_nWlEkMf6D1EmGjG-Mot9ByqjPHHCRDZHY95k9nvBMFJWZre_estS_Gw9U5uGHV7CBshvor80r6TrsiDDCcCYUtN3EdvlH2KNmZC0erEpQvONfwShoqOfyopsQAcy8GtvJJrXGa3biYBLVBHYetDDHUfSKeePNb2oOZuYarJ0QfTHNwRTuFnkz9vexLXnU84LETN1zA_lvRNeYouF-maxoNUfI4FXqxVti7_-QvGFna3T1IRPa44C)** **Friend****, if p atriots like you and I don't stand up today, America's destiny will be determined by a generation who was raised on Critical Race Theory, Radical Gender Ideology, and outright MARXIST ideas.** We cannot let that happen. **[That's why I'm hoping and praying that you'll join me in supporting the 1776 Project PAC as they fight to take back our schools with a donation of just $17.76 today.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a05fdae56d8d45abac1f94334bb8249a&_e=4KCPDuvWRrtlRwA6qcSoV0mybNM2zYNagESwODb43x2RgmgG1BFjgyIKMd4VGA-kIOzmZ-7A7Znf-KSrPv3Jzu9pZyMvbI-RCP7m4cUvX-BSfqqvTAcwQE66yquRWzcjYauk-5-8OZrxx_1iU1XPHXrEaVmircVONOkjOQJuET0dlM6GlMK3lMj2sAmPoIu2sEHey1qnHCA_nWlEkMf6D1EmGjG-Mot9ByqjPHHCRDZHY95k9nvBMFJWZre_estS_Gw9U5uGHV7CBshvor80r6TrsiDDCcCYUtN3EdvlH2IYUYI-scwxBFIfhFqQ8KvoochE7pF-4MebtExCinw4iqTxYoIdV9bs_k-Puxkx3NClWtqeZI1IYi9R3hBLy6hSG1GqpHXFnEjxJU0lM_i3EgBW-j7C1-tVbQYsik4_MUU-2tyD5wcbkvsf54tXC_p9)** Thank you for taking the time to review this message. name: American Briefing
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions

| This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2ztvno47kft293qv1fb40bqvo7jvs19a9nfdbed4o_rp22sh2s8i66p71c1g61o74cth2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z9em5gr85lsldlnkocbkstv23bpfi0oonjompapo_rp22sh2s8i66p71c1g61o74cth2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z9as037visu1hmev50d4e6elsn54a86fciee6e48_rp22sh2s8i66p71c1g61o74cth2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zcnehh2bfd1e1acbish9lib5u8vge37binu6ng8g_rp22sh2s8i66p71c1g61o74cth2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

American Briefing
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zcth6qls1sfh0tlh8pts1o59jm5c9j81fdrhtbsg_rp22sh2s8i66p71c1g61o74cth238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8ddl69qbcd1jm8p79d9j6iprect66uqrf9bjmpqn4djm69qb4d9nkvijbo9getqb3cdkmppmeo0n6mq39cdjkorrbcp4mni68or2c1gm0oh5u)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zcqrpj52oicabuccsu2ujbb8pf1pks4f7rntajm8_rp22sh2s8i66p71c1g61o74cth2bs)_

body:
They don't want you to take this survey

Friend,

_Gun rights have always been one of the most sacred freedoms in America._

That's why our Second Amendment was the VERY NEXT IDEA that the Founding Fathers protected in the Bill of Rights after the right to free speech. _They knew how crucial it is for law-abiding Americans to be able to defend themselves without government infringement._

Now, over 200 years later, protecting the Second Amendment has never been more important. Studies and data show that Americans need to be able to defend themselves, and we've found that enthusiasm within our movement has never been stronger. To know for sure, our team just released the **Official Armed Citizens Survey** , and we'd love to see your response.

They knew how crucial it is for law-abiding Americans to be able to defend themselves without government infringement. Now, over 200 years later, protecting the Second Amendment has never been more important. Studies and data show that Americans need to be able to defend themselves, and we've found that enthusiasm within our movement has never been stronger. To know for sure, our team just released the Official Armed Citizens Survey , and we'd love to see your response. The NRA is deeply committed to serving all law-abiding American gun owners by fighting for their CONSTITUTIONALLY GUARANTEED RIGHTS. Your responses to this survey will help our Association best meet YOUR NEEDS. This Official Survey just went live, and we'll be collecting the first batch of responses at 11:59 tonight. Friend, can you complete the survey now so our team can read your responses as quickly as possible? Do you believe that all law-abiding American adults should have the right to bear arms? Thank you, NRA HQ Paid for by the National Rifle Association of America This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system January 18, 2022. name: Jaiden (Gadsden Flag)
subject: I was kicked out of school. Here’s what’s next…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Libertas Institute
body:
I'm guessing you saw me in the news last week.

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=85fd7ed060df45189245e931e0fadd68&_e=bbMo71f5JJqHfkld0t5XO5KWp8IUOm6UXrExuzvm8RIugPF5WMvhdDq7gnhNaXlZi_pfWaVBDUpnRWFbEmzsk-KXBiNwy4eI7rlD92PI4qv85XgayD1Vmc3dqjzF8Wm9aa1HulFPmdD4yPRWIGQyI4lNqfXAfe6zfvEzpwk18Nn5_eb4oCDdSoZajpREuv75MZBZ-ZjDe-Qsu53FrlUOh1qlSlmokmrmZxYqyqKjWT3NJVP_zaSpfaOsu_Re1Y6D89dDO_nW6qdPu-qri1Y00GiJAFhB0r7sWdFm9glcNsw%3D "Tuttle Twins")

Dear Friend,

I'm guessing you saw me in the news last week. I'm the 12-year-old boy who was kicked out of class in my school in Colorado because I had a "Don't tread on me" Gadsden flag patch on my backpack.

The vice principal claimed that it was tied to slavery. (Totally false!) And they wouldn't let me come back to class until I removed the patch.

You might not know why this story got so many views -- over 40 million so far!

After I was kicked out of class, I talked with my mom about what to do. I remembered in one of the Tuttle Twins books how the kids got the media involved to fight against some corruption in the government.

[The Tuttle Twins helped me stand up for what I believe in. I want to help them ship their pro-American history books to schools and families. Can you chip in $25 or more today?](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=85fd7ed060df45189245e931e0fadd68&_e=bbMo71f5JJqHfkld0t5XO5KWp8IUOm6UXrExuzvm8RIugPF5WMvhdDq7gnhNaXlZi_pfWaVBDUpnRWFbEmzsk-KXBiNwy4eI7rlD92PI4qv85XgayD1Vmc3dqjzF8Wm9aa1HulFPmdD4yPRWIGQyIwYGbPcGIQijMXrbgvyStGHDrXGvzepyDYPzaTrphEK7EgPic-BzFNcIQ_0KCmxJ6AM4YIYy6g1BjzExGU1d6Mw2pfPmAndbWXZiOqlTIQP46eoGIJNf63HRQBLrNKAViAM2H6mtkVLMg-pXwQPmkDQ%3D)

[Support Tuttle Twins >>](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=85fd7ed060df45189245e931e0fadd68&_e=bbMo71f5JJqHfkld0t5XO5KWp8IUOm6UXrExuzvm8RIugPF5WMvhdDq7gnhNaXlZi_pfWaVBDUpnRWFbEmzsk-KXBiNwy4eI7rlD92PI4qv85XgayD1Vmc3dqjzF8Wm9TBobcifXBdnK5j4R3jo-ZH5wSFvQS_wj56tBfd60Wh0s6is5HxhwlR81BFz-v9M4qhBWpvi40sXfEZ5Ksrx2LTbt7KoElpfiIwhtSMy6hXa6mTvQXdXU9Cx99ShY_gkbu24dlusZ4BwrSW7k1hq8_CMC6n7L_XqKtZuF1BDN_WB4gOXcG_tl-kH3IpAHLU1E)

I asked my mom if we could drive over to the local TV station. She agreed, so I went up and rang the doorbell of their office. Here I am:

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=85fd7ed060df45189245e931e0fadd68&_e=bbMo71f5JJqHfkld0t5XO5KWp8IUOm6UXrExuzvm8RIugPF5WMvhdDq7gnhNaXlZi_pfWaVBDUpnRWFbEmzsk-KXBiNwy4eI7rlD92PI4qv85XgayD1Vmc3dqjzF8Wm9aa1HulFPmdD4yPRWIGQyI5eDB019ib4cjChuHYWE0kxWEhU-lZZ9mZ0DsoXu2JnqSNhK43QkU5LX-zR7JrEm-xNhl4U-QN0PgNu0AiwPJYQPLtazHZSLowOEpO_ssFjPCdamtk3oX6s7WmEOwvj8BP6OsPXyrlLRQEP4VxXIAPc%3D)

Nobody would speak with me. I felt defeated -- this was a story that needed to be told! My 1st amendment rights were being violated. Why didn't other people care?

Then, my mom decided to reach out to Connor Boyack that night. He's the author of the Tuttle Twins books -- and I'm a huge fan. Connor agreed to share the video my mom had recorded of the vice principal, and now it seems like everyone has seen it!

I'm definitely a little more popular at school now, haha. Lots of other kids are now putting Gadsden flag stickers on their lockers.

I was interviewed by a lot of people afterward. When I talked with Ben Shapiro, he asked me why I knew so much about politics and American history. Here's what I told him:

_" I give it mainly to Connor Boyack with his Tuttle Twins books. I read those growing up, and that really, really helped me. And now I have a good understanding of America and all sorts of key concepts."_

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=85fd7ed060df45189245e931e0fadd68&_e=bbMo71f5JJqHfkld0t5XO5KWp8IUOm6UXrExuzvm8RIugPF5WMvhdDq7gnhNaXlZi_pfWaVBDUpnRWFbEmzsk-KXBiNwy4eI7rlD92PI4qv85XgayD1Vmc3dqjzF8Wm9aa1HulFPmdD4yPRWIGQyI1iGGokLOtHmtLpfkNenZl-MSurjHQBHPu7azLO2DrU49UOe6lc3hKu2wC67HBCMg0bigLmjMKooUTQdDdpdHaxSVoniWia3XDHVicbLAhBeTlu6XPeCvHOaRJHtOJJUZT-uCMH1qGCfZafk5E16v3A%3D)

I'm so happy that Connor shared my story. But what's next?

Well, one day, I want to run for governor of Colorado. I have to be 30 years old, so that will be in the future.

There is something I can do in the meantime. I can use this attention for good. I can pay it forward. I can get other kids to learn the same things I've learned so when the time comes up, they can stand up for themselves, too.

Connor, my mom, and I have been talking over the past few days about what we can do to use this moment for good. And this email is one of the ideas -- we can use my story to encourage people like you to help us.

**So here is what we are doing:**

Connor and his team have some new American history books that teach the ideas of freedom and the founding fathers. They're so much better than the textbooks we have to use in school that don't really teach history with any kind of depth.

**I want more kids to be able to read these history books. So we are launching a fundraiser to raise $25,000 this week, and we will use the money to ship history books to schools across the country -- with a heavy focus on my state, Colorado.** 😀

[Will you stand up with me and help me? I'm super excited by this. Please donate here -- every $25 donation covers the cost of the book and shipping to a library or classroom.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=85fd7ed060df45189245e931e0fadd68&_e=bbMo71f5JJqHfkld0t5XO5KWp8IUOm6UXrExuzvm8RIugPF5WMvhdDq7gnhNaXlZi_pfWaVBDUpnRWFbEmzsk-KXBiNwy4eI7rlD92PI4qv85XgayD1Vmc3dqjzF8Wm9aa1HulFPmdD4yPRWIGQyI9sd_13_e7HdO64lZIPpXdyAZv6OQ_cMvAALpy_nzzS0JRTkUQwmTFF1spM7rFVg1wBehg9U9EwRkzGTmK338HyWQ3liOwIRrZMZvnnHaDglSpTj1l0CFpqWTu1pxokh4OjXv0RJS5f3Y2Rdp16qi9I%3D)

[Donate $1,000 = 40 Books Distributed >>](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=85fd7ed060df45189245e931e0fadd68&_e=bbMo71f5JJqHfkld0t5XO5KWp8IUOm6UXrExuzvm8RIugPF5WMvhdDq7gnhNaXlZi_pfWaVBDUpnRWFbEmzsk-KXBiNwy4eI7rlD92PI4qv85XgayD1Vmc3dqjzF8Wm9mlChmydkr2bYq8gcT9OlxSkZOzy8b5DYjoKfFS--kdamFy2Bg2vFc2BgYg9wgmvwh7B0dk8R04xXfnuijVWuTCAIkre5L5FMLjE2ztgXlysNXZT7h_Y5G7aQetZiwqhLKV7pYNuGFnZzAU43uGCravLRj1DlwyG44AWcr1fmqpkBU0_pvEgiTM_nnDpZMSoN)

**What 's super cool about this is Connor has a big donor who is passionate about this, and they agreed to double everyone's donations!** So, let's say you want to sponsor 5 books for students. That means you'll actually do 10 books when your donation is matched!

I knew how to act when my school tried to shut me down because I'd been learning these ideas for years. Because of the Tuttle Twins, I know what my rights are and how to stand up for them. People like Connor and you have been part of my story, and I'm grateful.

Now, we have to use this moment for good, and I hope you'll stand with me to make a difference. So many other kids need to learn what I have. It's education -- real, true, good education -- that will make sure other kids don't get tread on, too:

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=85fd7ed060df45189245e931e0fadd68&_e=bbMo71f5JJqHfkld0t5XO5KWp8IUOm6UXrExuzvm8RIugPF5WMvhdDq7gnhNaXlZi_pfWaVBDUpnRWFbEmzsk-KXBiNwy4eI7rlD92PI4qv85XgayD1Vmc3dqjzF8Wm9aa1HulFPmdD4yPRWIGQyI8OaTiukCgDN355XBP-pYhfRv1pJcf7O4I6QkAbdOTaIcapvZYCAtbLZmK8CMnlGi0lLx5_HAbwGPBPceaFDXMTquOwA5xlgkUYiI8W1z0qohRAT2jjEQX2-DEFKfU00bjrn6KhgdPLtthPBpTd_QeU%3D)

clean_body: I'm guessing you saw me in the news last week. "Tuttle Twins" Dear Friend, I'm guessing you saw me in the news last week. I'm the 12-year-old boy who was kicked out of class in my school in Colorado because I had a "Don't tread on me" Gadsden flag patch on my backpack. The vice principal claimed that it was tied to slavery. (Totally false!) And they wouldn't let me come back to class until I removed the patch. You might not know why this story got so many views -- over 40 million so far! After I was kicked out of class, I talked with my mom about what to do. I remembered in one of the Tuttle Twins books how the kids got the media involved to fight against some corruption in the government. I asked my mom if we could drive over to the local TV station. She agreed, so I went up and rang the doorbell of their office. Here I am: Nobody would speak with me. I felt defeated -- this was a story that needed to be told! My 1st amendment rights were being violated. Why didn't other people care? Then, my mom decided to reach out to Connor Boyack that night. He's the author of the Tuttle Twins books -- and I'm a huge fan. Connor agreed to share the video my mom had recorded of the vice principal, and now it seems like everyone has seen it! I'm definitely a little more popular at school now, haha. Lots of other kids are now putting Gadsden flag stickers on their lockers. I was interviewed by a lot of people afterward. When I talked with Ben Shapiro, he asked me why I knew so much about politics and American history. Here's what I told him: " I give it mainly to Connor Boyack with his Tuttle Twins books. I read those growing up, and that really, really helped me. And now I have a good understanding of America and all sorts of key concepts." I'm so happy that Connor shared my story. But what's next? Well, one day, I want to run for governor of Colorado. I have to be 30 years old, so that will be in the future. There is something I can do in the meantime. I can use this attention for good. I can pay it forward. I can get other kids to learn the same things I've learned so when the time comes up, they can stand up for themselves, too. Connor, my mom, and I have been talking over the past few days about what we can do to use this moment for good. And this email is one of the ideas -- we can use my story to encourage people like you to help us. So here is what we are doing: Connor and his team have some new American history books that teach the ideas of freedom and the founding fathers. They're so much better than the textbooks we have to use in school that don't really teach history with any kind of depth. I want more kids to be able to read these history books. So we are launching a fundraiser to raise $25,000 this week, and we will use the money to ship history books to schools across the country -- with a heavy focus on my state, Colorado. 😀 What 's super cool about this is Connor has a big donor who is passionate about this, and they agreed to double everyone's donations! So, let's say you want to sponsor 5 books for students. That means you'll actually do 10 books when your donation is matched! I knew how to act when my school tried to shut me down because I'd been learning these ideas for years. Because of the Tuttle Twins, I know what my rights are and how to stand up for them. People like Connor and you have been part of my story, and I'm grateful. Now, we have to use this moment for good, and I hope you'll stand with me to make a difference. So many other kids need to learn what I have. It's education -- real, true, good education -- that will make sure other kids don't get tread on, too: Let's use this momentum to find more Jaidens -- and get them learning today! I'm pumped to work with the author of my favorite books to help even more kids learn what I have. I'm just a 12-year-old kid. I have to focus on my school work and my family, but this is a great opportunity for me to make a difference while I get ready for my gubernatorial campaign 18 years from now. I hope you can support us! In the meantime, stay free and stay strong! Jaiden (Gadsden Flag) Paid for by Libertas Institute Defend the Constitution 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: The greatest Christian apologist of the 20th century
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions

| This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1463c538021c42a0a4b79ac2c2d2e956&_e=g6tNjFqO7n2JPp7zKo89VrUei-6vN1hEmldbqVeEz43_1baigIFag89CvMvinwZcgfbE9ZFKNu0B8GsIepL2vf18Dszzx4qPmjO2DFOhHCZkEmugcXBfS5dK9vmWPezfLxQvWKGVmbPXHW0tI9AEkp0CJl-BM5B6pLHbDghTxC7CRfcDb5Qb8SY-dCzmE39Jo7GSnwHpMqAM7sSzKf1xbhLNh4_o5j5rXqgtw_tWllYGVKSh1aGkbtJeoKTBa1YvfDQ19ntCbKcmEPBdMyWZzwHUwssz588Qek8GPr2YBlfbNK5P9LszN0vAch5hWM5DFH-v6osmI6GGlCl5Pgktd9kz1zTGirYPjsnDgRU5d-jA0vLE9APcwgW6G0agEPskg10xfe7hnqRLa4HTRQSc4qSjWB4xGXeVOfkSi8juBa_GzUqytp5wPDfxp4_kuzWN)

| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1463c538021c42a0a4b79ac2c2d2e956&_e=g6tNjFqO7n2JPp7zKo89VrUei-6vN1hEmldbqVeEz43_1baigIFag89CvMvinwZcgfbE9ZFKNu0B8GsIepL2vf18Dszzx4qPmjO2DFOhHCZkEmugcXBfS5dK9vmWPezfLxQvWKGVmbPXHW0tI9AEkp0CJl-BM5B6pLHbDghTxC7CRfcDb5Qb8SY-dCzmE39Jo7GSnwHpMqAM7sSzKf1xbhLNh4_o5j5rXqgtw_tWllYGVKSh1aGkbtJeoKTBa1YvfDQ19ntCbKcmEPBdMyWZz_RQd2sCr7fm_1IKHS4XCGVID-RpYbdHnmsRK_VhARcNh5v2aHID9oMYIBYmNT1OcDuK2gUajblcf-3PvaXA5oiij4fb3C0JlM2akkqW_KIH2EiCJ8E0QaPjCFgO2QEd3Sd56mv1Vw9jwZI2D7iu3v8e6RKphjbg_sDGnwGnA-GA)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1463c538021c42a0a4b79ac2c2d2e956&_e=g6tNjFqO7n2JPp7zKo89VrUei-6vN1hEmldbqVeEz43_1baigIFag89CvMvinwZcgfbE9ZFKNu0B8GsIepL2vf18Dszzx4qPmjO2DFOhHCZkEmugcXBfS5dK9vmWPezfLxQvWKGVmbPXHW0tI9AEkp0CJl-BM5B6pLHbDghTxC7CRfcDb5Qb8SY-dCzmE39Jo7GSnwHpMqAM7sSzKf1xbhLNh4_o5j5rXqgtw_tWllYGVKSh1aGkbtJeoKTBa1YvfDQ19ntCbKcmEPBdMyWZz46MeE1oL0bgoDxoA1JRNJ2nZ5Xp8F4FgF4Jyy7bG4tt7eERhBmXM6E926_pKdhtJnl5E9vRj5Z2GmOL62lXN_ZPnyIezz9ksHJgYkfyBk-wZBJHyyfMt7e3cs4VZZmQMZn48fvFFzqN6zFW-SGD6QBY4XoNlEs2vxw12r3rRijs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1463c538021c42a0a4b79ac2c2d2e956&_e=g6tNjFqO7n2JPp7zKo89VrUei-6vN1hEmldbqVeEz43_1baigIFag89CvMvinwZcgfbE9ZFKNu0B8GsIepL2vf18Dszzx4qPmjO2DFOhHCZkEmugcXBfS5dK9vmWPezfLxQvWKGVmbPXHW0tI9AEkp0CJl-BM5B6pLHbDghTxC7CRfcDb5Qb8SY-dCzmE39Jo7GSnwHpMqAM7sSzKf1xbhLNh4_o5j5rXqgtw_tWllYGVKSh1aGkbtJeoKTBa1YvfDQ19ntCbKcmEPBdMyWZz70Q-LxcJcoJaoVNEwSDqOtkWE_Mq7ZGDLlXpB0CJVWf8iae_v8yEovDrbGHGoWFUq0x9eqZ4DCp8Fs0lwat8XMyIdV1s-fewiWrNdsh8w4ckDrODCCRmorCgX_sDdiuIcwo4JciOYpfQzNuQGgHq_o0Ra2vlu6GebMiCYH-52rh).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

| Friends,
We are now entering the critical eight weeks until Election Day and early voting starts in just over two weeks. This is the time candidates need your support the most.
Republicans have the opportunity to flip the State Senate and build on our majority in the House of Delegates in Richmond. Two outstanding candidates are [Ken Reid](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hVbJG1u5BhgLzuZbUKdoa3_tFmjfUjYNYc9n_jqAiN2ydObH9ta21KSKO54orGt5hoYisia0V5bHJBV65lb0FfuU6igFpAnMbPFyBRPCcZqNnoOqZNVp3HoadG0DAj57PQtFyWvIIz5-jK4hPSXv6A==&c=gtGqwyoQLwig8ymW0m3s_rwxS4O0Yr0GXkRjQRJ4dMjQ_NKirFWexg==&ch=G_19gJ1lQv36OnT5lRW7plj4Z-gV94weAWhWbrajwq7_Opyc9jOvAg==), running for the State Senate in the [37th District](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hVbJG1u5BhgLzuZbUKdoa3_tFmjfUjYNYc9n_jqAiN2ydObH9ta21KSKO54orGt5xlkf1CGNxzb_PCqBJ69yYZjpQeisubbMf3DOgRn6URMtZ4XOQV9rM29prtNgphCFzDo7wwQ1P85l5LkBd0YyKOyk9YHBzhcglPHCL--Ea3WVglpMtmBcZnt6JRx64-Jw&c=gtGqwyoQLwig8ymW0m3s_rwxS4O0Yr0GXkRjQRJ4dMjQ_NKirFWexg==&ch=G_19gJ1lQv36OnT5lRW7plj4Z-gV94weAWhWbrajwq7_Opyc9jOvAg==) (Vienna, Tysons and Fairfax City) and [James Thomas](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hVbJG1u5BhgLzuZbUKdoa3_tFmjfUjYNYc9n_jqAiN2ydObH9ta21KSKO54orGt5zyCWHpObTvLnsWMr9Du9LBr5bOTqddKQmOd58vyB6t2fk3ZOSAVE9uQrQNbWUNAzUEg9guMsOmsxGxwsPMwuJDm7WC92oJCc&c=gtGqwyoQLwig8ymW0m3s_rwxS4O0Yr0GXkRjQRJ4dMjQ_NKirFWexg==&ch=G_19gJ1lQv36OnT5lRW7plj4Z-gV94weAWhWbrajwq7_Opyc9jOvAg==) campaigning for the House of Delegates in the [10th District](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hVbJG1u5BhgLzuZbUKdoa3_tFmjfUjYNYc9n_jqAiN2ydObH9ta21KSKO54orGt5kPemSAwuESNIPz-NpGb-7GIq0X893WpT7uqM-qP3AmeOFPsMO7HkncqNxt86YWXT9bxxm4_eqRWTXEYMDUojZLCORVY05qe6M-upbatUacNyqNZMuY5kguC6xtmM6SGjYKi_Dmb-3YE=&c=gtGqwyoQLwig8ymW0m3s_rwxS4O0Yr0GXkRjQRJ4dMjQ_NKirFWexg==&ch=G_19gJ1lQv36OnT5lRW7plj4Z-gV94weAWhWbrajwq7_Opyc9jOvAg==) (Tim Hugo's old seat of Clifton, Centreville and Fairfax Station). Their opponents are extreme Liberal Democrats especially sitting Delegate Dan Helmer in the 10th.
Please join my Grandfather, Former Congressman Frank Wolf and me in supporting our Republican candidates at these upcoming fundraising events:
In Support of Ken Reid with Special Guests Former Congressmen Frank Wolf and Tom Davis And Former State Senator Jeannemarie Davis This Thursday, September 7th - 5:00 to 7:00pm Vienna Vintner, 320 Maple Ave. E, Unit#F, Vienna 22180 Sponsorships and Ticket Amounts Listed Above in the Invitation Donate [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hVbJG1u5BhgLzuZbUKdoa3_tFmjfUjYNYc9n_jqAiN2ydObH9ta21KSKO54orGt5WeY-w6rbVvBCCvuST_qySEErXHh0Q1tRzjd8KjxgBVMqxpBN5OWI49vKtPkA8qfvEHLF3nbdUeYEE1Du0P13zT-rRn3y9Sqbj8S4hKQl5XroMOeI4Qd7L5qrBCFIcsTCV8DVi7T2SOgBz5z5o4ktbWNNWr9z7GptHu7dAxjKbOaw3d-EUtajJA==&c=gtGqwyoQLwig8ymW0m3s_rwxS4O0Yr0GXkRjQRJ4dMjQ_NKirFWexg==&ch=G_19gJ1lQv36OnT5lRW7plj4Z-gV94weAWhWbrajwq7_Opyc9jOvAg==)
In Support of James Thomas with Special Guest Former Congressmen Frank Wolf Friday, September 15th - 6:30 to 8:00pm The Home of Mary Campbell, 6410 Noble Rock Court, Clifton Sponsorships and Ticket Amounts Listed Above in the Invitation Donate [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hVbJG1u5BhgLzuZbUKdoa3_tFmjfUjYNYc9n_jqAiN2ydObH9ta21KSKO54orGt5jetLpDrOG4sXGP4mRVYfAFNytvwoLqwi5_vdl-g82vYYMZM--8j9Lv_3mQGCEP-poiOWuSFOBsDFP1kAyVZRSbmphGjmb2XehNgrJSdvdopVXU2Usqfb0IbxK4q6OqaR&c=gtGqwyoQLwig8ymW0m3s_rwxS4O0Yr0GXkRjQRJ4dMjQ_NKirFWexg==&ch=G_19gJ1lQv36OnT5lRW7plj4Z-gV94weAWhWbrajwq7_Opyc9jOvAg==)

Together we can support Governor Youngkin, take control of the General Assembly and keep Virginia on a path to prosperity. The alternative is easy see as people rejected a California-style Virginia when Democrats controlled Richmond and moved away from our Commonwealth.
I look forward to continuing to work with Ken, James and all the great conservative activists across Virginia to win in the November 2023 elections.
God Bless and thank you again for your support, Caleb

clean_body: In Support of Senate Candidate Ken Reid and Delegate Candidate James Thomas | | | | | Please Join Us In Supporting Ken Reid and James Thomas | == Click Above Image for More Details | == Click Above Image for More Details | | | Friends, We are now entering the critical eight weeks until Election Day and early voting starts in just over two weeks. This is the time candidates need your support the most. Republicans have the opportunity to flip the State Senate and build on our majority in the House of Delegates in Richmond. Two outstanding candidates are ==, running for the State Senate in the == (Vienna, Tysons and Fairfax City) and == campaigning for the House of Delegates in the == (Tim Hugo's old seat of Clifton, Centreville and Fairfax Station). Their opponents are extreme Liberal Democrats especially sitting Delegate Dan Helmer in the 10th. Please join my Grandfather, Former Congressman Frank Wolf and me in supporting our Republican candidates at these upcoming fundraising events: In Support of Ken Reid with Special Guests Former Congressmen Frank Wolf and Tom Davis And Former State Senator Jeannemarie Davis This Thursday, September 7th - 5:00 to 7:00pm Vienna Vintner, 320 Maple Ave. E, Unit#F, Vienna 22180 Sponsorships and Ticket Amounts Listed Above in the Invitation Donate == In Support of James Thomas with Special Guest Former Congressmen Frank Wolf Friday, September 15th - 6:30 to 8:00pm The Home of Mary Campbell, 6410 Noble Rock Court, Clifton Sponsorships and Ticket Amounts Listed Above in the Invitation Donate == Thank you for attending these important fundraising events and visiting their website to donate if you can not make it. Together we can support Governor Youngkin, take control of the General Assembly and keep Virginia on a path to prosperity. The alternative is easy see as people rejected a California-style Virginia when Democrats controlled Richmond and moved away from our Commonwealth. I look forward to continuing to work with Ken, James and all the great conservative activists across Virginia to win in the November 2023 elections. God Bless and thank you again for your support, Caleb | | | | == | | == | | | | | | | | Caleb Max | PO Box 404, Herndon, VA 20170 | | Sent by mailto:maxforcongress@gmail.com powered by

She's getting **_pummeled_** by her radical leftist opponent, Adam Frisch, and his left wing millionaire donors.

He's raised **$4.4 million in the first six months of this cycle thanks to Soros** , with a whopping **$2.6 million** in the second quarter _alone_.

If the Election were held today... **_Lauren would lose._**

_But there 's still time to save this seat._

name: Conservatives Give
subject: The greatest Christian apologist of the 20th century
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions

| This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d614084861fc42b8987aef4f40053887&_e=P7-Ophnycd9FrucAAHjc8GZ1DuwEMdnmbSFGARf8OxnlYqfujjQx6ggGvt-tASgJpdAITEWXZrK1WZHLkUitraKAIcwQClLsSWYaSKSlZsD-Z9Aw3t07zXYSIxU8jHtc2UHmA1bdSksdi3wnJ26ew_lYO2U_1AnBKGRaoFrWyLTl_98n_S7X9vhkcF5M96ttF2jD68ZeexgmgDARL_m-OI8QR0at3whiyyvLEn3dDqwjJFqr3Y8YvonR1QLRk-6rVfaMNTIXmrFeXDJvDj0yDsJ2Kb84320jV8EYe7L23pPUxYbP_uxB1ek3V-e8t0KNDPMCsDAIqypDpO0WGXsE7ys1zltDwuKCzisZUhZANyfcr66hVKdikOaUsIxVuocxjgaYYVbRypEbACOqbbs9xcWccRO_R5OW6IyNEPedNvlMQ6GNCKJwIhFVgKpwAEGx)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d614084861fc42b8987aef4f40053887&_e=P7-Ophnycd9FrucAAHjc8GZ1DuwEMdnmbSFGARf8OxnlYqfujjQx6ggGvt-tASgJpdAITEWXZrK1WZHLkUitraKAIcwQClLsSWYaSKSlZsD-Z9Aw3t07zXYSIxU8jHtc2UHmA1bdSksdi3wnJ26ew_lYO2U_1AnBKGRaoFrWyLTl_98n_S7X9vhkcF5M96ttF2jD68ZeexgmgDARL_m-OI8QR0at3whiyyvLEn3dDqwjJFqr3Y8YvonR1QLRk-6rVfaMNTIXmrFeXDJvDj0yDmm7W8WWredQDYjZ6lefi73VG_spZS4D_H6kNNYwnrzl2ZGEbNOG0JQf_665ARfVcl1ymtShLVSqw7N3M2HCNGrRIyqzMNU8vykMy_NvMTLfCotw5BidN_OyVzaGuqIzozWiE2F3ZmSCfFPpQByyHgq2gNufKbXD2gBs1W0EJuWN)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d614084861fc42b8987aef4f40053887&_e=P7-Ophnycd9FrucAAHjc8GZ1DuwEMdnmbSFGARf8OxnlYqfujjQx6ggGvt-tASgJpdAITEWXZrK1WZHLkUitraKAIcwQClLsSWYaSKSlZsD-Z9Aw3t07zXYSIxU8jHtc2UHmA1bdSksdi3wnJ26ew_lYO2U_1AnBKGRaoFrWyLTl_98n_S7X9vhkcF5M96ttF2jD68ZeexgmgDARL_m-OI8QR0at3whiyyvLEn3dDqwjJFqr3Y8YvonR1QLRk-6rVfaMNTIXmrFeXDJvDj0yDt9ry03BI405QKfaADQSf9d5QLnRidLgZGgnMUHtW2HfSawWta6gxuk82zj5LYRjJnCKzAcRlD3Q7660lw70pOjLaVsZewpfH8ohK634xn4PNUeMBITau8jDBSZfR90cwWhaaM3kkacyK_m_IW1z88WHDQu_pO1OSARZDI7C-EJq)

| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d614084861fc42b8987aef4f40053887&_e=P7-Ophnycd9FrucAAHjc8GZ1DuwEMdnmbSFGARf8OxnlYqfujjQx6ggGvt-tASgJpdAITEWXZrK1WZHLkUitraKAIcwQClLsSWYaSKSlZsD-Z9Aw3t07zXYSIxU8jHtc2UHmA1bdSksdi3wnJ26ew_lYO2U_1AnBKGRaoFrWyLTl_98n_S7X9vhkcF5M96ttF2jD68ZeexgmgDARL_m-OI8QR0at3whiyyvLEn3dDqwjJFqr3Y8YvonR1QLRk-6rVfaMNTIXmrFeXDJvDj0yDrFj3EAqkPIm-PHl5o0esouFW4oFTlLyAfEp7BBXmlaa13hpUEjvcQQ6drmUGjiELfK2JSvDGsoyvmTyY2dEyFKhugOlHH96q4PuTHtqIwvIplTGEL_zn99zPWFKVCcM7ozskqwW7epTlxDp3rwPneCoKEYqJqTGivnNwy0eBWCQ).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

name: The Federalist Wire
subject: A top Democrat may lose their job after breaking this law
body:
TheFederalistWire.com

DAILY NEWS | September 06, 2023

A top Democrat may
lose their job after breaking this law
Politicians don't always
play by the rules. But when they get caught, their world is
upended.

And a top Democrat may lose their
job after breaking this law.
➞ Continue Reading

TRENDING NEWS

This shocking accusation
could change everything for Barack Obama

Former President
Obama is one of the most influential voices in the Democrat
Party. But now his influence may have gone too far.
➞ Continue Reading

President Biden is in
shambles after being caught in this damaging lie

Joe Biden's policies
have been disastrous for the American people. But his inability
to get his facts straight, are making things even worse.
➞ Continue Reading

Top Republican sends Joe
Biden one warning that's keeping him up at night

The President and his
lackeys are barely treading water. His scandals are massive with
no end in sight.
➞ Continue Reading

ABOUT
US
The
Federalist Wire brings you dependable news that highlights the US
political landscape as well as the economy. We're here for
citizens who want to stay in the know. If you're particularly
interested in politics or economics, our regular news updates
will help keep you informed. If you're not especially interested
in the topics but know it's important to keep up, then our
reports will be simple to understand.

You know that the political and
economic worlds often collide, and that's why we provide you with
specific coverage. Our news team strives to pinpoint and report
the stories that interest you most. We keep our eyes on domestic
and international matters, both political and financial, so we
can help you stay on top of the latest happenings.

DISCLAIMER
Your privacy is important to us.
It is The Federalist Wire's policy to respect your privacy and
comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across
our website, and other sites we own and operate.

name: Nikki Haley
subject: I have faith in your love for our country
body:
Our moment is now – and our mission is clear.

| |
---
| | | Friend,

Hey, it's Nikki! I wanted to share a quick update with you.

Thanks to grassroots supporters, we finished off the month of August stronger than ever! We held standing-room-only events across Iowa, New Hampshire, and South Carolina, met with thousands of voters across the country, WON the first presidential debate, AND had our best fundraising month ever!

But, this is still the beginning of our journey to the White House.

**[As we begin a new month on the campaign, I wanted to remind you why I am running for president and why your support matters.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zf4csgb37hmjnla7un6ujnm3vlgsqrvjd62h9t30_rp22sh2s8i66p71c1i62oj2chh2bs "As we begin a new month on the campaign, I wanted to remind you why I am running for president and why your support matters.")**

I'm a wife of a combat veteran, a mother of two, and a proud daughter of legal immigrants. I have watched the American Dream unfold before me.

_**But, with the Democrats in power, our future is slipping. **_

Right now, we have too many families paying too much for groceries; too many small businesses who can't afford rent, and too many big businesses getting taxpayer bailouts.

We have too much crime on our streets - too many drugs flooding our cities - and too few police and border patrol.

And from Joe Biden on down, our leaders put too much trust in big government and too little trust in the American people.

They have us spiraling toward socialism, with a new trillion-dollar spending bill every few months, and a national debt over 32 trillion dollars.

This is not the America I want to leave to my children!

I am running for president to save our country from the downward spiral of socialism and defeatism. **I aim to move America upward toward freedom and strength.**

We are in an uphill battle to save our country's future, and I need your help. Your continued support is so important. **[Can I count on you?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z09do4ook1uei2aa7ekv0ojtrpqigk0i7hqt5nko_rp22sh2s8i66p71c1i62oj2chh2bs "Can I count on you?")**

**I want you to join me in this fight to save America 's future because our country is always worth fighting for. **

As a brown girl, growing up in a black-and-white world, I saw the promise of America unfold before me.

As the proud wife of a combat veteran, I saw our people's deep love of freedom, and determination to defend it.

As Governor, I saw our state move beyond hate and violence, and lift everyone in peace.

And as Ambassador, I saw that America is still the standard.

Our moment is now - and our mission is clear.

Let's save our country and secure our future. And let's move forward, together, toward our destiny - in a strong and proud America!

**[I appreciate your support more than you can imagine. If you can join me today by chipping in, it would mean so much to me.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5251i01ubl3bjmcs59e40deagltog222cu0bh0g_rp22sh2s8i66p71c1i62oj2chh2bs "I appreciate your support more than you can imagine. If you can join me today by chipping in, it would mean so much to me.")**
---
| | [DONATE](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5lestco0r9d93aqps2fkk4481jlmkmn408bvt9g_rp22sh2s8i66p71c1i62oj2chh2bs)
---
My very best,

---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zsruk9lcn8qmh75955b27uhf9h0o5tom1vcgtp48_rp22sh2s8i66p71c1i62oj2chh2bs)
---
Nikki Haley
---

name: Candace Owens, BLEXIT
subject: Thanking police officers
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.readactnews._Mt4cIxHxtNj5V01WKil-g)
---
Fellow American, **I am so grateful for our police officers. ** As an American who believes in law and order, truth, and justice, I have always stood with the public servants who protect our communities. **[Please join me in thanking uniformed men and women by signing our 'Back the Blue Petition' and letting brave officers know that we are grateful for their service and sacrifice.](http://trk.readactnews.)**
---
[**Sign the 'Back the Blue Petition'**](http://trk.readactnews._33Wzw)
---
Unfortunately, a few years ago, radicals began propelling criminals into heroes overnight and campaigning to "_defund the police_." I refuse to accept that we must cater to the bottom denominator of our society and that the black community must fight and scream and demand support for the people in our community who are up to no good. That's one of the reasons I founded BLEXIT - an organization focused on shifting the culture in Black America as well as educating and uplifting minorities through educational programs and acts of community service. **Around the nation, our BLEXIT chapters have supported local officers, while so many others have turned their backs on those who serve our communities. ** **[To join these chapters and stand with police officers, please sign the national petition today.](http://trk.readactnews.)**
---
[**Sign the 'Back the Blue Petition'**](http://trk.readactnews.-HUi0WVl3MGUX2q5AQ)
---
[](http://trk.readactnews._zdya744b2vmjaX9MYA)
---
_This summer, BLEXIT Maryland spent the day giving back to the Baltimore Police Department and learned some history about the city's police force._
---
[](http://trk.readactnews.-HmrerGg)
---
_The first state chapter - BLEXIT North Carolina - paid a visit to local officers in July. Our State Director showered them with thank-you notes and delicious food as a token of BLEXIT's appreciation._
---
**[If you 'Back the Blue' - and believe that we must support local heroes - please sign the national petition right away.](http://trk.readactnews._XZuLSCpwDkA)** While the 'defund the police' crowd wants us to think minorities stand with them - polls show that the vast majority of black voters (more than 80%) want police funding to stay the same or even increase. We've been sold a lot of lies by anti-police radicals - those lies have been a detriment to Black American culture, the country as a whole, and the police officers who fight for justice every day. **We must stop the deception that is harming urban communities and demeaning police around the nation. ** If you are an American, no matter what color you are, you should want law and you should want order. That is the way forward. **[Join me in letting our police officers know that you support law and order, justice, and their valiant efforts to keep our communities safe.](http://trk.readactnews.)**
---
[**Sign the 'Back the Blue Petition'**](http://trk.readactnews._g)
---
Candace OwensChair of BLEXITPowered by Turning Point USA
---
Read/Act News PO Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.readactnews.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzNjUxNjA3IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMyNDktZTU4Yzg3MDRkNzM1NDg5NTk3MTIyYjFkNGNiMGU2ZDkiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2V9/tHZrErtmT-Wr3gzesNpDjw) to unsubscribe.
---
clean_body: | | Please see a special message from our sponsor. | | | | Fellow American, I am so grateful for our police officers. As an American who believes in law and order, truth, and justice, I have always stood with the public servants who protect our communities. Unfortunately, a few years ago, radicals began propelling criminals into heroes overnight and campaigning to "defund the police." I refuse to accept that we must cater to the bottom denominator of our society and that the black community must fight and scream and demand support for the people in our community who are up to no good. That's one of the reasons I founded BLEXIT - an organization focused on shifting the culture in Black America as well as educating and uplifting minorities through educational programs and acts of community service. Around the nation, our BLEXIT chapters have supported local officers, while so many others have turned their backs on those who serve our communities. This summer, BLEXIT Maryland spent the day giving back to the Baltimore Police Department and learned some history about the city's police force. The first state chapter - BLEXIT North Carolina - paid a visit to local officers in July. Our State Director showered them with thank-you notes and delicious food as a token of BLEXIT's appreciation. While the 'defund the police' crowd wants us to think minorities stand with them - polls show that the vast majority of black voters (more than 80%) want police funding to stay the same or even increase. We've been sold a lot of lies by anti-police radicals - those lies have been a detriment to Black American culture, the country as a whole, and the police officers who fight for justice every day. We must stop the deception that is harming urban communities and demeaning police around the nation. If you are an American, no matter what color you are, you should want law and you should want order. That is the way forward. Candace OwensChair of BLEXITPowered by Turning Point USA Read/Act News PO Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us to unsubscribe.

name: National Gun Owner
subject: That was a weird choice,
body:
Grab your “Invisible” Belly Holster NOW, before someone else does.
---
| We are a community of gun-loving Americans. We hope you stick around but remember you can [unsubscribe](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/3771/6374453/db0b4a7a70ed53b789fa7253e47f1e748218df3f/104c665eb6d3cdc03101dca3d3dd37c694527c89) here at any time. September 6th, 2023 \- Breaking News - Firearms Reviews - 2nd Amendment - Ammo & More -. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | “That was a **weird choice** , .”

If you went out and **bought a fancy new Kydex holster...**

**_That’s what I’d say to you._**

Because instead of spending $99+ on a clunky holster that **only fits one kind of gun...and is uncomfortable as hell...**

You could’ve **[gotten this FREE one here](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/3771/6374453/21ca05636cd607d1b579028f943dfed54203e7d1/104c665eb6d3cdc03101dca3d3dd37c694527c89)** that’s far more comfortable... fits 99% of all handguns... is **way easier** to conceal.

I’m talking about the best selling **“Invisible” Belly Holster** from my friends at _Tactical USA._

**For a short time,** they’re [handing them out at no cost](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/3771/6374453/21ca05636cd607d1b579028f943dfed54203e7d1/104c665eb6d3cdc03101dca3d3dd37c694527c89) as part of a No More Gun Control campaign.

The only catch here is that they don’t have many left ** _(382 last I checked)._**

And this email just went out to over 120,000 other subscribers who are reading this just like you...

So you’ll need to move fast if you want one.

[Grab your FREE “Invisible” Belly Holster NOW](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/3771/6374453/21ca05636cd607d1b579028f943dfed54203e7d1/104c665eb6d3cdc03101dca3d3dd37c694527c89), before someone else does.

Thank You.

body:
The 'Digital Dollar' is now a reality.

|

They'll be able to....

name: Nikki Haley
subject: I have faith in your love for our country
body:
Our moment is now – and our mission is clear.

| |
---
| | | Friend,

Hey, it's Nikki! I wanted to share a quick update with you.

Thanks to grassroots supporters, we finished off the month of August stronger than ever! We held standing-room-only events across Iowa, New Hampshire, and South Carolina, met with thousands of voters across the country, WON the first presidential debate, AND had our best fundraising month ever!

But, this is still the beginning of our journey to the White House.

**[As we begin a new month on the campaign, I wanted to remind you why I am running for president and why your support matters.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z8uq6vs8p5fa68vs2704gc58c3iirbk45k5eaje0_rp22sh2s8i66p71c1i66o36cth2bs "As we begin a new month on the campaign, I wanted to remind you why I am running for president and why your support matters.")**

I'm a wife of a combat veteran, a mother of two, and a proud daughter of legal immigrants. I have watched the American Dream unfold before me.

_**But, with the Democrats in power, our future is slipping. **_

Right now, we have too many families paying too much for groceries; too many small businesses who can't afford rent, and too many big businesses getting taxpayer bailouts.

We have too much crime on our streets - too many drugs flooding our cities - and too few police and border patrol.

And from Joe Biden on down, our leaders put too much trust in big government and too little trust in the American people.

They have us spiraling toward socialism, with a new trillion-dollar spending bill every few months, and a national debt over 32 trillion dollars.

This is not the America I want to leave to my children!

I am running for president to save our country from the downward spiral of socialism and defeatism. **I aim to move America upward toward freedom and strength.**

We are in an uphill battle to save our country's future, and I need your help. Your continued support is so important. **[Can I count on you?](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zksihdckqpr94jcmd29ep9t504gnf84q5v3injig_rp22sh2s8i66p71c1i66o36cth2bs "Can I count on you?")**

**I want you to join me in this fight to save America 's future because our country is always worth fighting for. **

As a brown girl, growing up in a black-and-white world, I saw the promise of America unfold before me.

As the proud wife of a combat veteran, I saw our people's deep love of freedom, and determination to defend it.

As Governor, I saw our state move beyond hate and violence, and lift everyone in peace.

And as Ambassador, I saw that America is still the standard.

Our moment is now - and our mission is clear.

Let's save our country and secure our future. And let's move forward, together, toward our destiny - in a strong and proud America!

**[I appreciate your support more than you can imagine. If you can join me today by chipping in, it would mean so much to me.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zinlsgh9uvhimsie76o95s98aqid9c4pgu2qvrt8_rp22sh2s8i66p71c1i66o36cth2bs "I appreciate your support more than you can imagine. If you can join me today by chipping in, it would mean so much to me.")**
---
| | [DONATE](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zio8j2r6aktleu2acmel8hr5bubl7k9knsf2vac8_rp22sh2s8i66p71c1i66o36cth2bs)
---
My very best,

---
| [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z0550vmhmpbfqfnkptnnavlpt30b1rbo45l3fqdg_rp22sh2s8i66p71c1i66o36cth2bs)
---
Nikki Haley
