| | Save Virginia, Save America Weekly Roundup
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | Friend, The campaign to Save Virginia and Save America continued last week with attendance at Attorney General Jason Mayares’s “Human Trafficking Summit” in Richmond; an interviewwith Andrew Wilkow on Wilkow TV; a presentation at the Fairfax Patriot Pub in Springfield; a fundraiser for State Senate Candidate Matt Lang; a meeting with Mason District Republicans in Mason District Park; an interview with Emerald Robinson on “The Absolute Truth” on Lindell TV; an interview with Stu Epperson on Salem Media; an interview on the Robert Scott BellShow; an appearance at the Teletron Vietnamese Festival in Falls Church; and a presentation at the Dar Al-Hijrah Islamic Center in Falls Church.
---
| | |
---
| | STRAW POLL
---
| |
---
| | | [**Support Team Emord Now**](https://www.emordforva.com/so/6aOfRvT2-/c?w=rLTrE1XIPiQ7ZYq3SxQH8E6UtTQb2gzJF9UeKR-0Zak.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9lbW9yZGZvcnZhL2RvbmF0ZSIsInIiOiI3NjJhN2JiNC03ZWZlLTRlNGUtZTAyMy1jMzU2Y2IxMmYwYzgiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI4MTAwMWVmMi0xODkxLTQwZjAtYmY3ZC1iMmE2YzZmNWNlZTIifQ)
---
| | |
---
| | On August 29, I attended Attorney General Jason Mayares’s informative “Human Trafficking Summit” in Richmond, Virginia.
---
| | On August 29, I appeared on Wilkow TV to discuss the sex trafficking epidemic in the Fairfax County Public Schools and the unfounded legal argument that Section 3 of the 14th Amendmentwould bar President Trump from serving another presidential term.
---
| | | [**Watch Here**](https://www.emordforva.com/so/6aOfRvT2-/c?w=E6QRolgN2EWsYp-Yo81idBPGhN1GEml0f9qpFFlsd10.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zYWxlbW5ld3NjaGFubmVsLmNvbS93YXRjaC8_dj02NGVlNzRmODc2Y2IxNzAwMDFiNmJiODgiLCJyIjoiMGY2MTUzYjItNmU5YS00N2YzLTgyZDQtOGM0YTY4NGVlYjQwIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiODEwMDFlZjItMTg5MS00MGYwLWJmN2QtYjJhNmM2ZjVjZWUyIn0)
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| | On August 30, I spoke to 30 members of the Fairfax Patriot Pub Social Group at Kilroy’s in Springfield. I am most grateful for the opportunity to appear and speak and welcome the many pledges of support for our campaign.
---

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: I want to know your thoughts
body:
I’m reaching out today about an important issue that's close to my heart

|
---
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zu5atq5p6lp5659gacbhpjevnicd28bjf8u4jfjo_rp22sh2s8i66p71c1i66o31c3h2bs)
---
| Dear Fellow Patriot,

I hope this message finds you well. I'm reaching out today about an important issue that's close to my heart and, I believe, relevant to all of us.

In the current climate, our religious liberty, a foundational tenet of our nation, faces an increasing number of challenges. These are especially concerning for those of us who hold to biblical and faith-based values. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7e9aj9fu89h85ldpq1nuofjf1fjp528foi5ac68_rp22sh2s8i66p71c1i66o31c3h2bs)
With societal shifts and new legal precedents, including the recently passed Respect for Marriage Act, the ability to practice and express our faith openly may face unprecedented threats.

These changes may allow the federal government to exert pressure on schools, businesses, and organizations that adhere to their religious beliefs. I fear this might lead to intensified legal persecution against those wishing to live according to their faith.

As engaged citizens, it's crucial we understand this situation and its potential impact on our religious freedom.

Please take a moment to share your insights by completing this 2-minute survey: [https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zoalq64jg87kqfcjbis65m2h47sjlu5ik2c46768_rp22sh2s8i66p71c1i66o31c3h2bs)

Your contribution will guide our efforts to alert fellow Americans of the threats to our religious liberty and defend our First Amendment rights.

Let's uphold the integrity of our Constitution and protect the pillars that make our nation great: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Thank you for your attention to this matter.

Yours sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

American Action News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

Let's uphold the integrity of our Constitution and protect the pillars that make our nation great: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life. Thank you for your attention to this matter. Yours sincerely, Dr. Ben Carson Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute | | Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens. | | Copyright © 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved. # [Sign your name: Tell the Supreme Court to kick Trump off the 2024 ballot! >> ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T44793f26-d39f-4118-acc8-694e3c204f02/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | Wow, [the Supreme Court is going to rule on a case](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1bd93b34-aa07-4f2d-8cfa-9bf18b5ea491/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) that could determine whether or not Trump can appear on the 2024 presidential ballot. They are expected to make a ruling in just a matter of weeks. This case is seeking to disqualify Trump under the 14th Amendment, because of his involvement in the Capitol insurrection. See Section 3 of the 14th Amendment: "No person shall be a Senator or Representative in Congress... or hold any office...who, having previously taken an oath...to support the Constitution of the United States, shall have engaged in insurrection or rebellion against the [Constitution]." Don’t just sit back and let them make the decision in a vacuum. Raise your voice, and let them know Americans care about this case. Trump should absolutely be disqualified from running for president again. With the Supreme Court deciding this case in several weeks, we need to raise our voices and demand they disqualify Trump from the 2024 ballot for the sake of our democracy. [Sign your name: Tell the Supreme Court to kick Trump off the 2024 ballot! >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8238a4eb-a4f8-4d9e-b83b-1ded857efd4b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | Biden's a predictable disaster. **Ask him to lead the country in a time of crisis ...** Not a word. **Ask him about the 40 year high inflation ...** Not a word. **Ask him why you 're paying more for gasoline... ** Why it cost a fortune to heat and cool your home...
---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=33f89e68daf348c4845c7eb6f22492ca&_e=c5nH6mTGRpjehRvOf8TRfpQ32cYx84jBY_JBQOY5Z07T0f97BcuG5PF5j7h0D8g_y3dJXP7Kaf2qYfSngU5_4EXwKjmFnRoOo1aHiehug53wPkFpBiYmv_H8IVQhffQ8zxT818CHA22KOIeDsM-hyHb5XoZfPs-m0kBJx5Re7SINDxvzPnT7EI7Jvh89DL7lLZKkOD6komE3h6L7W5DpoqDVSxK4lN2QLzmn3RTGuva54i2bUMQxEPhL8c0Qx6BiZfYrbbik7Ne22K_ztxVHQeX2ucq49ZlF8mRQrJJnErxfsGF8SyHIowxNIozP6WJ5Ss1dzzySXWhmAqFiqdum_sIUgOlqWDJvnsReHU5fXinKsfH9yUrtkxV-QDYm8HiYiWBWdjX99m88m4wZur454LwPykylgghzbyRhtMGr7ZYzTtfcYWH4Q4GW2cSpzxao_HCDzZVUKkUpjwBZl95N-z13eHDSI0fFAN6ucQQby2NrmcdVhGqhFx2YXb_3MsUEwAj0SSVsW-L30S0hGIr1XA%3D%3D)
---
| | And why everything you buy at the store is more expensive... **NOT A WORD.** Instead, he'll stand in front of a teleprompter and sell you on a repackaged "Build Back Broke" deal, **paid for by your retirement savings.** But wait! Biden says, **" under my plan, nobody earning less than $400,000 a year will pay an additional penny in new taxes."** Yeah, is that right Joe? No new taxes? **Don 't believe it.** **He voted for a new 50% tax on Social Security** benefits in 1983... **He voted for 85% taxes on Social Security** benefits in 1994... **He voted for Estate Taxes** in 2000... **Now, he wants to raise over $3.3 TRILLION in NEW taxes. ** Who do you think will pay for that? **Are you prepared for higher inflation, higher costs, and less money for yourself ...** Or do you want to PROTECT YOUR HARD EARNED MONEY before it's too late? If you have $50,000 or more in retirement savings... name: Freedom First Project
subject: C.S. Lewis like you’ve never seen him before
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I'm writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News _because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty-like our free online courses. _ _ And though we're best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author-C.S. Lewis.In fact, our free online course, **"[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._SA5K2ORp2lI2zBQ-D5Cgg)" **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That's why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **"[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-QR6ygdirHAMTbFQ)," **we've received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis' writings.[](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._98o0-woF1QQ)We've also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I'm pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **"[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)"** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won't last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last:[**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._JkNWnW3cDJb-0CSItQ) Warm regards, Bill GrayClass of 2001Vice PresidentNational Donor OutreachHillsdale College
---

name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Big Pharma and the federal government
body:
In America, various industries have close ties to government regulators.

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d45a2ceb7c084e6bbe64aecdefae9ac0&_e=zzVIZpaJoyOzvttyxJDuAUG1S5G7aBZha85JsaYX7OVCpyYNf6nCv20p1KD28i5Jq2Pv1y-RCv-iLz8DEtDyjzp-F4nMzmBx6KwMyOmnnq8pb-FH1icL7CVPr-UjCqxo5cA69oTgg9QXGAch2y6G9DyZMSlUVfsW3ivxqt8jiprTjmgmZefQ_VZm4NVjLXci00Wv3tX6df8DnMGsraIQQUZxTct-YhAwsUDGQhY1IRihvXwQdbB2ltJlRA-uzCmcCkfqh8z8mLCyfyb4PRpr2IRrilHho276MEFuc_PrlU34wVAg9drHilVoXZQ0OtZ48vfTOvbK96AIkWb0p1C-8b4XtR3Mhm7l3fKCSNtVkrA7B_RCGAuxNrT6XdrQnLz6)
---
| | Dear Friend,

In America, various industries have close ties to government regulators.

The pharmaceutical industry is one of the most notable and most troubling.

Last year alone, "Big Pharma" spent over $373 million on lobbying--much more than any other industry.

While the Constitution certainly protects the rights to free speech and to petition the government, it was never intended to grant the special privileges that are characteristic of today's bureaucratic, administrative state.

In addition, Big Pharma's reputation has come under attack in the wake of America's opioid epidemic--since 1999, more than 600,000 people have died from opioid overdoses in the U.S. and Canada alone--and the COVID pandemic.

Given these current controversies, we decided to host a conference to consider the rise of Big Pharma, its role in the declining state of American health, and ideas for reform.

**The result is a free online video series that reveals the truth about Big Pharma.**

When you watch this free video series, you'll learn about the collaboration between the federal government and pharmaceutical companies, the content of the "Pfizer documents," and the origins of Big Pharma and the opioid epidemic.

You'll also gain valuable insights into Anthony Fauci and the public health establishment from Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.

**You can receive instant access to this free video series right now using this secure link:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/big-pharma-cca/](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d45a2ceb7c084e6bbe64aecdefae9ac0&_e=zzVIZpaJoyOzvttyxJDuAUG1S5G7aBZha85JsaYX7OVCpyYNf6nCv20p1KD28i5Jq2Pv1y-RCv-iLz8DEtDyjzp-F4nMzmBx6KwMyOmnnq8pb-FH1icL7CVPr-UjCqxo5cA69oTgg9QXGAch2y6G9DyZMSlUVfsW3ivxqt8jiprTjmgmZefQ_VZm4NVjLXci00Wv3tX6df8DnMGsraIQQUZxTct-YhAwsUDGQhY1IRiX4_fD4dVyBnfH_5eN_nETTA-6vt6ZIJnpbEgFU3b65yvZWeyz9JcIryerFD9hOWb6Mhx1zp9A9efQVVpv5h6zmwNuEXT9jKsDprctH4eXOfnCLbhKmQ6ZE7U1i5WTwI5tl9FVP2SGmob66nLfBam0)**

We filmed the series at a recent Center for Constructive Alternatives conference on the Hillsdale campus. You will not have to watch for long to discover why it was one of our most popular and well-attended events.

**Please use the secure link above to receive your Big Pharma video series. When you complete the form, we will email you the series so you can watch it immediately.**

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844**
**

clean_body: In America, various industries have close ties to government regulators. This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear Friend, In America, various industries have close ties to government regulators. The pharmaceutical industry is one of the most notable and most troubling. Last year alone, "Big Pharma" spent over $373 million on lobbying--much more than any other industry. While the Constitution certainly protects the rights to free speech and to petition the government, it was never intended to grant the special privileges that are characteristic of today's bureaucratic, administrative state. In addition, Big Pharma's reputation has come under attack in the wake of America's opioid epidemic--since 1999, more than 600,000 people have died from opioid overdoses in the U.S. and Canada alone--and the COVID pandemic. Given these current controversies, we decided to host a conference to consider the rise of Big Pharma, its role in the declining state of American health, and ideas for reform. The result is a free online video series that reveals the truth about Big Pharma. When you watch this free video series, you'll learn about the collaboration between the federal government and pharmaceutical companies, the content of the "Pfizer documents," and the origins of Big Pharma and the opioid epidemic. You'll also gain valuable insights into Anthony Fauci and the public health establishment from Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. You can receive instant access to this free video series right now using this secure link: We filmed the series at a recent Center for Constructive Alternatives conference on the Hillsdale campus. You will not have to watch for long to discover why it was one of our most popular and well-attended events. Please use the secure link above to receive your Big Pharma video series. When you complete the form, we will email you the series so you can watch it immediately. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 | | Conservative Liberty Wire 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

name: Marsha Blackburn
subject: Breaking news about my NEW socialist opponent…
body:
Will you step up when I need you the most?

| |
---
| | | **BREAKING: SOCIALIST DEMOCRAT ANNOUNCES CHALLENGE TO MARSHA BLACKBURN IN HIGH-PROFILE SENATE RACE**
Y'all - this is Marsha Blackburn.

I'm rushing to you with urgent news: a socialist Democrat just launched her Senate campaign against me. _She 's a well-connected, Bernie Sanders-style socialist, and I hate to say it, but she's buddies with all the fat cats in Liberal circles. _

Because of what you and I believe in and what I've done in the Senate, I've become a top target for the Radical Left.

By all accounts, this will be one of the most important races in the country, and I desperately need your support. _**[Now that I OFFICIALLY have a socialist opponent with deep, DEEP pockets, I'm humbly asking you to donate to my campaign.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsfpeth1gj1vidt4n4bcqub1vpcb3kovdjtja650_rp22sh2s8i66p71c1h68ob1clh2bs "Now that I OFFICIALLY have a socialist opponent with deep, DEEP pockets, I’m humbly asking you to donate to my campaign. ")**_

---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6b2sna8itg2qh99o8h3ak4q8e5rm5rttktijl8o_rp22sh2s8i66p71c1h68ob1clh2bs "I'm asking you directly to make a meaningful donation to defeat her.")
---
| | [DONATE NOW ->](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zenmgfu3presthprkpf5kaaidrv5jdp0390s5b4o_rp22sh2s8i66p71c1h68ob1clh2bs "DONATE NOW →")
---

The choice is quite clear:

I exposed the Left's woke gender agenda by asking Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson to define a WOMAN. I took on Joe Biden's vaccine mandate AND WON. I'm fighting to build Trump's Wall. I helped pressure Vanderbilt to END child sex change surgeries. I partnered with Riley Gaines to help SAVE women's sports. And I'm a strong Conservative Christian.

My new opponent is as woke as they come. She JUST attended a Bernie Sanders rally in Nashville. She canvassed for Barack Obama. She endorsed Elizabeth Warren for president. And she was the mastermind behind the anti-gun riot that shut down our state legislature.

**National Democrats will do ANYTHING to get her across the finish line and replace me in the U.S. Senate. **

_**[That's why your help is essential to hold them off. I'm reaching out to every Conservative I possibly can for support because this race means everything.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zotjeq3llgru3k6sf6uukaobbre5t999bhn8ot30_rp22sh2s8i66p71c1h68ob1clh2bs "That’s why your help is essential to hold them off. I’m reaching out to every Conservative I possibly can for support because this race means everything.")**_

If my Socialist opponent wins, our path to winning back the Senate will vanish, AND the Democrats will gain a loyal footsoldier in their battle to destroy America as we know it.

You have the power to make a REAL difference in this race.

_Will you step up when I need you the most? _

God bless you & God bless America,

Marsha

name: ElissaSlotkin.org
subject: A Republican opponent has entered this race
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=663%2E135344%2Ex3f4LK)

Friend --
Today, we had some big news in our Senate race: **Former Michigan Congressman, Mike Rogers, announced he is running for the Republican nomination for the open Senate seat here in Michigan.**
**[CONTRIBUTE NOW >>](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-sep23.hbnlDo&refcode=em230907-1-30&t=2&akid=663%2E135344%2Ex3f4LK)**
So what does this mean for us?
Mike Rogers’ announcement sets up a competitive and expensive election for the U.S. Senate in Michigan. **Recent polling has shown that the Presidential and Senate races are both statistical dead-heats, which means we’ll have two close races to win in Michigan next year.**
We know Mike will try to paint himself as a moderate in this race – but his record in Congress speaks for itself. He was repeatedly one of the top recipients of corporate PAC money in all of Congress, and the special interests always got a great return on their investment: Mike protected the companies that shipped Michigan’s jobs to China, supported Big Pharma’s efforts to keep drug prices high, and even voted to cut Medicare and Social Security.
**We know that Mike would support a nationwide ban on abortion even in the cases of rape, incest, and a common miscarriage if it came to a vote in the Senate.**
While there are still other candidates who might jump in the race, National Republicans have made it clear that Michigan is one of their top priorities in their efforts to take control of the Senate and the White House. **That means we need to use this moment and send a clear message that, no matter who our eventual opponent is, this will not be an easy seat to flip in 2024.**
So given this important inflection point in the campaign: **[Would you consider a donation of $3 or whatever you can afford to Elissa Slotkin’s campaign for Senate? The amount isn’t as important as the donation itself, because every one sends a message about the strength of our grassroots campaign.**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-sep23.hbnlDo&refcode=em230907-1-30&amount=3&t=3&akid=663%2E135344%2Ex3f4LK)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

name: Craig Riedel
subject: My friend, what’s your biggest issue headed into 2024?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Riedel For Ohio](craigriedelforcongress
body:
VOTE NOW → | | | [](http://links.craigriedelforcongress.com/u/click?_t=063960b10bde474cb034b193fc03c584&_m=4283ed88f5a94eee814f66a3d52f9986&_e=2AaEXnk7_DxEO199E_DKR1Qt0-U_O_npvxL7YNr1Mvqk7SDGt1ynnWqpuyT-xRABn_H7-iuSDblhWwpTKwcpgnvpulSB8DXs2URUZgmTR57zBG62tnwqIEHuqg-eCvUQRzh_irAPvr9jAjvbStc0mFlTVM3wV8mT-EwbFV6A8whM0AZzb9qmp9X6DocPAg3mt_ql6RpjCAxyFDEAQqJu7m2evPSMkyMg945tyguMpI5ectxjXPTugdFLeV1x1DWPjI4vXNekA-yBCCFrGLcKiL_wYIykHR25swW7bCBCZ3L9_bwRNbfubViplniRm_XUlIt57Ew6_dz2HsE5-w1DEvamfDN_Z8CPBiE1lP3AYkc%3D)
---
My friend, In the world of campaigns, it's all about the people and the issues. We're getting ready for 2024, and we want to hear directly from you about what concerns you most. **Your input will be pivotal in shaping the core issues we'll champion during our campaign. So, let's dive into what's on the table:** **Ending Inflation:** Inflation isn't just a buzzword; it affects our everyday lives. Americans have lost $4,200 in annual income thanks to the Biden administration while credit card debt soars. We must stabilize prices, cut spending, and promote responsibility. **[Click here if inflation is your biggest issue heading into 2024.>>](http://links.craigriedelforcongress.com/u/click?_t=063960b10bde474cb034b193fc03c584&_m=4283ed88f5a94eee814f66a3d52f9986&_e=2AaEXnk7_DxEO199E_DKR1Qt0-U_O_npvxL7YNr1Mvqk7SDGt1ynnWqpuyT-xRAB5DrVuoeF2bFn0tYiMM3oZ2MXfvpstMHzt6_eSQeIFopJEgpansC-F1nDgdq-2-Ge7xp86U3lpR3Y9QOsBK2ESd1M7zTHe_3fv1rUTG7SdmKsPNBgERYjhhRheeHg4JTqiLZZF1SdeXiC1kUgq79sURhvN4NkRfyutKpo0kOgOTM-GKNLbkvPxKpag4ufVDD2eWlouClnn3SNGoRAiGYcal431IyriuUhybJ0O7dFh15AflY4yhCBC9tbrmSFLNmmZXOxivhS8emZKMiO9dDOKb4R1l4KwB-ZbX7x9e9eX3k0PukOpTwgW0nkf4L7Zf73)** **Securing the Border:** National security starts at our borders. We believe in strong border enforcement and immigration policies that prioritize the safety and well-being of all Americans. It's about protecting our country. **[Click here if border security is your biggest issue heading into 2024.>>](http://links.craigriedelforcongress.com/u/click?_t=063960b10bde474cb034b193fc03c584&_m=4283ed88f5a94eee814f66a3d52f9986&_e=2AaEXnk7_DxEO199E_DKR1Qt0-U_O_npvxL7YNr1Mvqk7SDGt1ynnWqpuyT-xRAB5DrVuoeF2bFn0tYiMM3oZ2MXfvpstMHzt6_eSQeIFopJEgpansC-F1nDgdq-2-Ge7xp86U3lpR3Y9QOsBK2ESd1M7zTHe_3fv1rUTG7SdmKsPNBgERYjhhRheeHg4JTqiLZZF1SdeXiC1kUgq79sUc9_r8eH7i7Ev0HWdBxuZ3I2eFfPvfrUYBJq8i0gEa04CS4Q3gXwdTW_VMfTyHNEwC6luhlbFW7PFDT-rdgYfmqZucJviDlZDQaYihnYAaSylTIKWDhWBvVdYeqLLNqS-jC5-unOIZvVP6yesb4jYbjHwD8jS7iLVQjFWEHd8b0S)** **Protecting Family Values:** Traditional family values are the bedrock of our society. America desperately needs policies that promote parental rights, fight ‘wokeness’, and stop far-Left ideologies from destroying the American way of life. **[Click here if protecting family values is your biggest issue heading into 2024.>>](http://links.craigriedelforcongress.com/u/click?_t=063960b10bde474cb034b193fc03c584&_m=4283ed88f5a94eee814f66a3d52f9986&_e=2AaEXnk7_DxEO199E_DKR1Qt0-U_O_npvxL7YNr1Mvqk7SDGt1ynnWqpuyT-xRAB5DrVuoeF2bFn0tYiMM3oZ2MXfvpstMHzt6_eSQeIFopJEgpansC-F1nDgdq-2-Ge7xp86U3lpR3Y9QOsBK2ESd1M7zTHe_3fv1rUTG7SdmKsPNBgERYjhhRheeHg4JTqiLZZF1SdeXiC1kUgq79sUZ83Agz5ryexHhrZBDozU6C7hqgvcyO2OfYM4vOCK1Pr8-pcdnonOFD9uASeU-fLbiF3MUyX36UrUiN-OgfxzDMY7ExnBVpakQZh21XLWKtFr7frooxz4rGmhvpAcOy_fTyQKPQqWqfyS5vN-jYv5bw3ZVlKP1GkOcJ099PTFrKe)** **Fighting Government Corruption:** Corruption undermines trust in our government. We must expose and eliminate corruption at all levels, including the weaponization of the justice system, and bringing accountability to federal agencies. **[Click here if fighting government corruption is your biggest issue heading into 2024.>>](http://links.craigriedelforcongress.com/u/click?_t=063960b10bde474cb034b193fc03c584&_m=4283ed88f5a94eee814f66a3d52f9986&_e=2AaEXnk7_DxEO199E_DKR1Qt0-U_O_npvxL7YNr1Mvqk7SDGt1ynnWqpuyT-xRAB5DrVuoeF2bFn0tYiMM3oZ2MXfvpstMHzt6_eSQeIFopJEgpansC-F1nDgdq-2-Ge7xp86U3lpR3Y9QOsBK2ESd1M7zTHe_3fv1rUTG7SdmKsPNBgERYjhhRheeHg4JTqiLZZF1SdeXiC1kUgq79sUUmeo1AvhkizZ1LZxDzGyFl0aYd0NPOUhw-HAYeOMTmRlelmC0bXFgv57LzWsbeWHjBmoi615IwLh-6sV4yzB2R63SoiQGXwPiD5qUhgl32Xj48rOqz371uiXgKCvjCa8YZZ9df6R1kGOlyXRZXecY8p-wVOv9RfJwVYz3YWoQDD)** My friend, click on the issue that resonates most with you and make a donation to support our cause. **Your contribution will directly fund our efforts to tackle the chosen issue head-on.** If you ever have any questions or ideas, please don't hesitate to reach out. We're in this together, and your voice matters. Faithfully,
---

clean_body: VOTE NOW → | | | My friend, In the world of campaigns, it's all about the people and the issues. We're getting ready for 2024, and we want to hear directly from you about what concerns you most. Your input will be pivotal in shaping the core issues we'll champion during our campaign. So, let's dive into what's on the table: Ending Inflation: Inflation isn't just a buzzword; it affects our everyday lives. Americans have lost $4,200 in annual income thanks to the Biden administration while credit card debt soars. We must stabilize prices, cut spending, and promote responsibility. Securing the Border: National security starts at our borders. We believe in strong border enforcement and immigration policies that prioritize the safety and well-being of all Americans. It's about protecting our country. Protecting Family Values: Traditional family values are the bedrock of our society. America desperately needs policies that promote parental rights, fight ‘wokeness’, and stop far-Left ideologies from destroying the American way of life. Fighting Government Corruption: Corruption undermines trust in our government. We must expose and eliminate corruption at all levels, including the weaponization of the justice system, and bringing accountability to federal agencies. My friend, click on the issue that resonates most with you and make a donation to support our cause. Your contribution will directly fund our efforts to tackle the chosen issue head-on. If you ever have any questions or ideas, please don't hesitate to reach out. We're in this together, and your voice matters. Faithfully, Craig Riedel | | | | ---|--- craigriedelforcongress.com 427 W Dussel Dr. Maumee, OH. 43537 Box 196

I will tell you what no one else on that stage will - **THE ESTABLISHMENT IS LYING TO YOU.**

They cannot be trusted.

What we have, though, is the strength of conviction and the passion of warriors like you.

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

body:

My opponent is Tate Reeves – the most unpopular Republican governor in the nation, one of the most unpopular governors in the nation and a corrupt politician who prioritizes special interests and his wealthy allies over the hardworking families of Mississippi. If you already know what’s at stake, please chip in a gift of $5 or whatever you can right now to be split between my campaign and Blue Amp Action. If not, please read on. Peter we’ve got a code red situation on our hands. Reeves and his big-money friends are putting everything they have into this race because they know just how vulnerable he is. Nearly every poll shows this is a neck-and-neck race! And now that the primary is over, Reeves and his big-money allies are laser-focused on keeping Mississippi red. They’re desperate to send Tate Reeves back to the governor’s office by any means necessary, and they’ll use every trick in their playbook to do it. I know that, together, we can remove this failed governor, put an end to his corruption, and reclaim power for the people. But to make that happen, we need to go all out. Enough is enough. Mississippians deserve a leader who puts them first. I’m running for Governor to do just that. To fight corruption, not embrace it. To serve working people and families, not special interests. And to lead with strength, courage, and real backbone. | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. name: Replace Sinema
subject: Sinema isn’t on the side of working people
body:
Sinema can’t be trusted to protect the interests of working people. | | | Peter – We hope you enjoyed your Labor Day – a hard-won holiday brought to you by American workers and the labor rights movement.
When it comes to protecting the rights of working people, Kyrsten Sinema’s record is pretty awful: 👎She stood in the way of the PRO Act, which would protect the right of workers to unionize 👎She sided with Republicans to oppose overtime pay for more workers 👎She blocked a Labor Department nominee because he supported higher wages for gig workers 👎She blocked President Biden’s Labor Secretary Julie Su, an outspoken advocate for workers rights 👎👎👎And of course, she gave a big ‘thumbs down’ to raising the minimum wage. **[We need to let everyone in Arizona know how Sinema betrayed the working folks that got her elected, chip in to help us spread the word ahead of 2024 >>](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wvY1Jvpfz4i1bEv7EZghTKMub0z9GYz3TmCGCM7VjgZ-YC8711Cgg6GFOVDfEdHhOT87DmUpwndX-FNYN83yCA8_8_r_d6wmflQzXubR6ks0gH-R-04yudh6p754uElSPCBnHu1eFPBdtnDy8Nu0SDkcZ7qBVDrzGmTkw6P3tr7bXPhYhcKeNVr-3Xpb1tge9lSlFumiePx_lyo90krRY0zUIjJzm5AL69n8EJ5-rt4UPDCwCguybchX9zcRstX_BIr1_sKWWpN2E9oxYPfaihNUXQPN3nbL2DKmHS0UAlWaXLj09uu7xH-xQMbteeEFWTJsupQQEgjwuQU2FsguKJ/3zd/Q4couQgaTpaCVX9lueElDQ/h0/p8RtsZx49SzzmOOISHOHzhLPe9SceSa8FMUdtsF3f6I) ** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 now](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wvY1Jvpfz4i1bEv7EZghTKH0QDfz9sspUUBFMdecX0eGnGuiCDvFqzKv1nEdxDNU3vanQygHcJRNkN3F3v3On5o7aOY4onqavVfGnxnqRKjpDrsCZBqHPYNUk5J3Yig-KFV5eTYFFymZ1I79mnZ20t01JyTOew9zAM_OGIkdWMwkZRddj4Y_B1jUlAPBWy36TYADBhsSIC8xs6SHGVyrBQ-E-UxEYTsRj9Uctnp0IXazlw85xv3zfLxe6GrbaWA9peyODoAU_d9HnPPdGl1G-Dtdln23yyS5D4D1BkB6Zv8ChoX8g82BGAp_f_L5DUi8jYaVd1NDjRR99buOodA0957cVuyfvD41HRCmPYdpEZCPHk7A0HtEIBXJK3MmmbnoQ/3zd/Q4couQgaTpaCVX9lueElDQ/h1/LAcqJvz5DcgITMQWY2o_nLvb3e6AUDf9CLkZGSFkafM)

**Sinema’s ‘thumbs down’ on the minimum wage shows exactly what Sinema thinks about hard working, everyday Americans.**
Yet even while opposing raising wages for hourly workers, Sinema saw fit to award massive tax breaks to billionaires and Wall Street – including a special loophole worth $18 billion per year for private equity – which has funneled heaps of money into her campaign accounts, which she then uses to fund her jet setting life of luxury. Sinema has been caught over and over using campaign money for trips to Paris, stays at the finest hotels, and meals at the fanciest restaurants in the world.
When it comes to Sinema, we’ll always know where her loyalties lie. With millionaire donors, corporate executives, and Wall Street, not with her constituents.
**[Make a contribution now to help us hold Sinema accountable for selling out. Together, we’ll make sure she’s replaced by a Senator who will fight for working families, not rich Wall Street fat cats>>>](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wvY1Jvpfz4i1bEv7EZghTKRXeIMNmil5cHnPf_LXhEFAI8s-91gJMx7-sNH8X--Lwbxt-pw-SruSRZbZBo0gJYibSj9Py__hJCSGjp7SWOpW3v7p2kZ9x8t4_AtxeDsOCJnCAyLgJG_YJb9A1v10ie9hrDfS66oFH3gD_G7lH4qbcw30ocM5F2XkpdYxXapKsJIgf9egAWZoCPolUVrL52nVzfK4imPz97B8ge0xanI6_j6fXI15fNkamv4t2rEbmIKZ-1ZD9tbVRGytPnzjNztD-011fKdYF4zdWkuqNeazbKysrtJ_A1xtkMbHpHZ8V-eXM3One7MQX6fAqwzQUq/3zd/Q4couQgaTpaCVX9lueElDQ/h8/fHkESVx5BbTHwVqFkcrMudwzIZBWu5rJgsNpSXV76nE)**
Sellout Sinema’s days are numbered!
-Replace Sinema and Change for Arizona 2024

Sinema has been caught over and over using campaign money for trips to Paris, stays at the finest hotels, and meals at the fanciest restaurants in the world. When it comes to Sinema, we’ll always know where her loyalties lie. With millionaire donors, corporate executives, and Wall Street, not with her constituents. Sellout Sinema’s days are numbered! -Replace Sinema and Change for Arizona 2024 | | Sent via . **Good morning!** On this date in 1901, President William McKinley was assassinated by anarchist Leon Czolgosz as the two shook hands. It was the [third presidential assassination](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LFu5CAQgOGnsbu1YAAvLiiucXV7zel0JRqZYXcSDJYZ7SpvHyV9yr_79f2_xRty4Xr_gzsFyS3iJvykCFEtl_kCJsKYQiYCMiMFPS9WaefAj49gczY4O5vzYjc_XzVi9tqggeQ90HXkAAqMWtSsrfIOJnRaKzJpgbxZ591gFSWWdk5vjas8KJeP9qRz2to-lvAQOfpgfg2wDrBSnV78zgclxqmd9wHWrx5g_c1dYsvxX2WhFP8KCvV4nNQ5URXGErF37J0rCrcaUYT2Q3rEmuJRmvTxDOl4cSnc5-tg1X1HLt8b8gPLZwAAAP__bQ1oXw) after Abraham Lincoln and James Garfield.

## Sen. Vance Pushes Bill to Ban Mask Mandates
Ohio Sen. J.D. Vance said he would introduce a bill Tuesday to [stop any federal official,](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LFu7CAQQNGvwZ2tYcAYFxSvcbevTWlhmFkT4WWDyVr5-yjp01_pSufttt58yulx_-8Pco3L6kNLL1pxhbk3PaoVu-iYCEl15KSZNchxRNvtLswalFZ-YgYL2lhF2kYGq4NXZKBLDgEVzGCkBjvi4EcpgVSckYMe7Sg0UEyt1OG9pEfbifNXeVEdQjm67PbWnqdQ_wQuApfruoa2U6BHo3p-fPpKP53ApeypCFx8bSlkWk3kDU30vd6YeymJejvx1PM2MSqpNphh2NuRu-ri80o5p9NMQsP98Cn_vtsfFt8BAAD__0B1Xp0) including the president, from implementing a mask mandate through the end of 2024. Vance's bill, titled the [Freedom to Breathe Act](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00L9yozAQgPGngU6MWASGQsU1dL72SmYtrcxe9IeRZEjePuP0qX_NN9-_-3ZH9hyffzGQri5taCqftMEmFzEJGDZorXZEQENLup8WJftxhLndNVmSiLOzs1XGWTlJ9QAz9I8bKsLx1rIGCYNc5NQrOY_Q4dj3kga7gDNqnMdGSbJcU-7-J451J-e_0km5Mym0Xu-1HqUZ_jSwNrBe19W59BnpKm9vYD2S58qmNLCeGA0JjjUn-zIkAmF5ZRJHppNi5fgUjixl9CI5x4bRF8HhSOVNAcuHCBgtViqimD0lXwRyPjxGKm3W9rjYey7TrVHyGZD9T2P95dl3AAAA___RB3OM), would prevent the government from requiring masks for airplane flights, public transit, or school, and it would also bar school and transportation officials from refusing service to anyone not wearing a mask. The move comes in the wake of several facilities reimposing mask mandates. President Biden is now wearing a mask because [Jill Biden has a mild case of Covid,](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2O8yAQAJ8Gd1iw_MQUFF_jLl97pUVgSTbCxjIovrz9KddfPcVo5uu6XAMV2u7_w4q-57qE2OmFCyzCcctBLTAknxEB1YBeWqeFNAam4eFvBkKQ0omctLTBmUll1Mm6i0pJRTuQBwFKOGGlFpOBMRgpBarkIEdtJsO0wES9HuOz0tYfmMu7vvAYY12H4h-9742pfwxmBvN5nmOu3xue7cMZzHst1Ck2BnOmo3VeQnrzJ5XCb5Rw4x1bb3yvjT5RPNYXJd4w1i3xTisOh0_7SaVQsxemxX0NVH7l_Y8ZPwEAAP__9WxjDg) despite having been double-vaccinated and twice boosted.
## United Snafu Halts Flights for an Hour
United Airlines asked the FAA to issue a [ground stop Tuesday](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LGOqzAQheGnMZ2RPWAHCoo0dLnVlbZEDoxhVsaO7CEo-_SrpN_y6GuO_q_bdHMUKK7_3I4D-zS5memJE0yql1ZCM0G1DB4RsKlw0LZvlTYGumobVN86hU7f1d3DrO3FzGAbZ-_azG1ndEUDKGhUr6xuVWegdkZrhc3Sg59b0xnRKlyIU66_E0Xe0IdXemKu57RXYdiYH0U0VwGjgPE8z3ov8W0CRozyKAJGzu6JQcAY8XzvIxLjIh3lQBGLzFiOHYv0gdaNiwzkucjomFI8aUG55nTERRZOD-k8Y5blVRj3DzLOW0whrS9JpRwoYHRZXq963X7-2yoPy-OkEKjYi2jVujsKn-_8R8vfAAAA__8MNnmU) that lasted an hour while the airline struggled with a system-wide technology slowdown.

Hundreds of flights were delayed and several were canceled through the morning. United blamed the problem on [a software update that slowed](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFuwyAYhJ8Gb1j4x5AwMGTxlg5dOloIfhwqDAhwrLx9leyd7qS74dP3c1_vJsSQti-zo-4-r8b28MQVVqaopMBXGJz2iIB8QD1JNbNJCLgOD239xfMLKj5ZYa0xRglUUnrlnEKp_BA0MOBMMTnN7CpgNGKaGHKnwNtZXAWZGbrQcx1_c0j9gT6-8hPraPM-RP3ovTTCbwQWAst5nuPe0nsjsGCiRyOwJDzf8elHCh0dNaHGkLDRZl6Ntuz7aSrSozjTkZaa9_K-bTUfydHWcyGwmEpvt2kLpX0PVbtyhhhDkxcys203IX6Q-j-K_gIAAP__O6Rqow) its computer systems to a crawl.

The airline's stock dropped 2.5% during the day, and federal officials said they'd be investigating the incident. United said no cybersecurity issues were involved.
## 'Top 100 Places to Live' List Cuts Out Big Cities
People seeking the best place to live while avoiding big cities have a new interactive guide that ranks only towns with a population between 75,000 and 500,000. [The Top 100 Best Places to Live in the U.S.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LFuwyAQxvGngY0IDnDwwNDFW7p2tM74HF9FghVfXeXtq3Tq0vn_ST_p-7iMF-TK9-s73ijL0kYswgeNMNredAb8CHrOCxGQ15Rd1wfrYoSk1xywCxPGqUwpOiyunF3BuQdYUopnj5ozWPC2t50LNkU4YXTOkp97WEqIKapgaWZpj9Nn47ustNRnO-hxKu2ma15Ftl35NwWDgqHygRNXlucrKxgm2sVsFQvtCoYXZaRtxllr_iQjzVQ-yPDdyErm6zXWjzxv31wr791ZBXu9IddfVf554ScAAP__kkRdsQ) list offers users a tool to choose their own criteria for ranking the 100 cities by factors such as amenities, education, affordability, healthcare, and so on. No. 1 on the overall list is John's Creek, GA. If ranked by safety, Rochester Hills, MI, is No. 1, and ranked by cost of living, the top city is Des Moines, IA, where the median home value is $177,000. [You can sort the list here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL1ygzAQhJ9GdOeRTj82hYo0dE6bkhHoMJeREQNnMn77jF2lSf3t7O58X9f-mrjwcvtMd4oy1T6Nwgf12OsWAqDtsclxIkKyDUUTWqeN93hp5jihti6MNqRhaM_-bJzBloIzOeGUMzYcUaPVrQ7G6YvHU_LGaLK5xWl0_uKV05RZ6nb6rrzITFN51oO201jvTYmzyLor-6GwU9gVPtLAheX5wgq7gXaBtaSRdoXdawqkrmC0hj8IpELhg4AXkJngsb_r7CtaF4L5seSNMhTepdliXn-4FN7DWTl9uycu7zPyj5zfAAAA___uPWVw).

clean_body: Ohio Sen. J.D. Vance said he would introduce a bill Tuesday to stop any federal official, including the president, from implementing a mask mandate through the end of 2024. | | | | | | WEDNESday, SEPT. 6, 2023 ---|--- Good morning! On this date in 1901, President William McKinley was assassinated by anarchist Leon Czolgosz as the two shook hands. It was the after Abraham Lincoln and James Garfield. Today is Wisdom Wednesday in our Rotator section, and we're offering the secrets to living a happy, regret-free life -- plus a few instructive, very short stories! If this is your first time reading The Flyover , - and make sure you don't miss our next edition. Want to follow along on Facebook? . Enjoying the Flyover? Take a moment to check out today's sponsor, . | Sen. Vance Pushes Bill to Ban Mask Mandates Ohio Sen. J.D. Vance said he would introduce a bill Tuesday to including the president, from implementing a mask mandate through the end of 2024. Vance's bill, titled the , would prevent the government from requiring masks for airplane flights, public transit, or school, and it would also bar school and transportation officials from refusing service to anyone not wearing a mask. The move comes in the wake of several facilities reimposing mask mandates. President Biden is now wearing a mask because despite having been double-vaccinated and twice boosted. United Snafu Halts Flights for an Hour United Airlines asked the FAA to issue a that lasted an hour while the airline struggled with a system-wide technology slowdown. Hundreds of flights were delayed and several were canceled through the morning. United blamed the problem on its computer systems to a crawl. The airline's stock dropped 2.5% during the day, and federal officials said they'd be investigating the incident. United said no cybersecurity issues were involved. 'Top 100 Places to Live' List Cuts Out Big Cities People seeking the best place to live while avoiding big cities have a new interactive guide that ranks only towns with a population between 75,000 and 500,000. list offers users a tool to choose their own criteria for ranking the 100 cities by factors such as amenities, education, affordability, healthcare, and so on. No. 1 on the overall list is John's Creek, GA. If ranked by safety, Rochester Hills, MI, is No. 1, and ranked by cost of living, the top city is Des Moines, IA, where the median home value is $177,000. . James Comer subpoenaed Homeland Security Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas and several Secret Service officials for testimony related to a tipoff to the Biden transition team of a Hunter Biden tax probe interview. () ➤ Sen. Mitch McConnell didn't have a seizure or a stroke after he froze for 30 seconds, said Brian Monahan, Congress' attending physician. Monahan gave McConnell both MRI and EEG exams last week. () ➤Ex-Proud Boys leader Enrique Tarrio was sentenced to 22 years in prison Tuesday for his participation in the events of Jan. 6, the longest sentence to date given to anyone charged in the case. ()➤ The Texas Senate on Tuesday denied all of GOP Atty. Gen. Ken Paxton's motions to dismiss impeachment charges as he pleaded not guilty to accusations of corruption. The impeachment has divided the Texas GOP. () Flying together with: Trust in Big Banks Is at an All-Time Low Most financial advisors at banks are armed with one singular goal -- convert financial insecurity and fear into paying money. And the headlines they put out do just that -- "9%+ inflation is eating away at your savings," "Soaring interest rates have wiped $4T from equity markets." The win was arguably the biggest upset in college football this weekend. () ➤ Team USA bounced back at the Basketball World Cup, easily defeating Italy 100-63 to escape elimination. The team will play next in the semifinals. name: Team Deluzio

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRIS DELUZIO FOR CONGRESS
body:
Let's keep up the good work for the Common Good.

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69283880/425657865/-1807168276?refcode=wrpr_hdr&ms=230906_team_augustrecap&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjFhODA3ZS1iZjRjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kiRYrEDVfnprPm939hYigz31zUkB3LPfFXDHmfqJiJ8=)
---
Hi Derek, This August, Chris and Team Deluzio got things done in Washington and right here in Western PA. Chris hit the pavement to hear from voters, brought millions of dollars in funding to build safe infrastructure in our neighborhoods, and fought for workers on the picket lines. [**We're excited to share our August recap with you, but first, Derek, we wanted to ask – will you consider chipping in whatever you can to make sure we can keep fighting for the good people of Western PA and keep the pressure up on the right-wing extremists who are running against Chris?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69283881/425657866/-1807168276?refcode=team_augustrecap_l1&ms=230906_team_augustrecap&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjFhODA3ZS1iZjRjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kiRYrEDVfnprPm939hYigz31zUkB3LPfFXDHmfqJiJ8=) **[Chip in](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69283882/425657867/-1807168276?refcode=team_augustrecap_b1&ms=230906_team_augustrecap&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjFhODA3ZS1iZjRjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kiRYrEDVfnprPm939hYigz31zUkB3LPfFXDHmfqJiJ8=)** First up in our August recap, Chris spent an afternoon at the Indiana Township Democratic Committee Picnic – hearing from an exciting slate of candidates running to represent the PA-17 community in this November’s elections. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69283883/425657868/-1807168276?refcode=team_augustrecap_img_1&ms=230906_team_augustrecap&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjFhODA3ZS1iZjRjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kiRYrEDVfnprPm939hYigz31zUkB3LPfFXDHmfqJiJ8=) Millions of workers right now are standing up to corporate jagoffs and demanding the benefits and working conditions that they've earned. Chris joined SAG-AFTRA on the picket line in Western PA for their national day of solidarity. **We're proud to be union strong.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69283884/425657869/-1807168276?refcode=team_augustrecap_img_2&ms=230906_team_augustrecap&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjFhODA3ZS1iZjRjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kiRYrEDVfnprPm939hYigz31zUkB3LPfFXDHmfqJiJ8=) Chris joined the members of AFGE District 3 who make our government and critical programs run — members include nurses, law enforcement, and countless others who are fighting for the common good. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69283885/425657870/-1807168276?refcode=team_augustrecap_img_3&ms=230906_team_augustrecap&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjFhODA3ZS1iZjRjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kiRYrEDVfnprPm939hYigz31zUkB3LPfFXDHmfqJiJ8=) Finally, Chris went to the Millvale Rally for Our Rights event to stand with members of his community in support of the freedoms that right wing extremists are all too eager to take away. Chris will always stand up for the right to an abortion and the rights of the LGBTQ community. clean_body: Let's keep up the good work for the Common Good. | | = Hi Derek, This August, Chris and Team Deluzio got things done in Washington and right here in Western PA. Chris hit the pavement to hear from voters, brought millions of dollars in funding to build safe infrastructure in our neighborhoods, and fought for workers on the picket lines. = = First up in our August recap, Chris spent an afternoon at the Indiana Township Democratic Committee Picnic – hearing from an exciting slate of candidates running to represent the PA-17 community in this November’s elections. = Millions of workers right now are standing up to corporate jagoffs and demanding the benefits and working conditions that they've earned. Chris joined SAG-AFTRA on the picket line in Western PA for their national day of solidarity. We're proud to be union strong. = Chris joined the members of AFGE District 3 who make our government and critical programs run — members include nurses, law enforcement, and countless others who are fighting for the common good. = Finally, Chris went to the Millvale Rally for Our Rights event to stand with members of his community in support of the freedoms that right wing extremists are all too eager to take away. Chris will always stand up for the right to an abortion and the rights of the LGBTQ community. = That wraps up our August recap, Derek. Thanks for being part of Team Deluzio, and we look forward to your continued support on the campaign trail. – Team Deluzio | Chris Deluzio is a voting rights lawyer and Iraq war veteran running for Congress in Pennsylvania's 17th District. He'll be a champion for our unions, fight to guarantee good healthcare for every American, take on corporate power, and advocate for bold action to protect and strengthen our democracy. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country. name: Nikki Haley
subject: I have faith in your love for our country
body:
Our moment is now - and our mission is clear.

| |
---
| | | Friend,

Hey, it's Nikki! I wanted to share a quick update with you.

Thanks to grassroots supporters, we finished off the month of August stronger than ever! We held standing-room-only events across Iowa, New Hampshire, and South Carolina, met with thousands of voters across the country, WON the first presidential debate, AND had our best fundraising month ever!

But, this is still the beginning of our journey to the White House.

**[As we begin a new month on the campaign, I wanted to remind you why I am running for president and why your support matters.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1f6888511f6c4fe0a18c59d020a7f560&_e=1LVcup-DdJGzAYfYKCPJzXhqeHkbnbYqc2KFzMVx9Oew354u9sG64WqRViUiTNZGiP9KBHIU0d3fR6mx4mO3VuwpHa6LO9cu-H5l4KqF-ed76UgWuNeNy9vKGvduG9A2wv1ivvgCeqdTEUggP8zsT_zsXBZV3JUYk_VQnCBTj3CQ7cBWQxypAAQG3rlTiqm9uQXAxFqhFly785FCRtmifCMiDILvOhRM2G5xdBeaDzjJzqlfgwlRRfRDaLHBH470H3xdIDGnY2xgn5kt5zZq0sl9yrjMl9BcpAnGgx0gC1R4Xu7-ar5cFjgfpj6FpoVXVSG3LdvMpNW6te3vpKwVaxrqpF0ycJ_kFkAJqD41-ecLiuy35kd2iDUKIUane7_j-SfUrLseKjgLDA36sI7hTg%3D%3D "As we begin a new month on the campaign, I wanted to remind you why I am running for president and why your support matters. ")**

I'm a wife of a combat veteran, a mother of two, and a proud daughter of legal immigrants. I have watched the American Dream unfold before me.

_**But, with the Democrats in power, our future is slipping. **_

Right now, we have too many families paying too much for groceries; too many small businesses who can't afford rent, and too many big businesses getting taxpayer bailouts.

We have too much crime on our streets - too many drugs flooding our cities - and too few police and border patrol.

And from Joe Biden on down, our leaders put too much trust in big government and too little trust in the American people.

They have us spiraling toward socialism, with a new trillion-dollar spending bill every few months, and a national debt over 32 trillion dollars.

This is not the America I want to leave to my children!

I am running for president to save our country from the downward spiral of socialism and defeatism. **I aim to move America upward toward freedom and strength.**

We are in an uphill battle to save our country's future, and I need your help. Your continued support is so important. **[Can I count on you?](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1f6888511f6c4fe0a18c59d020a7f560&_e=1LVcup-DdJGzAYfYKCPJzXhqeHkbnbYqc2KFzMVx9Oew354u9sG64WqRViUiTNZGiP9KBHIU0d3fR6mx4mO3VuwpHa6LO9cu-H5l4KqF-ed76UgWuNeNy9vKGvduG9A2wv1ivvgCeqdTEUggP8zsT_zsXBZV3JUYk_VQnCBTj3CQ7cBWQxypAAQG3rlTiqm9uQXAxFqhFly785FCRtmifCMiDILvOhRM2G5xdBeaDzjJzqlfgwlRRfRDaLHBH470gfSLUwiIt88RKtDKJkVmOS0KTE0WFMAqqYWwpamaZTOYIirxGCbm0F75H3dn68dt3yiJV5uDYh-YWkpfgXR8ZP0xJWBOhR_hMZbJpiU-khEGG9vnc7RovlKw-KaHeGrttHSn7v5i8WRu-_wQAjH2BA%3D%3D "Can I count on you?")**

**I want you to join me in this fight to save America 's future because our country is always worth fighting for. **

As a brown girl, growing up in a black-and-white world, I saw the promise of America unfold before me.

As the proud wife of a combat veteran, I saw our people's deep love of freedom, and determination to defend it.

As Governor, I saw our state move beyond hate and violence, and lift everyone in peace.

And as Ambassador, I saw that America is still the standard.

Our moment is now - and our mission is clear.

Let's save our country and secure our future. And let's move forward, together, toward our destiny - in a strong and proud America!

**[I appreciate your support more than you can imagine. If you can join me today by chipping in, it would mean so much to me.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1f6888511f6c4fe0a18c59d020a7f560&_e=1LVcup-DdJGzAYfYKCPJzXhqeHkbnbYqc2KFzMVx9Oew354u9sG64WqRViUiTNZGiP9KBHIU0d3fR6mx4mO3VuwpHa6LO9cu-H5l4KqF-ed76UgWuNeNy9vKGvduG9A2wv1ivvgCeqdTEUggP8zsT_zsXBZV3JUYk_VQnCBTj3CQ7cBWQxypAAQG3rlTiqm9uQXAxFqhFly785FCRtmifCMiDILvOhRM2G5xdBeaDzjJzqlfgwlRRfRDaLHBH470E7ZBqtOFGyt3C7xVmBLUMBG8NIIzHzEP6HV1FAZ5Elg6LtwGbrm63zcdMOvVzEDTtJGS9Wk3KiFJ8b2IakVCFcI_hqqQTBlMxEfZa6hVuBnuYo9nZOCfEPkhiazOvRFnowabkz8SCxrgnpBriR3C-g%3D%3D "I appreciate your support more than you can imagine. If you can join me today by chipping in, it would mean so much to me.")**

clean_body: Our moment is now - and our mission is clear. | | | | | Friend, Hey, it's Nikki! I wanted to share a quick update with you. Thanks to grassroots supporters, we finished off the month of August stronger than ever! We held standing-room-only events across Iowa, New Hampshire, and South Carolina, met with thousands of voters across the country, WON the first presidential debate, AND had our best fundraising month ever! But, this is still the beginning of our journey to the White House. "As we begin a new month on the campaign, I wanted to remind you why I am running for president and why your support matters. " I'm a wife of a combat veteran, a mother of two, and a proud daughter of legal immigrants. I have watched the American Dream unfold before me. But, with the Democrats in power, our future is slipping. Right now, we have too many families paying too much for groceries; too many small businesses who can't afford rent, and too many big businesses getting taxpayer bailouts. We have too much crime on our streets - too many drugs flooding our cities - and too few police and border patrol. And from Joe Biden on down, our leaders put too much trust in big government and too little trust in the American people. They have us spiraling toward socialism, with a new trillion-dollar spending bill every few months, and a national debt over 32 trillion dollars. This is not the America I want to leave to my children! I am running for president to save our country from the downward spiral of socialism and defeatism. I aim to move America upward toward freedom and strength. We are in an uphill battle to save our country's future, and I need your help. Your continued support is so important. "Can I count on you?" I want you to join me in this fight to save America 's future because our country is always worth fighting for. As a brown girl, growing up in a black-and-white world, I saw the promise of America unfold before me. As the proud wife of a combat veteran, I saw our people's deep love of freedom, and determination to defend it. As Governor, I saw our state move beyond hate and violence, and lift everyone in peace. And as Ambassador, I saw that America is still the standard. Our moment is now - and our mission is clear. Let's save our country and secure our future. And let's move forward, together, toward our destiny - in a strong and proud America! "I appreciate your support more than you can imagine. If you can join me today by chipping in, it would mean so much to me." | | My very best, | Nikki Haley | Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc. and . . Contributions are not tax-deductible. Team Stand For America does not accept contributions from foreign nationals. | Defend the Constitution 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Tom Barrett for Congress
subject: End of Summer
body:
Back to business... | | | [](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=64f88d45f32d747e4e20fb61&u=https%3A%2F%2Ftombarrettforcongress.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D64f75a7c66dc6a5d018a70be%26ss_email_id%3D64f88d45f32d747e4e20fb61%26ss_campaign_name%3DEnd%2Bof%2BSummer%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2023-09-06T14%253A37%253A37Z&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_64f75a7c66dc6a5d018a70be&l=en-US&s=9PbuBeNGTOU-B7HswhwWqXdRuU4%3D)
---
| I’m writing this on this final weekend of summer as my family and I enjoyed one more cook out. The kids went back to school last week, and it’s been two months since I announced my candidacy for Congress.Since Joe Biden got elected, inflation has reached historic levels, gas prices have nearly doubled, the deficit has climbed $5 trillion, violent crime has skyrocketed, our Southern border is in crisis, and fentanyl is now the number one killer of Americans ages 18-45. Meanwhile, our schools have become a battlefield for the culture wars and our justice system has one set of laws for Republicans, and no set of laws for Democrats.**It's getting harder to make ends meet, and it seems like no one is standing up for us.**
---
[_ _**I support you Tom!**_ _](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=64f88d45f32d747e4e20fb61&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Ftom-barrett-for-congress%2Fendofsummer&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_64f75a7c66dc6a5d018a70be&l=en-US&s=bBdgXFkypaN85pKAJTfZAc4sZ4s%3D)
---
Last year, I came just short of defeating Democratic Congresswoman Elissa Slotkin, who outspent me $11 million to $3 million. But now I’m running against her hand-picked successor, Curtis Hertel, Jr., in an “open seat” that is **already ranked the most competitive district in the nation.** While I spent 22 years serving our country in the U.S. Army, my opponent spent 22 years as a career politician. Hopping from office to office, he became Gretchen Whitmer’s top ally in the Senate, and once he was forced out by term limits, she made him her top lobbyist, pushing through the most radical overhaul of state government in Michigan history.
---
Curtis is a self-described progressive who **voted to give your tax dollars to a Chinese Communist-owned corporation, voted to raise your taxes, and supports a 45 cent per gallon gas tax.** He’s a longtime Democratic Party insider with endorsements from Governor Whitmer, Senator Debbie Stabenow, and Congresswoman Slotkin. _He is the swamp._
---
[_ _**Make the 7th Red!**_ _](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=64f88d45f32d747e4e20fb61&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Ftom-barrett-for-congress%2Fendofsummer&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_64f75a7c66dc6a5d018a70be&l=en-US&s=bBdgXFkypaN85pKAJTfZAc4sZ4s%3D)
---
I’m a proud America First conservative who served our country and will fight for our values in Congress. It’s time to end the woke nonsense in Washington and put mid-Michigan families’ priorities ahead of the woke corporations and the Washington elites.That’s why I need your help. I can’t risk being outspent 4-1 again if we are going to win and need your help if I am going to fight back.[Can you consider a donation to our campaign and make sure we make the 7th District RED again!](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=64f88d45f32d747e4e20fb61&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Ftom-barrett-for-congress%2Fendofsummer&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_64f75a7c66dc6a5d018a70be&l=en-US&s=bBdgXFkypaN85pKAJTfZAc4sZ4s%3D)I know times are difficult right now, but if we don’t win, they’ll get even harder. Please consider a donation and join the Barrett Brigade in taking back the 7th District.Thank you and God Bless!
---
|
---
[_ _**Join the Barrett Brigade** _ _](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=64f88d45f32d747e4e20fb61&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Ftom-barrett-for-congress%2Fendofsummer&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_64f75a7c66dc6a5d018a70be&l=en-US&s=bBdgXFkypaN85pKAJTfZAc4sZ4s%3D)
---
|
---

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: I want to know your thoughts
body:
I'm reaching out today about an important issue that's close to my heart

|
---
| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=078086e333094774a777f85027577b07&_e=PgMBRSq8sVjffJL47nKkNm8CNTC9CtEvXuwC1tZ1kQ0arqaMtged1xdm73Q8vu8uioakiL-XYsyQZ-t7Sxj7BT2dJ2g3cfDeyoKhFZCqCvwWBLk_jsJZy9stXViJSDLfb8c0AklYWOSA4sNJGRGKLN4MUQm-s4DF3R-DWL8ULshYbCyO8balM07qDR4hjYK-AfPEmeoRe9zZJ6eYM4aLz1xyFiJdDXFtbSNQo6c1DSctM959YhjKE-c7YAXyZSgLN1NW11NGDNbCFXM4V7FpLMzdRq2ZqBCQ2kRgb8wNV2XrCzj8SLfXQoYp5PyNuQ9HnPABs1bVrKAyNYDAhXKBHTsIz9uVLJ1qaT05C1rcRMNi5j2gyvhZf32zASv5MsCrVn3UZoZMjH3WIi2LPW8SzYFd-ANAQsN8N6k_uOfnexM%3D)
---
| Dear Fellow Patriot,

I hope this message finds you well. I'm reaching out today about an important issue that's close to my heart and, I believe, relevant to all of us.

In the current climate, our religious liberty, a foundational tenet of our nation, faces an increasing number of challenges. These are especially concerning for those of us who hold to biblical and faith-based values. [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=078086e333094774a777f85027577b07&_e=PgMBRSq8sVjffJL47nKkNm8CNTC9CtEvXuwC1tZ1kQ0arqaMtged1xdm73Q8vu8uioakiL-XYsyQZ-t7Sxj7BT2dJ2g3cfDeyoKhFZCqCvwWBLk_jsJZy9stXViJSDLfb8c0AklYWOSA4sNJGRGKLN4MUQm-s4DF3R-DWL8ULshYbCyO8balM07qDR4hjYK-AfPEmeoRe9zZJ6eYM4aLz1xyFiJdDXFtbSNQo6c1DSctM959YhjKE-c7YAXyZSgLN1NW11NGDNbCFXM4V7FpLM5r9BanZcH6Ni4_hkfJR4UAjJZNlUouXCSjsYaFEOJGZsprKKkIsnzYultfqPypPQeyY2mpzTJaTDpg-gpaxL0XFmztkiwuG_ukFO0WOHRiiIzwvRYIBW2RFsSQ0uEifVEmOxe34yTVoz2lqdrgGnU%3D)
With societal shifts and new legal precedents, including the recently passed Respect for Marriage Act, the ability to practice and express our faith openly may face unprecedented threats.

These changes may allow the federal government to exert pressure on schools, businesses, and organizations that adhere to their religious beliefs. I fear this might lead to intensified legal persecution against those wishing to live according to their faith.

As engaged citizens, it's crucial we understand this situation and its potential impact on our religious freedom.

Please take a moment to share your insights by completing this 2-minute survey: [https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=078086e333094774a777f85027577b07&_e=PgMBRSq8sVjffJL47nKkNm8CNTC9CtEvXuwC1tZ1kQ0arqaMtged1xdm73Q8vu8uioakiL-XYsyQZ-t7Sxj7BT2dJ2g3cfDeyoKhFZCqCvwWBLk_jsJZy9stXViJSDLfb8c0AklYWOSA4sNJGRGKLN4MUQm-s4DF3R-DWL8ULshYbCyO8balM07qDR4hjYK-AfPEmeoRe9zZJ6eYM4aLz1xyFiJdDXFtbSNQo6c1DSctM959YhjKE-c7YAXyZSgLN1NW11NGDNbCFXM4V7FpLDM2jQcRh3XUj3brofeHQeMg3jwUCKtGnCLEXAOxI1soN7clo7pCD02AxOaem_24bVPvDuG-vY3XAVQfJm7drxFusrNcfloKxIbPnyJ1DejJNC77mJAmbZtWn0VD7qEJyZsEYWcml-hQrQq0KaqaR2s%3D)

Your contribution will guide our efforts to alert fellow Americans of the threats to our religious liberty and defend our First Amendment rights.

Let's uphold the integrity of our Constitution and protect the pillars that make our nation great: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Thank you for your attention to this matter.

Yours sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

---

---
---

clean_body: I'm reaching out today about an important issue that's close to my heart | | | | | Dear Fellow Patriot, I hope this message finds you well. I'm reaching out today about an important issue that's close to my heart and, I believe, relevant to all of us. In the current climate, our religious liberty, a foundational tenet of our nation, faces an increasing number of challenges. These are especially concerning for those of us who hold to biblical and faith-based values. With societal shifts and new legal precedents, including the recently passed Respect for Marriage Act, the ability to practice and express our faith openly may face unprecedented threats. These changes may allow the federal government to exert pressure on schools, businesses, and organizations that adhere to their religious beliefs. I fear this might lead to intensified legal persecution against those wishing to live according to their faith. As engaged citizens, it's crucial we understand this situation and its potential impact on our religious freedom. Please take a moment to share your insights by completing this 2-minute survey: Your contribution will guide our efforts to alert fellow Americans of the threats to our religious liberty and defend our First Amendment rights. Let's uphold the integrity of our Constitution and protect the pillars that make our nation great: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life. Thank you for your attention to this matter. Yours sincerely, Dr. Ben Carson Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute | | Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens. | | Copyright(C) 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved. Conservatives Give 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

**Meet Ron DeSantis**

| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---

Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

The rabidly anti-Trump Attorney General in New York is now seeking an _**IMMEDIATE**_ **VERDICT** against me **WITHOUT** **A** **TRIAL**.

**My constitutional rights are being ripped to shreds.**

Politicians, drunk with power, are weaponizing the legal system to try and completely destroy me – and, ultimately, imprison me for the rest of my life as an innocent man.

_If you’re doing poorly right now due to the people who would rather see me imprisoned than actually help the citizens of our country who are crying out for help, then don’t even think about donating. I completely understand._

But, after every single witch hunt, our movement has only grown stronger! subject: Judicial Watch: Pfizer Records Reveal 23-Person Study of COVID Vaccine Booster Safety and Effectiveness before Approval
body:
Judicial Watch released 58 pages of records from the U.S. Food and
Drug Administration (FDA) showing that a Pfizer study surveyed 23
people in 2021 to gauge reactions to its COVID vaccine booster before
asking the FDA to approve it. The FDA indicated that this production
of records “represents our complete response to your request; no
additional productions are anticipated.”

people in 2021 to gauge reactions to its COVID vaccine booster before
asking the FDA to approve it. The FDA indicated that this production
of records “represents our complete response to your request; no
additional productions are anticipated.”

body:
A critical special election will take place in Pennsylvania in less than two weeks. Will you join us as we stand against extreme Republicans? | | |

| | **In _less than_ two weeks, one vacant legislative seat in Pennsylvania will determine which party will control the state House.** Since Democrats flipped the Pennsylvania House last year and broke the GOP’s grip on the state legislature, we’ve defended our narrow majority in _four_ special elections. But now, the Pennsylvania House is TIED once again, and we need to fend off a right-wing power grab in _another_ special election THIS MONTH. Losing this seat not only cedes chamber control back to the GOP, but it also means giving a QAnon conspiracy theorist and Jan. 6th insurrectionist a voice in PA’s legislature.** [With the Pennsylvania House TIED and our majority teetering on the edge, we need you. In July, the first anti-abortion extremist jumped into the race for CO-08. Now, we just got word that another Republican - _who wants to prohibit abortion in almost all circumstances_ \- wants to defeat Yadira, too.

Whoever Yadira’s opponent turns out to be, either of these extremists will seriously threaten reproductive freedom in Colorado and across the nation.
