name: Team Lizzie
subject: #TeamLizzie Update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folf230905nl?refcode=folf230905nl [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folf230905nl?refcode=folf230905nl]
Thank you to all who contributed before our end-of-August deadline and before the Labor Day weekend. We are so grateful for you and your support.
And we are grateful to our friends in Labor for their work in support of our efforts and in support of working families everywhere. Each year, we celebrate on Labor Day the people who work across this country and the work they do, as well as the work to ensure that all Americans have safer workplaces, better wages, fair representation, and access to the American dream.
This weekend, and in recent weeks, Lizzie and the team have been spending time with our friends in the Labor movement to talk about today’s challenges and how we can work together to address them. The bottom line: protecting working families requires winning elections and electing people who will protect the progress we have made.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folf230905nl?refcode=folf230905nl [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folf230905nl?refcode=folf230905nl]
And that’s what we are going to do—in 2024 and beyond.
Of course, Lizzie and the team have also been meeting with other friends and neighbors around the district this very hot August, connecting with Democratic party leaders, clubs, and supporters across the district. We’re on the ground organizing and laying a strong foundation to re-elect Lizzie and a whole lot more in 2024. Together, we are building a coalition that will ensure strong leadership for our district, our region, our state, and our country. And we are excited about it!
Stay tuned here for ways you can get involved, or let us know now if you want to be contacted directly about volunteer opportunities.
https://secure.ngpvan.com/9BnBXhYmIEaHXln-Yu93jQ2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/9BnBXhYmIEaHXln-Yu93jQ2]
Thank you for being a part of the team,
Team Lizzie
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folf230905nl?refcode=folf230905nl]

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: FW: No arraignment today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
\- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
| | Friend,
---
Today was supposed to be my scheduled arraignment in Atlanta.
_**But I refuse to be part of the Left’s televised spectacle as they weaponize the legal system to try and make me look like a criminal and list over a dozen FALSE CHARGES against me on live TV.**_

But I refuse to be part of the Left’s televised spectacle as they weaponize the legal system to try and make me look like a criminal and list over a dozen FALSE CHARGES against me on live TV. Instead, I want to make today a MASSIVE grassroots fundraising day. When you contribute $1, $5, $15, or $24, it signals to the Deep State that the American people peacefully stand in solidarity with our movement and will NEVER SURRENDER our country to the tyrants and crooks who are destroying America. And the truth is – all of the many, many “small-dollar” contributions add up to A LOT! When I first broke the news that our movement had raised over $7 MILLION since my mugshot took over the world, the Democrats went crazy! But they’re about to really lose their minds when I announce that we have now almost DOUBLED that $7 million haul... We are now at $13 MILLION! Can today – the day that was supposed to be my sham arraignment – be the day that officially DOUBLES our haul? We’ll have to see! | Thank you, | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Donald J. Trump Date: Sat, September 2, 2023 Subject: “NOT GUILTY” To: <dpwillis67@gmail.com> | Friend, A judge ruled that all of my court proceedings in Atlanta will be TELEVISED for the entire country to watch. The Communist Democrats would love nothing more than for me to be stuck in court in a televised spectacle as a way to keep me off the campaign trail. But I refuse to play into the Left’s hands. That’s why I have waived my in-person formal arraignment and simply pleaded “NOT GUILTY” to the indictment in the Georgia witch hunt... | Why would I fly down to Atlanta just to hear over a dozen FALSE CHARGES brought against me on live TV? Our country is hurting right now. Our border is in chaos, our dollar is losing value, our justice system is dead, our rights are being ripped from our hands, and our enemies abroad are plotting ways to exploit our weaknesses. We have serious matters to deal with – not televised charades orchestrated by Crooked Joe and his corrupt accomplices. I’m going to focus on the REAL ISSUES that matter to Americans. And that’s how we’re going to win back the White House in 2024 and MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! If you’re doing poorly due to the very sad state of our country right now, then don’t even think about donating! | Thank you, | Donald J. clean_body: | Friend, It's no secret that my father's endorsement is the most powerful force in politics today. Donald Trump 's influence on elections, on policy, and on our country is incomparable. When my father gives a complete and total endorsement, tens of thousands of voters rally behind the MAGA candidate and change this country for the better. | Sadly, there are a lot of BAD ACTORS out there in American politics who believe they can use my father's name in their campaign fundraising efforts. These scammers are DRAINING money from MAGA candidates, including my father, and weakening the America First movement. I'm sharing the seal with you below to ensure you know EXACTLY who is on my father's team - a powerful signal to ALL of us in the MAGA movement that a candidate is on Team Trump, and NOT a scammer. On the list of approved candidates who can use the Seal of Approval is Senator JD Vance. JD has always stood by my father, fought for his America-First agenda, and promoted MAGA policies in our beautiful country. JD is fighting to flip the Senate Red in 2024 and ensure my father makes it back into the White House to FIX the mess Sleepy Joe Biden has created in our country. Remember, when you support candidates this election season, MAKE SURE they have the Trump Seal of Approval - Thank you, Donald Trump Jr. Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author. Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our economic and government leaders conspire to make life harder for normal Americans. Ohio needs JD Vance. If you'd like to support our campaign, you can click below to make a donation. | | ---|---|--- Paid for by JD Vance For Senate Inc. **[Hey there, it’s Eugene DePasquale here reaching out personally to ask you to pitch in $1 to my campaign for Attorney General.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69292094/425687474/-412144306?refcode=email_090623_onedollar_t3&amounts=1,5,15,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MGRkM2Y2Zi1jZTRjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C-6e9y1vRKIE1rAA0FeILaFIixxXNa07DuR83ze7mRA=)**

$1 may not seem like a lot, _but it means a hell of a lot for Pennsylvanians._ Let me explain— it’ll only take a minute of your time:

As Pennsylvania’s Auditor General, I protected taxpayers, rooted out waste and fraud, and exposed corruption. I’ll do the same as your Attorney General.

I have dedicated my career in public service to tirelessly fighting for working people, senior citizens, and the most vulnerable Pennsylvanians – and that’s why I’m committed to working hard for the people of Pennsylvania as your next Attorney General.

Your $1 donation today helps ensure that Pennsylvanians like you have an Attorney General who will fight for your rights when right-wing extremists try to roll them back. **[So what do you say?! I know actions speak louder than words, so here’s a look at my record. As Auditor General, I worked to:
* Save Pennsylvania taxpayers over $2 billion by shining a light on government waste, fraud, and abuse;
* Cut the backlog of untested rape kits sitting in PA crime labs by 97%--from over 3,000 to less than 100 in under four years; Expose abuse in PA nursing homes;
* And protect children from abuse by reforming the PA Child Abuse Hotline and getting them the resources they need to be safe.

As your Auditor General, I've never been afraid to stand up for those I serve, even, at times, when it's meant standing alone.

I'm proud of what we've accomplished together, and I know we can continue to accomplish so much more.

As your next Attorney General, I’ll take on the tough fights – and you bet I’ll win for you.

**[But first, I need your help getting there. Please make a donation today to my campaign for Attorney General →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69292159/425687623/-412144306?refcode=email_090623_onedollar_t3&amounts=1,5,15,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MGRkM2Y2Zi1jZTRjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C-6e9y1vRKIE1rAA0FeILaFIixxXNa07DuR83ze7mRA=)**

Thanks for your support,

Eugene
_Eugene DePasquale is a fighter with a reputation for getting results for the people of Pennsylvania. As Auditor General, he helped protect children from abuse, demanded thousands of untested rape kits be processed, exposed abuse in nursing homes, and saved taxpayers millions by shining a light on government waste, fraud, and abuse. Friend,
A judge ruled that all of my court proceedings in Atlanta will be TELEVISED for the entire country to watch.
The Communist Democrats would love nothing more than for me to be stuck in court in a televised spectacle as a way to keep me off the campaign trail.
_But I refuse to play into the Left 's hands._
That's why I have waived my in-person formal arraignment and simply pleaded **" NOT GUILTY"** to the indictment in the Georgia witch hunt...

**_Why would I fly down to Atlanta just to hear over a dozen FALSE CHARGES brought against me on live TV?_**
Our country is hurting right now. Our border is in chaos, our dollar is losing value, our justice system is dead, our rights are being ripped from our hands, and our enemies abroad are plotting ways to exploit our weaknesses.
We have _serious_ matters to deal with - not televised charades orchestrated by Crooked Joe and his corrupt accomplices.
I'm going to focus on the REAL ISSUES that matter to Americans. And that's how we're going to win back the White House in 2024 and MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!

body:

---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,
**Join Jim Herring for lunch to discuss two-party politics in Mississippi!**
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=c4d4ea4298&e=5703353baa)
---
**_Click on the image above for more information!_**
| **"The Switcher" is Jim Herring’s vivid, birds-eye account of the politicians, parties, and principles that competed for voters’ allegiances from the 1960s through 2008 in Mississippi.**

The son of passionate conservative Democrats, Jim ultimately became the only State Chairman of the Mississippi Republican Party to serve previously on the Mississippi Democratic Party Executive Committee. Jim currently serves on the Board of Directors for the Mississippi Center for Public Policy.

**There are only a few tickets left! Tickets can be found[here](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=c2cdacef5c&e=5703353baa). **Copies of "The Switcher" will be available for purchase.
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=62fd1315f1&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
All the Best,

Anika Page
Director of Operations

name: RIGHT NOW via Team Malamed
subject: Millions of Americans could lose their Medicaid coverage
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ZAK FOR CONGRESS
body:
#
**FIRST:** At the start of the pandemic Congress enacted the _Families First Coronavirus Response Act_ which required Medicaid programs to keep people continuously enrolled throughout the global crisis.

**THEN:** Congress voted to end the continuous enrollment provision, putting between 7.8 million - 24.4 million people – _including children_ – at risk of losing their coverage!

**NOW:** [_We need 10,000 people to sign our petition urging President Biden to step in and save Medicaid before it’s too late! >>_](https://act.zakforcongress.com/go/117?t=1&akid=412%2E8507%2EoPjPmJ)
[SIGN ON: Tell Biden to Save Medicaid!](https://act.zakforcongress.com/go/117?t=2&akid=412%2E8507%2EoPjPmJ)
---

Friend,

**We need to talk about Medicaid.**

In total, some 90 million low-income people – _including children, pregnant people, adults, seniors and people with disabilities_ – rely on Medicaid.

But after Congress struck down the continuous enrollment provision, states started purging people from their Medicaid records.

_In fact, 5.5 million people have lost their coverage so far!_

And if President Biden does not step in, that number could rapidly rise.

**So we are asking you:** [_Will you add your name today to tell President Biden and Democrats to save millions of Americans from losing their Medicaid coverage?_](https://act.zakforcongress.com/go/117?t=3&akid=412%2E8507%2EoPjPmJ)

[SIGN ON: Tell Biden to Save Medicaid!](https://act.zakforcongress.com/go/117?t=4&akid=412%2E8507%2EoPjPmJ)

**Our goal is to get 10,000 signatures ASAP so we can send a clear message to President Biden.**

We cannot thank you enough for your help.

-Malamed for Congress
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.zakforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=5&akid=412%2E8507%2EoPjPmJ)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.zakforcongress.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.zakforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=412%2E8507%2EoPjPmJ)

To give by check:
Zak for Congress
PO Box 220421
Great Neck, NY 11022
Email us: [info@e.zakforcongress.com](mailto:info@e.zakforcongress.com)
PAID FOR BY ZAK FOR CONGRESS

name: Andrew Gunter
subject: House Party for Cyril's Campaign
body:
Dear Peter,

Thank you for signing up for our volunteer list. Right now we need help
getting the word out about the campaign and raising funds. Would you be
willing to help out by hosting a house party fundraiser for us? We’d need
your help inviting friends and family as well as hosting the party at your
home.

Please let us know when would be a good time to talk about this project.

Best,

Andrew

--
Andrew Gunter
Outreach Coordinator
Focht For Tennessee

Would you be willing to help out by hosting a house party fundraiser for us? We’d need your help inviting friends and family as well as hosting the party at your home. Please let us know when would be a good time to talk about this project. Best, Andrew -- Andrew Gunter Outreach Coordinator Focht For Tennessee

clean_body: We have to FIGHT BACK against these million-dollar lying attacks. | Peter, I need your help. After last week's push to reach our end-of-month deadline, I decided to pause our fundraising until after the holiday weekend. Meanwhile, Joe Biden launched a $25 million ad blitz in battleground states, including right here in Arizona, to try to give Democrats an edge in the upcoming 2024 election. This multi-million-dollar ad blitz will promote Biden and the Democrat's so-called “accomplishments” in their desperate attempt to sway voters and has given the Democrats a 5-day head start on us this month. We have to close this gap if we want to stop the Democrats from destroying the American Dream with one failed policy at a time. With your help, I know we can continue to FIGHT BACK and END the Left’s disastrous agenda, preserve the American Dream, and build a better future for all generations. We have the winning message. That’s why Biden and his fellow Democrats are pouring millions into battleground states because they know their only chance at winning in 2024 is to BUY the election. But we can’t let that happen. In the past two quarters, we have reached RECORD fundraising hauls, showing our strength and determination to defend and preserve the American Dream against the Left’s attacks. Now, we have to keep the momentum going to OUTRAISE our opponents, ensuring we have the resources to FIGHT BACK against these million-dollar attacks and spread our winning message to every single voter. The future of the country and the American Dream is on the line, but with your help, I know that we will defend this all-important seat. Thank you, Rep. body:

Friends -
Is there _anything_ we can say to convince you to [**contribute $3 to GIFFORDS PAC today?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-sep23.BeCgjV&refcode=em230906-1-30&t=1&akid=6491%2E3935704%2E22Qt1m)
What if we told you that when you donate to GIFFORDS PAC, your contribution powers our work to help pass gun safety legislation at the state, local, and federal levels?
What if we told you that your contribution goes directly towards electing gun safety champions up and down the ballot, and that it allows us to hold our current elected officials accountable for keeping our communities safe?
Or what if we told you that your contribution directly impacts our ability to stand up to the NRA and their toxic influence on our political system?
We know it may be hard to believe that your $3 contribution can do all of these things. But when everyone adds their $3, it makes a world of difference.
The choice is yours, but we hope you understand just how much your $3 contribution means to our work.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Becky=20Edwards?=
subject: A Quick Update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BECKY EDWARDS FOR CONGRESS
body:
Hi, it's Becky. I wanted to give you a quick update about where our race stands. | | | | |
---
My Dear Friends,
I was incredibly honored to spend last night with many of you—in person, and in spirit! I wanted to give you a quick update about where our race stands.
We currently are in a very tight race. It is wonderful for every voter in this district to have their vote count in such a consequential way! Today, we expect the Lieutenant Governor’s office to receive a report from county clerks about the number of outstanding ballots, which will give us a picture of what remains to be counted. The results will continue to come in with late-arriving mail-in ballots. This election, voters can postmark their ballots through Election Day—which is different than in years past.
Importantly, there are also several ballots which need to be cured in order to be counted. [**Go to vote.utah.gov to check on the status of your ballot to see if it needs to be cured!**](https://beckyforutah.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9cc818aa94e94ffd36a8547b3&id=b9d84a399d&e=6484bb6dd5)
| [Check Your Ballot Status](https://beckyforutah.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9cc818aa94e94ffd36a8547b3&id=0a4e903370&e=6484bb6dd5)
---
I am honored by the tens of thousands of Utahns across this district who cast their votes for me in this election. I’ll be in touch in the coming days with more news. But, in the meantime, thank you!
This has been a sprint every day, and having you on this team means the world, no matter the result. I am so enthusiastic to be able to witness the democratic process with all of you—and continue to be optimistic about this result!
Becky
|
---
#### PAID FOR BY BECKY EDWARDS FOR CONGRESS
| | | | [](https://beckyforutah.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9cc818aa94e94ffd36a8547b3&id=561510bffd&e=6484bb6dd5)| [](https://beckyforutah.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9cc818aa94e94ffd36a8547b3&id=d243ac2d4f&e=6484bb6dd5)| [](https://beckyforutah.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9cc818aa94e94ffd36a8547b3&id=3c068bc55c&e=6484bb6dd5)

name: Team Morse Press & Communications
subject: Chuck Morse: No Amnesty for Mexican Smugglers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Chuck Morse, PO Box 106, North Salem, NH 03073
body:
| |
---
| [View in browser](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0yMjk3OTc3MzQ2MjgxNDQ2MjM1JmM9eTF4MSZlPTAmYj0xMjAxMjM2ODI0JmQ9azR2MWk0bg==.s4fr90lJE9sx6IrcvG_VxZ7IZLnnkRj7uQv7xCcVsP8)
| | | |
---
| |
---
| Chuck Morse: "Reject any notion of amnesty for individuals who break our laws to break into our country"
---
---
| |
---
| **For Immediate Release**

---
---
| |
---
| **_September 6th, 2023_** **Salem, NH** \- Granite State Small Businessman and candidate for Governor Chuck Morse released the following statement regarding an illegal Mexican smuggler arrested in New Hampshire that came to our state via Vermont and our Northern Border: "Recently, our state was jolted by the shocking discovery of an illegal Brazilian mass murderer who had been living among us. Concurrently, reports of drug and human smuggling operations along our northern border have raised serious alarm. Let's be clear: the open-border policies under President Biden's administration have left us vulnerable to crime and the influx of dangerous narcotics. This is an undeniable fact, and it's time we acknowledge it. While my opponent Joyce Craig supports sanctuary cities for illegal immigrants, I stand firmly against such policies and reject any notion of amnesty for individuals who break our laws to break into our country. Our state deserves a leader who will take a strong approach to safeguarding our citizens, and as Governor, I'll make it a top priority.
###
---
---
| | |
---

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | Chuck Morse: "Reject any notion of amnesty for individuals who break our laws to break into our country" | | | For Immediate Release | | | September 6th, 2023 Salem, NH \- Granite State Small Businessman and candidate for Governor Chuck Morse released the following statement regarding an illegal Mexican smuggler arrested in New Hampshire that came to our state via Vermont and our Northern Border: "Recently, our state was jolted by the shocking discovery of an illegal Brazilian mass murderer who had been living among us. Concurrently, reports of drug and human smuggling operations along our northern border have raised serious alarm. Let's be clear: the open-border policies under President Biden's administration have left us vulnerable to crime and the influx of dangerous narcotics. This is an undeniable fact, and it's time we acknowledge it. While my opponent Joyce Craig supports sanctuary cities for illegal immigrants, I stand firmly against such policies and reject any notion of amnesty for individuals who break our laws to break into our country. Our state deserves a leader who will take a strong approach to safeguarding our citizens, and as Governor, I'll make it a top priority. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|--- | Friends of Chuck Morse By providing your number, you are consenting to receive recurring calls and texts, including calls and texts, to that number from Friends of Chuck Morse. name: Team Durbin
subject: Add your name to protect reproductive rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
After the fall of Roe, the GOP is working to decimate abortion care even further.
#
Peter,
For decades, far right conservatives worked to strike down _Roe v. Wade_ , the landmark decision that guaranteed a constitutional right to abortion care. Last summer, the Supreme Court granted their wish and overturned it—and now the very real consequences are impossible to ignore.
While Republicans continue to push harmful anti-abortion rhetoric, reproductive rights are being stripped away state by state with the ultimate goal of banning abortion nationwide.
**[Senator Durbin and the Democratic majority in the Senate will keep working to defeat Republicans’ anti-choice agenda and codify the right to choose into federal law, but with so much on the line, they need to know that supporters like you are behind them in this fight. Add your name to Senator Durbin’s petition right now and help protect reproductive rights.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69295159/425698195/-1514063679?refcode=dd_em_230906_1&ms=dd_em_230906_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjk1MmMwMi1kNDRjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qVxDpADQUFw3zgV-1aSG2MoDqj8P6zwq8mdV50GNqEY=&emci=251a8534-ce4c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=e2952c02-d44c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=2727974)**
Just a couple of weeks ago, Republican presidential candidates took the debate stage to boast about their anti-abortion agendas and compete for who could cater the most to the far-right.
Meanwhile, GOP-controlled states like South Carolina and Indiana are passing strict legislation banning nearly all abortion care, sending high-risk patients across state lines to safe havens including Illinois, which is now entirely surrounded by states enforcing restrictive abortion laws.
****[Ending _Roe v. Wade_ wasn’t enough for the GOP. We need all hands on deck pushing back against the right-wing attempts to decimate access to abortion care even further. Will you sign Senator Durbin’s petition to show your support for reproductive rights?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69295160/425698196/-1514063679?refcode=dd_em_230906_1&ms=dd_em_230906_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjk1MmMwMi1kNDRjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qVxDpADQUFw3zgV-1aSG2MoDqj8P6zwq8mdV50GNqEY=&emci=251a8534-ce4c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=e2952c02-d44c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=2727974)****
Thank you,
Team Durbin

**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69295161/425698197/-1514063679?refcode=dd_em_230906_1&ms=dd_em_230906_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjk1MmMwMi1kNDRjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qVxDpADQUFw3zgV-1aSG2MoDqj8P6zwq8mdV50GNqEY=&emci=251a8534-ce4c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=e2952c02-d44c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=2727974)**

name: Lateefah Simon
subject: Thank YOU
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LATEEFAH FOR CONGRESS
body:
We made it through the summer slump and we couldn’t have done it without your help.
# [](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/go/39?t=1&akid=105%2E1163%2E-jmuCS)
All I can say is **_WOW_**. We had our strongest month in digital fundraising in the last five months. That’s amazing and no easy feat.
That’s why I’m taking this moment to say: thank you, thank you, THANK YOU!
Without your support through it all (yes, YOU), we wouldn’t have been able to turn around our fundraising momentum and against all odds come out of the summer slump stronger than before.
This grassroots movement has power + I’ve seen it from **day 1**. It’s what makes me so passionate about organizing from the ground up. It’s truly unlike anything else to see what we can achieve when we come together.
This is still an uphill battle, and part of running a campaign built on small-dollar grassroots donations from everyday folks means that we don’t have time to stop and rest.
We’ve got to do everything we can to keep up this momentum and make sure that we have the resources we need to talk to voters, knock on doors, recruit volunteers, and more!
[**If you’re able to help us start off our first week of September by being one of the 200 donations we need — I would be so grateful! clean_body: We made it through the summer slump and we couldn’t have done it without your help. All I can say is WOW. We had our strongest month in digital fundraising in the last five months. That’s amazing and no easy feat. That’s why I’m taking this moment to say: thank you, thank you, THANK YOU! Without your support through it all (yes, YOU), we wouldn’t have been able to turn around our fundraising momentum and against all odds come out of the summer slump stronger than before. This grassroots movement has power + I’ve seen it from day 1. It’s what makes me so passionate about organizing from the ground up. It’s truly unlike anything else to see what we can achieve when we come together. This is still an uphill battle, and part of running a campaign built on small-dollar grassroots donations from everyday folks means that we don’t have time to stop and rest. We’ve got to do everything we can to keep up this momentum and make sure that we have the resources we need to talk to voters, knock on doors, recruit volunteers, and more! Thank you for everything you do, Lateefah 💜

But, that hasn’t slowed her down one bit. Nikki got right to work, holding more than one hundred events across the country. After more than 45 stops in New Hampshire, her hard work is paying off. A New Hampshire poll that was just released showed Nikki surging to 2nd place! https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=8429e58942f2b320f90b372411eaa2c9b1be9ee0c907db3fb03d2baeb92ce45324cc8fc82aa87b0909be9bb123b3e66e83213296839d4c7faae5ef41c22fdb25 Help Nikki keep the momentum going with a donation of $10 or more now, and as a gift, we’ll send you one of Nikki’s favorites – our “Underestimate Me, That’ll Be Fun” shirt! https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=8429e58942f2b320f90b372411eaa2c9b1be9ee0c907db3fb03d2baeb92ce45324cc8fc82aa87b0909be9bb123b3e66e83213296839d4c7faae5ef41c22fdb25 GET YOUR SHIRT NOW Grassroots supporters like you have already done so much to help Nikki prove the critics who underestimated her wrong. Two weeks after the first debate in Milwaukee, poll after poll – in the early states and nationally – show Nikki as the only candidate who is consistently gaining ground…And she’s just getting started! Nikki could use the full force of our grassroots movement to help her continue climbing in the polls. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=8429e58942f2b320f90b372411eaa2c9b1be9ee0c907db3fb03d2baeb92ce45324cc8fc82aa87b0909be9bb123b3e66e83213296839d4c7faae5ef41c22fdb25 Can she count on your contribution of $10 or more today? None of this is possible without your support, so thank you in advance for stepping up to make Nikki’s vision for a STRONG and PROUD America a reality. -Team Haley https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=8429e58942f2b320f90b372411eaa2c9b1be9ee0c907db3fb03d2baeb92ce45324cc8fc82aa87b0909be9bb123b3e66e83213296839d4c7faae5ef41c22fdb25 GET YOUR SHIRT NOW https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=8429e58942f2b3203baa2e0dcbb7d735ce22a1d88c72a07aa8d5ca38d3f119623be2c74f5fc8d720e22d5fda21fc3175c5e0f4797119cdda5bd4df1691f41034 https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=8429e58942f2b3203baa2e0dcbb7d735ce22a1d88c72a07aa8d5ca38d3f119623be2c74f5fc8d720e22d5fda21fc3175c5e0f4797119cdda5bd4df1691f41034 GET YOUR SHIRT https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=8429e58942f2b320151ba31c5bef7c41c81da1be401f8c8d5dc20c51c6b174730569613e9128a3ab0456f6d853e4d95faa80ffba8066db4c9f934ef41ad625cf https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=8429e58942f2b320151ba31c5bef7c41c81da1be401f8c8d5dc20c51c6b174730569613e9128a3ab0456f6d853e4d95faa80ffba8066db4c9f934ef41ad625cf VOLUNTEER More About Nikki Haley https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=8429e58942f2b320c694f4654eff20aa0aa635de7b22b29a43d0bef7d47797983bc6b9f194b6a65032870dd76834359dd8d9ea29a441a2ac9a47041d4c1214b8 My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I’m running for President of the United States. I’m running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago – an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I’m running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something – that we do love this country. I’m running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I’m doing this for my son who’s a senior in college and shouldn’t have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn’t believe in just to get an A. I’m running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I’m running for President because we have a country to save! I’ve seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden’s leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a “jobs governor” because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I’ve done it before. And I’ll do it as your next President. As President, I’ll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington’s spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America’s future. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=8429e58942f2b320c694f4654eff20aa0aa635de7b22b29a43d0bef7d47797983bc6b9f194b6a65032870dd76834359dd8d9ea29a441a2ac9a47041d4c1214b8 Will you join me today and help me save our country? https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=8429e58942f2b320c694f4654eff20aa0aa635de7b22b29a43d0bef7d47797983bc6b9f194b6a65032870dd76834359dd8d9ea29a441a2ac9a47041d4c1214b8 DONATE Paid for by Nikki Haley for President. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=8429e58942f2b32008130d6213acf7271980bcf8c97157fbd9ffb0f85c8268dc97f0df9a993b8330895ef53a71fe60dee727ecaeb9b4aeecc6fc1ab2dbff533f www.nikkihaley.com By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided from each of Nikki Haley for President, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, Team Stand For America, SFA Fund, Inc., and Ambassador Nikki Haley (48324) directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. Peter, Nikki has been underestimated since DAY ONE of launching her campaign for President. But, that hasn’t slowed her down one bit. Nikki got right to work, holding more than one hundred events across the country. After more than 45 stops in New Hampshire, her hard work is paying off. A New Hampshire poll that was just released showed Nikki surging to 2nd place! Help Nikki keep the momentum going with a donation of $10 or more now, and as a gift, we’ll send you one of Nikki’s favorites – our “Underestimate Me, That’ll Be Fun” shirt! GET YOUR SHIRT NOW Grassroots supporters like you have already done so much to help Nikki prove the critics who underestimated her wrong. Two weeks after the first debate in Milwaukee, poll after poll – in the early states and nationally – show Nikki as the only candidate who is consistently gaining ground…And she’s just getting started! Nikki could use the full force of our grassroots movement to help her continue climbing in the polls. Can she count on your contribution of $10 or more today? None of this is possible without your support, so thank you in advance for stepping up to make Nikki’s vision for a STRONG and PROUD America a reality. -Team Haley GET YOUR SHIRT NOW GET YOUR SHIRT VOLUNTEER More About Nikki Haley My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I’m running for President of the United States. I’m running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago – an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I’m running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something – that we do love this country. I’m running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I’m doing this for my son who’s a senior in college and shouldn’t have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn’t believe in just to get an A. I’m running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I’m running for President because we have a country to save! I’ve seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden’s leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a “jobs governor” because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I’ve done it before. And I’ll do it as your next President. As President, I’ll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington’s spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America’s future. Will you join me today and help me save our country? Texts may be sent via an automated telephone dialing system. Consent not required to contribute. Consent not required to contribute. Message frequency varies. Message and data rates may apply.

body:
No matter when we expand Medicaid, we need Greta as AG

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69296725/425703443/-456841951?refcode=BEB_EM_FR_230906ME_B_logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzNDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTBjNzY5M2UtZDc0Yy1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=iYymdQpNhOoaSxEDNt-XRHCCLW41zYU4gugJnmRRQQI=) Peter,

220,000 working Mississippians are counting on our state leaders to expand Medicaid eligibility. But no one of our elected officials can make it happen on their own. **_That’s why we need to elect Medicaid expansion advocates up and down the ballot, including Greta Kemp Martin as Mississippi Attorney General._**

[Help elect Greta as a Medicaid expansion advocate in Mississippi by chipping in here:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69296726/425703445/-456841951?refcode=BEB_EM_FR_230906ME_B_l1&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzNDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTBjNzY5M2UtZDc0Yy1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=iYymdQpNhOoaSxEDNt-XRHCCLW41zYU4gugJnmRRQQI=) [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69296730/425703446/-456841951?refcode=BEB_EM_FR_230906ME_B_b1&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzNDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTBjNzY5M2UtZDc0Yy1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=iYymdQpNhOoaSxEDNt-XRHCCLW41zYU4gugJnmRRQQI=) Thankfully, we have a strong Democratic candidate running for Governor who has also pledged his support to expanding Medicaid on day one. But, _Mississippi Today_ breaks down why it isn’t quite that simple:
_“The bottom line is that if there was an effort to expand Medicaid through the waiver program, an appropriation by the Legislature to fund the program most likely still would be needed. But if a governor did expand Medicaid and figure out a way to pay for the program without the Legislature, it likely would result in litigation and be left to the state courts to determine whether it was legal.”_ We need a strong attorney general at the helm to protect healthcare access in our state courts. And that’s exactly what Greta will do when we elect her this November.

[Help us elect an attorney general who will protect Medicaid expansion and healthcare access in Mississippi by contributing $25, $50, or any other amount today:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69296732/425703449/-456841951?refcode=BEB_EM_FR_230906ME_B_l2&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzNDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTBjNzY5M2UtZDc0Yy1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=iYymdQpNhOoaSxEDNt-XRHCCLW41zYU4gugJnmRRQQI=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[$5 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69296733/425703451/-456841951?refcode=BEB_EM_FR_230906ME_B_EL5&express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode2=EL5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzNDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTBjNzY5M2UtZDc0Yy1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=iYymdQpNhOoaSxEDNt-XRHCCLW41zYU4gugJnmRRQQI=)**

clean_body: No matter when we expand Medicaid, we need Greta as AG = Peter, 220,000 working Mississippians are counting on our state leaders to expand Medicaid eligibility. But no one of our elected officials can make it happen on their own. That’s why we need to elect Medicaid expansion advocates up and down the ballot, including Greta Kemp Martin as Mississippi Attorney General. = = Thankfully, we have a strong Democratic candidate running for Governor who has also pledged his support to expanding Medicaid on day one. But, Mississippi Today breaks down why it isn’t quite that simple: “The bottom line is that if there was an effort to expand Medicaid through the waiver program, an appropriation by the Legislature to fund the program most likely still would be needed. But if a governor did expand Medicaid and figure out a way to pay for the program without the Legislature, it likely would result in litigation and be left to the state courts to determine whether it was legal.” We need a strong attorney general at the helm to protect healthcare access in our state courts. And that’s exactly what Greta will do when we elect her this November. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = Thanks for your support – we can’t do this without you! – Team Greta Greta Kemp Martin was born, raised, and educated in Mississippi. She is an active member of the Mississippi Bar, and currently works as the Litigation Director for Disability Rights Mississippi, the protection and advocacy agency for the state. As Attorney General, Greta will fight for the rights of everyday Mississippians, and stand up for the working people of this state. = Paid for by Greta Martin for AG Greta Kemp Martin for Attorney General PO BOX 16402 Jackson, MS 39236 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

Peter –
I wanted to share my recent op-ed in [Newsweek](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015hwueq1mBBqgbcmq-LbnQ1CqpcVehwo734yZrckZcqBf5s093Ad6Q6N7pZtgXbiiRuOlNjAZ3VbMpzTwF9tjXi-fO_pQqAqg1JahO-utXsKIvYqknh0ffUGX5wtNyqUb9aELCCNHA2vFZPGLTVgF65_ajM9PPNHA7fviKPKYqaUBukCOgciDpuPyF7jnETdc_B6GEcs97D6GukGERU3tx-gkl4MtZj5E0LI8J0Eovjeu0n2O-NTLXg==&c=tTmTs4aBzQ4ViGo9Pf7AJs1BNwpOYjv0niEMXfEIvHPBT2IyUKyabw==&ch=uNhufj_Ndmf1Irp5UlnkHSTQfYJZZHQo0A5RFTbig2esibxiLyFZiQ==) titled, Unmasking the Pseudoscience: The Truth About 'Gender-Affirming Care'.
I know this is important to you, so I hope you'll take the time to read the op-ed and learn more about my work in Congress on this issue.
Thank you for your support,
Dan Crenshaw

| Unmasking the Pseudoscience: The Truth About 'Gender-Affirming Care'
By Dan Crenshaw
In 2007, there was only one pediatric gender clinic in the United States. Now there are [close to 100](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015hwueq1mBBqgbcmq-LbnQ1CqpcVehwo734yZrckZcqBf5s093Ad6Q6N7pZtgXbiiPFTMPPKf5URA3AyJoEBO7WEbF_kXyumxPap_ZFJRB_6yZGyYJXoCT8EW1VtxkurdnjCx_QsPpxFWwKlVSo7TK8htt37GrOTSbaIwPM4HGdAzVU094G84QuVxk1DGKEBSDmdLppYPTPcFEjWkUS_76w==&c=tTmTs4aBzQ4ViGo9Pf7AJs1BNwpOYjv0niEMXfEIvHPBT2IyUKyabw==&ch=uNhufj_Ndmf1Irp5UlnkHSTQfYJZZHQo0A5RFTbig2esibxiLyFZiQ==). It's impossible to overstate just how quickly the Left has radicalized on the issue of so-called "gender affirming care." None of the people pushing this harmful pseudoscientific nonsense believed it 10 or 15 years ago.
According to data collected by[ Komodo Health and analyzed by Reuters](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015hwueq1mBBqgbcmq-LbnQ1CqpcVehwo734yZrckZcqBf5s093Ad6Q6N7pZtgXbiiPFTMPPKf5URA3AyJoEBO7WEbF_kXyumxPap_ZFJRB_6yZGyYJXoCT8EW1VtxkurdnjCx_QsPpxFWwKlVSo7TK8htt37GrOTSbaIwPM4HGdAzVU094G84QuVxk1DGKEBSDmdLppYPTPcFEjWkUS_76w==&c=tTmTs4aBzQ4ViGo9Pf7AJs1BNwpOYjv0niEMXfEIvHPBT2IyUKyabw==&ch=uNhufj_Ndmf1Irp5UlnkHSTQfYJZZHQo0A5RFTbig2esibxiLyFZiQ==), a total of 121,882 new diagnoses of gender dysphoria were added for patients ages six to 17 between 2017 and 2021. The rate of diagnosis increased by 20 percent each year between 2017 and 2020, and then shot up 70 percent between 2020 and 2021--the year kids were home due to COVID-19 lockdowns, when they spent much more time on their phones and social media.
These are real numbers that tell a real story. [As the head of Boston Children's Gender Clinic confirms for us](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015hwueq1mBBqgbcmq-LbnQ1CqpcVehwo734yZrckZcqBf5s093Ad6Q6qt_-qF4H2obdehxabYhkpyGVT-ZNlMsL05xFohvAXzI9KVf21pQ92YUBqlk5JaqkrWSjX18oHcPUL8RHgZt0LayIKKYXTo4jvp58RCLuPD5SH8EMk6YccmSgj6OUgwcFmC61GIdnRvGvIp31hqC2dTa5choWHTtIg8yduaQO03uT5Zb_5uBwZPcnhP1oYE4LIVMgu7JJtgJ8f1jreHQUU=&c=tTmTs4aBzQ4ViGo9Pf7AJs1BNwpOYjv0niEMXfEIvHPBT2IyUKyabw==&ch=uNhufj_Ndmf1Irp5UlnkHSTQfYJZZHQo0A5RFTbig2esibxiLyFZiQ==), they are handing out puberty blockers "like candy."
The Left accuses Republicans of creating this new fight in the culture wars out of whole cloth. In reality, we're simply responding to a rapid onset of transgender ideology being pushed on our children in their schools, libraries, and even doctors' offices. This is an entirely new phenomenon, pushed by people who know better in pursuit of so-called "compassion" for children suffering from sometimes temporary ideations about their gender.
Let's be frank: It is not compassionate to perform a double mastectomy on a teenage girl who is insecure about her body. It is not compassionate to pump a 13 year-old boy full of puberty blockers, seriously affecting his ability to reproduce in the future. Our children cannot consent to life-altering procedures, and informed consent depends on evidence-based medicine.
We need to be able to trust that physicians are providing care that is backed by solid science, and so-called gender affirming care runs counter to evidence-based medicine.
The American Academy of Pediatrics (AAP), the Endocrine Society, and the World Professional Association for Transgender Health (WPATH) have all released policy statements in support of gender-affirming care. Other organizations, including the American Medical Association, have made public statements in support of "affirming" medicine without citing evidence. But not one of these organizations has done systematic reviews of the evidence, a method of review supposed to prevent the cherry-picking of studies and biased analysis. Their statements of support appear to be grounded in a fear of provoking rabid gender ideologues rather than in sound science.
On the other hand, [Sweden](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015hwueq1mBBqgbcmq-LbnQ1CqpcVehwo734yZrckZcqBf5s093Ad6Q6qt_-qF4H2oBUte5ehpyiUSjbd-U6dNBIJJ4w0Mexpyeb8ajtcEiqQaCxJyQWYPCzO-ZNXd0gwJwZ3TJDk-iTI=&c=tTmTs4aBzQ4ViGo9Pf7AJs1BNwpOYjv0niEMXfEIvHPBT2IyUKyabw==&ch=uNhufj_Ndmf1Irp5UlnkHSTQfYJZZHQo0A5RFTbig2esibxiLyFZiQ==), [Finland](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015hwueq1mBBqgbcmq-LbnQ1CqpcVehwo734yZrckZcqBf5s093Ad6Q6qt_-qF4H2oZWbn95ZCEuPCYjFwFPRGKO4mL42S-c0H99JAwyhP2oPFLoR3YsWYg5gSAxWwoqAMEhaIWiFmWPba1Td84rryGTsD9eav7xVYNqRHU1Y32usHCOAGZRY2Fdkr9TUNh72r&c=tTmTs4aBzQ4ViGo9Pf7AJs1BNwpOYjv0niEMXfEIvHPBT2IyUKyabw==&ch=uNhufj_Ndmf1Irp5UlnkHSTQfYJZZHQo0A5RFTbig2esibxiLyFZiQ==), the [U.K.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015hwueq1mBBqgbcmq-LbnQ1CqpcVehwo734yZrckZcqBf5s093Ad6Q6qt_-qF4H2oX8mqHZmGG3ipycYoCjaJKVw6LK3RvdOqfpurDwM9SqdmdpV4cioSzQZn-pupzb6eUc4vpactHyoq-fp63Vnqq0t9QPEZh8E2FoedAdh2kkjtGoJj7HKNTJY1MjIffF8d&c=tTmTs4aBzQ4ViGo9Pf7AJs1BNwpOYjv0niEMXfEIvHPBT2IyUKyabw==&ch=uNhufj_Ndmf1Irp5UlnkHSTQfYJZZHQo0A5RFTbig2esibxiLyFZiQ==), and [Florida](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015hwueq1mBBqgbcmq-LbnQ1CqpcVehwo734yZrckZcqBf5s093Ad6Q6N7pZtgXbiiB1CFwJ8VXhYxp1Si9X5PRDm9cGcg280n7RzaVG9KXolLG89ghsVN0RcTpk7DiBnGweLjQlxgOh5idWc36LG9dh8cu4kkcs5Kz-yMnM_PMQc=&c=tTmTs4aBzQ4ViGo9Pf7AJs1BNwpOYjv0niEMXfEIvHPBT2IyUKyabw==&ch=uNhufj_Ndmf1Irp5UlnkHSTQfYJZZHQo0A5RFTbig2esibxiLyFZiQ==) have all done systematic reviews, and all reached the same conclusion: There is no evidence that the benefits of this approach for treating gender-related distress in youth outweigh the risks. Recently, Denmark also imposed restrictions, and Norway is poised to follow suit. Even progressive European countries recognize that high-risk and irreversible interventions must meet a high threshold of evidence.
Remember, these procedures on children are permanent. There is no turning back once you start to change a child's gender. And yet, as our peer-countries have admitted, there is zero high quality evidence for the benefits of this pseudoscience.
Roughly 70 percent of U.S. teens who go to gender clinics [have comorbid](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015hwueq1mBBqgbcmq-LbnQ1CqpcVehwo734yZrckZcqBf5s093Ad6Q6qt_-qF4H2oYoJRN-A_ipBaQd9f_JvWzX8T6Hw3DvSjI3qrnMZygipUioGFzboTabhCo68THlIVFo3gr7YWilMGiWuXxAjr97qGdgzoGyoggxWBvCvDe7asaJZHPmQNrb7XGDqIYDToOiWJh6b3bR-1XeX1OuHkwLEDxX6u18U7tJXVa3PP6bfhe-1mpW_-n4HVfUuQ-vzlP6kfJ2ZkMvZQHnVGZKPazDhDRPDsSNAbm71H6ffgUo6H4BEuF0wn47xWjvtYf7DV&c=tTmTs4aBzQ4ViGo9Pf7AJs1BNwpOYjv0niEMXfEIvHPBT2IyUKyabw==&ch=uNhufj_Ndmf1Irp5UlnkHSTQfYJZZHQo0A5RFTbig2esibxiLyFZiQ==) psychiatric diagnoses that precede the onset of gender dysphoria. That raises a troubling question: Are we misdiagnosing gender dysphoria because of the affirm first, ask questions later approach we have adopted in the United States? Is this affirmative model biased toward one diagnosis--gender dysphoria--and biased toward "gender affirming care" as a treatment?
Medical experts around the world think so. That's why 21 leading experts on pediatric gender medicine from nine countries recently [wrote](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015hwueq1mBBqgbcmq-LbnQ1CqpcVehwo734yZrckZcqBf5s093Ad6Q6qt_-qF4H2oW4IwrlOPn-ngDIyqg2dMhmILBfCfrXgU4AJMpX9aBtCT_82nVROvQrLi5kErqapnYEjXL_OHeebQos0usgzUqLQiaVwjW4XqbuwYlJNEGA-LhYtk9aM_Sac82cW5p5kB4htFcd7K2eCY056HOiNoBrFHF700rLY6OwAPO0xGVYkLUvlsPJIhfla53iHri7-T&c=tTmTs4aBzQ4ViGo9Pf7AJs1BNwpOYjv0niEMXfEIvHPBT2IyUKyabw==&ch=uNhufj_Ndmf1Irp5UlnkHSTQfYJZZHQo0A5RFTbig2esibxiLyFZiQ==) a letter to the Wall Street Journal sounding the alarm about the American affirmative model for youth gender dysphoria.
As legislators, we must stop rewarding medical institutions pushing this pseudoscience. That's why I introduced legislation to block graduate medical education funding from any children's hospital that provides gender transition procedures to minors.
This bill is commonsense: When 70 percent of Americans oppose using puberty blockers on minors, we should not force them to fund this sort of treatment with their tax dollars.
Children's hospitals that are training providers in evidence-based medicine will still receive funding under my legislation.
The fact there is even an argument over whether we should permanently mutilate children is evidence of just how far off the rails our political discourse has become. We are marching our children down a path from which they cannot return. Science and common sense tell us these procedures are permanent, dangerous, and wrong.
We must refuse to participate in this madness for the sake of our kids.

We must refuse to participate in this madness for the sake of our kids. | | | | | | | | | | == | Was this email forwarded to you? == to get the latest updates on the fight in Washington direct from me. Any questions, comments, or concerns? Simply reply to this email or give Team Crenshaw a call at 281-888-4016. If you'd like to donate by check, please make your check payable and mail to: Dan Crenshaw for Congress, 5900 Memorial Drive, Suite 215, Houston, TX 77007. | | | == == == | | | | | | PAID FOR BY DAN CRENSHAW FOR CONGRESS | | Dan Crenshaw for Congress | 5900 Memorial Drive, Suite 215, Houston, TX 77007 | | Sent by mailto:dan.crenshaw@crenshawforcongress.com

body:

We’re truly grateful for her leadership. As a life-long organizer with roots in the labor movement, she’s committed to ensuring that everyone has a seat at the table.
With your support and Yolanda leading our team, we can reach even further in 2024: to protect our Senate majority and send President Biden back to finish the job for working people across America.
We also have to flip the legislature blue — that means supporting candidates up and down the ballot, organizing our friends, families, and our communities, and making sure voters across Arizona have the knowledge they need to show up and cast their ballot on Election Day.

name: Mandela Barnes
subject: Impeach Justice Janet?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
#
Friends — When we helped to elect Justice Janet Protasiewicz in Wisconsin, it marked a historic day for our movement, Wisconsin, and our democracy.
That day, an overwhelming majority of Wisconsin voters flipped the majority on the Wisconsin Supreme Court. They chose to be represented by a Justice who will not put politics over the freedoms guaranteed by our democracy.
But since Justice Protasiewicz was sworn into office last month, Republicans have threatened an unprecedented and dangerous way to usurp power: **Impeaching Justice Protasiewicz.**
This is a direct attempt by the GOP to undercut the voice of Wisconsinites and undermine a coequal branch of government — a blatant attempt to keep their heavily gerrymandered districts and Wisconsin’s draconian anti-abortion laws alive.
Republicans in the State legislature have indicated that they would support impeaching her, and with their majority in the Assembly and supermajority in the Senate, it's a real threat.
This is a desperate power grab and an attack on our democracy. And we must do all we can to mobilize and organize to prevent these undemocratic stunts.
**[So please, can you contribute $5 to our fund to flip the legislative majority in Wisconsin? Your contribution will help us turn Wisconsin blue up and down the ballot and protect our democracy.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-ssdc-adcc-split.K6b7aP&refcode=em230906-1-t3&t=1&akid=4808%2E196590%2EEEg38L)
_If you 've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be split between the Wisconsin State Senate Democratic Committee, the Wisconsin Assembly Democrats, and The Long Run:_
[Express Donate: $5](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1272?c0=longrunpac-em-ssdc-adcc-split.3dNr2f&refcode=em230906-1-t3&t=20&akid=4808%2E196590%2EEEg38L)
[Express Donate: $25](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1273?c0=longrunpac-em-ssdc-adcc-split.Y4XBgr&refcode=em230906-1-t3&t=21&akid=4808%2E196590%2EEEg38L)
[Express Donate: $50](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1274?c0=longrunpac-em-ssdc-adcc-split.0NVALl&refcode=em230906-1-t3&t=22&akid=4808%2E196590%2EEEg38L)
[Express Donate: $100](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1275?c0=longrunpac-em-ssdc-adcc-split.K0olN4&refcode=em230906-1-t3&t=23&akid=4808%2E196590%2EEEg38L)
[Express Donate: $250](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1266?c0=longrunpac-em-ssdc-adcc-split.CcLfzi&refcode=em230906-1-t3&t=24&akid=4808%2E196590%2EEEg38L)
[Or donate another amount](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-ssdc-adcc-split.K6b7aP&refcode=em230906-1-t3&t=25&akid=4808%2E196590%2EEEg38L)
This is just the beginning of our battle to protect our democracy. The Wisconsin State Senate Democratic Committee and Wisconsin Assembly Democrats need our continued support to turn Wisconsin blue up and down the ballot.
Thank you in advance for your contribution. Change is on the horizon.
Mandela

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=26&akid=4808%2E196590%2EEEg38L). You can also [**sign up to receive fewer emails.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=27&akid=4808%2E196590%2EEEg38L)
The Long Run PAC is funded by grassroots donors giving what they can, when they can. [**Make a contribution to The Long Run PAC today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/longrunpac-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=28&refcode2=4808_196590_EEg38L&akid=4808%2E196590%2EEEg38L)
Submit this form to [**update your contact information.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/update-contact-info/?source=em-footer&t=29&akid=4808%2E196590%2EEEg38L)
Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P.O. Box 597
Milwaukee, WI 53201, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Brian=20Dahle?=
subject: Dahle Demands Action on Homeowners' Insurance Crisis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brian Dahle for Lieutenant Governor 2026
body:
Dahle Demands Action on Homeowners' Insurance Crisis |
---
| |
---
| | Hello friend, I wanted to share some important news with you. The California Homeowners' Insurance crisis is almost at a breaking point. My offices have been inundated with calls from homeowners who are fearful and not sure of their options. The number of Californians who have been dropped is truly UNEXCUSABLE! This is why I sent a [letter](https://briandahle.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11c7ad6aa59a7d39fc5819cc1&id=e72208dcc4&e=f9133ea432) to Insurance Commissioner Lara demanding action on behalf of Californians. He has the ability to take action and address this crisis instead of playing politics. Allstate and State Farm have stopped writing new policies in California. Farmers is limiting the number of policies they will write, and TWO more companies declared they are leaving this state behind. I can assure you, if Commissioner Lara doesn't act soon, we will see a tsunami of other insurance companies leave our state. Rate adjustments should have happened incrementally, the rate review process needs to be fast-tracked, and we need to incentivize homeowners who harden their homes. I've heard far too many stories of homeowners hardening their homes and spending thousands just to be dropped anyway.
Enough is enough.
You can read more about the actions I took [here.](https://briandahle.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11c7ad6aa59a7d39fc5819cc1&id=1de5855d48&e=f9133ea432)

-Brian

---

subject: without mercy
body:
| | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---
| | | | | **Should Colorado’s LAST surviving wolves be protected from ruthless trophy hunters?**
---
[](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1969459?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)

---
| [NO](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1969459?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
_**This link has been generated specifically for dpwillis67@gmail.com. Please do not share with anyone else. Deadline for responses: 11:59 p.m._
---
**Colorado’s last surviving wolves are in a dire situation and merciless trophy hunters and their Big Polluter allies are to blame. Three young gray wolves were SHOT TO DEATH near the Colorado-Wyoming border. These were some of Colorado’s first wild-born pups in more than 80 years. Now, the few surviving members of this vital wolf pack are in extreme peril, and decades of wolf conservation could go up in smoke!**
**It gets worse: Because federal protections for gray wolves were rolled back, trophy hunters slaughtered hundreds of wolves in only a matter of days!** Colorado conservationists have been working tirelessly to protect these majestic creatures and the forests they need to thrive. But now, **Colorado’s wolves can be LEGALLY shot and killed as soon as they step over state lines!**
The stakes are high, friend. But the U.S. Fish and Wildlife Service isn’t doing enough to protect our wolves. **That means struggling wolf populations have been ABANDONED in pro-hunting states like Wyoming. We can’t allow this majestic species to be legally tortured to death with choking snares, violent shootings, ATV chases and even explosives! That's why we urgently need your help to protect gray wolves and the planet they call home – before it’s too late!**
**We're committed to putting a stop to these merciless attacks and protecting this crucial species and our planet for generations to come. But we urgently need to know where our top supporters stand, and we’re still missing 16 responses from your area – including yours! We’re running out of time, so please, tell us before 11:59 p.m. tonight:**
| | **Should Colorado’s LAST surviving wolves be protected from ruthless trophy hunters?**
---
| | | [YES](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1969459?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)

name: Colin Allred
subject: Inside Elections just downgraded Ted Cruz's chances
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Friend, a lot of folks told me not to run against Ted Cruz.
They said a Democrat can't win a statewide election in Texas and that I should stick with my "safe" seat in the House after winning with 66% of the vote last year. But I'm not one to play it safe when our rights and values are in danger.
And listen, this team raised more in the first 24 hours of our campaign than Cruz did in the entire first quarter of 2023 – and the experts are taking notice.
Already, the Cook Political Report upgraded our chances of winning, and both Roll Call AND Inside Elections officially moved Texas from "Solid Republican" to "Battleground"!
Friend, all of these experts are putting Ted Cruz on notice because of the early strength of our grassroots campaign – but you know that GOP donors are taking notice, too. So please, will you chip in a split donation between my campaign and Serve America to help fight back against the GOP, beat Ted Cruz and flip Texas blue? I need to raise $100,000 today → [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
I've never felt better about our chances. Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight says Texas may be Democrats' best pickup opportunity next year, CNN is calling Cruz one of the most vulnerable incumbents on the ballot and, if we win in Texas, Democrats will hold the Senate Majority.
But CBS News says this could be one of the most expensive races in the country, and with Senate control hanging in the balance, national Republicans are pouring money into Cruz's war chest. They've already launched their first attacks, and if we miss our fundraising goals, I won't have the resources to fight back.
That's why I'm personally asking: Will you split a donation of $15 or more between my campaign and Serve America? Every dollar helps as we work to defeat Ted Cruz, flip Texas blue and protect our Democratic Senate majority → [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
Let's do this.
Colin Allred
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kevin=20Dellicker?=
subject: Campaign Update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KEVIN DELLICKER FOR CONGRESS
body:
November municipal and judge elections kick into high gear! |
---
| | [ ](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=aefc185cf8&e=1090c5c412)
---
|
---
| | Dear Friends and Neighbors,

With Labor Day behind us, state and local candidates have begun sprinting towards November 7th. We have lots of important races on the ballot, and I’ll work hard to help strong conservative leaders succeed on Election Day.

Here are just a few of the outstanding people I’ve had the pleasure of campaigning with throughout the summer:

For statewide judicial races: [Carolyn Carluccio](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=50ec07a62d&e=1090c5c412) for Supreme Court, [Maria Battista](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=9657682de0&e=1090c5c412) for Superior Court, and [Megan Martin](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=d504c16e54&e=1090c5c412) for Commonwealth Court.

In Northampton County: [Nancy Aaroe](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=5eb08901a7&e=1090c5c412) for Judge, [Tom Giovanni](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=c493be5866&e=1090c5c412) for Northampton County Council, and John Cusick for Northampton County Controller.

In Lehigh County: [Jacqueline Rivera](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=081696c8db&e=1090c5c412), [Paul Moat](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=8b5a5d8621&e=1090c5c412), [Gary Fedorcha](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=f2482a0977&e=1090c5c412), and Rita Sisselberger for Commissioner, [Robert E. Smith Jr.](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=808feddbf0&e=1090c5c412) for Controller, [Gavin Holihan](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=6af275ec0f&e=1090c5c412) for District Attorney, and Joseph Hanna for Sheriff.

In Carbon County: Wayne Nothstein and Michael Sofranko for Commissioner, [Kayla Herman](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=b3e99d4b37&e=1090c5c412) for Controller, Donna Gentile for Recorder of Deeds, Mark Smith for Coroner, and Michael Greek for District Attorney.

In Monroe County: [David Parker](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=ed9a67de54&e=1090c5c412) for Commissioner and [Alex Marek](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=362631f83d&e=1090c5c412) for District Attorney.

There are many more. We need to help elect school board candidates, municipal office seekers, and judicial candidates who are willing to support the Constitution and defend our American way of life. Please take the time to get to know your local candidates so you can be an informed elector.

This fall, you’ll continue to see me out and about working as a team with local candidates to promote safe communities, good jobs and strong families.

**Keep America Free.**

_Kevin Dellicker is a husband and father who has lived in the Lehigh Valley for 40 years. He's the founder of a successful technology company and a 28-year veteran of the U.S. Armed Forces. Kevin's not running for Congress because he needs a job. He's running because he's got the experience, vision, and courage to defend our American way of life. _
---
|
---
| Get involved with Kevin Dellicker for Congress and help Keep America Free!

**Thank you to all who responded to our end-of-month fundraising appeal!**
---
| [DONATE](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=dcbff00aab&e=1090c5c412 "DONATE")
---
| [VOLUNTEER](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=641bf6e2f4&e=1090c5c412 "VOLUNTEER")
---
| If you wish to contribute by check, please mail it to Kevin Dellicker for Congress, P.O. Box 86, Germansville, PA 18053. Please write your employer and profession on the check to comply with federal campaign finance laws.

**Learn more about Kevin's campaign at[www.dellickerforcongress.com](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=5f400753d3&e=1090c5c412). **

Thank you!
---
|
---
|
---
| **UPCOMING EVENTS**
* **St. Nicholas Greek Food Festival **| Thu., Sep. 7 at 6 PM | St. Nicholas Greek Orthodox Cathedral 1607 W. Union Blvd., Bethlehem
* **Palmerton Community Festival **| Fri., Sep. 8 at 7 PM | Palmerton Borough Park
* **Lehigh County Republican Committee |** Tue., Sep. 12 at 7 PM | 1633 W. Elm Street, Allentown

Please check the campaign [website](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=72e499e483&e=1090c5c412) for the up-to-date schedule.

Follow us on Facebook: [https://www.facebook.com/KevinDellickerforCongress](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=ca53195f83&e=1090c5c412)
---
|
---
| On Tuesday, I attended a reception for Gary Fedorcha at Blue Mountain Wineries in New Tripoli and the Lions Club Dinner in Scheckville. On Wednesday, I met with Congressman Thompson, the Chairman of the House Agriculture Committee and participated in the opening ceremonies at the Great Allentown Fair. On Labor Day, I marched in the Pen Argyl Labor Day Parade to support local candidates and recognize our local first responders.
---

Kevin Dellicker for Congress1400 N Providence Rd Ste 1040Media, PA 19063-2079
[Add us to your address book](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/vcard?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=d572757edc)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/profile?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=d572757edc&e=1090c5c412&c=0b9321b7ac) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=d572757edc&e=1090c5c412&c=0b9321b7ac).

name: Mark Gonzalez
subject: Did you see?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Gonzalez for Senate
body:
markagonzalez.com [markagonzalez.com]
Hi friends,
24 hours ago I launched my campaign for US Senate to take on Ted Cruz, because Texans deserve a leader as tough as they are. I wanted to reach out to share my launch video again in case you missed it, as well as to thank everyone who has already visited my Actblue page and made a donation [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mgfortexas] to help lay the foundation for success.
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Q_JeAUNybBk [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Q_JeAUNybBk]
Like I said in the video, it's time Texas had a Senator who will fight for justice, even on the cold and dark days. Throughout my life, I've shown that I will be that leader -- but I need your help to win. Will you make a contribution so we can build a movement that Ted Cruz can't run away from? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mgfortexas]
Click here to donate to Mark Gonzalez [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/MarkForTexas]
I made my career out of helping people earn a second chance, but I can tell you right now: Ted doesn't deserve one. If you’re on Twitter [https://twitter.com/DAMarkGonzalez/status/1699039438720954678?s=20] or Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/watch/?v=3563051767244466] , don’t forget to share my launch video with #Adelante and a message of support — thanks for having my back, and let’s win this thing.
Best,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/105874/images/Mark%20signature%20file.png]

name: Emilia Sykes HQ
subject: Just $1 to keep Northeast Ohio blue
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emilia Sykes for Congress
body:
Every dollar folks like you chip in will allow our team to build out the campaign infrastructure we need to reach that one extra voter, knock that one extra door, and receive that one extra vote next November.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69307671/425719112/-1741698823?refcode=em_res_2023.09.06_b1_eshq_res-nd&amount=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWZjOTBiOC1lMjRjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AiwbfUuxtlCU5e3Av2N8rJ1pkeCCG3J7F_3aYXNIkeM=) Peter — With OH-13 already being called a **pure toss-up race** and a **must-win seat** for reclaiming the Democratic House Majority, Emilia Sykes is going to need the full strength of this grassroots team by her side.

**That’s why today, we’re asking for $1._Yes, really just $1_ – to keep OH-13 blue.**

[**Every dollar folks like you chip in will allow our team to build out the campaign infrastructure we need to reach that one extra voter, knock that one extra door, and receive that one extra vote next November. Peter, will you chip in $1 today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69307672/425719113/-1741698823?refcode=em_res_2023.09.06_b1_eshq_res-nd&amount=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWZjOTBiOC1lMjRjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AiwbfUuxtlCU5e3Av2N8rJ1pkeCCG3J7F_3aYXNIkeM=) | [**CHIP IN $1**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69307673/425719114/-1741698823?refcode=em_res_2023.09.06_b1_eshq_res-nd&amount=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWZjOTBiOC1lMjRjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AiwbfUuxtlCU5e3Av2N8rJ1pkeCCG3J7F_3aYXNIkeM=)
---
[**CHIP IN MORE**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69307674/425719115/-1741698823?refcode=em_res_2023.09.06_b1_eshq_res-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWZjOTBiOC1lMjRjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AiwbfUuxtlCU5e3Av2N8rJ1pkeCCG3J7F_3aYXNIkeM=)
Emilia is a top Republican target, so we can expect that the other side will begin to flood our district with millions of dollars in an attempt to mislead voters and flip this seat red.

body:
is Virginia’s election a “bad omen”?

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69307678/425719119/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDJjZTliMC1lMjRjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HpM5eQ6hapUAo40fkO7M1S5jEq7H8KRJAVeCYqQYA9Q=&emci=7ae8b386-cc4c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=802ce9b0-e24c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=4568237)

| | _“If Democrats across the country aren’t engaged in Virginia, it’s a bad omen going into 2024.” - Mark Bergman, Democratic strategist_ I really want to make this clear, Derek – Virginia is a first look at what’s going to happen to our country in 2024. Our state is in a unique position right now. _Every single seat_ in our legislature is up for grabs. Republicans currently hold the House of Delegates while Democrats control the state Senate – both by the same exact margin. And with Virginia’s history as a purple state, we really don’t know which way this will go. Whatever happens in Virginia will both change the fate of our state forever on crucial issues like abortion, gun control, and health care, and potentially completely reshape the 2024 campaign. _****[Everyone is looking at what happens here in the Commonwealth as a sign of what could happen to the country next year. Donate anything you can today to prove that we have what it takes to elect Democrats up and down the ballot in Virginia this fall and do the same for our country in 2024.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69307680/425719121/-1986114747?refcode=mw_em_230906_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDJjZTliMC1lMjRjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HpM5eQ6hapUAo40fkO7M1S5jEq7H8KRJAVeCYqQYA9Q=)****_ **If we can fight back against the GOP’s massive fundraising haul, that momentum could be a game changer for our House, Senate, and Presidential elections next year.** And that’s not all – our election has national implications in the battle to protect access to reproductive health care. As the last state in the South without some sort of ban or restriction on abortion, a Republican victory followed by a 15-week abortion ban in Virginia could have lasting impacts on the women in Tennessee, Kentucky, and West Virginia that are coming to our state for help. Let’s show Republicans – here in Virginia and across the entire country – that Democrats won’t give up. _****[Donate $5 right now to help us lead the way>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69307682/425719123/-1986114747?refcode=mw_em_230906_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDJjZTliMC1lMjRjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HpM5eQ6hapUAo40fkO7M1S5jEq7H8KRJAVeCYqQYA9Q=)****_ Thank you, Mark **[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69307684/425719125/-1986114747?refcode=mw_em_230906_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDJjZTliMC1lMjRjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HpM5eQ6hapUAo40fkO7M1S5jEq7H8KRJAVeCYqQYA9Q=)**

Rick Scott is seriously vulnerable, making Florida one of Democrats’ best — and only — pickup opportunities in 2024. This race couldn’t be more important: Expanding our Senate majority here in Florida is our BEST CHANCE to pass lifesaving gun violence reform, codify Roe v. Wade , protect our democracy, fight climate change, and so much more. Now, with polls showing that Floridians have turned against Scott’s extremist agenda and Democrats across the country fired up to reelect President Biden, we can finally FLIP FLORIDA BLUE. But Rick Scott has a net worth of up to nearly a quarter billion dollars, and last time around, he pumped $64 million of his own money into the race to buy Florida’s Senate seat.
