body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69309710/425726185/972226503?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MThjNWFiMC1lODRjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ThKoQHMcpSXYkBO_rTTawQTzKvfpO_XJBCWvWEnSJCM=) Happy back-to-school season, team! Trust me, I know firsthand just how busy this time of year can be for Michigan parents, so I won’t take up too much of your time. [_**I wanted to ask if you’d take a moment to sign my back-to-school petition to Congress. As a nation, we need to invest more in our students, teachers, and public schools, and ensure every child has access to a quality education. If you agree with that fundamental value, will you sign your name next to mine?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69309711/425726188/-164330015?refcode=email_090623_Back-to-school&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MThjNWFiMC1lODRjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ThKoQHMcpSXYkBO_rTTawQTzKvfpO_XJBCWvWEnSJCM=&emci=a5e026fb-1348-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=718c5ab0-e84c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=31479900) | | [Add Your Name →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69309712/425726189/322838112?refcode=email_090623_Back-to-school&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MThjNWFiMC1lODRjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ThKoQHMcpSXYkBO_rTTawQTzKvfpO_XJBCWvWEnSJCM=&emci=a5e026fb-1348-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=718c5ab0-e84c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=31479900)
---
I’m proud to have fought for public education throughout my entire life – in fact, my first job in public service was serving as a member of a local school board.
Now, I’m in Congress fighting to improve public education in every way I can, including pushing for more resources for teachers in before-school, after-school, and summer-school programs.
**The fact is, every child, no matter their background or what ZIP code they’re from, should have access to a high quality public education.**
I’m proud of Michigan’s public schools, but I also know there’s still more work to be done.
[_**If you agree, will you take a moment to add your name to my petition? Adding your name will take less time than a kindergarten math quiz – so as back-to-school season starts, will you support Michigan students, teachers, and families by taking action?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69309713/425726190/322838112?refcode=email_090623_Back-to-school&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MThjNWFiMC1lODRjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ThKoQHMcpSXYkBO_rTTawQTzKvfpO_XJBCWvWEnSJCM=&emci=a5e026fb-1348-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=718c5ab0-e84c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=31479900)
| [Add Your Name →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69309714/425726191/322838112?refcode=email_090623_Back-to-school&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MThjNWFiMC1lODRjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ThKoQHMcpSXYkBO_rTTawQTzKvfpO_XJBCWvWEnSJCM=&emci=a5e026fb-1348-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=718c5ab0-e84c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=31479900)

name: Team James
subject: Watch the Wolverines Live with John James!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John James for Michigan
body:
| | | Friend, Are you ready to experience Michigan football like never before? We're thrilled to present an exclusive opportunity that could make you the lucky winner of an unforgettable game day experience! Enter for a Chance to Win: You and a lucky friend could be seated alongside Congressman John James as you watch the #2 Ranked Wolverines take on UNLV at the Big House. Prize Details:
* 2 tickets to the Michigan Wolverines vs. UNLV game on Saturday, September 9th**.**
* Seating with John James and friends.
* Complimentary popcorn and pop to keep you energized throughout the game.
* Capture the moment with a special photo opportunity with Mr. James.

How to Enter: Click the link below to enter for your chance to win this incredible Wolverines game day experience:
---
[**ENTER TO WIN HERE**](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=638fd1363630402eb941e8f71ad339dc&_e=34aSb1FCq7PV0oAw5PyZFW67-6XKsrmidlGx3ayHaKtV_cqbe3aMYwkb5wnfvipPajulWfzz3hdI9xJTOXPQcI_kmpLVI4h132tgK3dmjDbYFwMeJiMRt9OkAoWX_BwbNXGcQ42lM6t22p3_J4JVA6Zd79US46aZBVmR3CeT1Qxzbo4XUh2fhZlr0jxpJARZ7nMmyNemQdzvuP4-o1JVH3r-CO6qXyAYCI9CEgls0POqskHUO4zGvAoEZTit1BXX0MYBDhqfC9qkwwKn3qaMUKRnJHTZR3XAdn1bOKBkNvzTAH_I1haP3aR-OWTr4wIDKrz7z-UMexMCe0bKR4tUve4rUtFTyGRAHCrx_KXxRHrI8g6YzfGBqiaiNx59BQaY1kwxUJFpvmDpP2SS94krTSHi_iTzBWxNv-bHbsE4b3js7Z1tLff0PlX5gdq-75g98g6lbYrnCKVf8CJ9b1i-mL3KWWB9UgQcHBQzT3eixxsCEEJnrQTYBqAP6enCkpPG)
---
Hurry, the contest ends on September 6th, so be sure to enter before it's too late. Don't miss out on this opportunity to cheer on the Wolverines like never before. Spread the Word: Know someone who'd love to join you at the game? Share the contest with your friends and family so they can enter too! Get ready to immerse yourself in the excitement of Michigan football and enjoy a day filled with cheers, thrills, and unforgettable moments. **[We can't wait to announce the lucky winner!](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=638fd1363630402eb941e8f71ad339dc&_e=34aSb1FCq7PV0oAw5PyZFW67-6XKsrmidlGx3ayHaKtV_cqbe3aMYwkb5wnfvipPajulWfzz3hdI9xJTOXPQcI_kmpLVI4h132tgK3dmjDbYFwMeJiMRt9OkAoWX_BwbNXGcQ42lM6t22p3_J4JVA6Zd79US46aZBVmR3CeT1Qxzbo4XUh2fhZlr0jxpJARZ7nMmyNemQdzvuP4-o1JVH3r-CO6qXyAYCI9CEgls0POqskHUO4zGvAoEZTit1BXX0MYBDhqfC9qkwwKn3qaMUKRnJHTZR3XAdn1bOKBkNvzTAH_I1haP3aR-OWTr4wIDKrz7z-UMexMCe0bKR4tUve4rUtFTyGRAHCrx_KXxRHqic5RJcwkxJu7G3K2JF4ttkJBmPuCnsNGPacMhXh2ItIBeWRPe9vw3foijQGkWOPv2PAoQ9c73_3qL43SeDl-xtv_SydNAZIQSghudgy3L-V-SsC_nOwsCJLi7-OpnhX3RWX7aPnRxdObwsrIy0YWd)** Good luck! Team John James

All entries must be received by 11:59 pm Eastern Time on Wednesday, September, 6, 2023. One winner will receive the following Prize: two (2) tickets to the Michigan Wolverines vs. UNLV game on September 9, 2023, with an approximate retail value of $500 and free popcorn and pop, with an approximate retail value of $60. The total approximate retail value of the prize is $560. Odds of winning depend on the number of entries received. The Promotion is open to citizens and permanent residents (green card holders) of the United States who are legal residents of one of the fifty states, Puerto Rico, or the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age or the age of majority as determined by state law. name: Michael Bennet
subject: My work on drug prices
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BENNET FOR COLORADO
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_090623_DrugCosts_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_090623_DrugCosts_act]
One year ago, we took on Big Pharma and Republican obstruction to pass the Inflation Reduction Act.
One of the key provisions I fought for required Medicare to negotiate the cost of medication with pharmaceutical companies on behalf of America’s seniors. I was thrilled to see it become law.
The Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services just announced the first ten drugs they have selected for price negotiations. These medications treat cancer, diabetes, heart failure, and more — and in 2022, they cost seniors $3.4 billion in out-of-pocket costs.
This is a big step forward and our progress won't stop here. Over the next four years, Medicare will be empowered to negotiate the cost of up to 60 medications, and another 20 every year after that.
We’re putting the interests of Americans over corporate greed. It won’t just save our seniors billions of dollars — it will save lives.
Now, I’m fighting to ensure we can extend these medication price caps to all Americans.
No one should have to choose between food on the table or life-saving medication. You can join the coalition of Coloradans fighting to lower prescription drug costs by signing my petition here >> [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/x_090523_prescriptiondrugcosts]

Michael

subject: Here’s our plan to build Democratic power in Wisconsin →
body:
Wisconsin is a HUGE opportunity for Democrats this cycle – that’s why we’ve included it on our Path to the Majority! | | |
---
| | Wisconsin is a KEY player in our plan to win 50 state legislative chambers by 2030 – what we call our **Path to the Majority strategy**. Last year, we secured four new Democratic trifectas and defended our existing majorities. We’re working to keep up this momentum and **we have a HUGE opportunity in Wisconsin this cycle:** [](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zVHJ7K7OT4ByLTea21El521jfTs5PSybW8WD46PHFVz1bcfufbZ3An707zTZbAyJoqoUySuO-XzBA3JYq7zGdxhgFjNBdXIseadCxrT_WhPwuthXrWzzhdXDHjKSTyPFFb2gY6fBSxQc3w3gOjC7YDRWYS2kE3IyP7Q9WsWtjHczCabzzTlEN7u0IHSqjtl3VVOOCymZeHZLvhYoQ7PsMPxFuQF-1qXsGTbrOrv0swrviihJ84ls1wZ-X3RM1x7Fq-LJ8dogMbEY5hPmcZIzGOiDzufZHa9MxgV5cKEmpNJM_Xofb_66r7L52h-inwLlM-viQDpO_TSaZDEgUNdyrkot2e-uoXAlSIZzEg4s5Od_FbLCSUpshbMknVmJ2tvI3cNSwao6S64Jnh3aUpJgzvUGJKCAjDGI-yQ5-xmKg5TA/3zd/_hdVdtQRRrWP6tfLCUAzCQ/h0/F3OORI4RvjdCZdRewuCxR5qWX2BGp3hnpN-qEZZETAw) FIRST, Wisconsin voters elected a liberal Supreme Court judge, shifting the court’s makeup to a liberal majority for the first time in years. clean_body: Wisconsin is a HUGE opportunity for Democrats this cycle – that’s why we’ve included it on our Path to the Majority! | | | | | Wisconsin is a KEY player in our plan to win 50 state legislative chambers by 2030 – what we call our Path to the Majority strategy. Last year, we secured four new Democratic trifectas and defended our existing majorities. We’re working to keep up this momentum and we have a HUGE opportunity in Wisconsin this cycle: FIRST, Wisconsin voters elected a liberal Supreme Court judge, shifting the court’s makeup to a liberal majority for the first time in years. THEN, a lawsuit was filed urging the state to strike down Wisconsin’s unfair, Republican-drawn electoral maps. It’s possible that every seat in the legislature could be on the ballot NEXT YEAR. NOW, some Republicans are considering impeachment of WI’s newest liberal justice to stall our efforts and keep their rigged maps in place. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | We need to mobilize now , so we’re prepared to go toe-to-toe with state Republicans in places like Wisconsin and WIN. It’s critical that Democrats have the resources so that we’re ready to capitalize on opportunities like this and defeat extreme Republicans in 2023, 2024, and beyond – we’re counting on you to own a piece of this fight. Thanks for paving the way for change, Team DLCC | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the DLCC are not tax deductible. | The Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee and Grassroots Victory PAC are dedicated to winning and defending Democratic majorities in state legislatures across the country. | This is what it looks like when citizens are educated and empowered to hold their elected officials accountable. The work we are doing at Citizens Defending Freedom is paramount as we provide citizens with tools, knowledge, resources, and legal counsel to feel confident to go out and effect change to keep their communities safe.
During his term, Mark Gonzalez had a track record of releasing dangerous criminals back onto the streets, leaving citizens feeling vulnerable and unsafe. Now, the families of the victims that have suffered because of the policies and actions of Mark Gonzalez can have a sense of closure and peace knowing his soft-on-crime policies will no longer be tolerated. This victory is just the beginning in the fight to remove corrupt district attorneys across our nation. We must press forward and continue to hold our elected officials accountable to We the People.

_**The Mackenzie Minute**_

* * *
Fellow American,

I hope everyone had a great Labor Day Weekend!

It has been another exciting week in our campaign with things happening big and small. Here are just a few highlights:

• Interviewed on The David Webb Show
• Endorsement By Ambassdor Carla Sands
• Visting The Great Allentown Fair
• Pen Argyl Labor Day Parade
• Macungie Wheels Of Time

As always, if you need to get in contact with my campaign, please feel free to reach out at (484) 347-8777.

All the Best,
[](http://links.mackenzieforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e09c1376a1134fb5bbc6c87f9d1914fb&_m=113590948d80444ab0ff8dbc72931ad9&_e=ZjTqLaQCkhNNfzt01-FJvkFmL8uuwsMNUSUamsDDGKHtPnMrwehV_mFlklZBj2ePa-l0VATAzdFozl-QT0GyX9ENX50Q49fSTPj83ErLpj0c35xPT2uKzEV1olNqaGfBVegi2JXhKuNIyfLDWQUGW-d2y_8ojPUSyow7ZUSSyFs5IohahxMaFLlxJGK2vvbhjmPBW5KrOAhnkl5wTcXl-rGmiZ0xfMv-k0ZjWWT2bgUN2WSoyghuqAFLMYXAJThTNj0iFcgALegRjXIJxDrOq0I486OTCIdlUrQ0NchCm7NDcf4sPVIwtXLNJk5o4W0fyot_HkTORXoYXkgpI0rsaGCZgwHsW-vOzWVe_w_ScZePeb3d-Xw8PKTH4HjdxpmLXEohfNFBRf5Gr6iccZC0YY6s5buB36g-dFkhri7hBw_lymxS4UZjWWUJuF1CLnKE)

* * *
**NEWS**
* * *

**RYAN ON DAVID WEBB SHOW**
I joined guest host Brett Winterble on the nationally syndicated David Webb show to talk about my proven conservative record of fighting for Pennsylvanians and how I’ll bring that same fight to Washington for America’s future. Listen here:

[ **DAVID WEBB INTERVIEW**](http://links.mackenzieforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e09c1376a1134fb5bbc6c87f9d1914fb&_m=113590948d80444ab0ff8dbc72931ad9&_e=ZjTqLaQCkhNNfzt01-FJvp81l92VuD_Da0MCFZ8BCaWvBQ0AdygaD93N3_lAlD4tXqXzxZMcUutBb_fPsKmBCU7hOMGDj6lepJF-Q0ShnOi7FW8QDLHI7pAtBNccrOqZydl2GdhWl8PfvLNiL6fpXsRBVNB6uKapMc-HaId223raK0C2ozCFosNGTr2VRqse3BmO9AE1sztop_jCn_DNlyeUL7aNuwIbYadltAbNoFF-mDGALFwGI1CXzurP84VCLBHYu8Fut9qkFBZHF8bn1QL_Pwnsls1wDX4qcPKh-x8J0vziaZDTXODc7tU0KolBq8FWKGhXYEfa1T_bvnXkLTO4dDSQIa_wEyD5KKTswqQ1kEDDlRQ_DfOnkNNk3KU6ru2vCARZyiupSpTckylcXynOWBcau7Ol69h6eXhjRrVgX1PvCVcJaAme8QBxkj7g)

* * *
**ENDORSEMENT BY AMBASSADOR CARLA SANDS**
I’m honored to receive Ambassador Carla Sands’ support in this race. She understands the need to send leaders to Washington who will restore the policies that were so successful under President Trump’s administration. I am the only candidate who both shares the America First vision for our country and has a record to prove it. From fighting illegal immigration to protecting American jobs and workers, people can trust I will always put America First.
[](http://links.mackenzieforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e09c1376a1134fb5bbc6c87f9d1914fb&_m=113590948d80444ab0ff8dbc72931ad9&_e=ZjTqLaQCkhNNfzt01-FJvkFmL8uuwsMNUSUamsDDGKHtPnMrwehV_mFlklZBj2ePa-l0VATAzdFozl-QT0GyX9ENX50Q49fSTPj83ErLpj0c35xPT2uKzEV1olNqaGfBVegi2JXhKuNIyfLDWQUGW-d2y_8ojPUSyow7ZUSSyFs5IohahxMaFLlxJGK2vvbhjmPBW5KrOAhnkl5wTcXl-rGmiZ0xfMv-k0ZjWWT2bgUN2WSoyghuqAFLMYXAJThTNj0iFcgALegRjXIJxDrOq7vBKbjoqNb-tM4IP2MoVnNQW7ilLc0K96y2QjMHXUcgBsT-nRqh0f6dPzk2CtCfCAASGAQlkLWq3Cz7R6chXahxdQfb3VMUD6UX2KSQCAug_DeT-jCYp3avNvd0xCCeND6Efo49hZEesaxiudPxf2xrIkzdIUzGDMc8U9PjtT8o)
* * *
**VISITING THE GREAT ALLENTOWN FAIR**
It was great to have the opportunity to kick off the festivities at the Great Allentown Fair’s successful 171st year and to take part in the festivities with so many people from not only across our region but across the state. I was happy to spend time promoting the great 2023 Republican candidates who will bring our shared values to local and county governments, school districts, and courts this fall!

* * *
**PEN ARGYL LABOR DAY PARADE**
I hope everyone had a great Labor Day! It was my pleasure to spend the day helping Nancy Aaroe For Northampton County Judge, Maria Battista for Superior Court, and Megan Martin for Commonwealth Court.

* * *
**MACUNGIE WHEELS OF TIME**
I joined with residents from across our area walking around the Wheels of Time in Macungie, admiring vintage cars from so many different eras, and chatting with car owners from across the Lehigh Valley to hear about the history of their cars.

* * *
Our campaign and its volunteers continue to work hard every day – not just to help me, but to help Republicans across our local communities who are running this year, too! I hope I can count on your support and they can too. Please join the team today by visiting [**ryanforpa.com/#volunteer**](http://links.mackenzieforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e09c1376a1134fb5bbc6c87f9d1914fb&_m=113590948d80444ab0ff8dbc72931ad9&_e=ZjTqLaQCkhNNfzt01-FJvr_SVPzeoIfEZoubXvzAENl0SIoNhOz6ILm_O-AL8Lzu4TtjFRVcBmFbKtkJr_4fpGwbYf11btLWJGYGkSrFjUiMj51BxPPE7LjryWPkeMNqnjCNrbuBi4yfUz2jYV3maoHDtz1u_mCWgdS2TPBnkVRVMJlQ9Kv74RkBfpKLz7bggV98INE72e6kKWoGh5hcCdNu4EK0Um_rkRp3nDTP9xg%3D) or donate at [**give.ryanforpa.com.**](http://links.mackenzieforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e09c1376a1134fb5bbc6c87f9d1914fb&_m=113590948d80444ab0ff8dbc72931ad9&_e=ZjTqLaQCkhNNfzt01-FJvkFmL8uuwsMNUSUamsDDGKHtPnMrwehV_mFlklZBj2ePa-l0VATAzdFozl-QT0GyX9ENX50Q49fSTPj83ErLpj0c35xPT2uKzEV1olNqaGfBVegi2JXhKuNIyfLDWQUGW-d2y_8ojPUSyow7ZUSSyFs5IohahxMaFLlxJGK2vvbhjmPBW5KrOAhnkl5wTcXl-rGmiZ0xfMv-k0ZjWWT2bgUN2WSoyghuqAFLMYXAJThTNj0iFcgALegRjXIJxDrOq6HisJD7WzhBR0fHT28mNJyaeSzlxQqLwYQVVuQkoyEF3jpPFF9hQQn08BURKQEtAoMsPcplMLZagD1iptqAIvfThkZcv37DgRjKW-2y-icOryHa_v3Qz6O90yJkNBuUTQKRQmWKNpvDfVPmuGG8mwwEi91Q2toYl5ipOh3bS_z8)

[ **DONATE TO THE CAMPAIGN**](http://links.mackenzieforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e09c1376a1134fb5bbc6c87f9d1914fb&_m=113590948d80444ab0ff8dbc72931ad9&_e=ZjTqLaQCkhNNfzt01-FJvkFmL8uuwsMNUSUamsDDGKHtPnMrwehV_mFlklZBj2ePa-l0VATAzdFozl-QT0GyX9ENX50Q49fSTPj83ErLpj0c35xPT2uKzEV1olNqaGfBVegi2JXhKuNIyfLDWQUGW-d2y_8ojPUSyow7ZUSSyFs5IohahxMaFLlxJGK2vvbhjmPBW5KrOAhnkl5wTcXl-rGmiZ0xfMv-k0ZjWWT2bgUN2WSoyghuqAFLMYXAJThTNj0iFcgALegRjXIJxDrOq08CAcGgKt-Ufw_inFmN54h7Bykt6gtuPAC4J-bxR8xj_q_eivJTy6z4qm6wqPuPZYGY3hJfeR3CSKxDyWs1zOZ6UiC9NibIvijVqI9AGNe9GtQNM-gMe3JLVIjQKO7jX85JXdMaqCXex6Ij3rQsjGhm0DpCezBlg8XY7JmZIit7)

name: Team Mondaire
subject: 👀 What Roll Call said about Mike Lawler…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MONDAIRE FOR CONGRESS
body:
Roll Call just released an analysis of the 12 closest “toss-up” races in the country, and here’s what you need to know:
Team – _Roll Call_ released their analysis of the 12 closest “toss-up” races in the country, and it shows **Mike Lawler is the second most vulnerable House Republican in the country in 2024.**

This confirms what we already knew: The race for NY-17 will be one of the most competitive _anywhere_ , and **the path to retaking our House majority runs right through this district.**

name: Doug White
subject: Correction: Yakima, Chehalis and Spokane Valley
body:
Why is the torture of rural America so difficult to reckon with? | The situation is so dire that, now more than ever, Democrats must support
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/c7Ofi0CY8/c?w=bNZmq7La7ND-JFBssCZ2AUIr_zgCQbeB8LXU9mfgCW4.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucnVyYWxhbWVyaWNhbnN1bml0ZWQub3JnL3NvL2M3T2ZpMENZOD9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjI3N2U3ZjRhLTAwZTMtNDhmYy1iYjk3LTY1NGIzZmEzNzRhOCJ9)_**
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | URGENT: We have far right petitioners stationed outside of Walmarts in Central and Eastern Washington. It seems that they are using an interpretation of the law to allow them on private property and are refusing to leave, the Walmart management has been trying to get them off property for a week. The police and sheriff are adamant that they will do nothing. The police and sheriff have stated that a court order is required, however our courthouse has no idea as to what they are referring to. Additionally it seems that our police and sheriff are colluding with MAGA party members. The Mayor, Deputy Mayor, a council member and County Commissioner are all working on this with me and a transcript was requested this morning of the Mayor's conversation with the police yesterday by a known MAGA member. The only way that anyone could have known the Mayor spoke to the police is if the police tipped them off. Summary, we have police and sheriff selectively enforcing an ambiguous law, deliberately making the process opaque and colluding with MAGA. We have nowhere to turn as the people that are supposed to be protecting us are working against us. I feel like I am in China again.
---
| | |
---
| | Why is the torture of rural America so difficult to reckon with?
---
| | |
---
| | [](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/c7Ofi0CY8/c?w=DB5Cu7Ae3ZK5dzAQkiYH5PaYGbhpHIca6Vp1yV3k5Yc.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL3JhdSIsInIiOiI0NGNiMzYxOS05NTQ4LTRhNTUtOTcwOS02ZmNhZGEwMmI0NDIiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIyNzdlN2Y0YS0wMGUzLTQ4ZmMtYmI5Ny02NTRiM2ZhMzc0YTgifQ)
---
| | The situation is so dire that, now more than ever, Democrats must support one another. Rural Democrats continue to give generously, but is there reciprocity? Evidence suggests that, against rational reasoning, Liberal Progressive Urban Democrats (LPUD) are not seeing our struggles in rural America? I know in my heart of hearts that Democrats would not let other Democrats suffer intentionally. So how can we be seen? The single greatest factor defining Republicans and Democrats is geography. Democrats hang on to urban centers and Republicans have swept through rural America. We know that Democrats living in rural areas are living under Republican ideology. The stories I can tell. . . Things I know, things I believe and I have experienced: One would think that rural America, Central Washington, is the Holy Grail of causes for LPUD:
* Depressed wages - Yakima County’s household income is half the state average
* Greatly decreased access to healthcare and
* Lower Medicare/caid reimbursement
* More likely to be first or second generation immigrant
* Home of indigenous people
* 37% more gun deaths in rural areas
* Greater threat of violence toward LGBTQ+
* Increased threat of violence from MAGA
* We are the water and land that needs to be saved
* Genz, Latinx and even union members are trending right
* And the list is endless

So why is it easier to pull teeth than to get LPUD to “see” us?
---
| | [](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/c7Ofi0CY8/c?w=Ap0T9w9n2ibnraDTAO4TU4DIoaqiA9fSBy_NZvFYt9g.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL3JhdSIsInIiOiJjZmZiZTc3Ny05YTFlLTRlMDEtOWFhOC1lYjNkYWVmMjg5MWEiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIyNzdlN2Y0YS0wMGUzLTQ4ZmMtYmI5Ny02NTRiM2ZhMzc0YTgifQ)
---
| | |
---
| | Washington State is the tenth largest donor to electoral politics with two-thirds going to Democrats. Mostly Seattle Democrats give over $100M. That is a lot of rain, but like IRL very little of it falls on the east side of the Cascades. During the last election cycle I raised a few thousand dollars from Seattle, but my Republican opponent raised millions! Why?
I have spoken with and know the history of a number of nonprofits that have explored Central and Eastern Washington as places to invest. One very well known organization has stuck its toe in the water in Spokane and Yakima but ultimately pulled back. Another organization, which is excellent and does good work, stated that the competition for non profits to spend money in the Seattle area is so great that they need to find new places to spend their money. But even they have acknowledged that their big dollar donors are hesitant about investing in rural Central Washington.
---
| | A wonderful national rural organization, that I engage with regularly, went on the record to say that national nonprofits focused on rural issues are flush with cash, but sadly no one is building political infrastructure in rural areas. They are watching from a distance.
Why is our very real plight invisible? Why can we not be seen? We are the crystal ball that shows the future clearly. Ohio’s issue 1 was defeated, but a review of the voting shows an almost perfect urban/ rural split. But what is most alarming is that the Republican votes are encroaching on the suburbs. We can look to Alabama, Texas and Florida to see how the Republicans can run roughshod with impunity. Here in Central Washington we see our statewide elected leaders losing by larger margins each election cycle. This is a damning trend that can only be stopped by seeing the problem and investing. That investment must be in rural America. The future strategy can not depend solely on hanging on to what Democrats have, but it must retake what we have lost. This is both good business and morally correct. To abandon Democrats to live a MAGA existence is not the Democrat way.
---
| | [](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/c7Ofi0CY8/c?w=9byGFXoMVPCSifjwJzHjPgZlIehRch87h0Ie5beVArw.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL3JhdSIsInIiOiI0MDNmOThlNC05ZDcxLTQ3ZWItOWY3Yy1kZGMwMzA2YmExNDMiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIyNzdlN2Y0YS0wMGUzLTQ4ZmMtYmI5Ny02NTRiM2ZhMzc0YTgifQ)
---
| | |
---
| | [**PO Box 6893 Kennewick, WA 99336**](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/c7Ofi0CY8/c?w=BFEUyp8GnsAYlt_7h0h-WCYCUrOp2IpjRa11TX6-90A.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9tYXBzLmdvb2dsZS5jb20vP3E9UE8rQm94KzY4OTMrS2VubmV3aWNrJTJDK1dBKzk5MzM2IiwiciI6IjA3NjFkYjFkLTZmMWQtNDc4Mi04MDA3LWI5NWM1MGU2M2UzMiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjI3N2U3ZjRhLTAwZTMtNDhmYy1iYjk3LTY1NGIzZmEzNzRhOCJ9)[**509 406 2843**](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/c7Ofi0CY8/c?w=4wruoK0DjZEcXGEEEaq_ntRjuSQn5JlcP331HGuMfGg.eyJ1IjoidGVsOjUwOSs0MDYrMjg0MyIsInIiOiIwNzYxZGIxZC02ZjFkLTQ3ODItODAwNy1iOTVjNTBlNjNlMzIiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIyNzdlN2Y0YS0wMGUzLTQ4ZmMtYmI5Ny02NTRiM2ZhMzc0YTgifQ)

clean_body: Why is the torture of rural America so difficult to reckon with? | The situation is so dire that, now more than ever, Democrats must support | | Can't see this message? | | | | | | | URGENT: We have far right petitioners stationed outside of Walmarts in Central and Eastern Washington. It seems that they are using an interpretation of the law to allow them on private property and are refusing to leave, the Walmart management has been trying to get them off property for a week. The police and sheriff are adamant that they will do nothing. The police and sheriff have stated that a court order is required, however our courthouse has no idea as to what they are referring to. Additionally it seems that our police and sheriff are colluding with MAGA party members. The Mayor, Deputy Mayor, a council member and County Commissioner are all working on this with me and a transcript was requested this morning of the Mayor's conversation with the police yesterday by a known MAGA member. The only way that anyone could have known the Mayor spoke to the police is if the police tipped them off. Summary, we have police and sheriff selectively enforcing an ambiguous law, deliberately making the process opaque and colluding with MAGA. We have nowhere to turn as the people that are supposed to be protecting us are working against us. I feel like I am in China again. | | | | | Why is the torture of rural America so difficult to reckon with? | | | | | | | The situation is so dire that, now more than ever, Democrats must support one another. Rural Democrats continue to give generously, but is there reciprocity? Evidence suggests that, against rational reasoning, Liberal Progressive Urban Democrats (LPUD) are not seeing our struggles in rural America? I know in my heart of hearts that Democrats would not let other Democrats suffer intentionally. So how can we be seen? The single greatest factor defining Republicans and Democrats is geography. Democrats hang on to urban centers and Republicans have swept through rural America. We know that Democrats living in rural areas are living under Republican ideology. The stories I can tell. . . Things I know, things I believe and I have experienced: One would think that rural America, Central Washington, is the Holy Grail of causes for LPUD: Depressed wages - Yakima County’s household income is half the state average Greatly decreased access to healthcare and Lower Medicare/caid reimbursement More likely to be first or second generation immigrant Home of indigenous people 37% more gun deaths in rural areas Greater threat of violence toward LGBTQ+ Increased threat of violence from MAGA We are the water and land that needs to be saved Genz, Latinx and even union members are trending right And the list is endless So why is it easier to pull teeth than to get LPUD to “see” us? | | | | | | | Washington State is the tenth largest donor to electoral politics with two-thirds going to Democrats. Mostly Seattle Democrats give over $100M. That is a lot of rain, but like IRL very little of it falls on the east side of the Cascades. During the last election cycle I raised a few thousand dollars from Seattle, but my Republican opponent raised millions! Why? I have spoken with and know the history of a number of nonprofits that have explored Central and Eastern Washington as places to invest. One very well known organization has stuck its toe in the water in Spokane and Yakima but ultimately pulled back. Another organization, which is excellent and does good work, stated that the competition for non profits to spend money in the Seattle area is so great that they need to find new places to spend their money. But even they have acknowledged that their big dollar donors are hesitant about investing in rural Central Washington. | | A wonderful national rural organization, that I engage with regularly, went on the record to say that national nonprofits focused on rural issues are flush with cash, but sadly no one is building political infrastructure in rural areas. They are watching from a distance. Why is our very real plight invisible? Why can we not be seen? We are the crystal ball that shows the future clearly. Ohio’s issue 1 was defeated, but a review of the voting shows an almost perfect urban/ rural split. But what is most alarming is that the Republican votes are encroaching on the suburbs. We can look to Alabama, Texas and Florida to see how the Republicans can run roughshod with impunity. Here in Central Washington we see our statewide elected leaders losing by larger margins each election cycle. This is a damning trend that can only be stopped by seeing the problem and investing. That investment must be in rural America. The future strategy can not depend solely on hanging on to what Democrats have, but it must retake what we have lost. This is both good business and morally correct. To abandon Democrats to live a MAGA existence is not the Democrat way. | | | | | | | | Share on social | | | | This email was sent from .

clean_body: We have to hold the line for freedom. | Friend, Joe Biden and the radical Left want you to think their policies and agenda are to keep you “safe” and build a better future for YOU. But that couldn’t be farther from the truth. During COVID they locked you in your home and forced masks and mandates on you in the name of public health when it was really just about control. Now, they are trying to CONTROL YOU by telling you what to eat, what car to drive, and how many kids to have in the name of their “climate agenda.” And as the Left faces low approvals and the real risk of losing the White House, they are threatening you once more with COVID policies, lockdowns, and mandates to try to hold onto control. As the ONLY line of defense against Biden and his radical agenda, defending this seat and our narrow majority has never been more important. But we can’t fight this critical battle alone and are counting on you for help. The Biden Administration has been pushing us towards government tyranny since day one. The Left’s radical agenda relies on Americans complying with everything they say and NEVER fighting back against their oppressive policies. But Americans are not fooled by these attacks on our individual freedoms. We won’t back down from fighting back to END the controlling and oppressive agenda of the Left to Save America from their tyrannical rule. They know they are at risk of losing all their control in 2024 and that’s why they are doubling down their efforts. But the Left’s efforts are no match for our army of dedicated grassroots conservatives and together, we will defend our majority and END the Left’s control. Thank you, Wesley Hunt Congressman (TX-38) U.S. Army Captain Paid for by Hunt for Congress. Couples may make contributions from a joint account, but each contributor must sign the check (or other written instrument) or a statement that accompanies the contribution. Non-qualified federal PACs may contribute a maximum of $2,900 for the primary election and $2,900 for the general election. Contributions from federal government contractors and corporations are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation and name of employer for each individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in an election cycle.

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Addressing the backlog in passport applications
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| You’ve been saving up for a big trip overseas. You’ve booked your airfare, your hotels, your tours, and your museum tickets.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=3748%2E5257348%2E_zllvR)
Hey Derek — Picture this:
You’ve been saving up for a big trip overseas. You’ve booked your airfare, your hotels, your tours, and your museum tickets.
You’ve found a dog- or cat-sitter. You’ve found someone to water your plants while you’re away. You’ve taken time off work.
Then, the sinking feeling sets in — your passport has _expired_ , and with current delays in processing times with the State Department, you have to cancel your trip.
**This isn’t a fictional story, Derek. It’s a stress-inducing reality for far too many.**
There is a _massive_ backlog of passport applications; even expedited services are taking longer than usual.
That’s why I’m joining my Republican colleague, Buddy Carter, and a bipartisan group of Representatives to pass the _Passport Modernization Act_.
This legislation will help speed up the passport application process by increasing State Department staff, improving online services, and coming up with methods to reduce these delays.
I’m going to continue working hard in Congress to deliver tangible results for families, even as we run this campaign for the U.S. Senate, and that includes making sure people can make their well-deserved travel plans.
So what do you say? [**If you support these efforts, please join me in supporting the _Passport Modernization Act._**](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20230906-passports.8hQk2D&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20230906_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=3748%2E5257348%2E_zllvR)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20230906-passports.8hQk2D&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20230906_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=3748%2E5257348%2E_zllvR)
---
Thank you for supporting this important legislation. And if you have travel plans coming up, be sure to check your passport’s expiration date!
— Adam
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1813?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20230906_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=6&akid=3748%2E5257348%2E_zllvR)

Fellow Conservative,

The frustrating part about politics is these career politicians tend to stay in office so long that they lose touch with the people who sent them there in the first place.

That’s exactly what happened to Montana’s liberal U.S. Senator Jon Tester – **who as it happens is also my opponent in the U. S. Senate race.**

For a quarter of a century Senator Tester has spent his life in politics, and that has changed him...

Not only does Jon Tester vote with President Biden’s agenda 91% of the time (**out of 723 votes on nominations and legislation, Sen. Tester has voted against Biden just SIX TIMES**), but he’s also been on the wrong side of some of the most consequential issues:
* **Failing to secure our southern border**
* Supporting radical job-killing Green New Deal policies
* **Permanently protecting the right to an abortion until the moment of birth**
* Killing the Keystone XL pipeline
* Opposing constitutional Supreme Court nominees

Jon Tester has become so out of touch with Montana values that he may as well be New York’s third senator. Will you please get involved with my race and help me defeat liberal career politician Tester once and for all? I have the know-how; **[I just need the financial support to get it done.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=ad808dbef1a147618766742a290a6018&_e=CCBHsKaTrqi4kJ22ZDoGOhbAgFE_n8Y4uy7DBRU-js2saqsnZvTOQFjIBOz9K_Dn_aBW4t_3Ju8GF9TrTz5-s27VVfFCl5sV1Lt5Nt4o7qlDkXBcB5spMqJPW6rWLBe5ifQot-nGsvQTSxHVakqsKKIP2QgcThxO3U1qlUfpzcZaPRKSCe2Le6s-NRSnYcpggqNdw0tIfkqJ4yYczf_MnTrwLrvQICeGtJHrz9fY_kYEYj0aPy_5wQr9W_hqxGP371297nO73plK4evlp5HOO8IlY29UJXU1WT4G5S82RAixkIdAxmyqGWt-oWpOTCa2LBCH5B3D52-JIYFIqOnY2kbAnJL-Ln8TUsFbmzCaiLmW1RC--ZOhXeJLokoTmbxc30oaU7crZxju-G-cHuiEZpJVunqWp-P9cPU2FqzTl1E%3D)****

** [**BEAT A LIBERAL
CHIP IN TODAY->->

clean_body: “Former Navy SEAL seeking to oust three-term Democratic senator builds momentum ...” | | Fellow Conservative, The frustrating part about politics is these career politicians tend to stay in office so long that they lose touch with the people who sent them there in the first place. That’s exactly what happened to Montana’s liberal U.S. Senator Jon Tester – who as it happens is also my opponent in the U. S. Senate race. For a quarter of a century Senator Tester has spent his life in politics, and that has changed him... Not only does Jon Tester vote with President Biden’s agenda 91% of the time (out of 723 votes on nominations and legislation, Sen. Tester has voted against Biden just SIX TIMES), but he’s also been on the wrong side of some of the most consequential issues: Failing to secure our southern border Supporting radical job-killing Green New Deal policies Permanently protecting the right to an abortion until the moment of birth Killing the Keystone XL pipeline Opposing constitutional Supreme Court nominees Jon Tester has become so out of touch with Montana values that he may as well be New York’s third senator. Will you please get involved with my race and help me defeat liberal career politician Tester once and for all? I have the know-how; ** Folks are saying that if we’re going to defeat Jon Tester and win back Montana for the Republican Party, it’s next year. Folks are saying that Tester has never faced an opponent like me before; they’re right. I’m not a career politician. I know you haven’t met me and were only just introduced to me a couple of months ago, Jon Tester has won his last two elections by just a couple of points – and he didn’t even hit 50% in two of his last three elections. WE can win this; we just need a base of support to get the job done. I hope you’ll lend a hand. subject: We need to solve our border crisis now.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Binkley For President 2024
body:
My plan to secure our southern border will stop this insanity. | |
---
| | | [ ](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=80bdf28fd8&e=c1403f41d3)
---
| | | Dear Friend

The state of our southern border is horrifying.

Cartels bring across **deadly drugs** like fentanyl,**killing hundreds** of Americans every day.

Human traffickers sell innocent children into the **horrors of slavery**.

Mules **prey on the hopes and dreams** of desperate immigrants.

This must stop. We need to **secure our border immediately** , or these evils will keep growing.

**My plan** to secure our southern border includes these things:
* Build a physical barrier
* Provide resources and support to border enforcement
* Identify and remove potentially dangerous illegal immigrants
* Provide a permanent process to resolve the status of undocumented families

**My[Border Security and Dignity Plan](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=6f6b744500&e=c1403f41d3)** is a comprehensive strategy to secure the border, fix the immigration system, and **put an end to the suffering** caused by Biden's disastrous open border policy.

It's time to **replace our broken and inhumane system **with a strong, sensible and compassionate one.

**Your donation of $15, $25 or $50 to my campaign today** will help me reach more Americans with solutions to our most urgent issues.
---

Hello,
It didn’t take long. **The same day I announced that I was running again in a rematch against Lauren Boebert, the smear campaign from Boebert and her allies began.**
It’s no mystery why: Last year, I lost to Boebert by only 546 votes. It was the closest race in the entire country. And unless they lie about me and smear my name on every TV across the district, they know we’re going to win in 2024.
Here’s the thing, though. I’m not running to represent myself like Boebert. I’m not going to be a part of the circus in Washington. I’m running because the people of Western and Southern Colorado deserve someone in Congress who will wake up every day ready to work for them and their families – not corporate PAC donors.
I’m ready to put forward a positive vision for our district and our country, but I need your help to make sure we don’t get drowned out by Boebert’s lies.
**We’ve set a goal of raising another $150,000 before our first September fundraising deadline so that we have the resources we need to win, but right now we’re still $81,326 short. I’m not taking money from corporate PACs, so I’m counting on you to chip in now:**

clean_body: The smear campaign from Boebert and her allies has begun, because unless they lie about me and smear my name on every TV across the district, they know we’re going to win in 2024. Hello, It didn’t take long. The same day I announced that I was running again in a rematch against Lauren Boebert, the smear campaign from Boebert and her allies began. It’s no mystery why: Last year, I lost to Boebert by only 546 votes. It was the closest race in the entire country. And unless they lie about me and smear my name on every TV across the district, they know we’re going to win in 2024. Here’s the thing, though. I’m not running to represent myself like Boebert. I’m not going to be a part of the circus in Washington. I’m running because the people of Western and Southern Colorado deserve someone in Congress who will wake up every day ready to work for them and their families – not corporate PAC donors. I’m ready to put forward a positive vision for our district and our country, but I need your help to make sure we don’t get drowned out by Boebert’s lies. We’ve set a goal of raising another $150,000 before our first September fundraising deadline so that we have the resources we need to win, but right now we’re still $81,326 short. I’m not taking money from corporate PACs, so I’m counting on you to chip in now: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Lauren Boebert may have the special interests behind her, but I have something even more powerful: You. Thank you for being a part of our grassroots campaign. With gratitude - Adam ** Paid for by Adam for Colorado. Friend, it's Marisa Wood. I'm a public school teacher who has taught kids for 20+ years in Kevin McCarthys' district. I'm not a politician, just someone who has worked tooth and nail to put food on the table, pay the bills, and help my community.
Now, I'm ready for round 2 so we can take Speaker's gavel OUT OF KEVIN MCCARTHY'S HANDS. But I need you with me—can you take a stand against Kevin McCarthy's speakership of chaos by becoming a Digital Founding Donor today? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wood-email?refcode=20230609_em_fr_b1_MW_initial]

Let me take a step back and explain why Digital Founding Donors are so important:
Kevin McCarthy has far-right extremists behind him. Their deep-pocketed buddies & Super PACs put up DISGUSTING amounts of money to keep him in power. Why?
1️⃣ Not because he could win his Speaker's election on the 1st ballot...or the 5th...or the 10th...or the 14th.
2️⃣ Not because he has any principles or core values.
3️⃣ Not because he's delivering for the families who send their kids to my school in California's 20th Congressional District.
It's because he gives in. He lets some of the biggest global corporations, far-right extremists groups, and Donald Trump get whatever they want. He's never fought for anyone aside from himself and his friends.
It all changes now. We CAN put a stop to it in this election. But, let me tell you, I need you on our team to get there.
I don't have rich friends like Kevin McCarthy. As a public school teacher, this isn't what I'm used to, but I know to win we need a STRONG grassroots movement to win this election and take the Speaker's gavel from Kevin McCarthy's hands. Friend, can you be one of the 137 Digital Founding Donors I need TODAY to reach our goal? I'm counting on you >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wood-email?refcode=20230609_em_fr_b1_MW_initial]
DEFEAT KEVIN MCCARTHY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wood-email?refcode=20230609_em_fr_b1_MW_initial]
With gratitude,
Marisa Wood
Marisa Wood is a public school teacher, mother and grandmother, and she has spent her last 20 years serving the Bakersfield Community that she calls home.

body:
I selected YOU | Peter,

As a former Speaker of the House, I know a thing or two about winning elections.

In order to [**TAKE BACK AMERICA**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=0a63c35ef249415ba9a8ca734da4ae33&_e=w_jjVL5RduGxVxLlUIZX3uJ2M4QMfv_NHGQt88k9-ZvtxnFDG_ygel0z_fnmiEx_1lt1MJfcxKrUYvCOdk2TFDx7ZYtnb97ojz0RZS5xRiSM6efci8iMgE7qU0f2RYqvvrkoX33CqodZDzFn0re3aBeO4-4Gr98SMyyevuGOaD3lIHj6or_dsVjU7tjS4YudqHVd5E2N8luUuC0_tFxWAHvRRKZOVg1OLxiSYj5UHVRhkZhRvUWZHVuOWZb3fthCv2ojWRDRP45Ne61BU4F1B01c2ahN8LRMwLVhJGoGC0n1iaSIpeLgQkODUU6KYcayFE28BXypXaoS42URKSJqRX671Ia0ZyZ9RCFZYrrjIE4L4NaDnSmYbgKWv_ni5Jngt6pyI9vtzyRQi5cbzW1BlcFvl1YA3AexfZMRj0FZiiWvX_5YriazxUA1Lof9DH50) from Joe Biden and his far-Left cronies in the Senate next year, the Republican Party needs YOUR HELP to craft our winning message. That’s why I’m reaching out with a simple request: [**Complete the NRSC NATIONWIDE CENSUS before midnight tonight. >>**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=0a63c35ef249415ba9a8ca734da4ae33&_e=w_jjVL5RduGxVxLlUIZX3uJ2M4QMfv_NHGQt88k9-ZvtxnFDG_ygel0z_fnmiEx_1lt1MJfcxKrUYvCOdk2TFDx7ZYtnb97ojz0RZS5xRiSM6efci8iMgE7qU0f2RYqvvrkoX33CqodZDzFn0re3aBeO4-4Gr98SMyyevuGOaD3lIHj6or_dsVjU7tjS4YudqHVd5E2N8luUuC0_tFxWAHvRRKZOVg1OLxiSYj5UHVRhkZhRvUWZHVuOWZb3fthCv2ojWRDRP45Ne61BU4F1B01c2ahN8LRMwLVhJGoGC0mJ7he6_WQFiq32Q7VMwtclWVX-0hK_pIeCIn8q0IzcgT15t2VFW9Z1zGkPLWc7vwaQ6U0fL5M7a6AsO-afC_0Wxq2he2wn7qCeIZA6-kvFFoGDXFIlCv1_8dL8doET53s9TPgNTZWqBRN5puoU5jlQ)

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=0a63c35ef249415ba9a8ca734da4ae33&_e=w_jjVL5RduGxVxLlUIZX3uJ2M4QMfv_NHGQt88k9-ZvtxnFDG_ygel0z_fnmiEx_1lt1MJfcxKrUYvCOdk2TFDx7ZYtnb97ojz0RZS5xRiSM6efci8iMgE7qU0f2RYqvvrkoX33CqodZDzFn0re3aBeO4-4Gr98SMyyevuGOaD3lIHj6or_dsVjU7tjS4YudqHVd5E2N8luUuC0_tFxWAHvRRKZOVg1OLxiSYj5UHVRhkZhRvUWZHVuOWZb3fthCv2ojWRDRP45Ne61BU4F1B01c2ahN8LRMwLVhJGoGC0kVEvYfTC22HSJZB9KzKc1q0ZB8SH3Ix0BqZX2z-6cLMYYDSlrK8nZPtOnK7sB-41Y3qlkFGdtrqMW-Gb0VDoa9ZdujaYCNU0HQ3JJP83WlV6DdS-NSnfILbxiGQJeguyWuXHZNdvJLz8iTqIgh55vT)
By completing the [**NRSC NATIONWIDE CENSUS**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=0a63c35ef249415ba9a8ca734da4ae33&_e=w_jjVL5RduGxVxLlUIZX3uJ2M4QMfv_NHGQt88k9-ZvtxnFDG_ygel0z_fnmiEx_1lt1MJfcxKrUYvCOdk2TFDx7ZYtnb97ojz0RZS5xRiSM6efci8iMgE7qU0f2RYqvvrkoX33CqodZDzFn0re3aBeO4-4Gr98SMyyevuGOaD3lIHj6or_dsVjU7tjS4YudqHVd5E2N8luUuC0_tFxWAHvRRKZOVg1OLxiSYj5UHVRhkZhRvUWZHVuOWZb3fthCv2ojWRDRP45Ne61BU4F1B01c2ahN8LRMwLVhJGoGC0kc4jcqcR9sPyB30RYaUS-jEblHVngg_DHb7RfyXRr2_Uui02BkRv94lEyaipgdAlTqJzDrMeqsiL2Tf5PL8c2d67VuF-3t4Qnb_RaYGntkWsNuYRDIwwKLeGdL1jpVSzYoRSDa68-kl81IKOP7qs6a) ahead of tonight’s deadline, you’ll be providing GOP strategists and conservatives in the Senate with the crucial information they need to win big in 2024. [**Trust me, Peter: Joe Biden does NOT want you to fill out the census.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=0a63c35ef249415ba9a8ca734da4ae33&_e=w_jjVL5RduGxVxLlUIZX3uJ2M4QMfv_NHGQt88k9-ZvtxnFDG_ygel0z_fnmiEx_1lt1MJfcxKrUYvCOdk2TFDx7ZYtnb97ojz0RZS5xRiSM6efci8iMgE7qU0f2RYqvvrkoX33CqodZDzFn0re3aBeO4-4Gr98SMyyevuGOaD3lIHj6or_dsVjU7tjS4YudqHVd5E2N8luUuC0_tFxWAHvRRKZOVg1OLxiSYj5UHVRhkZhRvUWZHVuOWZb3fthCv2ojWRDRP45Ne61BU4F1B01c2ahN8LRMwLVhJGoGC0n1rmHNZdxYX6oF4j1XpCxPSCjclaKlIqIweX8ZWa5YNxNiPANZx4aHDkMoErvZ2Vyhy3b6JCKcXOsKyzB2zuW7AQTMW6MKmPv_Py2k-vr95IgE1HhTiQ30_PLAzuTIn4Jo8vzJumWPCFeKEo9Q5Dx1)

name: Alexandra Rojas
subject: Justice Democrats was started by a handful of Bernie 2016 staffers and volunteers — including me.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, this email
will probably be a bit longer than others you receive today, but it’s
really important and I hope you’ll read the entire message.

Justice Democrats was started by just a handful of Bernie 2016 staffers
and super volunteers. We had just worked on this inspiring campaign for
president. Bernie put a progressive agenda front and center for millions
of people for the first time — myself included.

In 2018, when Justice Democrats recruited AOC to run, she was working as a
bartender — she even worked as a bartender for many months while running
for office. Sometimes, that’s what it takes when you’re a working-class
candidate.

We helped AOC manage her team, run her organizing program, and make
everything we could of our small budget. Then, she won. We toppled one of
the most powerful corporate Democrats and elected the youngest woman ever
to serve in Congress in his place.

Money has always been one of the biggest things holding us back from doing
more. It’s the one thing that our establishment opponents have a seemingly
endless supply of and that we’re always working hard to raise just a
fraction of what they can raise. The DCCC protects entrenched incumbents
who are out of touch with their districts — we’re working every day to
recruit and elect progressive champions who will fight for policies that
match the scale of the crises we face.

We don’t take a dime from corporate PACs or Wall Street, so we rely on
supporters like you to power our work.

In order to sustain our work, we’re counting on our grassroots supporters
to help ensure we have the resources we need. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/137634?refcode=em20230906-30724&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=30724%2E1203867%2EYVr495 ]Will you contribute
$3 right now to help us continue to recruit and elect the
next AOC or Jamaal?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/137634?refcode=em20230906-30724&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=30724%2E1203867%2EYVr495 ]Contribute $3

I know we can do amazing things together. I’m grateful to be in this fight
with you, thank you again.

In solidarity,
Alexandra Rojas, Executive Director

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1021&akid=30724%2E1203867%2EYVr495 ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1022&akid=30724%2E1203867%2EYVr495 ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230906-30724-footer&t=1023&refcode2=30724_1203867_YVr495&akid=30724%2E1203867%2EYVr495

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=30724%2E1203867%2EYVr495

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

Friend, Bucks County, Pennsylvania was my first classroom for democracy. Growing up in Bucks, I learned firsthand through my neighbors and community how an inclusive democracy, one in which everyone has a voice, is vital to the creation of the uniquely composite nation of which Frederick Douglass spoke. But voting rights are on the line in Bucks County this November. **Right now, Democrats Bob Harvie and Diane Marseglia are in a neck-and-neck race with Republicans over control of the Bucks County Board of Commissioners — which oversees how people vote in the county.** If Republicans control the county commission, they could make it a lot harder for people to vote, swinging the district for Republicans up and down the ballot in 2024. And if MAGA Republicans sue the county like Trump did after 2020 (11 times!), we _have_ to make sure it's Democrats defending voters' voices, not election deniers. [**So that's why I'm asking — will please split a donation between Bucks United (the Democrats' group) and my campaign?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69312500/425735955/16845580?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMyMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjVlYThhNzctZjM0Yy1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=CKbYYlL6d9rCboswQcLU7UzjXSVQsoPjOyvfboJozKE=)

clean_body: With so much on the line, the stakes are simply too high for this race in Pennsylvania to remain "obscure" any longer.| | | Friend, Bucks County, Pennsylvania was my first classroom for democracy. Growing up in Bucks, I learned firsthand through my neighbors and community how an inclusive democracy, one in which everyone has a voice, is vital to the creation of the uniquely composite nation of which Frederick Douglass spoke. But voting rights are on the line in Bucks County this November. Right now, Democrats Bob Harvie and Diane Marseglia are in a neck-and-neck race with Republicans over control of the Bucks County Board of Commissioners — which oversees how people vote in the county. If Republicans control the county commission, they could make it a lot harder for people to vote, swinging the district for Republicans up and down the ballot in 2024. And if MAGA Republicans sue the county like Trump did after 2020 (11 times!), we have to make sure it's Democrats defending voters' voices, not election deniers. = | | = = = | = = = | | = race really is going to come down to the wire. In 2019, Democrats took control of the board for the first time in 40 years with just a few hundred votes. Now, experts are expecting this year's race to be just as close. With so much on the line and the margin for error so slim, the stakes are simply too high for this race in Pennsylvania to remain "obscure" any longer. Every dollar really can make a difference. = Thanks for all you do,Ro | | = | | | | | | mailto:info@rokhanna.com ---|---|---|--- Ro for Congress P.O Box 3513 Santa Clara, CA 95051 United States Paid for by Ro for Congress | | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Peter — WE DID IT!!! 🥳 Breaking through a crowded 11-way primary, The Collective PAC-endorsed champion Gabe Amo has officially been elected as the Democratic nominee for Rhode Island's 1st district special election! He is on his way to becoming the first Black congressperson from Rhode Island! Now it’s time for us to pick up the pace: Gabe is headed to the general election on November 7th and we need all hands on deck to make sure he wins. Winning this one seat could make a HUGE difference in passing critical legislation like protecting voting rights and codifying Roe. And we really can’t afford to let another House seat fall into the hands of Kevin McCarthy and the rest of the GOP... | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | Thank you for all that you do, Peter — in Rhode Island and across the country. body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_shyne?refcode=wrpr_hdr [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_shyne?refcode=wrpr_hdr]
Hey there,

If we know two things about Sepi, it's that she always puts our community first, and she gets things done.

When Sepi was elected to the West Hollywood City Council in 2020, she got to work immediately. While in office, she has:

*
Fought
for
support
and
incentive
programs
for
locally
owned
businesses
working
to
rebound
from
the
pandemic.
*
Taken
immediate
action
to
increase
rental
assistance
and
began
tackling
the
homeless
crisis
in
the
city
and
region
—
ultimately
reducing
homelessness
in
the
City.
*
Supported
accountability
measures
to
audit
and
increase
transparency
in
our
local
water
agency.
*
Ensured
that
equity
and
inclusivity
was
at
the
heart
of
the
city’s
actions,
including
creating
the
social
justice
task
force
to
ensure
that
Black,
Indigenous
and
other
people
of
color
had
a
voice
at
the
table.
*
Worked
to
raise
the
minimum
wage
to
the
highest
in
the
nation,
while
supporting
small
businesses
as
the
transition
took
place.
*
Fought
for
a
cleaner
environment
for
all
of
us,
taking
action
to
shift
the
food
service
industry
in
West
Hollywood
to
sustainable
plastic
alternatives
and
fast-tracking
our
climate
action
plan
by
10
years.
*
Revitalized
and
strengthened
the
Block
by
Block
Security
Ambassadorship
program,
helping
to
prevent
and
report
crime
on
residential
streets.
*
Required
increased
training
in
nightlife
areas
to
prevent
sexual
harassment
and
assault,
and
made
history
by
helping
West
Hollywood
become
the
first
city
in
the
nation
to
initiate
Drink
Spiking
Test
Strips
in
local
nightlife
facilities.

These victories are just the beginning, team.

As our next Congresswoman, Sepi will be a relentless champion for workers' rights, reproductive freedoms, environmental conservation, affordable housing, equitable healthcare, and social justice.

Chip in to help her get there [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_shyne?refcode=230906_team_mayor_accomplishments]

Thank you, friend!

— Team Sepi
Mayor Sepi Shyne has taken on WeHo's biggest issues and delivered results. From raising the minimum wage to the highest in the nation to significantly reducing homelessness – she's running for Congress to fight for all of us. As the first out Iranian LGBTQ+ woman elected anywhere in the world, Sepi is committed to making the American dream a reality for everyone: For immigrants, the LGBTQ+ community, women, and anyone trying to make ends meet. It's our time to Shyne, make a donation today.
Will you join Sepi's team and support her for Congress?
Contribute Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_shyne?refcode=emailfooter&refcode2=b56122df-f34c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73]
GIVE Monthly [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_shyne?recurring=true&refcode=footermonthly&refcode2=b56122df-f34c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73]

clean_body: [] Hey there, If we know two things about Sepi, it's that she always puts our community first, and she gets things done. When Sepi was elected to the West Hollywood City Council in 2020, she got to work immediately. While in office, she has: Fought for support and incentive programs for locally owned businesses working to rebound from the pandemic. Taken immediate action to increase rental assistance and began tackling the homeless crisis in the city and region — ultimately reducing homelessness in the City. Supported accountability measures to audit and increase transparency in our local water agency. Ensured that equity and inclusivity was at the heart of the city’s actions, including creating the social justice task force to ensure that Black, Indigenous and other people of color had a voice at the table. Worked to raise the minimum wage to the highest in the nation, while supporting small businesses as the transition took place. Fought for a cleaner environment for all of us, taking action to shift the food service industry in West Hollywood to sustainable plastic alternatives and fast-tracking our climate action plan by 10 years. Revitalized and strengthened the Block by Block Security Ambassadorship program, helping to prevent and report crime on residential streets. Required increased training in nightlife areas to prevent sexual harassment and assault, and made history by helping West Hollywood become the first city in the nation to initiate Drink Spiking Test Strips in local nightlife facilities. These victories are just the beginning, team. As our next Congresswoman, Sepi will be a relentless champion for workers' rights, reproductive freedoms, environmental conservation, affordable housing, equitable healthcare, and social justice. Chip in to help her get there [] Thank you, friend! — Team Sepi Mayor Sepi Shyne has taken on WeHo's biggest issues and delivered results. From raising the minimum wage to the highest in the nation to significantly reducing homelessness – she's running for Congress to fight for all of us. As the first out Iranian LGBTQ+ woman elected anywhere in the world, Sepi is committed to making the American dream a reality for everyone: For immigrants, the LGBTQ+ community, women, and anyone trying to make ends meet. It's our time to Shyne, make a donation today. Will you join Sepi's team and support her for Congress? clean_body: | | Derek- There are no off-years in Virginia! Virginia has all 140 seats in their General Assembly up for re-election and it will have massive repercussions in the rest of the Country. We have Young Dems fighting for their lives down there to build the Democratic majority and block Governor Youngkin’s regressive agenda. | Virginia is the "Bellwether State" for the Presidential election. It's going to show the rest of the country how Democrats are going to perform on the National Stage. Virginia is also the last safe haven for Abortion and Reproductive Rights in the South. No other Southern state has the same level of protections for child-bearing people than Virginia does and we have to protect that. Virginia is also at the forefront of what people are calling the “Parents Rights” movement, where they maligning LGBTQ+ Students and LGBTQ+ Teachers, watering down Black History, and limiting how effective Public Education can be with arbitrary guidelines and allowing parents who not education professionals to dictate what other people’s children learn. All of this matters for 2024 and keeping the White House. In solidarity, The Young Democrats of America | | Sent via . name: Lucas Kunce
subject: re: Senator Tommy Tuberville’s military promotion blockade
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Sen. Tuberville has let his personal politics around abortion blind him to the pressing needs of our national security. Please let me explain:
#
Peter,
Senator Tommy Tuberville has spent months blocking hundreds of military promotions, including some of the highest-ranking leaders in several branches of our armed services. **But now, after five weeks of Senate recess, Tuberville is back in DC — and it’s about damn time he did his job.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36278?refcode=em20230906-3708&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3708%2E614464%2ExPTw9I)
As a Marine officer doing arms control negotiations, I saw just how dangerous even a single empty leadership position could be. So I wanted to take a moment today to tell you more about what exactly is going on and how it impacts service members, military families, and our national security.
**This email is a little longer than usual, but will you please let me explain?**
**[ADD A DONATION →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36278?refcode=em20230906-3708&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3708%2E614464%2ExPTw9I)**
**For the first time in over a century, the United States Marine Corps is without a Commandant** — the highest-ranking officer in the Corps. We're in this situation because Senator Tommy Tuberville has blocked hundreds of military promotions, including the Commandant's.
He claims he’s doing this because government funds have been made available to cover travel for some service members getting abortions. But because I spent 13 years as an active duty Marine and I'm still Lieutenant Colonel in the Reserves, I've been in a lot of conversations about what this means and thought I'd take some time to lay it out for you.
_As a note, these are my personal observations and may or may not be the same as the Department of Defense._
So first, for a lot of us Marines, this just sucks. Going to the Commandant's house and meeting the Commandant during our initial six-month officer training called The Basic School is one of the highlights of that school.
The same can be said for Marines across the world and at every stage of their training or careers. The Commandant is a big deal for us — someone we look up to, aspire to, and who gives us guidance. So not having a Commandant because some politician in DC wants to play games is a morale killer.
But the problem is much bigger than us not having a Commandant. Hundreds of other promotions are backed up with it. **And that doesn't just suck — that has a real impact on our troops and on national security.**
Military life is hard. You move all the time, there's no certainty, there are lots of deployments, you work very long hours, but you do it because you believe in the mission and you believe in the country and taking care of the people who live here.
**And now, because promotions aren't going through, people who've given decades of their lives to this country are being asked or forced to change their plans or not retire.** The one thing they thought they had control over.
People are being frozen in place. They’re not getting the promotion they worked so hard for. Their kids don't know what school they're going to. Their spouses can't figure out their employment. The list goes on and on, and the impact of that is felt throughout the Corps.
This is wrong. Service members are being used for political leverage, the same way that these politicians recently used us veterans for political leverage by holding up the PACT Act — which takes care of us for burn pit exposure we received in Iraq and Afghanistan. **It's absolutely demoralizing to see them use us like this over and over and over again.**
Senator Tuberville is quite literally punishing military families for things that other people have done that he doesn't like. It's shameful, it's selfish, and I'll be frank, it's stupid because it also damages our national security.
He goes out there and has the nerve to say that promotions and positions don't matter, an acting commander can do just as good a job, and be just as capable with or without the actual nomination going through.
Trust me though, rank and position do matter or they wouldn't exist.
**I learned that myself when I was representing the US in arms control negotiations with NATO allies and Russia from 2016 to 2019.** When you've got American officers with lower ranks going up against generals and admirals in critical meetings and negotiations, that matters.
Our allies, our partners, other countries, and our adversaries notice. Russia and China, they notice.
And now dozens, if not hundreds, of military officers are going to have to explain why the US is sending significantly lower ranks than their counterparts to critical meetings and negotiations around the globe.
When China sends a high-ranking general to meet with a third country and we send a one-star acting commander, that undermines our country, our position, and our national security. It's going to look like we don't care, it's going to look like we aren't serious, and people are going to question our country's resolve.
**Weakening the position of our representatives overseas weakens our national security. Period. And that's exactly what Senator Tuberville is doing.**
We need more folks right now in the media, in Congress, and especially in the Republican Party, to step up and say something — and Senator Tuberville needs to stop putting his personal politics ahead of our troops and ahead of our national security.
These service members, veterans, and their families deserve to have someone looking out for them in the U.S. Senate — and that’s just part of why I’m running to defeat Josh Hawley and flip this seat. But I need your help to do it:
**[So Peter, will you add a donation of whatever you can afford to my grassroots campaign today? I don’t take a single cent from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or defense contractors — so you know I’ll always be a voice for real, everyday people in the U.S. Senate.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36278?refcode=em20230906-3708&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3708%2E614464%2ExPTw9I)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36279?refcode=em20230906-3708&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=4&akid=3708%2E614464%2ExPTw9I) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36279?refcode=em20230906-3708&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=5&akid=3708%2E614464%2ExPTw9I) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36279?refcode=em20230906-3708&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=6&akid=3708%2E614464%2ExPTw9I) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36279?refcode=em20230906-3708&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=7&akid=3708%2E614464%2ExPTw9I) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36279?refcode=em20230906-3708&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=8&akid=3708%2E614464%2ExPTw9I) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36279?refcode=em20230906-3708&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=9&akid=3708%2E614464%2ExPTw9I) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36278?refcode=em20230906-3708&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=3708%2E614464%2ExPTw9I)
---
Thanks for hearing me out,
Lucas Kunce

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20230906-3708-footer&t=11&refcode2=3708_614464_xPTw9I&akid=3708%2E614464%2ExPTw9I)**

But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=3708%2E614464%2ExPTw9I). Mail us: PO BOX 1240 Independence, MO 64050.

name: Tina Kotek
subject: It’s back to school season!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
Every Oregon child should have a safe place to receive a high-quality public education. |
#
---
Dear Peter, I love September. I was one of those kids who looked forward to getting back to school in the fall. I want that same kind of excitement for every Oregon student. And that’s why I want Oregon’s schools to be the best they can be for every child. **_Here’s how we’re going to get it done:_** 📚 Invest in early literacy programs to ensure all students are reading by third grade and all educators have the tools they need to support every student. 💸 Ensure all high school students complete a financial literacy and life skills course where they learn budgeting, resume writing, time management and other practical skills they need to be ready for the future. 🫂 Increase educational achievement for rural youth and youth of color by expanding investments in community-led initiatives. 📝 Reduce reliance on standardized testing and instead focus on real-time assessments. ➕ ... and so much more! Every Oregon child should have a safe place to receive a high-quality public education, and every working family needs access to affordable child care options. My administration is working hard to make that a reality here in Oregon. [_**Will you add your name today to show you support our efforts to improve education outcomes here in Oregon? I want you on my side as we work together to move our state forward.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69312865/425737170/1061738238?refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230906_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMWI0YjYxZC1mNTRjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d-LqJy4B4cFHhmHhwSm317TJ9TWYaVUoCN7w3oqnrOo=&emci=84bb2d0a-1b4c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=01b4b61d-f54c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=15353729) | [ENDORSE THE PLAN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69312866/425737171/1061738238?contactdata=fLdquA8Wat5zA7M5BDidd1+D+LyKxoKK8rpmFzKut4xrhdVQhUuuXftGmmY48HJwqwrmdVtnjWwzFJTXLgn4OVHnoD0NCesz+rlqVpmtcWlOaVOEzVmpsMt6fMlYYARuMWtViPp8CegkNVHI7rpQq/niLvZVzoz0UMDgKQjRdcs=&refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230906_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMWI0YjYxZC1mNTRjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d-LqJy4B4cFHhmHhwSm317TJ9TWYaVUoCN7w3oqnrOo=&emci=84bb2d0a-1b4c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=01b4b61d-f54c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=15353729)
