name: Steve Dunwoody
subject: I'm running to succeed Adam Schiff —
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Steve Dunwoody for Congress
body:
| |
---
| [View in browser](https://eqrlye.clicks.mlsend.com/te/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjU3NDMzOCxcImxcIjo5ODYwMDY2NzUxMTI2MDE3MSxcInJcIjo5ODYwMDY2ODczNzA0NjQ3OX0iLCJzIjoiMGE2ODdmZjVlYWFjNzdkZiJ9)
| |
---
| [ ](https://eqrlye.clicks.mlsend.com/te/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjU3NDMzOCxcImxcIjo5ODYwMDY2NzUxOTY0ODc4MCxcInJcIjo5ODYwMDY2ODczNzA0NjQ3OX0iLCJzIjoiZDQ3ZjUyZTU3MmZjYzMzNSJ9)
---
|
---
Friend,
My name is Steve Dunwoody, and now that Adam Schiff is running for U.S. Senate, I am running to fill his seat in the House of Representatives to continue on his work of working for justice and truth.
My story is a genuinely American story: in the 1950s, my family moved to Detroit for jobs and opportunity away from the cotton fields of the Deep South. I grew up as the son of parents who worked union jobs their entire lives to provide for their family and build a life from practically nothing. **Without their incredible hard work and sacrifices, and the benefits fought for and earned by unions, I would not be where I am today.**
I’m extremely proud of my roots: when I was in college, I joined the Air National Guard and became the sixth generation of my family to serve our country as a member of the U.S. military. **I was deployed to Iraq in 2005, and served under “Don’t Ask, Don’t Tell” during a time when gays in the military were still marginalized and treated as second class citizens.**
|
---
| [ ](https://eqrlye.clicks.mlsend.com/te/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjU3NDMzOCxcImxcIjo5ODYwMDY2NzUyNTk0MDIzNyxcInJcIjo5ODYwMDY2ODczNzA0NjQ3OX0iLCJzIjoiODI1NzViMWE5YTQ3MTkyNyJ9)
---
|
---
In 2008, I heard then-Senator Barack Obama speak at a community event and was immediately drawn to his message of hope and change, and his pledge to protect our environment by transitioning away from fossil fuels and to renewable energy. I jumped into the Obama campaign head first and never looked back. **
****I went on to serve the country once again as a member of the Obama Administration at the White House and the Department of Energy.**
|
---
| | [ ](https://eqrlye.clicks.mlsend.com/te/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjU3NDMzOCxcImxcIjo5ODYwMDY2NzUzMzI4MDI3MSxcInJcIjo5ODYwMDY2ODczNzA0NjQ3OX0iLCJzIjoiZjQwNGQ4ZmU4YmZjYmQyNyJ9)
---
| | [ ](https://eqrlye.clicks.mlsend.com/te/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjU3NDMzOCxcImxcIjo5ODYwMDY2NzUzNzQ3NDU3NixcInJcIjo5ODYwMDY2ODczNzA0NjQ3OX0iLCJzIjoiOGY3ZmQ2ZGUzZDY4ZTEyYyJ9)
---
|
---
I've been a stalwart advocate for our communities right here in California: fighting to lower the cost of prescription drugs alongside Sen. Bernie Sanders, working with the Vet Voice Foundation and the Sierra Club to advocate for the environment and public lands in Southern California, and dedicating my life fighting for climate justice.
**And now I want to bring those experiences, and my lifelong passion for public service, to Congress as the next representative for California’s 30th Congressional District.**
The people of this district need someone with a proven record of service, someone who shows up to fight, tirelessly, for working families and folks in need, and someone who is a champion for working class values: fairness, equality, and freedom.
I am so proud to be in this race, [and would be absolutely honored if you could join me and support our movement to fight for an America that works for everyone:](https://eqrlye.clicks.mlsend.com/te/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjU3NDMzOCxcImxcIjo5ODYwMDY2NzU1NjM0ODk0OCxcInJcIjo5ODYwMDY2ODczNzA0NjQ3OX0iLCJzIjoiYTZmMDUzODRhZDZjZDdkNiJ9)
|
---
_If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution immediately:_
|
---
| | [ Donate $15 ](https://eqrlye.clicks.mlsend.com/te/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjU3NDMzOCxcImxcIjo5ODYwMDY2NzU2MjY0MDQwNSxcInJcIjo5ODYwMDY2ODczNzA0NjQ3OX0iLCJzIjoiNzg5OTE2YTE3ZDAyMTcxZCJ9)
---
| | [ Donate $27 ](https://eqrlye.clicks.mlsend.com/te/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjU3NDMzOCxcImxcIjo5ODYwMDY2NzU2ODkzMTg2MixcInJcIjo5ODYwMDY2ODczNzA0NjQ3OX0iLCJzIjoiNjRjNDkyOWI0OGE3OGY5MSJ9)
---
|
---
| | [ Donate $50 ](https://eqrlye.clicks.mlsend.com/te/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjU3NDMzOCxcImxcIjo5ODYwMDY2NzU3NDE3NDc0MyxcInJcIjo5ODYwMDY2ODczNzA0NjQ3OX0iLCJzIjoiN2UxYTM5MzAzYzE2YjRhNiJ9)
---
| | [ Donate $100 ](https://eqrlye.clicks.mlsend.com/te/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjU3NDMzOCxcImxcIjo5ODYwMDY2NzU3ODM2OTA0OSxcInJcIjo5ODYwMDY2ODczNzA0NjQ3OX0iLCJzIjoiNWQxODE0ZjA5ZjJlYjE5NyJ9)
---
|
---
| | [ Donate $250 ](https://eqrlye.clicks.mlsend.com/te/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjU3NDMzOCxcImxcIjo5ODYwMDY2NzU4MzYxMTkzMCxcInJcIjo5ODYwMDY2ODczNzA0NjQ3OX0iLCJzIjoiMjk4NzEzNDY1ZjY3NmY3MiJ9)
---
| | [ Donate another amount ](https://eqrlye.clicks.mlsend.com/te/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjU3NDMzOCxcImxcIjo5ODYwMDY2NzU4OTkwMzM4NyxcInJcIjo5ODYwMDY2ODczNzA0NjQ3OX0iLCJzIjoiZDljNTgyMTNhNjhkMWUyYSJ9)
---
|
---
Thank you so much for your support, and**I look forward to building a multiracial, multi-generational movement that can lift up everyone.**
In Solidarity,
| | |
---
| **Steve Dunwoody**
Candidate for Congress (CA-30)
|

name: Derek Marshall for Congress
subject: Sign on: Expand the Medicare drug cost negotiations!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
| | | **Negotiating ten Medicare prescriptions is a good start, but we need more!
**

Peter, thanks to President Biden and the Democrats, the Inflation Reduction Act is going to save some Americans a lot of money on their prescriptions when the new drug prices take effect in 2026.
At this time only **ten** drug costs will be negotiated for 2026, leaving a myriad of other life-saving medications at their current or increased cost.
Many Medicare recipients are rationing medications due to the high cost. Sadly, a lot of them will not get relief with this first round of negotiations, putting their health at risk.
**After taking thousands of dollars from Big Pharma, Rep. Jay Obernolte voted NO on allowing Medicare to negotiate the costs of ten prescription drugs.**
**[In Congress, Democrat Derek Marshall will vote to allow Medicare to negotiate the cost of all drugs, and fight for Medicare for All. Join Derek’s campaign and sign on: negotiate the price of more drugs and save lives!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnRXHjijLi8Q1rSieUV-SwBRFak9ex2FvAoxkhhhpgTGJr2zUnMeFHaPvUJAsCNSaKLqnilFhSoCF3YdDxnFcXCBh6d4YzSzTN9Kxex7ZyvZUr5LJo2IFCia7lCd-_oX7xWzV7HXFy5bSWDohLlEru-aFhud5yNjwdNm1x-ZxbIuD6qopGcdEdDutbZzBwn6RAqU6A6h_uPpnZyJ1bRk0iXWEhwNJrOPIJ_Ehg1GEFuzbnZ7y1aH40q9SpmFGLmLQ2i6x3oPWd3SbXmoJUGcIRa8uB9_nkR-4zbg8pbMfLwiWTpTr4UyUQ7csMgRUUvwavbsCN1JcRQzYUqN0uIrtMJqrLKUOUaf9mZ-VpsiGZZrmZf6UdTvBG3xDHjdSbSLhmpVpmY57H-5u1zKlb2JycOTEITc_2DVS2wiBLx7AWTjgzDfPYnvJfRtmeizKfU3LMt4XBvhYj5bbNNcM3_udS3e8M0_yOxKIWLDei8doG5e2bfojZc-QGZWP29ys46GbyPpLdfFe2n6K-uXUapJ5iQ8uA6C-3aYwHTX6L8ZMicb96VpKUvkT20Py2RQz5quFpLTxygY2rpCKE0og527-H8/3zd/5unKdSGhRzWJe9dFQQJjaw/h1/hQs_SaGPD8tSSdoPjbOZPBYCYGUS7yNNrk1i5Aq5O34)**

This bizarre attack comes after Cruz spent the last few years picking fights with Bud Light and Big Bird instead of working for the people of Texas.

You were in the top 5% of my supporters during my campaign last year. That’s why I’ve selected you to participate in my exclusive 2023 focus group.
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69313513/425739203/-1997846888?code=jtk1188-su-nd&refcode=jtk1188-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZGE4NGNlOS1mNzRjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UW7_n-8jGkhnGZGQvITSkIOBQVUkKEzDDs2ctn1LlOI=)

**Peter, you were in the top 5% of my supporters during my campaign last year. That’s why I’ve selected you to participate in my exclusive 2023 focus group. **
| | [Join Focus Group](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69313514/425739204/1229846208?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&amounts=15,25,50,100,250&code=jtk1188-su-nd&refcode=jtk1188-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZGE4NGNlOS1mNzRjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UW7_n-8jGkhnGZGQvITSkIOBQVUkKEzDDs2ctn1LlOI=&emci=20853ac7-c24c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=fda84ce9-f74c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)
---
I’m counting on your response because when I made history and became New York’s attorney general, I vowed to _always_ let the people’s voice guide my work. As someone who grew up without a platform to speak out against the things that directly affected my neighborhood, I knew that I _never_ wanted to let another New Yorker feel as powerless as I once did.

That’s why I’m reaching out to you today, Peter. As one of my top supporters, you’re someone I can trust to speak honestly and openly about which fights to prioritize this year – **but it looks like you still haven’t accepted my invitation to participate in my focus group.**** **
| | **FOCUS GROUP RECORD**
---
EMAIL: dpwillis67@gmail.com FOCUS GROUP PARTICIPATION ID: 128810098 **PARTICIPATED IN FOCUS GROUP?: **NO DEADLINE: 11:59 P.M.
---
| | [Join Focus Group](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69313515/425739205/1229846208?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&amounts=15,25,50,100,250&code=jtk1188-su-nd&refcode=jtk1188-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZGE4NGNlOS1mNzRjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UW7_n-8jGkhnGZGQvITSkIOBQVUkKEzDDs2ctn1LlOI=&emci=20853ac7-c24c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=fda84ce9-f74c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)
---
**This focus group is only open until midnight tonight, and I need another 473 fearless fighters to respond in order to reach statistical significance. ****[_Please, will you participate in my focus group now so I know what’s most important to the people I represent? It’ll only take a moment of your time._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69313516/425739206/1229846208?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&amounts=15,25,50,100,250&code=jtk1188-su-nd&refcode=jtk1188-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZGE4NGNlOS1mNzRjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UW7_n-8jGkhnGZGQvITSkIOBQVUkKEzDDs2ctn1LlOI=&emci=20853ac7-c24c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=fda84ce9-f74c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)**

Together, we made ___real_ progress in our fight for the voiceless and vulnerable in 2022 – but we can’t afford to let that momentum falter in 2023. Because this January, _millions_ of Americans have entered the year without the right to an abortion, _millions_ of parents have entered the year without confidence that their children will be safe at school, and _millions_ of LGBTQ+ individuals have entered the year fearing for their safety.

Peter, with the chambers of Congress now divided, federal action on reproductive rights, voting rights, and gun safety reforms will likely continue to be stalled – and it’s up to state attorneys general like me to continue the fight for justice and progress.

**But before I solidify my plans for the year ahead, I need to know what you think. Please: [_Will you accept my personal invitation to participate in my exclusive focus group? Click here to access your personalized link:_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69313517/425739207/1229846208?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&amounts=15,25,50,100,250&code=jtk1188-su-nd&refcode=jtk1188-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZGE4NGNlOS1mNzRjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UW7_n-8jGkhnGZGQvITSkIOBQVUkKEzDDs2ctn1LlOI=&emci=20853ac7-c24c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=fda84ce9-f74c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)**
| | [Join Focus Group](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69313518/425739208/1229846208?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&amounts=15,25,50,100,250&code=jtk1188-su-nd&refcode=jtk1188-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZGE4NGNlOS1mNzRjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UW7_n-8jGkhnGZGQvITSkIOBQVUkKEzDDs2ctn1LlOI=&emci=20853ac7-c24c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=fda84ce9-f74c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)
---
Thank you for making your voice heard.

Letitia
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/0_qpfjczsECwUbLJUZRAAg2?unsubscribedata=lt%2Fy0PP8tpEKDnCm3Jwi7SIeqxUnHElWyWDp9mMttJy5DxSaBCBpErv%2BWoFAvu4ZKcWEdoZY3e3AolzW%2B7v7IhLS3G1JJ1Dh6iIBkFqnfEGfNZFPTmtztddvWw33w20rPe4yo%2Fc3snVEqjRFQanmvHq53k%2Farhy8d9xRUBHNOjZgBkiMkgyVCnQ5lBWMOOxX%2F1C7exly%2B0PbmGQdj6ghYzWIn%2BccMIh82eY8uMQ5EIpsXyAX3KI1w0t8fv8M%2F6dJSK0B%2FmMUol1UO2wz5fHM9kgx%2BFgYKaP5K4ZBKXk7Hsyiu5vwEVoCYTLRB8Pe1kgLmZwvVYq5NrviQyoskLSunQItAVgiF9WGeMXQXL9%2BhIylimrNcQZ46xdu4YmQjtwvfNPhq809ENzCMfXQdN1zD6BRVoGsmPQ7qOOdZ6wedd7%2BHF9ysUCHkfK3s3n8spr0) James for NY

subject: Is America on the right track?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Baugh for Congress
body:
|

| | [ ](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=10e415abb9&e=8a657725d1)
---
| Peter, Check out this recent poll that shows how folks are feeling about the nation’s direction right now. (HINT: It’s not a good sign...)
---
| [ ](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=1b69a49042&e=8a657725d1)
---
| Turns out, Americans aren’t too thrilled about the future when the Southern Border is wide open, the national debt is over $30 trillion, and left-wing politicians in places like California do nothing about violent crime on our streets!

We must fix the broken status quo, Peter, and Republican leaders like Scott Baugh are ready for that challenge.

In the meantime, we’re conducting a short internal poll today to see if the numbers above match the sentiments of folks like you.

**If you have just one minute, can you let us know whether you feel America is currently on the right or wrong track?**
---
| [ ](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=0bbad38357&e=8a657725d1)
---

We need at least **150 Responses** today in order to ensure accurate data.

name: Sharice Davids
subject: We can’t let them suppress our voices
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
| Keeping our elections free and fair is essential to our democracy.

We’ve seen an alarming number of cases of National Republicans attacking our election integrity recently. This summer, the Supreme Court ruled on two states’ attempts at gerrymandering their congressional districts to dilute the votes of marginalized communities.

Just over two years ago, I voted for legislation to protect our freedom to vote and ensure equality at the ballot box. As your representative, I will always defend our individual rights and freedoms— _and stand up for our democracy._ But without control of the House, we know real action to protect our elections from these attacks aren’t going to become law.

**_[I want to hear from my top supporters today. As we look towards 2024, how important is it to you that I keep standing up against efforts to suppress our voices? Answer before midnight tomorrow:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69313868/425740615/-764962693?source=EM_NBI_SD_20230906_PL_election_1.1_0_1MO_candidate_NA_NA_electionintegrity&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYWNhNDM1Ni1mODRjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hA28x0KSeOYleco4SnUO9ZlqhXAznnhtWSmHYol-3H4=&emci=c1c68130-e74c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=0aca4356-f84c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=22117458)_** | | [Answer Now→](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69313870/425740617/-764962693?source=EM_NBI_SD_20230906_PL_election_1.1_0_1MO_candidate_NA_NA_electionintegrity&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYWNhNDM1Ni1mODRjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hA28x0KSeOYleco4SnUO9ZlqhXAznnhtWSmHYol-3H4=&emci=c1c68130-e74c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=0aca4356-f84c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=22117458)

Gerrymandering, voter suppression, disinformation, deep pocketed mega donors and corporations.... These are only a few of the tactics that extremists use to try and weaken the foundation of our country.

**These attacks will not stop. Which is why we can’t stop fighting back.**

Do you agree? Answer here→

subject: He’s no moderate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:
As you know, each state only gets two U.S. Senators, but it appears New York has three ... | [Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_s=5ca894f6be16431085e04e38255a1a47&_t=k7DE6me7dfaWH3RY4RB3m1Ek7QVcBMR47qZeaFQKsrXJwBnTqUG3LMBWHiiKAeyGRpFqc8pc_VxC0RbrzEJpKPbpHPNSXz74oOBNKB8O6Qc%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_s=5ca894f6be16431085e04e38255a1a47&_t=k7DE6me7dfaWH3RY4RB3m1Ek7QVcBMR47qZeaFQKsrXJwBnTqUG3LMBWHiiKAeyGRpFqc8pc_VxC0RbrzEJpKPbpHPNSXz74oOBNKB8O6Qc%3D)

[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=5ca894f6be16431085e04e38255a1a47&_e=_31UzdRFytXcy7n9qvTU97Rj6swzRsdXcVsDNfcp9tSDU5eTQvxDHyygBdxY6Z6HAOn9toh2WhPjpYFwgVd4DbOlIemI6bATix_NgYiPGnc-qEUsdVfWfRP1XmGdBYrUjrnw6vO9jPEwL3trntgnbcqQFSH8Y_GiriL1BMGqaMurav_PEX50xk2cakGVPFA8ju12O4NPIkeo02W-8f6gy18PmKC1fJtE17VzIjCH3KfRoHM7PjpcaX4fcu0hd-xLnliXf4Lc-Gik2JOr9HNGKOv4eVVHTSkN2pAk6IG6wXI8S9IqQ8eUfEiyk1PRnjgNS1cynKVrbS0AkC_9_T0u8soL1hegITNEDNG7OT2QY-nCDkiJ8mIrRgpjpuW_sVihD_zaqIjlsJFjnN9ZT_Y8dQ9suHuhJvp_myv9-lL1UTw%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

The frustrating part about politics is these career politicians tend to stay in office so long that they lose touch with the people who sent them there in the first place.

That’s exactly what happened to Montana’s liberal U.S. Senator Jon Tester – **who as it happens is also my opponent in the U. S. Senate race.**

For a quarter of a century Senator Tester has spent his life in politics, and that has changed him...

Not only does Jon Tester vote with President Biden’s agenda 91% of the time (**out of 723 votes on nominations and legislation, Sen. Tester has voted against Biden just SIX TIMES**), but he’s also been on the wrong side of some of the most consequential issues:
* **Failing to secure our southern border**
* Supporting radical job-killing Green New Deal policies
* **Permanently protecting the right to an abortion until the moment of birth**
* Killing the Keystone XL pipeline
* Opposing constitutional Supreme Court nominees

Jon Tester has become so out of touch with Montana values that he may as well be New York’s third senator. clean_body: NBC News predicts Andy's re-election race to be close in November. Peter, Earlier this week, an NBC News election report made a prediction for the Kentucky governor's race: "...the final result isexpected to be close in November: Beshear won his first term in 2019 by just 0.4 percentage points before Trump carried the state by 25 points in 2020." We've been saying this for months, Peter. No matter what the polling shows, we know this race will once again come down to the wire. We can't let our foot off the gas or take anything for granted. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Andy won in 2019 by a tiny margin — just 0.4 percentage points. And that race was against a highly unpopular incumbent. This election, Andy's up against Mitch McConnell's protégé. His opponent and four super PACs supporting him have announced or spent close to $10 million to try and buy this race. This is shaping up to be the most expensive governor's race in Kentucky history. That's why we need you, Peter. Andy's campaign is powered by grassroots supporters. And every single donation — no matter how large or small — makes a difference and puts Andy one step closer to winning reelection this November. = Thank you, Team Beshear | Andy is fighting to make the Bluegrass State the best place it can be for generations to come, and he needs you on board. Will you chip in today to Andy's re-election campaign? = PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR Andy Beshear for Governor PO Box 4278 Louisville, KY 40204 United States

Peter,
Throughout my career, I’ve been proudly dedicated to leadership and service, holding senior positions at organizations like the Make-A-Wish Foundation and the American Red Cross.
More than anything else, my deep passion for helping others has driven me as I’ve navigated through life. From being on the ground coordinating first-response efforts after natural disasters to supporting families during their most difficult times of crisis, I’ve been able to cross paths with so many people and play a small role in lifting them up when they need it most.
Now, I’m running for Congress because our Democracy is in peril. Can I count on you to help fuel our people-powered campaign? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-q3-2023?refcode=09062023]
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-q3-2023?refcode=09062023]
Our representative in Congress has held office for over 10 years, yet there have been no improvements made in our district. Instead of working for the great people he’s been elected to serve, David Schweikert has disrespected us by succumbing to special interests and extremist agendas.
I know my experience, along with my dedication to helping others, will allow me to be an effective voice for Arizonans in Congress. Our residents deserve better than career politicians like David Schweikert, so it’s time for us to come together to flip this seat from red to blue.
Peter, will you join our team by making a grassroots contribution today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-q3-2023?refcode=09062023]

When it comes to poverty or inequality, food insecurity or housing, mental health or LGBTQ+ rights, I don’t _just_ think about policy — I think about my own experiences. **Because for me, policy _is_ personal. It always has been.**

I’m a product of public housing. I am a Black, Afro-Latino, LGBTQ+ American. I don't come from a political family. I am open about my own experiences with depression. I don't have fancy degrees.

**The greatest asset that I bring to public life is the wisdom of _lived experience_ — and it motivates much of what I do in Congress.**

Peter, I vow to never give up on these fights so that more folks like me can have a seat at the table — _but I can’t do this alone._

[Can you chip in $3 to help me start September off strong and continue my work in Congress? My campaign is starting to ramp up and we need to raise $7,000 this month from emails like this one. »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69314334/425742305/-717493931?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20230906_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxN2Q5MmYwZC1mOTRjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lZoQz5Ba4AalNzEzKZx2VM7XId8tAvQRrPB5-BxIyB0=)

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

body:
All eyes will be on Greg and our campaign when our FEC report is published, so it’s critical that we put forward a report that shows the full strength of our grassroots team.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69314454/425742773/-1207523720?amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2023.09.06_b1_aalhq_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkN2ZiMzY2MC1mOTRjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RBcRH328EwIBCts7P4T207jwgvu0kYXftCpRevzO-pc=)
---
Hey there, Alex from Team Landsman here.

As Greg’s finance director, it’s my job to ensure our campaign is running strong, and that means keeping a close eye on our fundraising. **That brings me to September 30 and a critical moment for our campaign.**

**After September 30, our team will publicly report our quarterly fundraising numbers to the Federal Election Commission.** _All eyes will be on Greg and our campaign when our FEC report is published,_ so it’s critical that we put forward a report that shows the full strength of our grassroots team.

As you know, the Washington Republicans are targeting OH-01 as a potential pick-up opportunity as they seek to keep and expand their House Majority. But with you on our team, I know we’re ready to fight back _and win_.

[**We run a grassroots-funded campaign, so in order to have a strong FEC report, we’re going to need your help. clean_body: All eyes will be on Greg and our campaign when our FEC report is published, so it’s critical that we put forward a report that shows the full strength of our grassroots team. | = Hey there, Alex from Team Landsman here. As Greg’s finance director, it’s my job to ensure our campaign is running strong, and that means keeping a close eye on our fundraising. That brings me to September 30 and a critical moment for our campaign. After September 30, our team will publicly report our quarterly fundraising numbers to the Federal Election Commission. All eyes will be on Greg and our campaign when our FEC report is published, so it’s critical that we put forward a report that shows the full strength of our grassroots team. As you know, the Washington Republicans are targeting OH-01 as a potential pick-up opportunity as they seek to keep and expand their House Majority. But with you on our team, I know we’re ready to fight back and win. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = = With gratitude, Alex Alex Hensley Finance Director Greg Landsman for Congress | | Paid for by Landsman for Congress P.O. Truthfully, it’s not going to be easy to reelect President Biden and maintain the Democratic Senate Majority. But together, we’ve overcome huge challenges and come out successful. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Thank you! — Team Tina Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota Tina Smith for Minnesota PO Box 14362 St. Paul, MN 55114 United States | | Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax-deductible.

# [2023 in Review - CBDCs](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1424602&post_id=136593222&utm_source=post-email-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM2NTkzMjIyLCJpYXQiOjE2OTQwMzUwNzgsImV4cCI6MTY5NjYyNzA3OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0MjQ2MDIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.D_J5nK4h1uRjwgSbmWvcwrriuSDOBGrOrQy6JryvuPE)
### A Central Bank Digital Currency is Financial Slavery
| | [Andy Roth](https://substack.com/redirect/ae240ada-1ebc-4aaa-a131-8d492d22eb24?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| Sep 6
---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ae240ada-1ebc-4aaa-a131-8d492d22eb24?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1424602&post_id=136593222&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM2NTkzMjIyLCJpYXQiOjE2OTQwMzUwNzgsImV4cCI6MTY5NjYyNzA3OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0MjQ2MDIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.D_J5nK4h1uRjwgSbmWvcwrriuSDOBGrOrQy6JryvuPE)
---
| | [](https://substack..4mq2_uZuM4qw2EKuYnB641SCHc7G7k5EKNQfQdJ2wkE?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/sfcn/p/2023-in-review-cbdcs?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store)
---
Friends,
Recently, I sent the first email in a series bringing you the successes of our State Freedom Caucuses from this year's legislation sessions, proving to you that the model that we built from the House Freedom Caucus in D.C. is working...and working well.
In that last email, I highlighted our Freedom Caucuses' success in fighting back against the Radical Left's attempt to [socialize your healthcare.](https://substack.com/redirect/b00328c2-f3e7-4448-b5e6-c85bd98a3317?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Now the Radical Left is trying to force a new form of tyrannical control, this time by controlling _**our money**_.
We're talking about a Central Bank Digital Currency (CBDC). Imagine being forced to have a bank account directly with the Federal Reserve and not with your local bank. Imagine the government being able to see all of your transactions. And worse, being able to censor your transactions. In short, a CBDC is financial slavery, and countries around the world - especially China and Russia - are rushing to adopt them. They're even trying to do it here in the United States, but they are doing it much more quietly since it's such an affront to liberty and our way of life.
The South Dakota Freedom Caucus was the first to recognize the plan developed by the Uniform Law Commission (ULC) to build the framework and infrastructure for a national CDBC. This nefarious plan entailed 50 bills being introduced in all 50 states.
Thankfully, the South Dakota Freedom Caucus was successful in leading an initiative to kill the bill (HB 1193) that would have redefined the definition of money to include CBDCs. Their fight brought national attention after the SD Freedom Caucus went on the [Glenn Beck show](https://substack.com/redirect/a5861144-98d8-493f-95a7-29bc4d9c568b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and received support from multiple national groups like [Club for Growth](https://substack.com/redirect/0164ad68-a5bf-46ed-b38e-b3ff60edabd1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), [Gun Owners of America](https://substack.com/redirect/52969cfc-e4c4-4d02-a31a-522e152666dc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and [WallBuilders](https://substack.com/redirect/4063157b-1c4d-42cc-9ffe-6155be5a2d10?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). While the bill ultimately passed the legislature, the Caucus successfully pressed Governor [Kristi Noem to veto](https://substack.com/redirect/3c07aab8-033f-461c-8ded-5b75552f7a6b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the legislation.
Upon Governor Noem's veto of the bill, the Caucus released [the statement](https://substack.com/redirect/a1e56f7c-40e4-4678-941d-30c942740665?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), "We profusely thank Gov. Noem for vetoing HB 1193, a bill that would have created a path towards a China-style Central Bank Digital Currency. At our urging, thousands of South Dakotans have called and written to the governor warning her of the dangers of this legislation and she has truly listened to the voice of the people."
The fight in South Dakota prompted our other 10 State Freedom Caucuses to begin preemptive strikes against this type of legislation, resulting in several Caucuses successfully defeating CBDC legislation in their states:
* The **Arizona Freedom Caucus** successfully led the efforts to kill HB 2770 which created a framework for a CBDC in their state.
* The **Montana Freedom Caucus** successfully killed SB 370, which would have paved the way for a CBDC in their state.
* The **Louisiana Freedom Caucus** successfully authored and passed HB 415 that would ban CBDCs from qualifying as a valid deposit account in the state. Unfortunately, this bill was ultimately vetoed by the Democrat Governor.

To date, no state with a state freedom caucus has successfully passed a CBDC bill. And our national media attention also prompted other states outside of our Network to join the fight - Texas, Arkansas, Oklahoma, and other states all killed their respective CBDC bill. This includes [Governor Ron DeSantis in Florida, who announced his own legislation](https://substack.com/redirect/51960b97-ebc5-4147-9a95-069de4ff8aaf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to protect Floridians from a federally-controlled CBDC and what he correctly called the "Surveillance State."
This fight isn't over. The Establishment will continue to push these CBDC bills across the country, but our state freedom caucuses will remain vigilant and fight them every step of the way.
Stay tuned in the coming weeks and months to read more about the successes we've had this year. Imagine what we could do if we had a freedom caucus in all 50 states! If you share our vision and want to support our efforts, please donate now.
[DONATE](https://substack.com/redirect/1c4df2fe-aa1d-455f-9a11-92a2e7c07f56?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**Keep fighting,**
**Andy Roth**
**President**
**State Freedom Caucus Network**
** P.S. Your help is critical in building out a network of patriots and freedom fighters throughout our nation's state capitols and in your home state. Please consider a contribution and join us as we work to advance the cause of liberty.**
You're currently a free subscriber to [State Freedom Caucus Network](https://substack.com/redirect/7c976b37-1488-4dc4-97cb-e35814800237?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). For the full experience, [upgrade your subscription.](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZmNuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.geVhwxX1V-nwq7Lt-biiQ0xjjstaSDnmAuVE07Wscdw?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=postcta)
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZmNuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.geVhwxX1V-nwq7Lt-biiQ0xjjstaSDnmAuVE07Wscdw?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=postcta)

subject: A dollar is all it takes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
See how far your dollar can go and donate $1 to help Joe win reelection! | | |
---
Peter, All we need is $1. To keep fighting the good fight, to grow our campaign, to reach millions more Americans – **to finish the job.** ****We promise, we’re not lying when we say that just $1 can make a difference for our campaign. It may seem small, but it goes a long way in making sure we reelect Joe Biden and Kamala Harris and defeat MAGA extremism along the way. Because here’s the thing: $1 adds up, especially when thousands of donors like you pitch in and tell your family and friends about our campaign. **Our number of donations grows, but so does our coalition of Americans who want to see a better and brighter future led by President Biden and Vice President Harris.** [**So what do you say, Peter? Can we count on you to chip in $1 today to join our campaign and make sure that Joe and Kamala can keep fighting for progress? name: CaucusRoom
subject: Nazis for Joe!
body:
What you need to know today. No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-e-ajludtd-trhiujldw-v/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-ajludtd-trhiujldw-r/)
## **Happy Wednesday!**
**This Needs to Pass** **[Titled the Freedom to Breathe Act](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-ajludtd-trhiujldw-y/), **if passed and signed into law, would prevent Biden and federal agencies from implementing face mask requirements for public transit passengers or students in schools. **Will Kim Jong Un Arm Russia?** North Korean dictator**[Kim Jong Un is reportedly scheduled to travel to Russia](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-ajludtd-trhiujldw-j/) **to meet with President Vladimir Putin as the two countries move toward an arms deal. **He Has No Choice** Elon **[Musk said he is considering suing the Anti-Defamation League](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-ajludtd-trhiujldw-t/)** to clear the platform of claims of antisemitism. **Nazis for Biden?** The leader of a Neo-**[Nazi group protesting over the weekend](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-ajludtd-trhiujldw-i/)** says Biden is better than Trump. _So, actual white supremacist like Biden?_

**Prices Will Skyrocket!** **[Saudi Arabia extended its 1 million barrel per day](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-ajludtd-trhiujldw-d/) **voluntary oil production cut until the end of the year. [_**Let**_](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-ajludtd-trhiujldw-h/)**[ _'s _](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-ajludtd-trhiujldw-k/)[have a good laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-ajludtd-trhiujldw-u/)! **😆
* Read **[between the lines](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-ajludtd-trhiujldw-p/).**
* This is a **[great question](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-ajludtd-trhiujldw-x/).**
* **[Whoa](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-ajludtd-trhiujldw-m/).**
* One**[has to go](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-ajludtd-trhiujldw-c/).**

**Countdown to the 2nd Republican Primary Debate!** [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-ajludtd-trhiujldw-q/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-ajludtd-trhiujldw-a/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-ajludtd-trhiujldw-f/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-ajludtd-trhiujldw-z/) | CaucusRoom, LLC

As someone who has worked in public schools, I know that these book bans are just another politically fueled attack by extremists who don’t actually care about our students. Instead of advocating for more funding for our schools and improving the quality of education in Texas, these extremists are hellbent on attacking anything that doesn’t align with their MAGA agenda. Now more than ever, our students and teachers need leaders in Congress who truly understand what issues matter most. So, I’m running to flip TX-24 to bring a fresh perspective to Congress. | | Peter, yesterday was supposed to settle the big question of who the GOP nominee for UT-02 would be. **It looks like we could still be waiting for**** _days_****to get that answer.** As of this afternoon, the top two Republican candidates in the primary were separated by just 1,417 votes – with several thousand more ballots expected to be counted later this week. Whoever does prevail on the Republican side will have to quickly unite a deeply divided party. In the meantime, our campaign has a unique opportunity to press forward while our opponents remain bogged down in an increasingly chaotic fight. **For us, the general election begins now.** [**We have 76 days to make our case to voters, and every moment counts. clean_body: For Republicans, it’s still chaos. For us, the general election begins today. | | | | Peter, yesterday was supposed to settle the big question of who the GOP nominee for UT-02 would be. It looks like we could still be waiting for daysto get that answer. As of this afternoon, the top two Republican candidates in the primary were separated by just 1,417 votes – with several thousand more ballots expected to be counted later this week. Whoever does prevail on the Republican side will have to quickly unite a deeply divided party. In the meantime, our campaign has a unique opportunity to press forward while our opponents remain bogged down in an increasingly chaotic fight. For us, the general election begins now. = Donate Now If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = ---|--- = | = = Unlike my opponents, I don't have the means to write myself a check for $100,000. I'm running a people-powered campaign whose success is driven entirely by grassroots donations from folks like you. We've built a powerful movement over the summer. We've established strong connections with voters over issues like education, water conservation, and protecting choice. We've shown the pundits – who are quick to write off any Democrat in Utah – that we have what it takes to make a winning coalition and mobilize voters who are sick of far-right Republicans dominating our recent political discourse. It's only a matter of time before national GOP groups (and their super PACs) come in to flood the airwaves and attempt to stop our momentum. I want to ensure that our message continues to reach voters throughout all the twists and turns ahead in this race. We've achieved so much in a very short time, and I know we can bring this home over the finish line by November 21. = More soon, Kathleen = | | | Paid for and authorized by Riebe for Congress. |

_Jackson County, Ohio Democrats mail out reminders to voters ahead of the Issue 1 election_ Rural Democrats are no longer settling for "the way things are." With support, training, and grants from Movement Labs, county party organizations are building power from the ground up and taking back their communities one local election at a time. [Donate Now](https://click.everyaction.com/k/69315246/425745542/-327605227?refcode=2023-09-06-countyparties&recurring=&amount=12&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=f43744a8-fd4c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS85MjA2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDM3NDRhOC1mZDRjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uw6n9-I23f5Arth1aG-fmYaAyU3BfztUY0LCcIZ9SJY=) Democrats young and old are out walking in parades, hosting events to support local candidates, and having conversations with their friends and neighbors about what their community needs and how to get it. They're recruiting volunteers and new members to knock on doors, phone bank, and arrange carpools to get every single Democratic voter in their precinct to the polls on Election Day. And the work is paying off. Rural county parties are on the frontlines electing local candidates to school boards and county commissions and rejecting statewide anti-abortion initiatives like Issue 1 in Ohio –**** and ultimately, these folks will help bring home a presidential victory in critical battlegrounds like Ohio and Wisconsin next year. [**Talk about bang for your buck! Invest in the long-term grassroots work that is reshaping our country county by county. clean_body: 📸 | | | | Each time a supporter drops five bucks in the hat to support Movement Labs – this is what you're funding: = Montgomery County, Virginia Democrats recruit volunteers at a 4th of July parade Our projects are putting power and strength back into the hands of Democrats in red, rural, or underrepresented communities across the country – and giving hope to folks who thought they'd never see change like this in their conservative, rural county. = = Jackson County, Ohio Democrats mail out reminders to voters ahead of the Issue 1 election Rural Democrats are no longer settling for "the way things are." With support, training, and grants from Movement Labs, county party organizations are building power from the ground up and taking back their communities one local election at a time. = Democrats young and old are out walking in parades, hosting events to support local candidates, and having conversations with their friends and neighbors about what their community needs and how to get it. They're recruiting volunteers and new members to knock on doors, phone bank, and arrange carpools to get every single Democratic voter in their precinct to the polls on Election Day. And the work is paying off. Rural county parties are on the frontlines electing local candidates to school boards and county commissions and rejecting statewide anti-abortion initiatives like Issue 1 in Ohio –** and ultimately, these folks will help bring home a presidential victory in critical battlegrounds like Ohio and Wisconsin next year. = Onwards, Yoni Landau CEO, Movement Labs | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | | Paid for by Rapid Resist Action. Contributions to Rapid Resist Action, a 501(c)(4), are not tax deductible for income tax purposes. |

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: If you haven't chipped in yet, will you do so before midnight? I want to meet you in South Carolina. | | - Fellow American - I'll make this quick because the clock is ticking: What's included? Travel and accommodations for a Team Vivek supporter and dinner reservations in Charleston, SC! Apoorva and I are looking forward to meeting you to discuss the future of our country. Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy P.S. Don't forget - we'll pick a date that works for both our calendars once a winner is announced. Good Luck! | GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- NO PURCHASE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN A PRIZE. **Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=e80e80262b1f49be957b295244bec4d5&_e=k3Oksg_XL2M4273jJnE8pFnsxRc0u9-gpwFVqNl8Lh0pcZlV9Zh4NpPjScJzgQ8JADv7C7SZcQN05obFO8M0mPTjfx-bArtKn3bgVq0-2Ci7u49Xytv1oM2YkkBdgNLvKyTTdZi2pTEK3YSblC3uRX5MU5DS3JpB0CO8-N7m0z07hanPaxEFaHefBwkm0tOKDqRaIecWgVYUUMGBHftPln5jWDnxK89ddnwLklz82X7ghC4-NncF67vs4Aq0sK-8kLrr_wLERFB1Qb_OcNEypRRhhHXw6k9d7eFv-P5aGKJKmUJyptMKfpuvuPGJJ7pJ7Pml6Kt_yxSAx7WYJh8Rte06ajQPfxtRQP3toUmeJXAJX0xIH2lEd5RoULESRq8_6Nngf5CbyqKZ2rGtIVhc9lLoKnXjCRVuBvoh3ohLv9k7nXJY_zhzaIhwZanEyvFF)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---

Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution. I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person. I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source. Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. | Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President | This email was sent by: Ron DeSantis for President PO Box 3696 Tallahassee, FL 32315 %%profilecenterurl%% %%subscriptioncenterurl%%

name: Sabina Matos
subject: Thank you, team
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Sabina for Rhode Island
body:
https://www.sabinamatos.com/ [https://www.sabinamatos.com/]
Friend,
I spoke with Gabe Amo and offered him my congratulations on securing the Democratic nomination in the primary. While this is not the result I was hoping for, I have no doubt that Gabe will be a fighter for Rhode Islanders and I urge you to support him come November.
I'm proud of the campaign we ran, and I'm grateful for the support we received. Whether you knocked on doors, shared our content on social media, or put up a yard sign – thank you.
While my campaign may be over, our work is not. I first ran for office because I wanted to make a difference. That's been my primary motivation since I became a public servant – to get things done for the people.
This great state welcomed me with open arms, and I will continue to give back and ensure a better future for all Rhode Islanders.
I hope you'll join me in continuing the fight to do some good in our community. Thank you for everything.
Onwards,
Sabina
https://www.facebook.com/SabinaMatosRI [https://www.facebook.com/SabinaMatosRI] https://twitter.com/sabina_matos [https://twitter.com/sabina_matos]

Sabina for Rhode Island
P.O Box 40715
Providence, RI 02940
United States

Fellow Conservative,

We hope this email finds you well. Thank you for your dedication to the Conservative cause and for standing up for America.

As you know, the midterm elections did not go as planned. We did not see the red wave we expected. We did take back the House majority, but we did not flip the Senate.

Fellow Conservative,

The frustrating part about politics is these career politicians tend to stay in office so long that they lose touch with the people who sent them there in the first place.

That’s exactly what happened to Montana’s liberal U.S. Senator Jon Tester – **who as it happens is also my opponent in the U. S. Senate race.**

For a quarter of a century Senator Tester has spent his life in politics, and that has changed him...

Not only does Jon Tester vote with President Biden’s agenda 91% of the time (**out of 723 votes on nominations and legislation, Sen. Tester has voted against Biden just SIX TIMES**), but he’s also been on the wrong side of some of the most consequential issues:
* **Failing to secure our southern border**
* Supporting radical job-killing Green New Deal policies
* **Permanently protecting the right to an abortion until the moment of birth**
* Killing the Keystone XL pipeline
* Opposing constitutional Supreme Court nominees

Jon Tester has become so out of touch with Montana values that he may as well be New York’s third senator. Will you please get involved with my race and help me defeat liberal career politician Tester once and for all? I have the know-how; **[I just need the financial support to get it done.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=129eeee0bbbe412fa66d99bf91fb2784&_e=U52bHbUomAnxJ1_nr5cd78UdeSVgC4-e5QwUai2N9YXrjXaS6fqIMwspxIhuiaQNZFaAUlofat1OUwTTZeXXw1BaPzszBT24yBNjb_tYGnaaOKvmWdisgD96v6sgNIUGlS19dYm5dSFO1Uf9HqsHpW9sYniP7ylBTlDARFehcHxLiUay7a-z_dLBO-KgNmm09IZpnFJRcfENlLCbiMB88UlNaBnCqFaWhh9m7oPz0bncKWfcIl0NjQ5q1PXklhuHupDaAg13TVQc73mpCtEDbP7nIzhZZ7nTpPbTlPWoVh3vhE9uybAQdjBWv0kjxVkKvcsOt-O0RNhogECjhv8X_CC7jqrjUuxP92mQe-tmIbepbF7HYdVrOq8Cxmqti9bm3dDYoIKyB46Vu-DBJtTlvnHVfewWgfEp4fOdwmScMXU%3D)****

Folks are saying that if we’re going to defeat Jon Tester and win back Montana for the Republican Party, it’s next year. Folks are saying that Tester has never faced an opponent like me before; they’re right. _**I’m not a career politician.**_

Jon Tester has won his last two elections by just a couple of points – and he didn’t even hit 50% in two of his last three elections. **WE can win this; we just need a base of support to get the job done.**

Tim Sheehy

Peter,

As a public defender, I’ve dedicated my career to building justice systems that serve and protect our communities.

And as Attorney General, I will take on special interests that target vulnerable Pennsylvanians, from insurance companies and predatory lenders to corporate polluters.

**But first, I want to know what matters most to you.**

**[Will you take a moment to fill out my 1-minute survey and tell me what you want me to prioritize as your next Attorney General?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69315959/425748078/-1849319856?source=EM_NBI_KBG_20230712_SV_WelcomeSeries_0_1WO_KeirBradford-Grey_na_na_Welcome&refcode2=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYzMjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWQ0ZDU4ZTItMDA0ZC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=9aBqFphLKL-D9fvC8ZtQll7g-Irbu6_-alyRypb3KGE=&emci=4e7e7484-d820-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=5d4d58e2-004d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=1755337)** | [TAKE THE SURVEY→](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69315961/425748080/-1849319856?source=EM_NBI_KBG_20230712_SV_WelcomeSeries_0_1WO_KeirBradford-Grey_na_na_Welcome&refcode2=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYzMjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWQ0ZDU4ZTItMDA0ZC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=9aBqFphLKL-D9fvC8ZtQll7g-Irbu6_-alyRypb3KGE=&emci=4e7e7484-d820-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=5d4d58e2-004d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=1755337)

– Keir Bradford-Grey

name: Strength in Seven PAC
subject: Don’t forget to reserve your spot
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STRENGTH IN SEVEN PAC Strength in Seven PAC
body:
Honoring and celebrating the legacy of Cleveland’s own Congressman Louis Stokes, Congresswoman Stephanie Tubbs Jones, and Secretary Marcia L. Fudge.
, Peter,

We’re gearing up for Congresswoman Shontel Brown’s Second Annual Legacy Celebration, and we wanted to be sure you saw the big event.

Join us on **Friday, October 13, from 7-10 pm at the Huntington Convention Center of Cleveland **for an all-black attire reception honoring and celebrating the legacy of Cleveland’s own Congressman Louis Stokes, Congresswoman Stephanie Tubbs Jones, and Secretary Marcia L. Fudge. [RSVP TODAY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69315954/425748072/192304475?refcode=EM_E_230906PACEvent_N_SSPac_ALL_5_NG_N&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMGZmYWRiYS0wMDRkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m37nA0uYkJDIdSJtl84jqG4XQbhs-_D70n55N8IQqIM=&emci=19016a67-374c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=c0ffadba-004d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=23746811) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69315955/425748073/192304475?refcode=EM_E_230906PACEvent_N_SSPac_ALL_5_NG_N&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMGZmYWRiYS0wMDRkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m37nA0uYkJDIdSJtl84jqG4XQbhs-_D70n55N8IQqIM=&emci=19016a67-374c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=c0ffadba-004d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=23746811) The legacy of these groundbreaking leaders runs decades-long, and Shontel couldn’t be more grateful for their work, Peter. Not only are they stalwarts of Cleveland’s black community, but each of them has served the people of today’s 11th Congressional District.

[**_The event is free but registration is required, and space is limited. body:
Did you see this note about our Madam Mayor initiative? |
---
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/69316204/425748713/1714615580?refcode=20230906_MadamMayorKicker&refcode2=WTEFE905&sourceid=1051875&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTVkMTc0My0wMTRkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q35Wnw5x1XierNMInIyoF_UUgPR4YwLEGgsa1-oZ9x4=) Peter, last month, I wrote to you about our one-of-a-kind **Madam Mayor initiative** — and today, it has three new additions!

**We're thrilled to announce we've endorsed three pro-choice champions in Colorado to join our Madam Mayor roster:**

**Lauren Simpson** in Arvada, CO
**Wendi Strom** in Lakewood, CO
**Julia Marvin** in Thornton, CO

Mayors stand at the front lines of the battle for reproductive rights, and in a purple state like Colorado, every pro-choice leader makes a _huge difference_. **If you can, please read on about why pro-choice mayors matter, and then donate to help more of them WIN across the country:**
** ** ****[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/69316209/425748747/1714615580?refcode=20230906_MadamMayorKicker&refcode2=WTEFE905&sourceid=1051875&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTVkMTc0My0wMTRkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q35Wnw5x1XierNMInIyoF_UUgPR4YwLEGgsa1-oZ9x4=)**** **** ****[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/69316210/425748750/1760748444?recurring=true&refcode=20230906_MadamMayorKicker&refcode2=WTEFE905&sourceid=1051875&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTVkMTc0My0wMTRkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q35Wnw5x1XierNMInIyoF_UUgPR4YwLEGgsa1-oZ9x4=)**** ******** Thank you,

Sarah Curmi (she/her/hers)
Vice President of State & Local Campaigns, EMILYs List _\----------Original Message---------
From: Sarah Curmi, EMILYs List
Sent: Fri., Aug. 25, 2023_ [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/69316211/425748758/1714615580?refcode=20230906_MadamMayorKicker&refcode2=WTEFE905&sourceid=1051875&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTVkMTc0My0wMTRkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q35Wnw5x1XierNMInIyoF_UUgPR4YwLEGgsa1-oZ9x4=) Peter, have you met our Madam Mayor candidates?

Our one-of-a-kind **Madam Mayor** initiative is focused on providing resources for women mayors and mayoral candidates who stand at the frontlines, fighting to make our communities a better place.

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: BIG NEWS: We have an opponent
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
“His announcement could immediately make the race one of the most competitive in the country in 2024”
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=665%2E135344%2EM-td1o)

I wanted to make sure you saw this big update in my U.S. Senate race: **After six months without any serious Republican opposition, former U.S. Representative Mike Rogers entered the race.**
**[DONATE NOW](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-sep23.hbnlDo&refcode=em230906-2-15&t=2&akid=665%2E135344%2EM-td1o)**
While this wasn't unexpected, Mike Rogers is the first serious Republican to get into this race. Other Republicans, including former Congressman Peter Meijer and former Detroit Police Chief James Craig, are also apparently eyeing this seat, which could set up a very messy primary on the other side. We can expect to see the Republican candidates duke it out to earn their place as Donald Trump’s pick for this seat.
But as we always do here on Team Slotkin, we've done our homework, and we’re prepared to tell Michiganders about Mike Rogers and any other Republican who may enter the race.
But as the only official serious contender for the Republican nomination, it’s important Michiganders understand exactly who Mike Rogers is: He was on the Trump national security transition team, and was in talks to be Trump’s FBI Director, but then got fired. Then he became a critic of Trump.
Regardless of his record on Trump, he's a true conservative. **He supports an extreme nationwide abortion ban with no exceptions for rape, incest, or common miscarriage; he voted to cut Social Security and Medicare; and, with an A rating from the NRA, he voted to *expand* access to guns.** He represented a version of my current congressional district, 4 years before I flipped it – but with a different set of values.
Unfortunately, his entry into the race will make this race competitive -- and expensive. In 2020, Michigan’s U.S. Senate race cost nearly $200 million, all-in. We expect that this race will cost just as much (if not more). **Michigan is already a battleground state for the Presidency, and Rogers as a Senate candidate means that we’ll have two close races to win in Michigan next year.**
**[So given this important inflection point in our campaign, I’d love for you to consider a contribution of $3 or whatever you can afford to my campaign for U.S. Senate. clean_body: “His announcement could immediately make the race one of the most competitive in the country in 2024” I wanted to make sure you saw this big update in my U.S. Senate race: After six months without any serious Republican opposition, former U.S. Representative Mike Rogers entered the race. While this wasn't unexpected, Mike Rogers is the first serious Republican to get into this race. Other Republicans, including former Congressman Peter Meijer and former Detroit Police Chief James Craig, are also apparently eyeing this seat, which could set up a very messy primary on the other side. We can expect to see the Republican candidates duke it out to earn their place as Donald Trump’s pick for this seat. But as we always do here on Team Slotkin, we've done our homework, and we’re prepared to tell Michiganders about Mike Rogers and any other Republican who may enter the race. But as the only official serious contender for the Republican nomination, it’s important Michiganders understand exactly who Mike Rogers is: He was on the Trump national security transition team, and was in talks to be Trump’s FBI Director, but then got fired. Then he became a critic of Trump. Regardless of his record on Trump, he's a true conservative. He supports an extreme nationwide abortion ban with no exceptions for rape, incest, or common miscarriage; he voted to cut Social Security and Medicare; and, with an A rating from the NRA, he voted to expand access to guns. He represented a version of my current congressional district, 4 years before I flipped it – but with a different set of values. Unfortunately, his entry into the race will make this race competitive -- and expensive. In 2020, Michigan’s U.S. Senate race cost nearly $200 million, all-in. We expect that this race will cost just as much (if not more). Michigan is already a battleground state for the Presidency, and Rogers as a Senate candidate means that we’ll have two close races to win in Michigan next year.
