| | Peter, Last month I reached out to help fundraise for the Maui Food Bank in the wake of the tragic wildfire in Lāhainā. I'm grateful to share that more than 100 people made a contribution to the Maui Food Bank using our campaign's link, helping countless families get the basics they need to overcome this devastating event. [**Now, I'm reaching out again in hopes that even more people in our movement will sign a petition to help protect Lāhainā residents from predatory developers and scammers.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69316384/425749504/-1095369226?source=direct_link&referrer=group-nick-melvoin-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fnick-melvoin-maui%3Frefcode%3Dpet-2023-09-maui%26recurring%3D0%26noskip%3Dtrue&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQxNjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmEwZGI1YWMtMDI0ZC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=_Q9gFaZ9wNGobMoqBQJ9wj2CpOnIAJdYhOA0JrSDFdw=&emci=ff8ee3a5-d34c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=fa0db5ac-024d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=10481059) **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69316385/425749505/-1095369226?source=direct_link&referrer=group-nick-melvoin-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fnick-melvoin-maui%3Frefcode%3Dpet-2023-09-maui%26recurring%3D0%26noskip%3Dtrue&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQxNjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmEwZGI1YWMtMDI0ZC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=_Q9gFaZ9wNGobMoqBQJ9wj2CpOnIAJdYhOA0JrSDFdw=&emci=ff8ee3a5-d34c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=fa0db5ac-024d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=10481059)**[Sign the Petition >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69316386/425749506/-1095369226?source=direct_link&referrer=group-nick-melvoin-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fnick-melvoin-maui%3Frefcode%3Dpet-2023-09-maui%26recurring%3D0%26noskip%3Dtrue&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQxNjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmEwZGI1YWMtMDI0ZC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=_Q9gFaZ9wNGobMoqBQJ9wj2CpOnIAJdYhOA0JrSDFdw=&emci=ff8ee3a5-d34c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=fa0db5ac-024d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=10481059) In the aftermath of Maui's tragic wildfires, predatory land developers are cold calling survivors and lurking around emergency shelters to speak with residents of Lāhainā. **Not to offer help or give comfort in the wake of a tragedy — but to capitalize on the vulnerable homeowners who have just lost everything.** Hawaiians have already had to fight to keep their culture alive and for vital resources with the boom of tourism and industrial plantations throughout the islands. That's why I'm partnering with Democratic and environmental organizations to petition Congress to protect those impacted by the fires. **We can help them focus on the restoration of Lāhainā by urging Congress to protect the rights of local residents.**[**Add your name and demand that Congress protect the property rights of native and local Hawaiians affected by the fires in Lāhainā.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69316387/425749507/-1095369226?source=direct_link&referrer=group-nick-melvoin-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fnick-melvoin-maui%3Frefcode%3Dpet-2023-09-maui%26recurring%3D0%26noskip%3Dtrue&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQxNjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmEwZGI1YWMtMDI0ZC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=_Q9gFaZ9wNGobMoqBQJ9wj2CpOnIAJdYhOA0JrSDFdw=&emci=ff8ee3a5-d34c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=fa0db5ac-024d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=10481059) More soon, _Nick_ \---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Nick [info@nickmelvoin.com]
Date: Fri, August 18, 2023 at 12:31 PM
Subject: Helping Lāhainā:
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Peter, The town of Lāhainā's vibrant streets, breathtaking ocean views, bustling markets, and warm hospitality have drawn in tourists for decades. For generations, Hawaiians have shared in their culture with us on Maui, and now it's our turn to help. [**Join me in supporting the Maui Food Bank, an organization that is actively providing crucial assistance to those affected by this tragedy.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69316388/425749508/1336115072?refcode=pet-2023-09-maui&recurring=&amount=19&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=fa0db5ac-024d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQxNjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmEwZGI1YWMtMDI0ZC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=_Q9gFaZ9wNGobMoqBQJ9wj2CpOnIAJdYhOA0JrSDFdw=) Your contribution will help ensure that basic necessities reach those in need and help rebuild the spirit of Lāhainā. [Support Maui Food Bank](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69316389/425749509/1336115072?refcode=pet-2023-09-maui&recurring=&amount=19&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=fa0db5ac-024d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQxNjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmEwZGI1YWMtMDI0ZC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=_Q9gFaZ9wNGobMoqBQJ9wj2CpOnIAJdYhOA0JrSDFdw=) **While Lāhainā holds significance to many of us through fond memories of family vacations, special events, and stunning travel photos, the cultural significance of this community runs deep.** **Lāhainā was once the capital of the Hawaiian Kingdom during the early 19th century.** It served as a political, economic, and cultural hub, where ali'i (royalty) and important leaders gathered — including the reign of King Kamehameha III, who established the first written constitution of the Hawaiian Kingdom in Lāhainā in 1840. Lāhainā's role as a meeting point for cultures and civilizations led to the sharing of knowledge, traditions, and practices, contributing to the unique cultural blend that defines modern Hawaiian identity. **The town is home to some of the most significant artistic and spiritual sites for Hawaiians** , including the ancient temple, Hale Pi'ilani Heiau. Heiaus were places of worship, offering, and ceremony, and they played a central role in Hawaiian religious practices. Lāhainā has a rich tradition of arts and music, including hula, mele, and other artistic expressions. Its vibrant art scene has bolstered the preservation of Hawaiian cultural practices. **The town's natural harbor made it a significant center for trade and commerce** , and was a prominent whaling port during the 19th century. Hawaiians engaged in the exchange of goods, further connecting them with neighboring islands and cultures. Beyond Front Street, it is Lāhainā's cultural significance as a historical, spiritual, artistic, and communal center for native Hawaiians that makes its rehabilitation and preservation vital to ensuring the continued understanding and appreciation of Hawaiian heritage. clean_body: Help protect Lāhainā residents from predatory developers and scammers. | | | | Peter, Last month I reached out to help fundraise for the Maui Food Bank in the wake of the tragic wildfire in Lāhainā. I'm grateful to share that more than 100 people made a contribution to the Maui Food Bank using our campaign's link, helping countless families get the basics they need to overcome this devastating event. In the aftermath of Maui's tragic wildfires, predatory land developers are cold calling survivors and lurking around emergency shelters to speak with residents of Lāhainā. Not to offer help or give comfort in the wake of a tragedy — but to capitalize on the vulnerable homeowners who have just lost everything. Hawaiians have already had to fight to keep their culture alive and for vital resources with the boom of tourism and industrial plantations throughout the islands. That's why I'm partnering with Democratic and environmental organizations to petition Congress to protect those impacted by the fires. We can help them focus on the restoration of Lāhainā by urging Congress to protect the rights of local residents. More soon, Nick \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Nick [info@nickmelvoin.com] Date: Fri, August 18, 2023 at 12:31 PM Subject: Helping Lāhainā: To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Peter, The town of Lāhainā's vibrant streets, breathtaking ocean views, bustling markets, and warm hospitality have drawn in tourists for decades. For generations, Hawaiians have shared in their culture with us on Maui, and now it's our turn to help. = Your contribution will help ensure that basic necessities reach those in need and help rebuild the spirit of Lāhainā. = While Lāhainā holds significance to many of us through fond memories of family vacations, special events, and stunning travel photos, the cultural significance of this community runs deep. Lāhainā was once the capital of the Hawaiian Kingdom during the early 19th century. It served as a political, economic, and cultural hub, where ali'i (royalty) and important leaders gathered — including the reign of King Kamehameha III, who established the first written constitution of the Hawaiian Kingdom in Lāhainā in 1840. Lāhainā's role as a meeting point for cultures and civilizations led to the sharing of knowledge, traditions, and practices, contributing to the unique cultural blend that defines modern Hawaiian identity. The town is home to some of the most significant artistic and spiritual sites for Hawaiians , including the ancient temple, Hale Pi'ilani Heiau. Heiaus were places of worship, offering, and ceremony, and they played a central role in Hawaiian religious practices. Lāhainā has a rich tradition of arts and music, including hula, mele, and other artistic expressions. Its vibrant art scene has bolstered the preservation of Hawaiian cultural practices. The town's natural harbor made it a significant center for trade and commerce , and was a prominent whaling port during the 19th century. Hawaiians engaged in the exchange of goods, further connecting them with neighboring islands and cultures. Beyond Front Street, it is Lāhainā's cultural significance as a historical, spiritual, artistic, and communal center for native Hawaiians that makes its rehabilitation and preservation vital to ensuring the continued understanding and appreciation of Hawaiian heritage. = Nick = | ---|---|--- | | | Paid for by Nick Melvoin for Congress - FEC ID #C00831289 |

clean_body: | | | Peter, Last month, Chuck Schumer and the Democrats announced their handpicked candidate to try and take Senator Rick Scott’s Senate Seat. Just as we anticipated, she is raising money at an unbelievable rate. We anticipate she wills raise similar amounts to what John Fetterman and Val Demings raised in 2022. It is absolutely crucial that we counter back. We cannot stress how important it is that we do not let her gain momentum in Florida. In her time in Congress, she was a puppet for Nancy Pelosi, voting 100% of the time with her. She even had a near perfect voting alliance with AOC and Ilhan Omar. Socialists like this do not have a place in Florida and it is up to us to make sure they never do. name: Team Pramila
subject: How we can pass people-first legislation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Our legislative system has ground to a halt under the Jim Crow-era filibuster.
#
Peter,
For too long, Republicans have used every tool at their disposal — specifically the filibuster — to stop our progress and continue putting profits over the needs and values of the people.
Common sense laws like codifying abortion rights, raising the minimum wage, banning assault weapons, and even protecting voting rights have been held at a stand-still. We cannot allow this to continue.
Our legislative system has ground to a halt under the Jim Crow-era filibuster. So it's crucial we rid our democracy of this practice once and for all. **[We must call Congress to abolish the filibuster so that we can pass common sense legislation that finally answers the calls of the people. Will you add your name today?](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/abolish_filibuster_petition/?source=em20230906-2892&t=1&akid=2892%2E420207%2ETr8a1X)**
**[Add your name ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/abolish_filibuster_petition/?source=em20230906-2892&t=2&akid=2892%2E420207%2ETr8a1X)**
In 2020, we saw the highest voter turnout in American history for a presidential election. And this time around, Republicans will do everything in their power to silence voters, strip away our rights, and use their dark money to sway election results in their favor.
By ending the filibuster, we can work to get dark money out of these elections and ensure arbitrary voter suppression laws are a thing of the past. And we won't just stop there, Peter. **Once we end the filibuster, we will pass immigration reform, universal childcare, the PRO Act for union rights, and so much more.**
**There's a lot on the line****, Peter, but getting rid of the filibuster is the first massive step towards building our democracy rooted in love, compassion, and true representation.[If you stand with our fight, please sign our petition to urge Congress to abolish the filibuster and finally pass people-first legislation. ](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/abolish_filibuster_petition/?source=em20230906-2892&t=3&akid=2892%2E420207%2ETr8a1X)**
Together,
Team Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230906-2892-footer&t=4&refcode2=2892_420207_Tr8a1X&akid=2892%2E420207%2ETr8a1X)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=5&akid=2892%2E420207%2ETr8a1X)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=2892%2E420207%2ETr8a1X)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

Republicans seem to care more about their own party politics and are more focused on trying to impeach President Biden than to actually do their jobs. And trust us, Mike Lawler is no exception. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | = | = | = | = | = | = Liz is a leader who understands our district and is devoted to prioritizing the concerns of the Hudson Valley – NOT far-right conspiracies. If we let Lawler win, we are giving the gavel back to Speaker McCarthy and the extremist cronies who are never going to make any progress on issues such as reproductive rights, gun violence, and affordability. ## Why Chris Christie:

Chris Christie is a proven leader who fearlessly tells it like it is. As a successful governor in a blue state with a track record of real accomplishments, Christie has consistently confronted challenging issues head-on, making difficult decisions without hesitation. To ensure a conservative Republican victory in the 2024 presidential election, we deserve an open, honest debate that focuses on critical issues. Governor Christie's voice at the debates will ensure our party engages in the robust, direct, truth-telling conversation we need to start winning again. Join us in supporting Chris Christie's candidacy for president and ensuring his direct, no-nonsense agenda at the RNC-sponsored presidential debates. Your participation is vital in making this happen. Sign up today to "Tell It Like It Is" and help our party and country select a president we can all be proud of. Together, we can shape a brighter future for America.

name: VoteVets HQ
subject: Traitor
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
We would never exect an elected member of the U.S. Senate to willingly do this much damage to our Military.
#
_“I would have never imagined that one of our own senators would be aiding and abetting communist and other autocratic regimes around the world. This is having a real negative impact.”_
[**U.S. Secretary of the Navy, Carlos Del Toro](https://act.votevets.org/go/7248?t=1&akid=15743%2E3013755%2EFyH7jf)**
Doesn’t get much more direct than that, Derek.
A blockade on Military promotions like Tuberville’s is unprecedented in American history.
It is an insult to the men and women serving our country.
And it is a gift to our adversaries.
We all expect authoritarian regimes around the world to do whatever they can to undermine our Democracy and our National Security. But we would never expect an elected member of the U.S. Senate to willingly do this much damage to our Military, with his entire party standing by — or even outright supporting it.
These people have to go. It’s our job to beat them. Do you have our back?
[**If you do, make a contribution to VoteVets. The amount doesn’t matter as much as the donation itself. We need thousands and thousands of people chipping in to send as loud a message as we can to Tuberville and the GOP. And that message is:](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-sept23.AXrwBB&refcode=em230906-1-30&t=2&akid=15743%2E3013755%2EFyH7jf)**
| [WE'RE COMING FOR YOU](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-sept23.AXrwBB&refcode=em230906-1-30&t=3&akid=15743%2E3013755%2EFyH7jf)
---
Thank you,
The team at VoteVets

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: Here's why we're also nervous
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Let us explain this...
#
Hey, Derek -- did you know $13.86 is our average contribution for 2023?
**Here's why we're proud of that number:** Our average contribution proves that this movement is powered by small-dollar donations. We've relied on real people like you donating what + when they're able to since Day One -- and we plan to keep it that way.
**Here's why we're also nervous about that number:** it's lower than usual, which means we could fall behind our long-term fundraising goals...
**[So we're asking for folks like you to help out ahead of our end-of-quarter deadline: Will you help us boost our fundraising back up by chipping in $25 or even more?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230906-1?refcode=em20230906-1-8546&refcode2=8546_434096_cgmgrh&akid=8546%2E434096%2Ecgmgrh)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230906-1?refcode=em20230906-8546&refcode2=8546_434096_cgmgrh&akid=8546%2E434096%2Ecgmgrh)**
Allow us to dive further into our average donation amount and why it matters so much.
This time last year, our 2022 average donation was around $29.13. Now we've dipped down all the way to $13.86.
In a weird way, we're proud of it! Here's why:
A low average donation is the hallmark of a real people-powered campaign. It shows that we're not funded by corporate PACs or billionaires with deep pockets.
But, on the other hand, it means the money we used to raise from a single donation -- well, now we need two to raise the same amount!
**We can't afford to let our fundraising dip *too* low, Derek.** So, we're asking everyone who hasn't donated to make their very first contribution to John Fetterman today -- that'll help us close the gap.
**[Can you make your first $5 donation right now to help John Fetterman reach our end-of-quarter goal? Every donation helps us show the strength and size of this grassroots team.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230906-1?refcode=em20230906-1-8546&refcode2=8546_434096_cgmgrh&akid=8546%2E434096%2Ecgmgrh)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230906-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230906-8546&refcode2=8546_434096_cgmgrh&akid=8546%2E434096%2Ecgmgrh)**
Thank you for all you do.
-- Team Fetterman

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230906-8546-footer&t=1&refcode2=8546_434096_cgmgrh&akid=8546%2E434096%2Ecgmgrh)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=8546%2E434096%2Ecgmgrh)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=8546%2E434096%2Ecgmgrh)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Bob Casey
subject: This may not sound like much
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
I’m in a tough race here in Pennsylvania, and every dollar makes a difference.
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=561%2E552475%2EdbPTwH)
Hi Peter, I'm writing to ask if you will make a $5 contribution to our campaign today.
**[I want to take a minute to explain why this request matters to our campaign, but if you are ready to help us hold Pennsylvania you can chip in at this link now. I'm grateful for your support.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230906-1?refcode=em20230906-1&refcode2=561_552475_dbPTwH&akid=561%2E552475%2EdbPTwH)**
**[Chip in $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230906-1?refcode=em20230906-1&amount=5&refcode2=561_552475_dbPTwH&akid=561%2E552475%2EdbPTwH)**
$5 may not sound like much. It's about the price of a water ice, a Hershey bar, or half of a cheesesteak. But the truth is, when enough folks chip in a few dollars whenever they can -- whether it's $50, $25, or even $5 -- it makes a difference.
And the stakes of this race are high.
I'm #4 on Mitch McConnell's list of races he's targeting, and news outlets like CNN and Roll Call are calling PA a top Senate battleground. All eyes will be on our race as we head into 2024, which is why we have to build a strong campaign now.
I know we have what it takes to fight back against whatever the GOP throws at us. We made history by electing Josh Shapiro and John Fetterman in 2022, and we're going to need that same momentum on our side to win in 2024.
**[So if you're able, will you chip in $5 to my re-election campaign? I'm in a tough race here in Pennsylvania, and every dollar makes a difference.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230906-1?refcode=em20230906-1&refcode2=561_552475_dbPTwH&akid=561%2E552475%2EdbPTwH)**
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230906-1?refcode=em20230906-1&refcode2=561_552475_dbPTwH&akid=561%2E552475%2EdbPTwH)**
We are building a campaign of supporters across Pennsylvania and the country, and I'm proud to have you on our team.
With gratitude,
Bob

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=4&akid=561%2E552475%2EdbPTwH)
* [Update Your Information](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=561%2E552475%2EdbPTwH)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)

Peter, I want to start this email off by saying thank you.

We’ve made incredible progress in our campaign in just a few short months, and it wouldn’t have been possible without you.

Your dollars aren’t going into a black hole - we’re spending every single cent on our mission to take back the U.S. Senate and win in Virginia.

Now that we’re wrapping up the first few months of our campaign, I want to check in with you and see how you’re feeling. We want to make sure we’re being adequately transparent and keeping you in the loop enough. I value you, and I need to make sure you know that.

The court already rejected his desperate attempt to push his DC trial to 2026 -- but now Trump is falsely claiming he can "appeal" their decision and try to delay the trial _again!_

Over 60% of Americans want his trial to happen _before_ the election, but we still don’t know if you agree! **So please, respond to our URGENT Live Poll before midnight and let us know:**

**Should Trump be tried before Election Day?**

name: Jeremy Spreitzer for Congress
subject: You Get Less with Lesko! (Jeremy4Congress)
body:
|

|

|

MY CANDIDATE E-QUAL PETITION AZ-8

----------

|

|

|

->

SIGN CANDIDATE PETITION (PUSH TO SIGN) ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/9026?id=38856.33.1.c817579ee5ff4e4431750b0450f6bfd5 )

<-

|

|

|

EVERY BIT HELPS!

----------

|

|

|

->

Click to Donate ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/9026?id=38856.34.1.f56afa0a3ef9755eee7c929d1b175743 )

<-

|

|

|

Earlier last month I launched my campaign in AZ-08 to defeat Republican Debbi Lesko and flip our critical swing district. Since then, the positive response has been fantastic -- and very encouraging. I’m no career candidate so running for a Congressional seat is completely new to me. But, we both know that you don’t have to be a seasoned politician to see that Debbie Lesko is out of step with Arizonans in our district. I’m a firefighter with four generations of Arizonans in my family. My commitment to this district and this state is unwavering and I’m ready to go to Congress and get to work. But ahead of the first big fundraising deadline of this campaign, I’ve got to ask: do you have $10, $20, or something meaningful that you can contribute to my campaign and help us get off on the right foot? I wouldn’t trade my time as an Arizona firefighter for anything in the world. But because I’m not a career candidate or professional politician, I don’t have the deep donor network that my Republican opponent has. Instead, I’m relying on you. I know there are lots of emails like this one that ask for your precious resources so I appreciate anything you can give -- if you are in a position to do so. Let’s get to work!

| |

| |

Donate

----------

|

|

|

->

Click to Donate ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/9026?id=38856.35.1.a46a02b671847695f3c6dce4a4c2dc3a )

<-

WEBSITE

|

|

JEREMY4CONGRESS.COM ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/9026?id=38856.36.1.ce1deeb4dc79b0e63ffb548928678524 )

<-

|

|

|

Financial support is critical to getting our campaign started and ensuring that we can reach as many people as possible. We would be honored if you could consider making a contribution to our campaign, no matter how small. Every bit helps, and every contribution gets us one step closer to our goal. Thank you for your support. Please reach out with any questions or concerns. I look forward to working with you for a better future.

It has been one week since Hurricane Idalia made landfall in North Florida and Floridians are still picking up the pieces.

I want to thank all of the first responders, emergency and military personnel, linemen, road crews, civil engineers, charitable organizations, and volunteers who came to Florida’s aid in its time of need. It is in these times of hardship when one’s character is tested and I am proud of how we responded not just as a state, but as a nation.

Floridians are no strangers to adversity. I know that if we work together and remain united in our indomitable spirit, we shall persevere through these challenges and come out on the other side stronger than ever.

[_**Watch my full statement here.**_](https://u36007693.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=1sHtzNcs9U-2FAVSFPADIffKL4mYdD74s9mQwIyLcFzfiKSGnb-2FCCcNJpzdDH6K14upuC5_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdkLMmWeLnwK0KfPGgXzXHvuDIanMVmtz6l8-2B7-2FGeG44PmYmCSJWJIg66COE1hPKdiBUfv-2FvX-2B5kVCgnV8v-2B6WQLXsYYIQPl-2Be1Z6Jg-2BflNZIOVfOxf3zUU4ntMo3nwZopam9IaB2AHpd5M1DHopEfyN542mwH2a5-2BpajnynJ3mwkHNVW2Zw-2BJ1JDEMzlb60ZI-2Bs98vIU-2BO1GaoBRduIoxIgNRiAoDBBRlk8xo9r2U-2FxhsoPekwliOTnhydyltiBAW9fNM4qqhspYWAPRzxK79UprQ5ooNxv5FAfKowM0QEqWTyOo-2F0yGJoW66we0QgAIqjHJdErqd5RIGjxLWTgDF-2FVOG1dFEhqKzJxzx-2FmAgSd-2FF5OKpImomNRTdYiMeSCvPP7S4oWPcUdyhdYfHC8p-2B71LCvfKsSW305A5YZ2E-2BD35sGLsGYsbzPk5vmyzYndcnt5fBw2mHkihEqLZX2rpV4XYatJ-2FoLPGOSjaVZE5dWy991NHbiDdTmTB6-2FlEtZmMU-2BVpJgafTwDISz7a5-2B-2FJl5jjuSsl4ZmXYPMcKLuC89-2FDXOhaIaH65hueHXfuCxd2Pn-2B4QGW8MVYJTRMsFAHv1Oi0XFrgDVM2D4nqh3AHswU0bb6hoPUAg2s6YK6-2FoUrrbaN0NeeKGvetJbmv9G7ljzP19BhulapEogm4o4s2NmtHAOETDxXDxHmNpRglKvflx5Gtl63oqvhSm7AhKCqm24cO0zdpVKva3jd-2FpMBrfr1FfYc8wbM5sXUyUDHPIPsGcQMa8xVG5qodQTJLMTKQqfu4U5253eZ5PVuTD42uh1TGT1lhREEAoLwHdOw81vCzlN-2BWVP0dmF0uDYAt65PnCdGI8zZpF8slUX4AKXvLVy88pLgZ3LnMnR7eMZiPc57gii2p7Do-2FgEH-2B0lZSCr4Tkow-2F1j6xzwMnahCb8AH4qZSs6Wg6Jn3nvjsQKj79RTQ9zC9HoX8CNvdCiTwGcSlLLsg-3D-3D)

clean_body: | | | | | It has been one week since Hurricane Idalia made landfall in North Florida and Floridians are still picking up the pieces. I want to thank all of the first responders, emergency and military personnel, linemen, road crews, civil engineers, charitable organizations, and volunteers who came to Florida’s aid in its time of need. It is in these times of hardship when one’s character is tested and I am proud of how we responded not just as a state, but as a nation. Floridians are no strangers to adversity. I know that if we work together and remain united in our indomitable spirit, we shall persevere through these challenges and come out on the other side stronger than ever. Please, do not hesitate to reach out to my office if you require any assistance whatsoever. My Constituent Services team is here to serve you: Gainesville: 352-505-0838 Ocala: 352-421-9052 Washington, D.C.: 202-225-5744 The Office of Congresswoman Kat Cammack is in no way affiliated with the Kat for Congress campaign. Thank you and God bless. Kat Cammack Congresswoman, FL-03 | | [PAID FOR BY KAT FOR CONGRESS]() Kat Cammack 5200 NW 43rd st, suite 102-180, Gainesville, FL 32606 \- =

Here’s the latest update on mifepristone, Peter: A federal court ruled that access to the abortion drug mifepristone must be restricted, pending further Supreme Court action. To be clear: **Mifepristone remains available for now.** But this ruling to restrict is now going to go before the Supreme Court — the same Court that voted to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ last year. If the Court upholds this decision, mifepristone will no longer be available by mail, and will only be available in the first seven weeks of pregnancy — including in states where abortion remains legal. [_**We still have time to fight back and make our demands known to the Court. Will you chip in any amount today to help us protect abortion medication access for all?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69317170/425752285/-845140112?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230906_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDk5ODVmZGQtMDY0ZC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=tcnm5e8aiJ9kjX87qajh1NXKYjAlPdcFUfHQFDhWdX8=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69317171/425752286/-845140112?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230906_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDk5ODVmZGQtMDY0ZC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=tcnm5e8aiJ9kjX87qajh1NXKYjAlPdcFUfHQFDhWdX8=)

| Hi there, It has been an honor serving West Michigan in Congress since my election in 2022. I understand more every day how critical it is that West Michiganders have a representative who shares their values of equality and progress. Wherever you come from in my district, regardless of your gender identity, race, religion, or how much you make, I am fighting to give everyone the rights and quality of life they deserve. _**But as of last month, I have an opponent who wants to end my work and serve his donors, not the diverse community of West Michigan. **_ It is possible that with the backing of National Republicans, my DeVos-backed opponent, Republican Paul Hudson, could flip this seat **RED**. So, I know that in 2024, I _**must**_ and _**will**_ win reelection so I can continue serving the community I love. name: Urgent Message (via DLCC.org)
subject: Will you help us fight extremism in your state?
body:
Michelle and Barack Obama know the critical importance of coming together to create change – now they’re calling on you | | |
---
| | **The GOP has spent decades building state power, gerrymandering districts, and propelling their anti-American agenda across the country. From gutting abortion access to infringing on LGBTQ+ rights, state Republicans have become a one-stop shop for advancing the far-right agenda.** But state Democrats are right on their heels. clean_body: Michelle and Barack Obama know the critical importance of coming together to create change – now they’re calling on you | | | | | The GOP has spent decades building state power, gerrymandering districts, and propelling their anti-American agenda across the country. From gutting abortion access to infringing on LGBTQ+ rights, state Republicans have become a one-stop shop for advancing the far-right agenda. But state Democrats are right on their heels. They’re doing everything in their power to ensure these extremist policies don’t come to fruition. Even the Obamas have sounded the alarm: Former President Barack Obama and former First Lady Michelle Obama know just how critical coming together right now to rally behind Democrats is. That’s why they’re calling on members of this community – yes, you! – to help fight Republican extremism across the country. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | GOP lawmakers have already started to propose dangerous legislation like: The death penalty for women who have abortions Infringing on LGBTQ+ rights Enacting execution by firing squad And so much more! After it was announced that Raffensperger was moving to cancel nearly 200,000 voters from the voter rolls, his office announced that it was starting the process to remove ANOTHER 187,000!

These moves comes right as groups across Georgia are suing the state government for diluting the Black vote, just as the GOP did in Alabama and Louisiana.

Not only that, but it was reported that GOP activists in Georgia challenged the rights of another nearly 100,000 voters.

[**_Peter, we’re up against rampant GOP voter suppression in Georgia, and we need your support. name: Josh Shapiro
subject: the freedom to thrive
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAPIRO FOR PENNSYLVANIA
body:
Derek – you’ve probably heard me talk about bringing “real freedom” to every corner of our Commonwealth. Here’s what I mean: Real freedom means being respected no matter where you’re from, what you look like, or who you do or do not pray to. It means the freedom to raise a family on a living wage. It means that our children feel safe and are safe, and receive a high-quality public education no matter where they live. **And it means the freedom to make your own health care decisions, without a radical politician trying to stand in the way.** Since day one as Governor, I’ve fought for real freedom in every corner of Pennsylvania – **and our work is far from done.** [_**If you believe _every_ Pennsylvanian ought to have real freedom to thrive, will you chip in $15 to support this grassroots movement? I’m working day and night to deliver much-needed progress and real freedom throughout our Commonwealth, but I can’t do it without you.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69318163/425755921/-1162444457?refcode=email_090623_Real-freedom&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZWFlNDZjYS0wYTRkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IICjcaf8BzpAYn8Rp9fGamPTipx69lwQ7vJhGczTEu8=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $15 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69318164/425755922/-1162444457?refcode=email_090623_Real-freedom&amount=15&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZWFlNDZjYS0wYTRkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IICjcaf8BzpAYn8Rp9fGamPTipx69lwQ7vJhGczTEu8=)

clean_body: Derek – you’ve probably heard me talk about bringing “real freedom” to every corner of our Commonwealth. Here’s what I mean: Real freedom means being respected no matter where you’re from, what you look like, or who you do or do not pray to. It means the freedom to raise a family on a living wage. It means that our children feel safe and are safe, and receive a high-quality public education no matter where they live. And it means the freedom to make your own health care decisions, without a radical politician trying to stand in the way. Since day one as Governor, I’ve fought for real freedom in every corner of Pennsylvania – and our work is far from done. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | = | = | | | = | = | | | = | = Thank you for your support, Derek. name: Katie Porter HQ
subject: Report on our August fundraising
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Thanks to this grassroots team, we met and exceeded our August fundraising goal.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=29433%2E3422442%2EOpzEox)
Hi Derek, Katie’s campaign team here with a quick report on our fundraising efforts in August. We know we send you more emails leading up to our end-of-month deadlines, so we hope you’ll appreciate an update on where we landed.
**First of all, we’re happy to report that thanks to this grassroots team, we slightly exceeded our August fundraising goal!** 🎉
Here are a few other stats we thought were pretty cool:
* In August, **29,784 people** pitched in online to support our campaign, demonstrating our massive people-power!

* The average contribution was just **$24.60** —we’re proud to say our campaign is supported by working people and families chipping in what they can, when they can.

* People from **2,041** unique California zip codes chipped in, demonstrating Katie’s support across the state.

Katie doesn’t take a cent from corporate PACs or federal lobbyists. This is a grassroots campaign through and through—and we couldn’t do it without your support!
[**So thanks again for a successful August****, Derek. And if you’d like to help us start September off strong, pitch in $5 or anything you can today to support our grassroots campaign:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230906-2?refcode=EMAL06_2_AUG_20230906_V1_F&refcode2=29433_3422442_OpzEox&akid=29433%2E3422442%2EOpzEox)
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230906-2?amount=6&refcode=EMAL06_2_AUG_20230906_V1_F&refcode2=29433_3422442_OpzEox&akid=29433%2E3422442%2EOpzEox)
—Katie Porter HQ

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAL06_2_AUG_20230906_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=29433_3422442_OpzEox&akid=29433%2E3422442%2EOpzEox)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=3&akid=29433%2E3422442%2EOpzEox)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=29433%2E3422442%2EOpzEox)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)

subject: DeSantis-Aligned Super PAC To Launch Ad Touting Plan To Allow ‘Deadly Force’ At Border

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Here’s what will happen if Congressional Republicans get their way and let federal child care funding fall off a cliff.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
I went on CNN to talk about how we can prevent a child care crisis, and I’m fighting for Congress to pass emergency funding.

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=46%2E4032634%2EsmpOw6)
---
Millions of families are on the edge of a child care cliff — and MAGA House Republicans want to send them tumbling down. You see, when the pandemic started, I fought alongside Senator Tina Smith to get emergency funding to child care centers across the country. We won that fight. But much of that funding is set to expire at the end of September. And the GOP-run House isn’t lifting a finger to extend it. If the Republican wrecking-ball crew gets their way...
* At least 3.2 million children would lose their child care
* 70,000 child care programs could shut their doors
* And nearly a quarter of a million child care workers could lose their jobs

**I went on CNN to talk about how we can prevent this child care crisis in the short term — and ensure universal child care in the long run. Watch the video and share it on**[**Facebook**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/437?t=8&akid=46%2E4032634%2EsmpOw6)**,**[**Instagram**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/438?t=9&akid=46%2E4032634%2EsmpOw6)**, or**[**Twitter**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/439?t=10&akid=46%2E4032634%2EsmpOw6)**to help get the word out about this fight.** | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/437?t=11&akid=46%2E4032634%2EsmpOw6)
---
When it comes to child care arrangements, working families are already barely hanging on as it is — struggling to preserve houses of cards that could fall apart with just one light breeze. I’ve been there. When I had two little ones and started my first big teaching job, I thought I was going to have to quit, until my Aunt Bee moved in and rescued me, staying for 16 years.
If millions of parents have to scramble to find new child care, many wouldn’t be able to go to work. Many wouldn’t be able to work a full shift. And that would take a real toll on our economy, with fewer people available to fill jobs.
There’s no reason to let this child care crisis happen. I’m ringing every alarm bell I can find and fighting for Congress to pass emergency funding by September 30.
But make no mistake: even if we win this fight, we’ll have more work to do. Because quality, affordable child care is already far out of reach for far too many Americans. We can’t pour gasoline onto this fire — and we’ve also got to work to put it out.
**I have a plan for that: the Child Care for Every Community Act. Half of all families would pay no more than $10 a day for child care, costs would be capped for everyone, and no one would pay more than 7% of their income. Plus: child care workers would get badly needed, well-deserved raises — getting paid on par with local, similarly credentialed public school teachers.**
We need to build a future for all of our kids — that means putting early education within reach for every family. We need to come together as a nation and invest in basic infrastructure that allows people to go to work — that means investing in roads, bridges, and child care. And we need to recognize that child care workers do some of the most important work in the country — that means paying them what they deserve.
[**Do you have a story about how child care costs are impacting you? Please share here. I would appreciate hearing from you.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/wfs-share-your-child-care-story/?source=EMZ16K_CHD_E_20230906_V1S1_AK_F16&t=12&akid=46%2E4032634%2EsmpOw6)
I’m staying in the fight. And I’m honored to fight by your side.
Thanks for being a part of this,
Elizabeth

name: =?utf-8?Q?Elizabeth=20Helgelien?=
subject: Call to Action: Let’s NOT Be Deceived
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elizabeth for Nevada]( "Paid for by Elizabeth for Nevada")
body:
We must apply our recognition of those whose actions fail to measure up to their words | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f0c529a2c323/elizabeth-helgelien-for-congress-12649835?e=54a81bd33c)
---
| | [ ](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=1dceb0888b&e=54a81bd33c)
---
| Peter,
---
| | _“You shall know them by their works.”_

We’ve paid a painful price in learning the difference between the promises of a politician’s words and how their actions measure up later.

I gave a one minute talk about this recently on [social media](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=e018da8a00&e=54a81bd33c):
---
| [ ](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=4951b18afa&e=54a81bd33c)
---
| What’s shocking is how so many politicians from every political persuasion fail to grasp the reality of working class Americans. And it’s the policies that we didn’t vote them into office to pass or enact that have gotten us to this agonizing economic reality!

**I’m running for Congress to be the voice of working Americans,** and I’m eager to continue my Conservative record of delivering on my promises as I did as a State Senator.

I **WILL** stand up to the lobbying cartel and career politicians and say NO when they want to continue the reckless government spending that has created a financial crisis for our nation and for American families!

I won't make empty promises – I'll fight for your interests every step of the way.

**But to make this change happen, I need your continued grassroots support to face off against my incumbent opponent’s war chest that is backed by the DC lobbying cartel. **

[**Please consider making a donation of ANY amount to our campaign so that we can continue our fight for a better future for all Nevadans.**](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=e0a0fbaab8&e=54a81bd33c)

clean_body: We must apply our recognition of those whose actions fail to measure up to their words | | | | | | Peter, | | “You shall know them by their works.” We’ve paid a painful price in learning the difference between the promises of a politician’s words and how their actions measure up later. I gave a one minute talk about this recently on : | | What’s shocking is how so many politicians from every political persuasion fail to grasp the reality of working class Americans. And it’s the policies that we didn’t vote them into office to pass or enact that have gotten us to this agonizing economic reality! I’m running for Congress to be the voice of working Americans, and I’m eager to continue my Conservative record of delivering on my promises as I did as a State Senator. I WILL stand up to the lobbying cartel and career politicians and say NO when they want to continue the reckless government spending that has created a financial crisis for our nation and for American families! I won't make empty promises – I'll fight for your interests every step of the way. But to make this change happen, I need your continued grassroots support to face off against my incumbent opponent’s war chest that is backed by the DC lobbying cartel. | "CONTRIBUTE TODAY »" | For America, | | Elizabeth Helgelien Candidate for U.S. Congress, NV-3 | | OUR CAMPAIGN’S SEPTEMBER SOCIAL MEDIA CHALLENGE | Peter, grassroots support is key to changing the status quo. Peter,

A key recent poll shows me leading my Democrat opponent Adam Schiff in the U.S. Senate race here in California, where Democrats are indoctrinating our public school children with their gender fluidity propaganda from the very moment they begin their education.

To ensure their indoctrination is not interfered with, **they’re removing you,_the parent_ , from the picture** by preventing school officials from notifying you if your child wants to “transition.”

Thankfully, parents across the state are standing up and fighting back – and, as a parent, **I stand with you 100%.**

[** Eric Early is fighting for Parents' Rights
JOIN THE FIGHT» **](http://links.ericearly.com/u/click?_t=ad21af4bbba74273abaf5a1183f945ac&_m=051fafff8d214a6f87c566b1fab9834b&_e=yVsUQbhrsGS-3UE4wd13eKZDf_omI41OL259amqGdsuclt521coC6SNPMpTv_5sgSaMQtRvhl7JPDY-q5OES6Jkvtj95g8al1GG7d-yyZl0AysheT_vEZaXlT5H2wpTEm6uAXilhV3w8zrHPZz4wy1fijgEEM8VHjuyxK2uWC2H0I_Qrp9pL2hdbtBT1TwFR_B6HDcraEw9lxdV8L1tBBUhiV7t6spJMTMGsx2pBHxrTBGJa97fSXf0pLq4rGUi9R9TYyWC9ZgW8tWH_OTdNDxyQQPoATrfm0Lg16SGq270YMk0uJvlPGNars73e6H44b9dNS-fFiRTk1pQrQl6I9ovMLQnPOsqGip8QG1Y8oeLX_r66t1A13_pIvKPOWeAz)
In the Chino Valley Unified School District, parents and the school board stood up and REQUIRED school officials to notify parents, preserving parental rights and protecting these minor children.

But now, **California Democrats are taking steps once again to attack parents’ rights to protect their children** by suing the Chino Valley USD.

Gavin Newsom, Adam Schiff, and Democrats in California and across America **want control over your children.** They want to force feed them their propaganda and will be more than happy if your child succumbs to constant in-school and social media pressure to change their gender.

**I stand with the Chino Valley USD, I stand with parents in defense of our children, and I stand against Newsom & groomer-in-chief Schiff and their attempts to control our children with their disgusting sexualized education curriculum.**

[**I need your help to defeat Adam Schiff in my race for U.S. Senate and ensure we have a voice in Washington who will fight against the predatory and dangerous gender fluidity agenda and the attack on parents’ rights.**](http://links.ericearly.com/u/click?_t=ad21af4bbba74273abaf5a1183f945ac&_m=051fafff8d214a6f87c566b1fab9834b&_e=yVsUQbhrsGS-3UE4wd13eKZDf_omI41OL259amqGdsuclt521coC6SNPMpTv_5sgSaMQtRvhl7JPDY-q5OES6Jkvtj95g8al1GG7d-yyZl0AysheT_vEZaXlT5H2wpTEm6uAXilhV3w8zrHPZz4wy1fijgEEM8VHjuyxK2uWC2H0I_Qrp9pL2hdbtBT1TwFR_B6HDcraEw9lxdV8L1tBBUhiV7t6spJMTMGsx2pBHxr58gkrV86_CMHUdy04ipI6dJPjVQbLoYfD2uNg6Ig3fWf8FKHCuKmdCqIUSuOfGBEoVvjCj9phT2Epk-TUV6SZ4Bdwxgy9574g9MTqa6TrEymmrVG-B8-QiZQT6fd7KjH0c6DEmuCBweqXFpQ4z-YX)

# ABOUT ERIC EARLY
---
Eric Early is a husband, father, attorney, businessman and son of a Marine. **Not a career politician.** Eric was raised to believe in America’s founding principles of limited government and free markets. He believes that every American should be given the opportunity to fulfill their American Dream, and his parents inspired Eric to achieve his personal goals. As the co-owner and Managing Partner of a nationally recognized law firm, Eric understands how difficult it is to start and run a successful business. As your next US Senator, Eric will work to cut overly-burdensome regulations that get in the way of entrepreneurship and job creation. Eric will stand-up to the Socialist woke interests that control Washington, DC, fight to preserve and protect our Democracy, and fight for ordinary Californians who are being left behind. clean_body: Can you commit to a monthly donation today? Folks, Last year, we successfully defended our Democratic Senate Majority. That was no coincidence. Grassroots supporters stepped up early in the midterm cycle and pitched in what they could to power strong Democrats’ campaigns, from leaders in New Mexico to candidates all across the country. November 2024 may seem like a long time from now, but investing early and consistently will make a powerful difference. That’s why one of the most valuable contributions you can make to a campaign is a recurring donation that we can count on month after month. With so much hanging in the balance, from reproductive rights to the health of our public lands and waters, it’s especially important that we bring in the resources needed to defend our Senate Majority next year. = | = Thanks for your support — knowing we can rely on your contribution on the 6th of every month will help us set our long-term plans into action. — Martin P.S.
